title: Cook's Cellars Extra Dry 187ml 4 Pack
body_html:
Cook's Cellars Champagne Extra Dry

187ml 4 Pack

Cook's Cellars Extra Dry (187ml 4 Pack) is perfect for those solo celebrations when nothing but bubbly will do. Keep your bubbles effervescent with Cook’s Cellars Extra Dry which mixes the springtime flavors of apple, lime and gooseberry for a lip-smacking finish. Pair with Pecorino and asparagus penne for a perfect meal.

title: Stella Rosa Platinum Semi-Sweet Bianco 250ml
body_html:
Stella Rosa Platinum Moscato

250ml Aluminum

Stella Rosa is one of the best brands of wine on the market today and their recently released Stella Rosa Platinum lives up that reputation. This amazing wine was made with some of the best grapes Italy has to offer. The wine has a hint of sweetness that will be satisfying to your taste buds. Use Stella Rosa Platinum at your next dinner party and your guests will be amazed at your fantastic taste.

title: Wilson Creek Brut Sparkling Wine
body_html:
Pop the cork on Wilson Creek's Brut Sparkling Wine, a bubbly and sophisticated wine that's perfect for any celebration. This crisp and refreshing wine is crafted with the finest grapes, showcasing a perfect balance of fruity notes and delicate bubbles.

With its light and airy texture, Wilson Creek's Brut Sparkling Wine is an excellent complement to any meal, whether you're enjoying brunch with your friends or a romantic dinner for two. Its low sugar content and crisp acidity make it a perfect match for seafood, salads, and appetizers.

Indulge in the ultimate luxury with Wilson Creek's Brut Sparkling Wine. The delicate bubbles and refreshing taste will take you on a journey of pure bliss, leaving you craving for more. With every sip, you'll discover why this wine is the perfect addition to your collection. So, order a bottle today and get ready to experience the magic for yourself!

TASTING NOTES

A Sparkling wine made with French Columbard and Chardonnay naturally fermented through secondary fermentation resulting in a crisp, not too dry sparkling wine.

title: Joseph Carr Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Joseph Carr Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

Embrace the elegant world of wine with the Joseph Carr Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon. No experience needed to enjoy its robust flavors and rich bouquet.

Unleash the magic of wine tasting with the splendid Joseph Carr Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon. Perfect for wine beginners and aficionados alike, this masterpiece from the Napa Valley's pristine vineyards offers an inviting gateway into the opulent world of fine wines.

Immerse yourself in the divine symphony of flavors offered by this Cabernet Sauvignon. From the first pour, you'll be captivated by its majestic deep ruby color, signaling a quality wine experience. Swirl your glass to awaken the intense aromas of ripe dark berries, hints of cocoa, and a subtle touch of oak - a tantalizing teaser of the sumptuous taste to come.

When you take your first sip, your palate will be embraced by the full-bodied harmony of rich blackcurrant, plum, and a hint of savory spice. The balanced tannins and vibrant acidity create an extraordinarily smooth and pleasing mouthfeel that leads into a long, satisfying finish with lingering notes of dark chocolate and vanilla.

TASTING NOTES

Opens with bright aromas of cherry compote, black cherry, and fresh pie crust. On the palate, ripe flavors of black cherry, cassis, vanilla, black tea, and hints of dried orange are showcased.

title: Joseph Carr Carneros Chardonnay
body_html:
Joseph Carr Carneros Chardonnay

Delight in the refined charm of the Joseph Carr Carneros Chardonnay. Your journey into the world of fine wine starts here – no expertise required.

Step into the captivating realm of premium wines with the alluring Joseph Carr Carneros Chardonnay. Curated for both wine aficionados and beginners, this remarkable white wine from the lush vineyards of Carneros introduces you to the vibrant medley of flavors and aromas that define the art of wine appreciation.

From the first pour, this Chardonnay enchants with its brilliant, golden hue. A quick swirl of your glass awakens an aromatic bouquet of fresh apple, pear, and a hint of vanilla – a delightful prelude to the splendid tastes that lie ahead.

As you take your first sip, indulge in the symphony of flavors this elegant Chardonnay brings. Juicy white fruits harmonize with nuances of buttery oak and a gentle whisper of spice, all balanced by a refreshing acidity. The medium-bodied wine boasts a creamy texture that gives way to a lingering, delicately toasted finish, leaving a remarkable impression on your palate.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas of green apples, canary melon, and lime. On the palate, a creamy texture and bright fruit flavors are enhanced by notes of honeysuckle,
persimmon and baked pear.

title: Diving Into Hampton Water Rosé 375ml
body_html:
Diving Into Hampton Water Rosé

375ml (Half Bottle)


This unique rose is made primarily from the Grenache grape variety, blended with Cinsault, Mourvedre and Syrah traditional grapes of the French Mediterranean.
The wine is fresh and lively with distinctive minerality and a long lasting finish, intensified by again in French oak barrels. It's intense aroma of red fruit, citrus fruit and spices make it another perfect companion to be shared among friends.

First rosé in the top 100 in Wine Spectator - A nicely crafted rosé, with a hint of creamy richness lining the strawberry, melon and white cherry flavors.

This wine represents the lifestyle, it captures the spirit shared between the Hamptons and the South of France: enjoying life and a good bottle of wine to share with friends.

View The Website | Download The Technical Sheet | Wine Spectator Top 100

title: Stella Rosa Peach Aluminum
body_html:
Top Selling Stella Rosa Peach

Stella Rosa Peach Aluminum

Stella Rosa Peach 250ml Aluminum, capturing the fresh white peach and honey characteristics.

Why Our Stella Rosa Peach by The Best Wine Store

The new Stella Rosa Peach Aluminum's contain natural carbonation using a Charmat-style of fermentation in pressurized tanks, which produces the alcohol and carbonation simultaneously. This fun-sized serving is suitable for all types of activities and lifestyles.

See all Stella Rosa Wines

title: Dérangé Red Blend Napa Valley
body_html:
The Prisoner Wine Derange Red

It is balanced with a perfect harmony of bold and alluring aromas of blackberry, vanilla bean, dark chocolate, caramel and a variety of mixed spices. This complex type of wine is elegant and easy drinking. It's fruity, has a delicate expression and it has finesse. The wine can be paired well with seafood like blackened salmon or lightly seasoned filet mignon.

title: Hello Kitty Pinot Noir
body_html:
Hello Kitty Pinot Noir

The Hello Kitty Pinot Noir wine will remind you of those days where you picked berries and ate them outside when they were still fresh. As you sample this beverage, you'll be tasting those raspberries, cherries, and strawberries all over again. It's a good idea to drink this wine with very natural dishes, including meals that feature mushrooms, pheasant meat, and quail meat.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Director's Wizard of OZ Merlot 2014
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Director's Wizard of OZ Merlot

As a part of the Director’s Great Movies themed series of wine from the Francis Ford Coppola Winery, the Wizard of Oz Merlot will bring to mind the merriment of merry movie with each taste. It has a ripe, strong blackberry flavor that is dominant and formed thanks to Monterey’s climate. The taste of the merlot also offers hints of dark chocolate, oaks, tobacco, and acai berry. The smooth finish also offers hints of toasted oak and caramel. Like the visitors to Oz, Francis Ford Coppola Director's Wizard of Oz Merlot will also leave you happy that you have a brain to taste it, a heart to enjoy it, and a home in which to enjoy it. This delectable merlot pairs best with a spicy dish, a hearty salad, roasted vegetables, and tomato-based Italian dishes such as pizza or pasta. There’s no place like home, and there’s no taste like a glass of the Francis Ford Coppola Director's Wizard of Oz Merlot.

Francis Ford Coppola Director's Wizard of OZ Merlot is a dual appellation variety with hints of black plum, tobacco, blackberry, and exotic oak spices and a finish of dark chocolate salted caramel and warm toasted oak. It pairs well with richly sauced tomato-based Italian dishes, casseroles, and roasted vegetables.

title: Trump Winery Blanc de Blancs
body_html:
Trump Winery Blanc de Blancs

The Trump Winery Blanc de Blancs is an amazing Champagne… it is aged at least 48 months and is made from Chardonnay that is 100% estate grown. When you sip on this wine you will get an awesome taste of a very nice crisp taste along with citrus notes that are sure to please. You will have the sweet taste of green apple, a slight hint of pear and brioche as well. It is aged 95% in stainless steel and 5% French oak.

Trump Winery Blanc de Blancs pairs well with fish or chicken that is deep fried, buttery shellfish or cheese.

title: Orin Swift Slander Pinot Noir
body_html:
Orin Swift Slander Pinot Noir

Your mouth will love you for sipping a ruby red glass of Orin Swift Slander Pinot Noir. It's fun to watch as the strawberry cherry notes sink into the palate and finish with a mysterious hint of Asian spice. This expansive pinot pairs well with beef stew and lingerie on a sultry night by the fire.

title: Orin Swift Papillon Red
body_html:
Orin Swift Papillon Bordeaux Blend

The Orin Swift Papillon Red, sourced from some of Napa Valley’s most iconic vineyard sources, is often tightly allocated. The massive wine, offering inky purple color and notes of espresso roast, creme de cassis, blackberry and a touch of toasty oak, with broad and rich tannins pairs with poultry, red meat, pork, pasta, and salad.

Looking for a touch of elegance? The Orin Swift Papillon Red is your choice. A traditional Napa Valley Cabernet, this well-structured crimson wine has an edge of spicy currant and black cherry.

Orin Swift provides consumers with a fantatsically original blend of flavors in the Papilllon Red. Its creator, Dave Phinney, is an alchemist of unmatched talent and imagination. The Papillon is a result of the high standards and creative genius of the vine master. Unafraid to push boundaries, Dave has catapulted Orin Swift into the magnificent brand it is.

title: Orin Swift Mannequin Chardonnay Wine
body_html:
Orin Swift Mannequin Chardonnay

Dazzle your taste buds with the stunning Orin Swift Mannequin Chardonnay. A blend of Chardonnay, Viognier, Marsanne, Grenache Blanc, Muscat and Roussanne, this full-throttle wine is truly special. With an energetic, complex citrus based profile and tangy, exotic mineral finish, this succulent white wine is the perfect companion for a fruit platter or salmon entree, or savor each drop as an aperitif.

With an energetic citrus based profile and tangy, exotic mineral finish, this succulent white wine is sure to be the shining star of your next soiree.

Dave Phinney’s vibrantly intricate chardonnay, Mannequin Head, is notably unique in that its distinctly complex nature is a reflection of Dave’s vision to create a brilliant multi-dimensional wine. Naturally, Dave’s meticulous fermenting efforts were richly rewarded with the celebrated version of the multi-faceted Mannequin Head’s first true chardonnay.

title: d66 Others Department 66 Grenache
body_html:
d66 Others Department 66 Grenache Orin Swift

Department 66 is an elite winery in France that specializes in the Grenache variety, one of the most beloved red wine varieties in the world. The d66 Others Department 66 Grenache red blend is a medium-bodied, slightly spiced red wine with a delightful bittersweet berry taste.

The spice and bitterness in this Grenache make it a perfect pair with other spicy-savory foods, like Indian or Thai dishes.

title: Westwood Pinot Noir
body_html: Westwood Pinot Noir is characterized by small berries and generally low yields per acre, which results in a more intense color than many Pinot Noirs and a good tannin structure suitable for aging.

title: Westwood Chardonnay
body_html: Westwood Chardonnay with its legacy of eye-popping scores from the wine-reviewing domain, it is no surprise that this limited-production chardonnay has become one of the most popular wines we produce. Rich acidity, bright, focused aromas of fuji apple and Asian pear, and crushed limestone. The 2021 shows spectacular minerality and a viscous,mouth-filling textural quality.

title: Westwood Legend Red Wine
body_html: Westwood Legend Red Wine showing both power and grace, this wine can be consumed now or will reward over the next 5+ years.

title: Roots Run Deep Winery 'Educated Guess' Merlot
body_html:
Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Merlot

The Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Merlot is flavored richly with toffee, black cherry and other berry fruits. Accented with chocolate, plum, toast and vanilla, it has a ripe, low acidic flavor that makes it ideal for an extended period of time. It pairs best with beef and venison.

If you are looking for a rich and delicious red wine, then the Roots Run Deep Winery 'Educated Guess' Merlot may be the right choice for you. The complexity of this wine comes from the combination of flavors including wild berries, chocolate, ripe plums, and oak. Pair the Roots Run Deep Winery 'Educated Guess' Merlot with a juicy steak or a slow-cooked pot roast to really bring the best flavors forward.

title: Don Melchor Cabernet Sauvignon 2013
body_html:
Don Melchor Cabernet Sauvignon 2013

Chilean wine is a nearly sacrilegious offering at a dinner party if you were attending a dinner party in neighboring Argentina. However, Don Melchor's winemaker embraces the Cabernet Sauvignon grape provided by Puente Alto in the Maipo Valley. Pair its ripe tannins and plum flavors with Argentine beef or comfortably serve with Patagonian lamb if really looking to anger an Argentinian who thinks everything needs to be Malbec.

title: Beau Joie Demi Sec Sugar King
body_html:
Beau Joie Demi Sec Sugar King

Bertrand Senecourt Beau Joie Special Cuvee Sugar King Demi-Sec pours with a gorgeous deep rose color, brimming with watermelon, strawberry and citrus notes. Fresh and fruity, with a vibrant structure and delicate mousse that keep it focused and lively, with a long, crisp finish. Very brut for a rose champagne, it pairs well with fish dishes and light deserts. The bottle itself is wrapped in copper, reminisent of a suit of armor worn by the knights of the Kingdom.

Known as the Sugar King, the blend is a pale gold color tinged with pink. Its flavor is fruity and well-constituted with a marked elegance and youthfulness.

title: Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Merlot
body_html:
Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Merlot

Experience the captivating allure of Fat Bastard Merlot Wine, an exquisite showcase of French winemaking excellence. This full-bodied Merlot is the epitome of elegance and sophistication, making it the ideal companion for dinner parties, romantic evenings, or simple moments of relaxation.

Fat Bastard Merlot Wine bursts with rich, velvety flavors of ripe black fruits, balanced beautifully by subtle hints of vanilla and cocoa. This bold Merlot leaves an indelible impression on the palate with its plush tannins and satisfyingly long finish. It's a tantalizing indulgence that reveals the true depth of its character with every sip.

TASTING NOTES

Deep ruby red. Elegant black fruit aromas (plum and cherry) followed by subtle spicy nuances of caraway and black pepper. On the palate, it is fresh, supple and juicy. Structured finish with spicy and lightly wooden notes.

title: Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Rose
body_html:
Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Rose

Discover the delightful charm of Fat Bastard Rosé Wine. This excellent Rosé is a true blend of crisp, fruity vibrance, and a hint of floral elegance, perfect for those who appreciate the finer things in life. Hailing from the acclaimed vineyards of France, Fat Bastard Rosé is the quintessential wine for all celebrations, casual dinners, or quiet nights in.

This stunning Rosé embodies a harmonious balance between tantalizing raspberry and cherry flavors, layered with subtle notes of spice for a robust yet smooth finish. Expertly crafted, it boasts a refreshing acidity and delightful finish that will captivate the senses. Whether you're a wine connoisseur or a casual sipper, you'll fall in love with the well-rounded complexity of Fat Bastard Rosé.

TASTING NOTES

Intense pink with purple-blue hues. Complex and expressive with intense raspberry and strawberry notes. Round and full on the palate with ripe red fruits and a long, fresh finish.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Riesling
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Riesling

Dive into a sensational journey of flavor with Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Riesling – the liquid poetry that's set to enthrall your senses, one enticing sip at a time.

This Indian Wells Riesling is the pride of Washington State's wine craft, meticulously curated by Chateau Ste. Michelle, the region's premier wine estate renowned for its commitment to exceptional quality and innovation. Sourced from the radiant, sun-kissed vineyards of Indian Wells, this Riesling delivers an unmatched depth of flavor that will undoubtedly captivate your palate.

Unveiling a captivating aroma that dances with hints of juicy peaches, ripe apricots, and a touch of honey, this charismatic Riesling offers an invitation you can't resist. On the palate, savor an ensemble of luscious tropical fruits and crisp apple flavors that glide seamlessly into a refreshingly tangy citrus finish.

TASTING NOTES

Light sweetness balanced by bright flavors of stone fruit and crisp citrus create a refreshingly elegant Riesling crafted from top Yakima Valley vineyards showcasing the signature fruit-forward style.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Chardonnay
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Chardonnay

Experience the epitome of sublime sophistication with Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Chardonnay – the golden elixir that promises a voyage of vinous delight, one sip at a time.

Our Indian Wells Chardonnay is a radiant beacon of Washington State viticulture, expertly produced by Chateau Ste. Michelle, a wine estate synonymous with exceptional quality and uncompromising standards. This luxurious Chardonnay is a triumph of the sun-drenched vineyards of Indian Wells, which impart an unprecedented depth of flavor into every bottle.

Aromatically enticing, this tantalizing Chardonnay swirls with a bouquet of ripe tropical fruits and a whisper of toasted oak. Upon your first sip, an orchestra of succulent mango, pineapple, and creamy vanilla notes envelop your palate, harmoniously balanced with a lush, buttery texture and a delicate kiss of well-integrated oak. The finale is a lasting, elegant finish that marries the crispness of vibrant fruit with the richness of creamy textures.

TASTING NOTES

Specially selected and carefully aged, our Indian Wells Chardonnay balances tropical fruit and creamy butterscotch flavors with a hint of toasted oak.

title: Barefoot On Tap Pinot Noir 3 Liter
body_html:
Discover the enchantment of California's wine country with our Barefoot On Tap Pinot Noir 3 Liter. This distinctive red wine encapsulates the spellbinding charm of the coastal vineyards and the unforgettable season that graced them.

Luxuriate in the silky smoothness of our Pinot Noir, a medium-bodied red that is as seductive as a Californian sunset. Immerse yourself in the bewitching bouquet of ripe cherries, wild strawberries, and soft hints of toasty oak. The flavors are gracefully intertwined, promising a harmonious symphony of taste that lingers long after the final sip.

The Barefoot On Tap Pinot Noir 3 Liter perfectly captures the splendor of a remarkable vintage and the heavenly ambiance of coastal California. Its generous size ensures that you can share this delight with friends and family, transforming every occasion into a special one.

title: Barefoot On Tap Riesling 3 Liter
body_html:
Experience the essence of a Californian summer with our Barefoot On Tap Riesling 3 Liter. This delectable wine takes you on a transcendent journey to the sunlit vineyards of California's world-renowned wine regions, during a season where the grapes were exceptionally lush and the weather, divine.

Barefoot On Tap Riesling hails from the vineyards of Central Valley, where the soils are ripe with minerals, and the days are filled with radiant sunshine. Picture a brilliant summer, marked by cloudless skies and the vivacious hustle of grape harvest. This was the auspicious year when this Riesling was birthed, a year so memorable, its essence was immortalized in every 3 Liter box.

This lively Riesling is renowned for its refreshingly light body and an enchanting array of flavors. Invigorate your palate with vibrant notes of ripe peaches, juicy pears, and a hint of zesty citrus. Each sip is a delightful dance between sweetness and acidity, resulting in a wine that’s perfectly balanced and incredibly refreshing.

title: Barefoot Buttery Chardonnay
body_html:
Born from vines deeply rooted in the fertile soils of Sonoma and Napa Valley, our Barefoot Buttery Chardonnay shines with a golden hue, mimicking the setting sun of its birthplace. Each bottle invites you to experience the lushness of an ideal vintage year, promising an enlivening aroma that captivates your senses before the first sip.

Our Buttery Chardonnay boasts a creamy, full-bodied texture and an enchanting flavor profile. You'll discover notes of freshly baked apple pie, tropical pineapple, and a hint of vanilla spice – a complex tapestry that reflects the rich landscapes of its origin. Crisp, clean acidity gives way to a luxuriously long finish that leaves you yearning for the next divine sip.

Engage your senses with Barefoot Buttery Chardonnay. Immerse yourself in the romance of Californian winemaking and taste the spirit of a blissful, sun-kissed season bottled up in our alluring white wine.

title: Angeline Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Angeline Cabernet Sauvignon

Savor the refined taste of the Angeline Cabernet Sauvignon, your perfect partner for memorable celebrations. Crafted in the sun-soaked vineyards of California, this luxurious red wine promises a full-bodied experience for all wine enthusiasts.

Every sip of the Angeline Cabernet Sauvignon draws you in with a captivating bouquet of rich blackberry, ripe cherries, and subtle hints of roasted coffee. The delightful fusion of flavors unfolds on the palate with a blend of dark fruit, gentle tannins, and a whisper of sweet oak. It's a wine that echoes the complexity and depth of the region from where it hails.

Perfectly balanced and finely structured, this Cabernet Sauvignon is a testament to the art of winemaking. It's an elegant choice for your dinner table, complementing a wide array of dishes, from hearty red meat to delicate seafood, creating a symphony of tastes that will leave you and your guests wanting more.

TASTING NOTES

Rich notes of fresh boysenberry, cassis, and a touch of light cocoa.

title: Angeline Reserve Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Angeline Reserve Sauvignon Blanc

Indulge in the crisp, invigorating taste of the Angeline Reserve Sauvignon Blanc. Born in California's esteemed vineyards, this white wine offers a distinct, fresh experience for wine enthusiasts and casual sippers alike.

Beautifully crisp and superbly elegant, our Sauvignon Blanc mirrors the tranquility and bounty of its Californian homeland. It pairs harmoniously with an assortment of dishes, making it the perfect companion for your seafood, poultry, or summertime salad.

Take a dive into the vibrant world of white wine with the Angeline Reserve Sauvignon Blanc. It's more than a bottle of wine; it's a testament to Californian winemaking excellence. Revel in the clean, fresh flavors and elevate your dining experience to a whole new level.

TASTING NOTES

Crafted from cool-climate vineyards throughout California, our Sauvignon Blanc is full of zesty key lime, gooseberry, tart apple, and hints of citron, with herbaceous notes and vibrant acidity
throughout.

title: Acrobat Rosé
body_html:
Acrobat Rosé

Step into the extraordinary world of extravagant wine experiences with Acrobat Rosé, a splendid creation crafted especially for the taste buds of the ultra-rich and famous. This fabulous wine symbolizes elegance and luxury, offering a delightful adventure through the romantic vineyards of Oregon.

Acrobat Rosé is not just any wine; it is a luxurious expression of refined taste and exceptional craftsmanship. This rosé is a product of dedication and passion, showcasing the subtle nuances of Oregon's fertile vineyards, and standing as a testament to the vibrant spirit of the Acrobat brand.

This rosé begins its journey with carefully selected grapes, delicately harvested at the peak of ripeness to preserve their intense flavors and vibrant aromas. The handpicked fruit then undergoes a meticulous vinification process, led by our talented winemakers, resulting in a rosé that perfectly balances elegance and vivacity.

TASTING NOTES

Fresh cut strawberries with a hint of lime. The palate is laser focused with bright flavors of fresh strawberries, tropical fruit and lime zest, with a pleasant structure of lively, clean acidity.

title: Acrobat Pinot Noir
body_html:
Acrobat Pinot Noir

Acrobat Pinot Noir is more than just a wine. It's a testament to the intricate balance of nature, art, and utmost precision, embodying the audacious spirit of its namesake. Crafted from Oregon's finest vineyards, this pinot noir is the perfect blend of nature's bounty and man's genius, creating a masterpiece that effortlessly stands out in the crowded world of fine wines.

The voyage begins with the careful selection of the best Pinot Noir grapes, picked at the perfect moment to capture their inherent essence. Our dedicated vintners then skillfully transform these grapes into a delightful wine that retains the natural flavors and delicate complexities of the fruit.

TASTING NOTES

Raspberry, red currant, black cherry, and baking spice.

title: Chloe Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Chloe Sauvignon Blanc

Each sip of Chloe Sauvignon Blanc unveils a radiant palette of alluring flavors. Delight in the crisp notes of passionfruit, ripe citrus, and a hint of fresh-cut grass, enhanced by a backdrop of elegant minerality. Its balanced acidity and bright, refreshing finish deliver an enticing symphony of tastes, elevating the wine-drinking experience to extraordinary new heights.

Whether you're enjoying a gourmet dinner on your private island, hosting an intimate gathering in your penthouse suite, or celebrating a milestone aboard your luxury yacht, the Chloe Sauvignon Blanc is the ultimate companion. Its unique sophistication and captivating taste make it a beloved choice among the rich and famous, and a remarkable gift for those with a taste for the extraordinary.

TASTING NOTES

Tropical fruit aromas and layers of fresh citrus, ripe lychee and juicy pineapple delight the palate, culminating with a crisp, refreshing finish.

title: Yellow Tail Buttery Chardonnay
body_html:
Yellow Tail Buttery Chardonnay

Every sip of Yellow Tail Buttery Chardonnay unveils a rich palette of irresistible flavors. Revel in the elegant notes of creamy peach, ripe melon, and a touch of tropical fruit, complemented by a whisper of delicate vanilla. Its well-rounded buttery texture and subtle oak finish weave an intricate tapestry of sensations, delivering an unparalleled and indulgent experience.

Presented in a striking bottle adorned with the iconic kangaroo emblem, the Yellow Tail Buttery Chardonnay exudes an aura of exclusivity and prestige. Its vibrant golden label is a visual testament to the luxurious journey housed within, making it an impressive addition to any high-end wine collection.

Style
A twist on an all-time favorite, [yellow tail] Buttery Chardonnay is full of flavor with a rich and buttery finish.

Aroma
Rich buttery aromas complimented with notes of vanilla and butterscotch.

Flavor
Rich and buttery, with hints of smooth vanilla and toasted oak.

Enjoy
with a creamy pasta or a cheese platter shared with friends.

title: Yellow Tail Rosé
body_html:
Yellow Tail Rosé

Step into a world of sheer luxury with the Yellow Tail Rosé - an extravagant embodiment of elegance born from the esteemed vineyards of Australia. This lavish rosé wine speaks to the discerning tastes of the influential and esteemed, offering an experience that is simply unmatched.

Each sip of the Yellow Tail Rosé unfolds a captivating bouquet of flavors. Delight in the tantalizing notes of fresh strawberries and cherries, intertwined with a whisper of spice. Its delicate sweetness, balanced by a lively acidity, creates a stunning harmony that is both enthralling and satisfying.

Style
Rosé is a highly versatile wine that continues to grow in popularity. It's vibrant and refreshing, perfect on its own or with a meal.

Aroma
Fresh aromas of strawberry, honey dew melon and light notes of musk and raspberry.

Flavor
Crisp and delicate, blossoming with juicy strawberries and cherry flavors.

Enjoy
Slightly chilled with grilled fish or chicken on a sunny day.

title: Yellow Tail Pink Moscato
body_html:
Yellow Tail Moscato

Discover the mesmerizing world of luxury with Yellow Tail Pink Moscato - an epitome of opulence crafted meticulously in Australia's renowned vineyards. This exclusive pink moscato is a symbol of sophistication and elegance, designed explicitly for the lavish tastes of the rich and prominent.

The Yellow Tail Pink Moscato is a seductive dance of flavors. Every sip unveils luscious notes of juicy strawberry, succulent pear, and a hint of zesty lemon, embraced by a kiss of enchanting floral undertones. Its charming sweetness and sprightly bubbles create a symphony of sensations, delivering an immersive and thrilling wine-drinking experience.

Style
Unbelievably delicious, [yellow tail] Pink Moscato has a tantalizing light fizz that dances on your tongue and tapers into a finish that is fresh and crisp.

Aroma
Delightful aromas of strawberry, musk and pomegranate.

Flavor
Zingy and refreshing, bursting with ripe strawberries and red apple flavours.

Enjoy
Well chilled on its own, or with your favourite dessert.

title: Yellow Tail Riesling
body_html:
Yellow Tail Riesling

Unleash your senses with the unparalleled allure of Yellow Tail Riesling – a bold statement of luxury crafted in the prestigious vineyards of Australia. This exceptional white wine is a beacon of grandeur and exclusivity, curated meticulously for the discerning palettes of the wealthy and illustrious.

Style
This [yellow tail] Riesling is everything a great wine should be – vibrant, fresh and easy to drink.

Aroma
A fragrant aroma of lemon, citrus and floral combine to create a delicious fruit mix.

Flavor
Fresh and vibrant, bursting with juicy green apple, citrus and floral notes.

Enjoy
With freshly grilled fish on a warm afternoon.

title: Yellow Tail Smooth Red Blend
body_html:
Yellow Smooth Red Blend

Experience the unrivaled luxury of the Yellow Tail Smooth Red Blend - a true masterpiece that caters to the discerning tastes of the affluent and the celebrated. Crafted with exceptional care in Australia's prestigious vineyards, this impeccable red blend is the ultimate symbol of sophistication and grandeur.

Every sip of the Yellow Tail Smooth Red Blend reveals a harmonious symphony of ripe red berries, succulent plums, and a dash of spice. The velvety mouthfeel is accompanied by subtle notes of oak and vanilla, creating a remarkable sensory experience that transcends ordinary wine drinking. Its full-bodied richness and smooth, elegant finish make it a treasured gem among wine lovers.

Style
This [yellow tail] Smooth Red Blend is everything a great wine should be – lush, vibrant and easy to drink.

Aroma
A fruit forward aroma of red cherry, blackberry and raspberry with a hint of spicy vanilla oak.

Flavor
Smooth and velvety, with notes of cherries, blackberries and a hint of liquorice and spice.

Enjoy
With lamb and good conversation.

title: Yellow Tail Jammy Red Roo
body_html:

C.C. Ranch is planted in Rutherford, along the slope of a knoll west of the Silverado Trail. The vineyard grows classic Rutherford Cabernet Sauvignon on well-drained, gravelly loam soil and receives a variety of exposures, depending on the block and location. The vines are well balanced and the canopy is opened up to give good light exposure. Nickel & Nickel produces wine from 15 select acres of this 115-acre vineyard.

title: Mionetto Prosecco Rosé
body_html:
Mionetto Prestige Prosecco Rosé is a sparkling wine made from a blend of Glera and Pinot Noir grapes. It is produced using the Charmat method, which involves secondary fermentation in pressurized tanks. This results in a wine with fine bubbles and a delicate, fruity flavor.

The wine has a pale pink color with hints of peach and apricot. The nose is dominated by red fruit aromas, such as raspberry and strawberry. On the palate, the wine is fresh and lively, with a good balance of acidity and sweetness. The finish is long and lingering, with a hint of spice.

Mionetto Prestige Prosecco Rosé is perfect for any occasion. It can be enjoyed as an aperitif, with light appetizers, or as a dessert wine. It is also a popular choice for weddings and other special events.

If you are looking for a delicious and versatile sparkling wine, Mionetto Prestige Prosecco Rosé is a great choice. It is sure to please everyone at your next gathering.

APPEARANCE:

AROMA:
Fruity bouquet with evident notes of honey, berries and citrus.

PALATE:
Well-balanced acidity with refreshing notes of red berries and grapefruit with elegant fine bubbles.

Enjoy on its own as an aperitif, with appetizers and with fresh seafood, grilled fish and ideal with risotto.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Rosso & Bianco Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Rosso & Bianco Pinot Grigio

The Francis Ford Coppola Rosso & Pinot Grigio is a refreshing Pinot Grigio that was made to be a replicate of the Pinot Grigio that the Coppola family drinks during their meals. It is named for the gray color that the grapes turn when they are fully ripened. This wine is light, crisp, and versatile and it also has full, ripened flavors and balanced acidity. There are some good foods to feast on when drinking this Pinot Grigio.

Pinot Grigio goes well with light foods. One of them is melon and ham. You just take a slice of melon and wrap it with a slice of prosciutto. Lobster rolls and artichoke dip (especially a lemon artichoke dip) go well with this wine. Lastly, sushi (all kinds of sushi served with rice and crunchy vegetables), and summer soups like Gazpacho, tomato basil, chilled cucumber soup, and corn chowder) all go well with this wine because it is a light and delicate wine. If you feast on this foods with the Francis Ford Coppola Pinot Grigio, your feast will be a fantastic one.

title: 19 Crimes Martha's Chard Chardonnay
body_html:
19 Crimes Martha's Chard Chardonnay tells the true story of heroes who beat the odds and overcame adversity to become folk heroes. And while the wines are a product, they're also more than that. They're named after rebels and misfits of history—characters ranging from 19th-century robbers in Chinese mythology to contemporary people like Martha Stewart.

19 Crimes tells the true story of heroes who beat the odds and overcame adversity to become folk heroes. This spirit lives on today through innovators like Martha Stewart, a self-made icon who built a domestic empire. Martha’s drive embodies the timeless values of the 19 Crimes mavericks who came before her.

title: Opus One 2018 California Red Wine
body_html:
Only the best grapes go into making Opus One. Our winemaking conforms to exacting standards that produce consistently exceptional wines. Only by using the finest fruit are we able to offer you this complex, intense wine brimming with layers of ripe fruit flavors.

For over 35 years, from the Napa Valley of California, former winemaker Daniel Baron of Chateau Montelena has been crafting wines for Opus One. For his latest vintage, Baron has crafted a blend of Syrah and Grenache with a touch of Merlot and Petit Verdot to create a California wine with rich aromas of blackberry and hints of cedar and mocha with a dry finish.

title: Opus One 2016 Magnum
body_html: The Opus One 2016 is remarkably elegant and bright offering sumptuous aromas of fresh red and blue fruit, baking spices and vanilla, and a delicate fragrance of spring florals. The initial bouquet is augmented by more nuanced notes of sage, rosemary, and black olive. Juicy flavors of black cherry, blackberry and cassis flood the palate and creamy, fine-grained tannins deliver a delightfully round structure. Harmonious and lively, the flavors linger to create an enduring finish with touches of dark chocolate and espresso.

title: Frank Family Chardonnay
body_html:
Frank Family Chardonnay

Since the founding of our winery in 1992, our family has poured our passion for land, grape growing and winemaking into each and every bottle of Frank Family Vineyards wine. Today we own over 450 acres of the finest vineyard land checkerboarded throughout the beautiful Napa Valley. This allows us to control quality and cultivate sustainably on our own estate and enables our winemaker. Todd Groff, to blend perfectly balanced wines. With a commitment to crafting the finest representation of Napa Valley wines, we hope to create a legacy for generations to come.

Next time you are in the Napa Valley, stop by the Frank Family tasting room to raise a glass with us. We are regarded by many to be the friendliest tasting room experience in wine country, and it is a big part of why we have cultivated many loyal followers. Our 19 the century stone winery is listed on the Register of National Historic Places, and the surrounding elm trees provide a lovely setting for a lazy afternoon picnic. You are invited anytime.

Many thanks for brining our wine to the table. Cheers, from our family to yours. The Frank Family: Rich and Leslie, Paul, Darryl and Vanessa, and our grandchildren Lewis, Stella, Jeremy and Benjamin

body_html:
Harken Pinot Noir

Harken Pinot Noir is Harken’s tribute to the delicate grape, notable for its understated beauty and elegant profile.

Aromas of ripe cherries, raspberries and dried herbs. Extended aging on tightly grained French oak imparts harmonious aromas of clove and spice with a satin structured palate.

Pair with wild mushroom risotto, herb crusted pork loin, coq au vin and dark chocolate

We created Harken Pinot Noir because we missed the classic taste of Pinot Noirs gone by. At some point, someone decided "bigger is better." We think that's crazy. So we crafted our Pinot Noir the old-fashioned way, with oak barrels and world-class fruit. No added sugar, no nonsense and no fakes. Welcome to Harken Pinot Noir - made the way you remember.

title: Soto Sake Can 180ml
body_html:
Soto Premium Junmai 180ML Can Sake

Soto, meaning "outside" in Japanese, is a celebration of the earth's purest elements brought together to make this premium quality all-natural product. Serve chilled and enjoy straight, in cocktails, or while dining.

TASTING NOTES: CLEAN AND LIGHT ON THE PALATE, APPLE, SOFT RICE, TOUCH OF UMAMI NOSE: CLEAN, FRESH AROMATICS, APPLE, NOUGAT ALL NATURAL
GLUTEN FREE
NO ADDITIVES
NO PRESERVATIVES

NO SULFITES

title: Luc Belaire Bleu
body_html:
Luc Belaire Bleu

Luc Belaire Bleu is a truly unique cuvée with a taste and color like no other wine. Belaire Bleu’s bottle is both striking and elegant. Remarkable sapphire blue color with aromas of fresh berries and tropical fruits. Round and fruit-forward on the palate with more fresh berry notes and a clean finish. It is effortlessly drinkable, mixable, and extraordinary both in the glass and on the palate.

title: Chateau "The Montelena Estate" Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Chateau Montelena Estate Cabernet Sauvignon 2016

Rich notes of cocoa, hazelnut, and Earl Grey. Velvety tannins and bright acid bookend a youthful and vibrant palate. Filled with blackberry sorbet, plum sauce, and strawberry jam. Baking spices on the finish along with coffee bean, star anise, and a caramel like sweetness.

The 2016 Estate will drink well with minimal cellaring.

Blend: 99% Cabernet Sauvignon, 1% Cabernet Franc

title: Chateau Montelena Chardonnay
body_html:
Chateau Montelena Chardonnay

The wine opens with cinnamon and ripe peach, bolstered by aromas of melon, fig, and pear. Plenty of honeysuckle and spice, softening to green apple and vanilla. Bright and fresh, ripe apricot along with orange marmalade lend a slight sweetness peppered by toasted almond and clove.

title: Terra d'Oro Deaver Vineyard Zinfandel
body_html:
Terra d'Oro Deaver Vineyard Zinfandel

Mild temperatures throughout the growing season allowed for slow even ripening, resulting in rich Zinfandels with fresh fruit characteristics and mature tannins. The Terra d’Oro Deaver Zinfandel showcases warm, inviting earthy notes of oregano, white pepper, clove, vanilla, black cherry, dark cocoa and smoke on the nose. The palate is invigorated with velvety tannins leading into a balanced midpalate and spicy finish.

With age comes grace and over time, the vines have self-regulated and do not grow as wildly as new vine Zinfandel. Winemakers with old vine Zinfandel experience take pride in the careful selection of yeast strains and pumpover techniques designed to extract the flavor and character of the grapes unique to this vineyard.

title: Chandon Garden Spritz
body_html:
Chandon Garden Spritz

No artificial flavors and no artificial colorants are used at any stage in its production. Our blend is crafted purposely to make it simply and naturally delicious.

Ready-to-chill and ready-to-share, Garden Spritz is the blend of an exceptional sparkling wine and a unique bitters recipe crafted with handpicked fresh oranges macerated with dry orange peels, herbs and spices carefully selected from the finest terroirs in the world. Enjoy our Garden Spritz.

title: Chandon Garden Spritz Mini 187ml
body_html:
Chandon Garden Spritz

Mini 187ml

We’re thrilled to bring you the Garden Spritz – a blend of multi-awarded Chandon sparkling, with the twist of house-made bitters, crafted with fresh Valencia oranges. The Garden Spritz is a refined spritz for those seeking new frontiers in their glass, authentically handcrafted by our winemaking team in Mendoza, Argentina. This perfectly balanced and ready-to-enjoy refreshment brings nature to the world of spritz – and is liable to become your new staple for brunch, picnicking, aperitif, or whenever.

One of the best parts of the Garden Spritz is that the mixology is already in the bottle. It’s ready to chill, bring wherever the moment (or the sunshine) takes you, and enjoy with the pop of a cork (no wine opener needed). So, that leaves us with the question: Where will the Garden Spritz take you?

Austin Hope RESEREVE Paso Robles Cabernet Sauvignon

I Grew up in Paso Robles tending vines alongside my father, who made a living farming grapes. Today the place I call home is surrounded by those same vineyards my family has farmed for nearly 40 years.

This Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon has been crafted using a select few barrels that I put aside while making the Austin Hope Cabernet Sauvignon. I felt that these few select barrels had immense potential to gain even more special qualities with some extended aging in new French oak barrels. 

Enjoy!

title: Charles Heidsieck Blanc des Millenaires
body_html:
FRUIT OF A GENEROUS HARVEST, easily revealed itself as a "Typiquement Charles” year. The House boasts a long history in the art of producing great vintage wines ever since its first in 1874.

AN EXCEPTIONAL VINTAGE CHAMPAGNE
Throughout all of France, the harvests were magnificent. The harvest in Champagne was particularly successful due to a cold, dry winter, an early heat wave in June that promoted flowering, a reasonable amount of rainfall in the summer and, finally, a return to high temperatures in early September, ideal for ripening the grapes.

If you were not as original or as much of a connoisseur as Charles, you would not be reading these lines.

TO THE EYE
The deep golden robe presents a delicate, lively effervescence. A voluptuous impression.

ON THE NOSE
Warm and autumn-like, the nose offers fragrances of candied chestnuts and honey with surprising notes of praline and lightly toasted hazelnuts.

ON THE PALATE
The incredible balance offers the firmness expected of a great champagne as well as the opulence of autumn with generous flavours of roasted apricots, dates and figs which delicately coat the palate.

title: Stella Rosa ASTI
body_html:
Stella Rosa ASTI (DOCG)
Denominazione di Origine Controllata e Garantita

Denominazione di Origine Controllata e Garantita (DOCG), is the highest quality level. The DOCG designation was created in 1980 in response to criticisms that there were too many DOCs and their quality was variable. DOCG wines, in contrast, were to be truly the best of what Italian wines could offer.

title: Stella Rosa Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Stella Rosa Pinot Grigio

Stella Rosa Pinot Grigio is the pride of Northern Italy, Grapes for Stella Rosa are grown in the beautiful valleys near the Trentino mountains. The rugged landscape produces our perfectly balanced and adaptable wine that's perfect for all occasions. Crisp and dry with flavourful hints of honey, green apple and pear. Enjoy our handcrafted Stella Rosa Pinot Grigio with your favorite appetizers, grilled chicken, salads and light Italian dishes.

OVERVIEW

You’re not like everyone else - when others say no you say yes. And Stella Rosa’s new Pinot Grigio is just like you! It’s different yet exciting. Our very first still wine is everything you look for in life, it takes you on a thrilling adventure with each crisp sip. Once you go Pinot, you’ll never look back.

Unlike the rest of the Stella Rosa brand that is semi-sweet and semi-sparkling, our Pinot Grigio is dry like traditional wines. With 12% ABV, this Italian wine is best served chilled.

FLAVOR PROFILE
Honey, green apple, and pear.

SIZE VARIATIONS
750 ml – Perfect to share with a few loved ones… Or just yourself, that’s okay too!

FOOD PAIRING RECOMMENDATIONS
Pinot Grigio is perfect alongside appetizers, grilled chicken, and salads.

title: St. Supéry Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
St. Supéry Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

Harvested from our sustainably farmed Napa Valley estate vineyards, the fruit is sorted by cluster, then by berry to ensure only the finest fruit is chosen. An early spring kicked off the growing season and was followed by warm days ad some late summer heat, resulting in wines of opulence and density. Aged for 19 months in French oak barrels, this is a well-balanced and structured wine flavors of black plum, cassis and coffee bean.

TASTING NOTES

Opulent purple and red hues present this wine. Cassis, black plum and dark raspberry aromas combine with anise and subtle vanilla, evidence of the toasted oak maturation. Juicy blackberry and black currant flavors mingle with dark cocoa, black licorice, espresso and subtle toasted oak. This textured and elegantly structured cabernet sauvignon exhibits a velvety tannin finish.

What to pair this Cabernet with

title: Apothic Pinot Noir
body_html:
APOTHIC Pinot Noir with a Dark Side

Inspired by the "Apotheca", a mysterious place where some of the earliest wine was blended and stored. Apothic Wines offers a truly unique wine experience.

Pinot Noir:
Pinot Noir has been described as the minx of the vineyard, an elusive grape that captivates the senses. Apothic Pinot Noir features layer of vanilla, dark cherry and raspberry and leaves you with a soft, luscious finish.

Deep and dark cherry aromas meet with root beer and Dr Pepper spice on the nose of this bottling. There is a licorice kick to the dark berry flavors of the palate, which is pleasant

body_html:

Crafted in the heart of Italy, La Marca Prosecco Rosé sparkles with lively effervescence. Shining from the first toast to the last sip, our playful pop of pink offers an effervescent new way to enjoy Prosecco. Offering the bright, crisp fruit and floral essence of our traditional Prosecco with the delicate elegance of Pinot Noir, La Marca Prosecco Rosé sparkles with our classic notes of fresh-picked citrus, honeysuckle, peach and pear, blending with hints of ripe red cherry, raspberry and wild strawberry. Refreshing and zesty, this bubbly is perfect for lively soirées and spontaneous celebrations.

title: Korbel Prosecco DOC
body_html:
Top Selling Sparkling Wine

Korbel Prosecco DOC Extra Dry Sparkling Wine

Delicate and aromatic, Italian Glera grapes are plucked from steep hillsides to create the charming, fun-loving sparkling wine called Prosecco. At Korbel, we’re overjoyed to bring you our latest release—Korbel Prosecco—produced and bottled entirely in Italy’s Prosecco DOC, an official zone of origin and quality.

See More Korbel Prosecco Ideas

Translation: delicious fun. In keeping with our “house style”—fruit up front, bubbles light, flavors bright—Korbel Prosecco is lively and lighthearted, yet refined. Pop the cork, pour a glass, and be greeted with the exuberant aromas of white peach, pear blossom, and lemon zest. On the tongue, the bubbles come alive with delicately vibrant flavors and an Extra Dry-style finish. In other words, this is a sparkling wine that inspires jubilation for every occasion.

See ALL Korbel Sparkling Wine Ideas

title: Ravenswood Mendocino Old Vine Zinfandel
body_html:
Top Selling Zinfadel

Ravenswood Mendocino County Old Vine Zinfandel

For over 35 years, Ravenswood has delivered classically crafted Zinfandels of exceptional quality and soul from Old Vines in the best Zinfandel vineyards on Earth.

Our Mendocino County Zin hails from vine nurtured by cobbly red loam soil in an area known for its short, warm days and cool nights.

See More Zinfadel Products

Our wine creates the no-holds-barred, bright and fruit characteristics

These conditions create the no-holds-barred, bright and fruit characteristics typical of the region. Vibrant cherry and cassis layered with notes of toasty oak, clove and cardamom mingle together deliciously, resolving into a long, smooth finish.

title: Sandeman Don Fino Sherry
body_html:
Sandeman Don Fino Sherry

Given its name, it should come as no surprise to learn that Sandeman Don Fino Sherry is made using Palamino grapes grown near the town of Jerez de la Frontera, which can be found in the Andalushia region of Spain. The result is both crisp and refreshing, which make it excellent as an appetizer as well as a pairing with seafood dishes.

body_html:

Finished with hints of nectarine, red apple, and zesty citrus, our versatile Brut Rosé pairs perfectly with everything from fresh fruit to terrific takeout.

title: Yalumba The Y Series Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
The Y Series

Cabernet Sauvignon
South Australia

The Y Series represents a collection of iconic classics and exciting new varietals. Each authentically crafted with fruit from South Australia's most celebrated wine regions. The tractor is the essential workhorse in the vineyard, which is why we have chosen it to represent our Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Josh Cellars Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Josh Cellars Pinot Grigio

This delicious Pinot Grigio features flavors of citrus and passionfruit. It is crisp and bright, with hints of green apple and pear. Pairs well with lighter fare and is best shared with loved ones.

title: Josh Cellars Prosecco
body_html:
Josh Cellars Prosecco

Joseph Carr, Founder and Son

We made this Josh Cellars Prosecco with the same care and uncompromising commitment to quality instilled in me by my father Josh. Made from grapes in the Prosecco DOC region of Northeastern Italy, the wine has refreshing acidity and a touch of sweetness from the ripe fruit. You may smell scents of pear, green apple and citrus. In the mouth, the light effervescence provides a vibrant, racy texture. Its a sparkling wine we make for your family, friends and in honor of the man I called Dad.

title: Josh Cellars Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Josh Cellars Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet

Our Josh Cellars Reserve Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon is made with our award-winning Cabernet Sauvignon. By again in oak bourbon barrels for two months, the wine is enhanced with subtle notes of caramel, vanilla, and a hint of bourbon. The resulting Cabernet Sauvignon is bold, yet well-balanced, with scents of dark fruit and pepper and a long finish.

title: Meiomi Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Meiomi Cabernet Sauvignon

Monterey County 56% | Sonoma County 23% | Santa Barbara County 21%

Meiomi Cabernet Sauvignon embodis the characteristic of California's most notable coastal growing regions. Unifying the unique character of each region allows this Cabernet Sauvignon to distinguish itself as an elegant, balanced and full flavored win. Monterey County - dark fruit and ripe blackberry Sonoma County - fresh earthy notes of black currant; Santa Barabara County vibrant raspberry and jammy red fruit. Each individual Cabernet Sauvignon lot is selected to maximize its individuality and contribution to the final blend, creating a multifaceted wine with graceful disposition for you to enjoy.

title: Sandeman Don Fino Sherry 500ml
body_html:
Sandeman Don Fino Sherry 500ml

Sandeman Sherry Don Fino Superior Fino, a premium Fino Sherry, is a delicate and dry white wine. Produced from Palomino grape grown in Sandeman's own vineyards located in the best areas of the Jerez demarcated region, the wine matures in a Solera, under «flor» (a veil of yeast) for a minimum of five years.

title: Stella Rosa Moscato Halloween Wrap

title: Post & Beam Chardonnay
body_html:
Post & Beam Chardonnay

By Far Niente

Balanced and sophisticated, with vibrant fruit flavors and a captivating minerality in every sip, delight in Napa Valley Chardonnay as it was meant to taste.

An alluring perfume of mango and fresh gardenia with whispers of candied citrus rind and spices open onto a round, full palate layered with fresh citrus and stone fruit flavors. Bright acidity provides structure and a mouthwatering juiciness and the finish has a captivating briny minerality that will make it a delight with fish, oysters and seafood.

title: Post & Beam Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Post & Beam Cabernet Sauvignon

By Far Niente

Taking its cues from proven, hand-crafted winemaking, this is one of our purest expressions of Cabernet Sauvignon, with elegant layers of fruit, supple tannins, whispers of oak and a finish that is pure finesse.

Pure, fresh plum, violet and sage aromas lead to a round palate layered with ripe plum, dark berry and black currant flavors. Leather, cedar and dried herb accents, along with whispers of vanilla and oak provide depth, while lithe acidity keeps the wine lifted, balanced and bright. Supple tannins feel like suede-velvet and carry the elegant fruit and spice flavors into a finish that goes on and on. This debut vintage is pure finesse.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Stags' Leap Petite Sirah
body_html:
Stags' Leap Petite Sirah Napa Valley

Petite Sirah is a varietal that is enhanced by the deliberate diversity of our vineyard sites. Grapes from the vineyards located on our estate's deep, rocky soils make up the backbone of this Napa Valley Petite Sirah. Carefully selected fruit from both northern vineyards in Calistoga and St. Helena and southern vineyards in Oakville, Oak Knoll and Coombsville are added to intensify and broaden the wine's profile to include floral, spice and fruit characteristics.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Petite Sirah

title: Hewitt Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Hewitt Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon Rutherford Napa Valley

Hewitt Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon is a single-vineyard, limited-edition wine that highlights the character of our estate without overwhelming it. We harvest the grapes at peak maturity, ferment them for optimal extraction, age them slowly in new French oak and bottle without filtration.

The resulting wine has deep black cherry and currant fruit complemented by classic Rutherford expression of cocoa, cedar and black olive. Impressive and elegant, Hewitt Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon may be enjoyed in its youth or savored after years in the cellar.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Beaulieu Vineyard BV Tapestry Red Wine
body_html:
Beaulieu Vineyard BV Tapestry Red Wine

This is a wine that shows the artistry of blending five Bordeaux-heritage grape varieties, which contributed layer-upon-layer of flavor complexity. Cabernet Sauvignon gave the wine its generous core of briary blackberry and cassis expression, while we increased the amount of Merlot this year to tame the tannins and add plush mid-palate texture. Malbec contributed deep plum notes, while Cabernet Franc and Petit Verdot completed the blend with nuances of rose, forest loam and graphite.

title: Beaulieu Vineyards Georges De Latour Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Beaulieu Vineyard Georges de Latour Private Reserve Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

Our Georges de Latour Cabernet Sauvignon has been widely recognized as the benchmark Cabernet Sauvignon from Rutherford since its inaugural vintage in 1936. Our understanding of terroir comes from more than 100 years of creating rich, classic Napa Valley wines. Our legacy honors the marriage between state-of-the-art technology and gentle, traditional winemaking methods, a combination that enhances the expression of our remarkable vineyards.

title: Penfolds Bin 389 Cabernet Shiraz
body_html:
Penfolds Bin 389 South Australia Cabernet Shiraz

Bin 389 was often referred to as ‘Baby Grange’, in part because components of the wine are matured in the same barrels that held the previous vintage of Grange. First made in 1960 by the legendary Max Schubert, this was the wine that helped forge Penfolds reputation with red wine drinkers by combining the structure of cabernet sauvignon with the richness of shiraz. Exemplifying the judicious balance of fruit and oak, Bin 389 highlights the generous mid-palate Penfolds in known for.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Shiraz

title: Opus One 2017 California Red Wine
body_html:
Opus One 2017 Napa Valley Red Wine

The winter of 2017 ended a five-year drought with January recording the most rainfall in over 20 years. The abundant rainfall continued into March, causing a modest delay in budbreak, and pushing bloom back by two weeks. Increased soil moisture allowed for healthy vine growth and development. The summer, in turn, was warm and punctuated by occasional heat waves. Despite Mother Nature’s variability, favorable weather in August provided optimal conditions for fruit development and maturation. Superb flavors and excellent ripening led to an earlier than expected harvest, which commenced on the 5th of September.

The Opus One 2017 offers a harmonious aromatic balance of rich dark fruit, stems of roses, and earthy forest floor. The juicy entry offers a round, silky mouthfeel with just enough acidity to complement the satin texture. This seductive wine shows flavors of black cassis, black cherry and a hint of cocoa powder. The fine-grained, plush tannins evolve into a long, supple finish.  A supremely age-worthy wine, it will delight now and for many years to come.

Varietals
Cabernet Sauvignon 80%, Petit Verdot 9%, Cabernet Franc 5%, Merlot 5% and Malbec 1%

Skin Contact
20 days

Barrel Aging
17 months in new French oak

title: Moet & Chandon Imperial Brut 187ML Split
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Brut Champagne Mini

187ml Split

The color is an elegant golden straw yellow with amber highlights. Its aromas are radiant, revealing bright yellow-fleshed fruits (apple, pear, yellow peach), honey, floral nuances (lime blossom) and elegant blond notes (brioche and fresh nuts). The palate is seductive, richly flavorful and smooth combining generosity and subtlety, fullness and vigor, followed by a delicately fresh crispiness (fruit with seeds), to reveal the magical balance of Champagne.

Moet & Chandon Imperial is the symbol of the Moet & Chandon house. It is the world's most loved Champagne, and for a very good reason. This Champagne is a true expression of the Moet style with a fruity aroma and crisp finish. It's blend is based on the structure and intensity of Pinot Noir (around 50% of the assemblage).

Moet & Chandon Imperial Brut is a flagship Champagne and a wonderful introduction to the world of Champagne.

Moet & Chandon Imperial can be served as an aperitif or with dinner.

Pair it with sushi, shellfish, white fish and white meats.

title: Bryant Family Cabernet
body_html:
Bryant Family Vineyard

2017 Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley 750ml

We are proud to offer our limited production 2017 Bryant Family Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon. (Proprietor Grown)

A true expression of the Pritchard Hill terroir, Bryant Family Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon was first released in 1992 and is culled solely from grapes grown on the estate’s 13-acre vineyard. This First Growth wine conveys the long winemaking history of the region, a confluence of climate and soil plus a team of experts committed to nurturing its creation. Bryant Family Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon possesses ethereal aromatics and pure minerality that give focus and energy. The complexity of the site yields unusually dynamic wines for a single varietal. The wines of the mid-90s inform our current, somewhat more restrained approach towards crafting wines that demonstrate structural elegance, balance with good acidity and plush tannins — all elements that make them very age-worthy.

Decades in the hospitality industry worldwide have cultivated our family's love for outstanding wines. We are delighted to introduce you to our Sonoma Coast Chardonnay; a wine that combines our love of Old World wines with the incredible bounty of California. Made with grapes grown in our Sonoma Coast Estate Vineyards, this Chardonnay features aromas of Lemon citrus and pear, lined with floral notes and hints of brioche and toast. This wine is bright and crisp with perfectly balanced acidity and minerality, followed by an elegant, refreshing finish. Aged for 11 months in 100% French Oak.

Tropical and citrus notes pair well with poultry, fish, and salads.

San Simeon Chardonnay is a rich, mouth-filling wine with ripe, tropical fruit flavors with complements of citrus and pear. The nose reveals bright fruit and toasty oak with hints of vanilla and spice. ... This structured and well-balanced wine shows a lengthy finish with potential to age.

title: Maddalena Chardonnay
body_html:
Maddalena Monterey Chadonnay

Chardonnay thrives in the cool, windy climate of Monterey. With the influences of morning fog and sandy soils, our family's estate vineyards produce intense flavors of tropical fruit with aromas of citrus and guava. Barrel fermentation adds a touch of spicy oak. Enjoy with pan-seared halibut and wild mushroom risotto.

In 1946, family matiarch Maddalena Riboli began her lifelong journey with San Antonio Winery. She founded one of the first tasting rooms in the state and a highly successful restaurant. Today, the third and fourth generations of the Riboli family honor her passion and dedication with each bottle of her namesake wine.

title: Silver Oak Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Silver Oak Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

A legendary wine from an iconic wine region – our Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is available for purchase at TheBestWineStore.com

Silver Oak Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon has a deep, rich red color with a purple rim. A robust wine with an assertive and alluring attack, it has notes of strawberry, cigar and tea leaves with a touch of black pepper and clove. A mouthwatering mid-palate of raspberry is followed by an expressive and bright finish. With lush and silky tannins, this ageworthy wine will show beautifully through 2038 given proper cellaring conditions.

title: TWOMEY Sauvignon Blanc by Silver Oak
body_html:
TWOMEY Sauvignon Blanc by Silver Oak

Sauvignon Blanc is among the world’s most popular white wine varietals, with strikingly different expressions in California than the wines produced in Sancerre or New Zealand. The telltale signature of Twomey Sauvignon Blanc is its bright tropical fruit expression and fresh mineral character. While our estate Sauvignon Blanc is a wine we drink fresh on hot summer days, our Merino Vineyard bottling ages several months longer…if you can wait that long.

title: Monte Xanic Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Monte Xanic Cabernet Sauvignon

Gentle mouth feel. Dry wine and freshly acidic. Warm alcohol and moderate tannins, with a fleshy body. Mouth aromas continue to be red fruit, chocolate, spices (pepper, cinnamon, and vanilla), wood, dried fig, and black licorice. Perfectly well-balanced wine, with long finish and highly complex.

title: Hopes End Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Hopes End Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon

A harsh journey initially brought the Doctor to Port Misery, Australia. However, he found nothing more than lawless people and an uninspiring swamp land. Life here was spent looking for the next vice to pass along the miserable days. Devastated after his long and treacherous journey, the Doctor knew he had to say goodbye to the hope that brought him here and take fate into his own hands. From his disappointment, a new beginning: the beginning of Hopes End Wine.

With a story rooted in dark history, from a winery over a century old, in a land revered through the ages for wine, comes a new tonic that we took our time on making. After all, a life well lived is a life you wouldn’t dare rush. Neither should the life of your wine.

title: Cooper & Thief Pinot Noir
body_html:
Cooper & Thief Pinot Noir Aged 75 Days in Brandy Barrels

2018

To produce a complex, smooth and rounded wine, we stashed select lots of our Pinot Noir in Brandy Barrels.

Some winemaking traditions were meant to be broken. That's why our Lush & Jammy Pinot Noir is blended with select lots Aged In Brandy Casks.

And when we cracked the barrels after 75 days, let's just say we knew pretty quickly that we were on to something GOOD.

Cooper & Thief is a Lush wine with Cherry and Caramel flavors and Baking Spice notes that finishes with a Smooth Mouth Feel.

title: Capriccio Rosé Sangria
body_html:
Capriccio Rosé Sangria

The Capriccio Rosé Sangria is a crisp fruit-filled wine with flavors of pineapple, strawberries, and pomegranate. Perfect for summertime gatherings. Really this Capriccio Sangria is perfect anytime of the year, as long as you are responsible.

title: Capriccio Passion Fruit Sangria
body_html:
Capriccio Passion Fruit Sangria

Capriccio Passion Fruit Sangria brings on the fun! A delicious, tropical blend of wine with real fruit juices. Bubbly with passion fruit, pineapple, banana, and orange flavors. Well balanced and refreshingly fruit forward.

title: Momokawa Ruby Lightly Sweet Sake
body_html:
Momokawa Ruby Lightly Sweet Junmai Ginjo Sake

Mildly sweet with hints of red berries, cherry, guava, and mochi. Hints of tropical fruit, melon, and grapes on the nose.

Pure saké made with rice polished 51-60% with no distilled alcohol added. Junmai Ginjo is a super premium level saké.

title: Momokawa Diamond Medium Dry Crisp Sake
body_html:
Momokawa Diamond Medium Dry Crisp Craft Sake

Medium-dry and crisp with a balance of soft water notes and fall flavors of apple and pear. Melon, and mild anise on the nose.

Pure saké made with rice polished 51-60% with no distilled alcohol added. Junmai Ginjo is a super premium level saké.

title: Momokawa Silver Dry Crisp Sake

Momokawa Silver Dry Crisp Junmai Ginjo Craft Sake

Light, crisp and dry mouthfeel with hints of mineral and citrus. Green apple, melon, and spice on the nose.

Pure saké made with rice polished 51-60% with no distilled alcohol added. Junmai Ginjo is a super premium level saké.

title: Momokawa Organic Medium Rich Sake
body_html:
Momokawa Organic Medium Rich Junmai Ginjo Sake

Medium rich with aromas of tropical flowers and the lush flavor of exotic fruits with a hint of honey. An easy every day choice for saké enthusiasts, and an ideal starting point for wine lovers seeking to explore saké.

title: Momokawa Organic Creamy Nigori Sake
body_html:
Momokawa Organic Creamy Nigori Junmai Ginjo Sake

Rich and silky layers of coconut and cream with a big burst of fresh pineapple and a hint of banana.

Nigori style saké is coursely filtered to allow flavorful and aromatic sediments to remain, creating a creamy cloudy beverage.

title: Momokawa Organic Medium Rich Junmai Sake
body_html:
Momokawa Organic Medium Rich Junmai Sake

Notes of refreshing melon and lime combine with delicate pineapple and cola flavors.

Pure saké made with rice polished 51-60% with nothing added. Junmai Ginjo is a super premium level saké.

title: Chronic Cellars SIR REAL Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html: The Chronic Cellars SIR REAL gallant Cabernet Sauvignon keeps watch over your taste buds with regal layers of black cherry, mocha and fresh savory notes. A wine with noble intent, there is a deep core of dark fruit and harmonious tannins that drives through to a fearless finish.

title: Stella Rosa WATERMELON
body_html:
Stella Rosa WATERMELON Semi-Sweet Wine

Stella Rosa WATERMELON Wine offers a delicate taste that is sweet yet subtle. If you were wondering is there a watermelon flavored wine, wonder no more. This Stella Watermelon is a beauty, and instead of trying to make this wine at home, pick up a bottle of Watermelon Wine and discover the perfect balance of watermelon flavors in a wine bottle. 

Why Drink Stella Rosa Watermelon?

One sip from this wine you will find the delicate flavor of watermelon dancing across your palate, bringing back relaxing memories. Stella Rosa Watermelon is a crisp wine, the refreshing taste is already making a splash among Stella Rosa lovers everywhere. Could this be your new favorite too? You won’t know unless you Taste The Magic for yourself.

Stella Rosa Watermelon Food Pairing

This flavor pairs wonderfully with light salads, such as Greek or Caesar, as well as salty appetizers like Edamame or Jalapeño poppers. For dessert, you can pair it with coconut cream pie! Order your bottle of Stella Rosa WATERMELON now!

title: K Vintners The Beautiful Syrah
body_html:
K Vintners The Beautiful Syrah

With K Vintners The Beautiful Syrah you get candied violets, blackcurrants, and notes that all emerge from this Syrah, a seamless beauty. Rich, full-bodied profile on the palate as well as a great mid-palate, nicely integrated acidity. Very fine tannin, and just another singular, layered, silky beauty from K Vintners.

title: The Prisoner Pinot Noir
body_html:
The Prisoner Pinot Noir

Experience the rich, velvety flavor of The Prisoner Pinot Noir. With a deep red color and an enticing aroma of ripe berries and spices, this wine is sure to impress.

Crafted with the finest grapes and aged in oak barrels, The Prisoner Pinot Noir has a smooth, full-bodied flavor with notes of cherry and vanilla. This wine is the perfect choice for any occasion, whether you're sharing a meal with friends or enjoying a quiet evening at home.

Indulge in the luxurious taste of The Prisoner Pinot Noir and elevate your wine drinking experience. Order a bottle today and discover why this wine is a favorite among wine lovers everywhere.

TASTING NOTES

Blend:
Pinot Noir, Syrah

Aroma:
Cherry, Dried Herbs, Cinnamon Spice

Tasting Notes:
Strawberry Jam, Hint of Toast, Vanilla

Pair with:
Chef Brett recommends pairing The Prisoner Pinot Noir with Mushroom Risotto or Grilled Salmon.

title: Opus One 2016 California Red Wine
body_html:
Opus One 2016 Napa Valley Red Wine

2016 marked the fifth consecutive year of a punishing drought in Northern California; however, our Oakville estate was fortunate to receive 28½ inches of rain; most of which fell before March; making the soil conditions ideal for budbreak that began precociously on March 7th.

title: St. Francis Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
ST. FRANCIS RESERVE CABERNET SAUVIGNON ALEXANDER VALLEY

Rich and full-bodied this Cabernet delivers layered aromas of black licorice, vanilla bean, sweet tobacco, and graham cracker followed by concentrated flavors of dark Bing cherry, wild berry compote, and allspice. Structured yet silky on the palate, the finish is lengthy and vibrant.

Accolades

  • 92 Points • Wine & Spirits Magazine • November 2018
  • Gold Medal • Sonoma County Harvest Fair • October 2018
  • 94 Points • Jeb Dunnuck • June 2018
  • Gold Medal • San Francisco Chronicle Competition • January 2018
  • 90+ Points • The Wine Advocate • August 2018

title: Four Virtues Bourbon Barrel Zinfandel
body_html:
Four Virtues Lodi Bourbon Barrel Zinfandel

Heavily charred Bourbon oak barrels impart nuanced layers of caramel, vanilla and toasty oak to the wine’s naturally intense dark berry character. The result is a robust, deliciously complex and silky smooth Lodi Zinfandel.

Intense and full-bodied with red fruit, blackberry and spice. Soft, subtle tannins and a lingering smoky finish.

Bright raspberry, cherry and juicy blackberry with hints of caramel, vanilla and toasty oak.

Aged with French and American oak, then finished in heavily charred Bourbon barrels.

Accolades:
“Rich, toasty nose; smooth, grilled meat, vanilla and caramel are all present; juicy fruit and a classic toasted finish.” - 92 Pts Blue Lifestyle

title: Stella Rosa Peach Halloween Wrap
body_html:
Stella Rosa Peach Halloween Wrap

Rounding out the Stellaween squad is the Stella Rosa Peach, with a hypnotizing, intricately adorned calavera and the wine’s delicate white peach and honey aromas.
