A sumptuous wine like this should be tried alongside equally sumptuous foods, including steak, pizza, and cheddar cheese.

title: Angels & Cowboys Rosé
body_html:
Angels & Cowboys Rosé

If you could represent the spring season using a wine, then Angels & Cowboys Rosé would be a good candidate. It tastes like minerals and citrus blossoms, and it smells like wildflowers, pomegranate, and golden delicious apples. When you drink it with shrimp cocktails, salads, and seared tuna, you will really be ready for spring.

title: Zonin Prosecco Sparkling Wine
body_html:
Zonin Prosecco Sparkling Wine

Zonin Prosecco Sparkling Wine is the freshest Prosecco on the market. It is a sparkling wine that is full of life and should be an essential element of every Italian celebration. Since it has a fresh and fruity taste, it is easy to pair with any type of food and it is also a delicious aperitif. When you buy this wine, you are buying a wine that will help you enjoy the simple moments in life.

title: Etude Lyric Chardonnay
body_html:
Etude Lyric Chardonnay

Etude Lyric Chardonnay is absolutely perfect for the people who love citrus fruits. The wine smells a lot like lemons but doesn't taste like them. If you've ever wanted to taste a naturally sweet lemon, this wine could give you a sense of what that would be like. Citrus fruits go with seafood dishes and pasta, and that's also the case for this wine.

title: Zonin Prosecco Mini 187ml
body_html:
Zonin Prosecco

187ml Mini 

The Zonin Brut Sparkling Wine from Prosecco DOC is a delectable and bubbly sparkling wine with a soft and fruity flavor that makes it ideal as an aperitif and for the entire meal. Perfect for Bellini Cocktail! Serve Chilled and Enjoy!

Zonin Prosecco Mini is a crisp and dry wine that is a little on the fruity side. It has notes of almond and citrus that make it interesting to serve it by itself or as a natural choice for bellinis or mimosas. When you pop the top on this petite sparkler, it is time to get the party started.

title: Dona Paula Smoked Red Blend
body_html:
Dona Paula Smoked Red Blend

This Dona Paula Smoked Red Blend Wine was aged in toasted oak barrels that were smoked over an open fire, similar to that of a traditional Argentinean BBQ (asado).

This innovative barrel toasting process gives the wine unique smoky flavors along with aromas of coffee, vanilla and hints of tobacco, making it the perfect pairing for grilled meat and barbecues.

Dona Paula Smoked Red Blend is an intense violet colored wine. It has complex aromas of red fruit jam, spices, vanilla, and a delicate level of smokiness. On the palate, it separates itself from other wines with its sweet and velvety tannins. Another thing that sets this wine apart from others is that the grapes that make it are harvested manually and you will taste the difference in the wine.

title: Poppy Santa Lucia Reserve Pinot Noir
body_html:
Poppy Santa Lucia Pinot Noir

Poppy Santa Lucia Reserve Pinot Noir is produced from grapes grown in Monterey County’s Santa Lucia Highlands AVA, well known for its ideal climate for growing Pinot Noir grapes. The morning and night-time fog and the costal breeze from Monterey Bay, mitigate temperatures, creating a classically cool-climate area with long ripening period. The Highlands vineyards are planted on the terraces of the Santa Lucia mountain range, overlooking the Salinas River Valley, and in close proximity of the Pacific Ocean.

title: The Walking Dead Chardonnay
body_html:
The Walking Dead Chardonnay

This Walking Dead Chardonnay is a true balance of creamy texture and balanced acidity. It has flavors of baked apple, peach, caramel, and clove elevate the palate since a lot of oaks are used. It would make the perfect addition to a survival kit or as a gift to anyone that is a fan of The Walking Dead.

title: Vinny New York Bubbly Wine 250ml
body_html:
Vinny New York Bubbly Wine 250ml

250ml Can

This canned wine is made in the Finger Lake Region of New York City. It is a sparkling white wine that has tasting notes of lemon, lime and Green Apple. The goal of the Vinny company is to “show you how crisp, convenient, and crush-able canned wine truly can be."

title: Vinny New York Bubbly Wine 4-Pack
body_html:
Vinny New York Bubbly Wine

4-Pack Can(s)

This 4-pack of canned white wine is made by the Vinny company. It is a crisp, effervescent blend of Riesling and Gruner Veltliner wines. It tastes like green apple, lime, and lemon. The name of this wine comes from a combination of the words wine (vino) and New York (NY).

title: Cannonball Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Cannonball Cabernet Sauvignon

Very few drinks can produce a sensation quite like the current varietal of Cannonball Cabernet Sauvignon. In fact, Cannonball Cabernet Sauvignon fulfills all desires, including a desire for barbecue. This vintage Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine complement steaks, short ribs, and lamb chops. It is made in California.

title: Ghostrunner Ungrafted Red
body_html:
Ghostrunner Ungrafted Red

Be the first to offer the Ghostrunner Ungrafted Red Wine. Everyone will ask about the name. This vintage bottle is made from a red blend consisting of Zinfandel, Cabernet Sauvignon, Syrah, and Petite Sirah. Serve several glasses at the next dinner party. Ghostrunner Ungrafted Red is a current varietal from Lodi, California.

We started Ghostrunner as a way to bring to the market a great tasting red blend that you'll enjoy drinking anytime. Ghostrunner grapes are sourced through central valley vineyards that produce rich and elegant wines. This handcrafted wine shows complex fruit and has a gentle, well balanced finish. It can be enjoyed on its own or with a variety of foods. At Ghostrunner, we only make a red blend so we focus 100% of our time, resources and passion around just this one wine. We hope you enjoy it and share it with your friends.

title: Stags' Leap Winery Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Stags' Leap Winery Cabernet Sauvignon

At the next dinner party, serve a few glasses of Cabernet Sauvignon. Stags' Leap Winery offers an original Napa Valley varietal. This is a red wine that complements meals perfectly. It was created in France during the 17th century. Today, it is served in restaurants and steakhouses throughout the world.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Barefoot Bubbly Brut Rosé
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Brut Rosé

Drinking Barefoot Bubbly Brut Rosé will be like going to a summer barbecue where there's a really fantastic fruit salad. When you take a sip of this, you'll taste citrus fruit, nectarines, raspberries, apples, and cherries. Since it's a good idea to serve this beverage alongside potato salad, salmon, shrimp salad, and steak, you'll really feel like you're at a great barbecue.

title: Moet & Chandon Virgil Abloh "Do Not Drop" Rosé Limited Edition
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Virgil Abloh "Do Not Drop" Rosé

Moët x Virgil

Limited Edition

ISSUES WITH LETTERS PEALING HAVE OCCURRED (Sorry No Returns)

The Moet & Chandon Virgil Abloh "Do Not Drop" Rosé has demonstrated that fashion designer and DJ Virgil Abloh is even more talented than we all thought. This wine is available in bottles that have a very unique and striking design, which shows that Virgil Abloh is great at many different forms of art. After you finish the wine, you may even want to save the strong yet streamlined wine bottle. You'll be supporting the arts in general when you purchase this, especially if you eat it with baked halibut or tomato and basil pasta at a fine restaurant, since cooking is an art form as well.

One of today’s most celebrated creative visionaries, VIRGIL ABLOH will debut an exclusive collection of custom-designed bottles of Moët’s iconic Nectar Imperial Rosé.

Over the last year, Abloh has worked alongside the House of Moët & Chandon to develop a radical all-white take on its classic gold-labeled rosé. Each bottle bares the designer’s signature “DO NOT DROP” styling while showcasing the Champagne’s prominence and collectors-edition designation.

title: Luc Belaire Rare Rose Art Series
body_html:
Luc Belaire Rare Rose Art Series

The beauty of the Art Series bottle is just a hint to the magnificent flavor of the Luc Belaire Rare Rose. The distinctive black bottle with its uniquely painted graffiti design, is known the world over. Luc Belaire Rare Rose Art Series is the perfect harmony of aroma, taste, body and style.

title: The Walking Dead Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
The Walking Dead Sauvignon Blanc

Bring your tastebuds back to life with the bright and refreshing taste of The Walking Dead Sauvignon Blanc. Featuring tropical flavors of key lime and guava, and finished with a hint of fresh pineapple, this vibrant California white will have your palate screaming. With its delicate balance of acidity, herbal flavors and citrus notes, this Sauvignon Blanc is dead easy to enjoy chilled on its own, or paired with fresh foods like seafood or a summer salad.

title: Skeleton Gruner Veltliner
body_html:
Skeleton Gruner Veltliner

1-Liter

Looking for a crisp and refreshing white wine from Austria, then Skeleton Gruner Veltliner is the one for you. Gru-Vee (for short) is an intimate wine that can also be shared when entertaining friends. With its explosive fruit flavor, Skeleton Gruner Veltliner is food friendly and fits into everyone’s budget.

title: Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé 187ml
body_html:
Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé

Mini 187ml

In the glass, the Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé 187ml has a beautiful, almost iridescent pink color. It offers a smooth mouthfeel, augmented with intense notes of tropical fruits akin to mangoes and bananas. The Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé has a complex onset, with slight hints of peach. Initial sips are met with lingering tanginess that remains refreshing. The Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé 187ml bottle pairs well with grilled meats and your favorite pasta.

title: Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé
body_html:
Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé

After you try Cloud Chaser Côtes de Provence Rosé, it will instantly seem like it's summertime again, no matter what season it actually is. You'll be instantly reminded of sunny afternoons where it seemed like anything was possible. Appropriately enough, this wine goes well with a lot of different dishes, including grilled fish, pasta, and light salads.

title: Luc Belaire Luxe Rosé
body_html:
Luc Belaire Luxe Rosé

If you've ever had delicious homemade desserts, Luc Belaire Luxe Rosé wine might make you think of them right away. This wine has a classic and wholesome flavor, and it's also very sweet. It's actually a great wine to drink with desserts, especially fruit-filled pastries and cheese. This creamy and fruit-flavored wine almost feels like a dessert in its own right.

title: St. Supéry Sauvignon Blanc California Wine
body_html:
St. Supéry Sauvignon Blanc California Wine

If you've ever had promising mornings where you feel calm and energized at the same time, St. Supéry Sauvignon Blanc California Wine will seem familiar to you. The freshness and the hints of grapefruit will immediately make you feel as if the day is just starting, even if you sample this wine when it's late at night. This wine will work well with artichokes, goat cheese, sole, and oysters. You'll feel like you had a productive day.

TASTING NOTES

This is a bright crisp sauvignon blanc with citrus zip, flavors of lemon, lime, yellow grapefruit, and lime zest combined with a fennel and caper vibrancy. Green and yellow hues present in this wine with exotic aromatics of pink grapefruit, green lime zest, lemon citrus along with undertones of fennel, and green olive.

title: Klinker Brick "Old Ghost" Old Vine Zinfandel
body_html:
Klinker Brick Old Ghost Old Vine Zinfandel

Created each year from some of their oldest vineyard blocks, Old Ghost is an unbeatable Lodi Zinfandel produced by Klinker Brick. With a full body, a great finish and rich flavor, this is a bold encounter. Klinker Brick Old Ghost Old Vine Zinfandel is perfect with a porterhouse or your favorite red meat.

The Birth of the Old Ghost

The Old Ghost represents the very best lots of old vine zinfandel that we produce annually.
For the past eight vintages, this wine has come from 90 plus-year-old vineyard blocks that produce minuscule yields that are less than one ton per acre. Each vintage this wine has managed to offer our winemaker major challenges! The following is a discussion of the challenges during the inaugural vintage.

title: Da Luca Prosecco
body_html:
Da Luca Prosecco

If you want the number one Italian wine, you want Da Luca Prosecco wine from the rolling hills of the Prosecco region. Comes conveniently in a variety of sizes try the Da Luca Prosecco Mini if you want to enjoy a bottle with your meal. As an aperitif or a companion to your favorite food, Da Luca Prosecco wine is a must!

title: Stella Rosa Rosé 1.5 Liter
body_html:
Stella Rosa Rosé 1.5 Liter

Stella Rosa Rosé is a refreshing, cool wine that blends notes of wild mountain berries and rose petals together for a luxurious taste. This Stella Rosa Rosé liter jug is perfect for treating guests at your next event and pairs perfectly with red velvet cake or pork.

title: Chateau St. Jean Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html: Chateau St. Jean Cabernet Sauvignon is full of fruit flavors. It has vivid aromas of blackberries, fresh plum, and chocolate. Its really rich flavor consists of black cherries, fresh berry pie, and notes of black tea. It has a lot of structure, a juicy mouthfeel, and a full, lingering finish.

title: Chateau St. Jean Chardonnay
body_html: Chateau St. Jean Chardonnay is full of aromas of lemon creme and mango, fresh, and rich with apple and melon scents joined by smoky, toasty oak. It turns creamy and keeps a strong focus on the fruit and oak. It ends with a complex aftertaste that offers a hint of marshmallow.

title: Chateau St. Jean Pinot Noir
body_html: Chateau St. Jean Pinot Noir has lovely aromas of cranberry, raspberry, and strawberry. It also has hints of rose and toasted oak and is medium-bodied and fruity. The palate consists of juicy flavors and soft tannins that truly provide a creamy texture and long finish that is driven by fruit.

title: Chateau St. Jean Merlot
body_html: Chateau St. Jean Merlot has ripe fruit aromas of fresh berries, red plum, and cherry that is strong and rich in smell. The aromas lead to rich flavors of fresh berry pie, milk chocolate, and notes of black tea on the palate. It is a wine that has a lot of structure, a juicy mouthfeel, smooth tannins, and a finish that lasts a long time.

title: Capriccio Bubbly Sangria
body_html:
Capriccio Bubbly Sangria

Finding such a good combination of fizzy bubbles and fruity flavours isn't quite so simple, but this delectable bottle of Sangria delivers both. The blended fruit juice and red wine creates a delicious experience, just pour it straight from the bottle and enjoy with ice or fresh fruit.

title: Capriccio White Sangria
body_html: This edition is for the white wine lovers who appreciate sangria in all it's glory. Using only natural fruit juices to strengthen the smooth yet bold-tasting bubbly, this tasting experience is crisp from start to finish. To create a perfect combo, simply pour into a glass on the rocks.

title: Capriccio Bubbly Sangria 4 Pack
body_html:
The number 1 selling Sangria from the Carribean is now available in packs of 4, ideal for taking with you to a party or convenient to take with you on a picnic. These little bottles are perfect for sharing, delivering the same special taste you have grown to love from Capriccio.

Capriccio is made from 100 percent natural fruit juices and grape wine with no additives or preservatives. A bubbly sangria that is made with red wine and pineapple, orange, and grape juices.

title: Capriccio Bubbly Sangria 375ml
body_html: What more could you need than a perfect combo of fizz and juicy, fruity flavors? Capriccio understands the importance of delivering a high-quality beverage that can be enjoyed at any time. All you need to do is open the bottle, pour into a glass and enjoy!

title: Paraduxx Proprietary Red Wine
body_html:
Paraduxx Proprietary Napa Valley Red Wine

Paraduxx Proprietary Red Wine is an elegant and smooth red wine made at a winery in Napa Valley, California. The palate consists of red currant and cherry and it has a medium-short finish. It has a complex blend of red and dark fruit with warm spices, leather, cloves, cinnamon, cola, and toasted nuts. It is a great blend of Cabernet and Pinot Noir.

title: Stella Rosa Rosé L'Originale LE Halloween
body_html:
Please call us for pictures might be different

619 295 9108

Stella Rosa Rosé L'Originale Limited Edition Halloween

1.5 Liter

Life is full of laughs and smiles with family and friends, the fun runs for miles.

Food and drinks also play a big part in the making of joy for the palate and heart.

The heart also seeks love, a special affection from someone who loves all their imperfections.

Life is filled with celebrations big and small but a Stellabration of life is the greatest of them all.

title: Bread & Butter Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Bread & Butter Cabernet Sauvignon

Bread and Butter cabernet sauvignon is all you need after a hard day’s work. The wine has a nice aroma of chocolate and blackberry. It has soft tannins and a bit of spice that give it a smooth lingering finish. The wine goes well with blue cheese burger, mushroom pizza or grilled ribeye steak.

title: GIFFT Kathie Lee Gifford Rosé
body_html: Our GIFFT Rosé by Kathie Lee Gifford is irresistible with fragrant notes of freshly picked summer berries and rose petal. Raspberry, strawberry and nectarine sweep the palate rounded with bright acidity and a crisp, refreshing finish.

title: Opus One 2015 California Red Wine
body_html:
Opus One 2015 Napa Valley Red Wine

Initial dark fruit, spice and baking aromas in the 2015 Opus One are interwoven with seductive notes of violet, black tea, and sage. The entry is vibrant with ripe dark fruit flavors of plum, blackberry and blueberry followed by hints of vanilla and cocoa. Silky, fine-grained tannins provide structure and a creamy texture. The wine finishes with fresh acidity and a rich, lingering finish that promises longevity in the cellar.

The 2015 as a “sexy, beautiful spice-bomb, with tons of cinnamon stick, cloves, fenugreek and pepper notes springing forth over a core of mulberries, plum preserves, blackberry pie and fragrant earth plus a waft of lavender. The palate is big, voluptuous and totally decadent.” - The Wine Advocate

97+ Points - Robert Parker

title: Game of Thrones Pinot Noir
body_html:
Game of Thrones Pinot Noir

From the arid climate of Dorne to the lush vineyards of The Reach, the topography of the Seven Kingdoms of Westeros is as diverse as the wine we produce. Against the backdrop of the ever evolving struggle for the Iron Thrones and amidst the howling winds of the winter, nobles raise their glasses and toast to luck in the wars to come.

title: 1000 Stories Bourbon Barrel Aged Red
body_html:
1000 Stories Bourbon Barrel Aged Red Blend

The California Gold Rush was a period of courage, bravado and curiosity. I craft Gold Rush Red with these characteristics in mind. The grapes used to blend this bold wine are carefully selected from the golden hills and valleys of California.

It is finished in bourbon barrels, which complements this rich wine with notes of charred vanilla and dried herbs.

- Bob Blue, Winemaker

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red Blend

title: Educated Guess North Coast Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Educated Guess North Coast Cabernet Sauvignon

When your mouth is watering for something savory and silky, reach for a vintage bottle of Educated Guess North Coast Cabernet Sauvignon. In addition to your candle light dinner, fun with friends or just a single night of relaxation, you can't go wrong with this splendid mix of fruity sensation!

title: Reata Sonoma Coast Chardonnay
body_html:
Reata Sonoma Coast Chardonnay

The Reata Sonoma Coast Chardonnay lives up to its rich, buttery color with its full bouquet of delectable flavors. When you first open this special white wine, the aroma of oak and pear is inviting. Taste red apple and pear along with clove and cinnamon. It offers a great balance of sweet and savory flavors. Pair it with chocolate for a fun snack or dessert. It's versatile and would also be tasty to consume leisurely on a picnic or during a night on the town.

title: Bodega Tapiz Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Bodega Tapiz Cabernet Sauvignon

Bodega Tapiz Cabernet Sauvignon is not only enriched with dark, intense fruits and a rich cassis flavor, it's a tender blend of acidity and finesse. With lots of depth and a subtle finish, when you need a touch of elegance, woo your house guests with a glass of the best.

title: Stella Rosa Black Lux Mini 187ml
body_html:
Stella Rosa Black Lux

Mini 187ml

Stella Rosa Black Lux Mini 187ml is a mini bottle of red wine that pairs well with desserts or spicy food. Also, this delicious wine is made predominantly from the Brachetto grape. Moreover, this delightful wine is the perfect thing to drink at a wedding. Additionally, this wine is imported from Italy, one of the premier locations for high-quality wine production.

title: Stella Rosa Moscato Rosé Mini 187ml
body_html:
Stella Rosa Moscato Rosé

Mini 187ml

Stella Rosa Moscato Rosé Mini 187ml is a delicious sparkling wine in a miniature sized bottle. Additionally, this wine is sweet, and it comes from the Piedmont part of Italy. Also, you should be aware that this fantastic wine pairs exceptionally well with meals like fresh fruits, cheesecake, and fondue. Remember, this wine is also perfect for any occasion.

title: VOGA Italia Pinot Grigio
body_html:
The VOGA Italia Pinot Grigio offers ripe pear and apple notes with a smooth mouth feel in a stylish modern bottle. Crisp notes of fresh fruit combine with bolder-than-average flavor making this Italian Pinot Grigio sure to become a quick favorite.

Subtle, elegant pure aromas with a nose that exhibits peach pulp, yellow apples and a suggestion of white flowers. The palate is equally light and clean, and leads to a mineral, spring water like finish.

For more on VOGA Pinot Grigio View This Link.

title: Cosentino The Blanc Sauvignon Blanc
body_html: THE Blanc 2015 Savignon Blanc from Cosetino Winery is the first vintage of this blend of 90% Savignon Blanc and 10% Chenin Blanc. Harvested in the cooler temperatures of West Lodi, this California white wine blend presents lemongrass and guava on the nose and crisp citrus flavor notes with a gentle acidity.

title: Blossom Bros Pink Grapefruit & Honey Comb Can
body_html:
Blossom Bros Pink Grapefruit & Honey Comb Can

Blossom Bros Pink Grapefruit & Honey Comb is a neat new take of wine in a Can. You have to try it to believe the flavors and taste of this amazing new type of wine in a can. One sip and you will be blown away by this wine spritzer. Please enjoy responsibly.

The pink grapefruit in this Blossom Bros Pink Grapefruit & Honey Comb wine has a delicious taste of vibrant citrus flavors. Also, the aroma of a bottle of this wine can’t be beaten, and the subdued sweetness of the honeycomb combines perfectly with the grapefruit to form a tasty treat that will surely knock your socks off.

title: Blossom Bros White Peach & Jasmine Flower Can
body_html:
Blossom Bros White Peach & Jasmine Flower Can

This Blossom Bros White Peach & Jasmine Flower Wine in a Can is indeed a top of the line can of wine. The jasmine mixes well with the peach to combine and form a deliciously delightful sweet bottle of wine that has amazingly subtle and effervescent flavor. The tastes of this wine work exceptionally well together, and the overall aftertaste is fabulous.

title: Blossom Bros Wild Strawberry & Lime Zest Can
body_html:
Blossom Bros Wild Strawberry & Lime Zest Can

This Blossom Bros Wild Strawberry & Lime Zest wine in a can is one of a kind. First of all, the citrus tang of the lime works exceptionally well when combined with the subtle sweetness of the wild strawberry flavors. Also, the aromas are heavenly, and the rich scents are out of this world.

title: The Crusher Sauvignon Blanc White Wine
body_html: This Crusher Sauvignon Blanc White Wine is the perfect bottle of wine to accompany a light meal like baked chicken. The Crusher Sauvignon Blanc White Wine is made from a grape that comes from the west of France originally. Therefore, you know this wine will provide the flavor you desire because the grapes were first born in France, the home of wine-making.

title: The Crusher Unoaked Chardonnay
body_html: This Crusher Unoaked Chardonnay has a rich flavor that will put a smile on your face. Alas, a bottle of this wine has a delicious aroma of pineapple that will conjure up images of relaxing on a tropical beach while the warm clear waters of the ocean lap at your bare feet.

title: Saved Red Blend California Wine
body_html:
Saved Red Blend California Wine

Saved Red Blend California Wine is a remarkable blend of red wines that offers a one of a kind taste. It features a delicious mix of black cherry, vanilla, and some subtle hints of pomegranate. Saved Red is a fabulous blend that goes well with any Italian meals that combine meat rich sauces with pasta. Moreover, you should buy a bottle today and experience this one of a kind flavor for yourself.

title: SeaGlass Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
SeaGlass Cabernet Sauvignon

SeaGlass Cabernet Sauvignon is a delicious wine from Paso Robles in California and offers a lovely dark cherry aroma. This one of a kind wine won a Gold Medal at the California State Fair in 2012. Moreover, SeaGlass Cabernet Sauvignon wine is perfect for meals such as pasta with red sauce or grilled lamb. So grab a bottle and have a party today!

TASTING NOTES

Our Central Coast Cabernet Sauvignon opens with distinct aromas of black plum and cherry. The palate is rich and complex, with ripe flavors of blackberry and black cherry, framed by hints of spicy oak on the finish. Exquisitely balanced with vibrant acidity, this wine complements grilled lamb, pepper-crusted tuna or pasta with a red sauce.

title: Valley of the Moon Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html: Valley of the Moon Cabernet Sauvignon is a top of the line wine offering a lovely oaky and spicy taste. Honestly, a bottle Valley of the Moon Cabernet Sauvignon Wine has everything you could ever want from a Cabernet. You’ll also love this wine because of its perfect balance of flavors and its clean taste. Valley of the Moon Cabernet Sauvignon pairs well with rotisserie chicken.

title: Valley of the Moon Blend '41
body_html: Valley of the Moon Blend '41 Wine pays homage to the date of the founding of the Valley of the Moon winery, which was 1941. So, taste a blast from the past with this wine and recall the class and sophistication of the 1940s. A glass of Valley of the Moon Blend '41 Red Wine with a pedigree like this is best enjoyed while wearing a fedora and listening to big band music. Pair Blend '41 with your favorite steak, sit back and enjoy.

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Pearl Lux
body_html:
Stella Rosa Pearl Lux Dry Sparkling Wine

Savor this crisp Stella Rosa Imperiale Pearl Lux semi-sweet wine as your taste buds are treated to a delicate balance of yellow muscat, pear, and white peach flavors. An excellent wine to kick-start a romantic evening or to share with friends at dinner. Stella Rosa Pearl Lux pairs perfectly with any fish or salty desert.

title: Soleil Mimosa Mango Sparkling Wine Can
body_html: The Soleil Mimosa Mango Sparkling Wine Can beverage will make you feel like you're on a luxury cruise ship. At the same time, you'll feel like you're relaxing on the beach, so you'll be calm and invigorated. You can drink this with grilled cheese, fruit pastries, and almost all of the other delicious dishes that you'll usually want to eat when you're on vacation.

title: Soleil Mimosa Pineapple Sparkling Can
body_html: After a long hard day at work, nothing is as relaxing as a refreshing can of Soleil Mimosa Pineapple Sparkling Wine in a can. Also, you’ll fall in love with this tangy mixture of pineapple and sparkling wine because it tastes so fresh that it feels like you're drinking a beverage made from recently hand-picked fruit.

title: Clayhouse Paso Robles Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Clayhouse Paso Robles Cabernet Sauvignon

This one is a bit of a mouthful and we don't just mean the name. This Cabernet Sauvignon is sumptuous and well-kept. Clayhouse really knows how to speak to our palate and keep us coming back for more. Highly recommended.

Find out much more about Clayhouse Wines by visiting their website.

title: Peju Winery Piccolo Red Blend
body_html: The Peju Winery Piccolo Red Blend is very light and fragrant at the same time. You'll feel like you're taking a drive through an orchard and a floral garden as you sample this wine. You'll find that this wine will work particularly well alongside eggplant or chicken Parmesan, or almost any dish made with fresh tomatoes or marinara sauce.

title: Peju Province Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html: Drinking Peju Province Cabernet Sauvignon is like buying a summer home and then discovering that the new house has hidden benefits that you didn't even notice previously, like a spectacular view. The vanilla, dark cherry, and raspberry flavors are immediately obvious, but you'll also taste notes of molasses and fresh almonds as you savor the wine. If you're having filet mignon or lamb, this would be the perfect wine.

title: Layer Cake Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Layer Cake Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon

Our Layer Cake Cabernet Sauvignon is aged 3 months in old bourbon barrels, imparting a bolder and more intense character. This Cabernet Sauvignon is dense, rich, and jammy with scents of blackberry and vanilla and a long, mouth coating finish complimented by a hint of sweetness.

TASTING NOTES

This Bourbon Barrel Cabernet Sauvignon both truly expresses the depth and complexity of the grape as well as the additional vanilla, toasty oak influence of the bourbon and charred barrel that result from 3 months aging in these barrels. The result is a wine that is dense, rich, and jammed with scents of blackberry and vanilla and a long, mouth coating finish complimented by a hint of sweetness.

title: Four Graces Pinot Noir
body_html:
Four Graces Pinot Noir

Create an unforgettable experience for your pallet with the light, tantalizing sensation of Four Graces Pinot Noir. Compliment the taste with a light flakey salmon or a perfectly seasoned pork loin to bring out the floral notes within this decadent Pinot Noir by Four Graces.

title: Soleil Cantina Sangria Wine Can
body_html: St Claire Winery has introduced a canned form of Soleil Cantina Sangria wine. The crispy wine which has a touch of Hispanic and Mexican culture now comes in a pink and black 375 ml can. Choose Soleil Cantina Sangria wine to go with popcorn or cheese at your next wine party.

title: Avalon California Pinot Noir
body_html:
Sourced from California’s cool, coastal growing regions, Avalon Pinot Noir showcases lush and silky cherry notes and ripe red fruit. Intriguing spice components give way to notes of sweet toasty oak with just a hint of smoke. Avalon Pinot Noir is extremely approachable and pairs perfectly with roasted chicken, grilled salmon and pizza.

Keep your friends close, and a glass of Avalon California Pinot Noir closer. Your favorite wine speaks volumes – you like your wine dark red and know white wine is overrated. This bottle evokes nostalgia. Best for reminiscing good times with your lover – on a candle-lit dinner. Comes in a classic bottle and pairs well with pizza. What more would you ask for?

title: Avalon Red Blend
body_html: The bold Avalon Red Blend wine comes in cherry fruit and blackberry flavors. The fruity nature gives it a jammy feel and the taste of black pepper which is swallowed up by a long smooth finish of tannins. Avalon Red Blend wine goes well with beef, lamb, veal, and poultry.

title: Joel Gott Palisades Red Wine
body_html:
The Joel Gott Palisades red wine has a smell of toasted vanilla, leather, black currant, anise, plum and raspberry. Once it touches your tongue, you will taste a fruity burst of tannins with a touch of acidity that fades into the sweetness of vanilla.

This wine is best served with Spicy Peach-Glazed Pork Chops.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott Palisades Artist Series red wine has aromas of cherry pie and roasted coffee with notes of vanilla and spice. On the palate, bright cherry flavors lead to smooth tannins and subtle acidity on the mid-palate with notes of spice on the long, delicate finish.

title: Raeburn Russian River Pinot Noir
body_html:
Raeburn Russian River Pinot Noir

Raeburn Russian River Pinot Noir wine has a sweet smell of vanilla. Its beautiful crimson color is amplified by its taste which is fruity with a touch of blueberry, blackberry and raspberry and a far way hazelnut taste. Raeburn Russian River Pinot Noir goes best with foods like mushrooms and truffles.

title: Hall Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html: To fully enjoy the world’s civilized pleasures you need good wine, good food, and good company. You will never go wrong with Hall Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon, which is the only wine that goes down well with any meal, especially with lobster you get out of this world experiences that you live to remember.

title: Louis Jadot Rosé
body_html:
Louis Jadot Rosé

You'll taste raspberries and red currants every time you take a sip of Louis Jadot Rosé, so it might remind you of those times that you picked berries in the forest. If you're eating grilled fish, pasta, or grilled fish and pasta, this is the perfect wine. Maybe you'll be in a fine restaurant at the time admiring a nearby forest.

title: Bogle Vineyards Phantom Chardonnay
body_html:
Bogle Phantom Chardonnay will remind you of the best breakfast you ever had, given its notes of butter, vanilla, cream, fresh bread, and lemon. However, you probably won't want to serve it with a breakfast food.

Bogle Vineyards Phantom Chardonnay is a great wine to serve with crab cakes, grilled shrimp, or chicken Kiev.

FROM CLARKSBURG
The finest grapes from the best growing regions in California.

FRENCH OAK
French oak whispers sweet notes of vanilla and melted caramel.

BARREL FERMENTED
Barrel fermentation enhances flavor and delivers a smooth, creamy texture on the palate.

HAND STIRRED
Hand stirring every two weeks creates a silky, creamy mouth feel.

title: Piper Sonoma Brut Sparkling
body_html:
Piper Sonoma Brut Sparkling

Piper Sonoma Brut is a peculiar mix of Pinot Noir, Pinot Meunier, and Chardonnay. This disparate concoction gives this amazingly delicious champagne an astonishing amber hue. Furthermore, as soon as you taste this champagne, you’ll likely fall in love with the highly unusual mix of fabulous apple and vanilla flavors.

title: Daou Discovery Chardonnay
body_html:
Daou Discvoery Chardonnay

Unlike other beverages, Daou Vineyards Discovery Chardonnay is the only wine with unique, mystical quality.

No one is able to exactly craft its final outcome-its constantly evolving to present a bottled surprise.

Daou Discvoery Chardonnay can be added to food during cooking and it goes down well with bakers pudding.

title: Santa Cristina Delle Venezie Antinori Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Santa Cristina by Antinori Pinot Grigio

Since 1946, Santa Cristina has been producing Italinan wines that are a result of an enduring link between the vineyards, terroir, and the winemaker's unique guidance. This wine presents balanced aromas and flavors of peaches and ripe apples with a pleasant acidity. Perfect with appetizers and seafood.

title: Quintas de Melgaço Torre de Menagem Alvarinho
body_html:
Quintas de Melgaço Torre de Menagem Alvarinho Vinho Verde is made from grapes grown in granitic soils. The wine has a citrus and nectarine aroma. It is then layered with pear and textual fruit palate before being balanced with a mineral finish. You can serve it as an accompaniment to white meats, seafood or fish dishes.

This attractive wine is clear and citrine in colour. Along with its appearance, its fruity, delicate and persistent aroma with hints of tropical fruit is soft, balanced and irresistible to the taste.

title: Vaca das Cordas Vinho Verde
body_html: Vaca das Cordas Vinho Verde is made from a Dutch wine making tradition dating from 1645 where grapes are manually harvested and vinified in vat tanks. The white blend comes with optimum vibrancy, freshness, and distinctive aroma. It is a blend 30 percent Trajadura and 70 percent loureiro, which gives it a green and flinty style.

title: Prophecy Wines Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html: The smooth Prophecy Wines Cabernet Sauvignon comes with a sweet layer of blackberry mixed with raspberry and plum. It has an oaky base note and a smooth finish. The delicate mix of tasting tones gives a rather light taste on the tongue but incredibly smooth feel down your throat.

title: Mumm Napa Brut Rosé
body_html: Bursting with notes of strawberry and black cherry, Mumm Napa Brut Rosé is a festive wine that is great for any occasion. Serve it on ice as a relaxing drink or serve it up to your guests at a wedding. Although it is more Pino Noir than Chardonnay, the Chardonnay gives it a powerful power that is enough to have Uncle Fred on the dance floor with all the ladies. This wine tastes great with foods such as grilled lamb and salmon.

title: Mumm Napa Blanc De Blancs
body_html: This “white of whites” wine is great to indulge in on the beach or poolside. Take a bottole of Mumm Napa Blanc De Blancs to your favorite resort or party and you will be the one everyone wants to hang out with. This amazing wine boasts the flavors of citrus, apple, peach and brioche and pairs well with salads, oysters, and calamari.

title: Chandon Brut Split 187ml
body_html:
Domaine Chandon Brut Split Mini 187ml

Brut Classic by Domaine Chandon consistently expresses our signature flavor profile of apple, pear and citrus flavors and aromas with a hint of spice that leads to a soft, dry finish. This wine makes a great party favor for any event, use it at your wedding, or put it in your purse and take it on a weekend getaway. Chandon Brut is always ready for a good time.

title: Chandon Brut Rosé Mini 187ml
body_html:
Domaine Chandon Brut Rosé Mini 187ml

Chandon is a colorful wine that is full of flavor. If you pair any of these foods with this wonderful wine, you and your guests will experience a marvelous meal that will linger on your palates for a long time.

The Chandon Brut Rose has notes of wild strawberries and cream with ripe apple and just a small amount of peach blossom, with small persistent bubbles, and a medium-long finish. For all of these reasons, this wine is a great drink to consume before a meal to stimulate an appetite and it has just the right amount of intensity to make a nice food sparkler.

Also Buy Chandon Brut Rose Mini Aluminum 187ml

title: Menage a Trois Lavish Merlot
body_html:
Menage a Trois Lavish Merlot

Prepared from grapes of the leading California growing areas, Menage a Trois Lavish Merlot rings a bell of what it is like to be in love. Scents of rich, juicy blackberries, plums, and ripe black cherries flirt with sweet vanilla kisses and smoky spices in an inexcusable display of lusciousness. This wine goes well with BBQ ribs.

title: 19 Crimes The Punishment Pinot Noir
body_html:
19 Crimes The Punishment Pinot Noir

The 19 Crimes The Punishment Pinot Noir is a memoir of the rough-hewn prisoners who survived the harsh punishment by transportation that began in 1783. Its black cherry and cinnamon undertones start off as soft, pick up with acidity as the wine reaches the mid-palate and then finishes off with a floral flush. The wine tastes great with pork loin and kinds of steaks

title: Chateau Gassier Esprit Gassier Rosé
body_html:
Chateau Gassier Esprit Gassier Rosé

‘’Esprit Gassier” refers to the “Gassier Spirit” that unites the Côtes de Provence varietals with the perfect terroir of the Sainte-Victoire area to make a bottle of wine that puts across the family’s enthusiasm, knowledge, and originality. The gorgeous Esprit Gassier Rosé label, premeditated by a local artist, is silk-screened on the beautiful bottle to create an arresting package. The bottle’s mouth is curved with notes of citrus fruits and a healthy slight final acidity.

title: Domaine Ott Chateau de Selle Rosé
body_html:
Domaine Ott Chateau de Selle Rosé

The Domaine Ott Chateau de Selle Rosé features a distinguished sophistication, fullness and firm character thanks to the meticulous winemaking and vine trending process. The Mourvedre grape makes the largest composition of this wine creating the bold structure and capacity for ageing. This grape is complemented by the bold texture of the Grenache, the Cinsault that creates softness and the Syrah that gives the fruity roundness.

title: Caymus-Suisun Grand Durif Petite Sirah
body_html:
Caymus-Suisun Grand Durif Petite Sirah

Grand Durif is our special wine produced from a little know valley, which has produced wine since 1862. With Climatic conditions equal to neighboring Napa Valley, The SUISUN (SU-SOON) VALLEY is renowned for its lush, flavorful fruits and vegetables. Yet the Suisun soils and climate can also produce dark, exquisite and age-worthy wines that are rich and magnificent. Our luxurious DURIF is made following rigorous and uncompromising standards in both the vineyards and winery,. The wine making process begins by thinning the crop by hand to ensure low yields of uniformly ripe clusters followed by long, cool fermentation and barrel aging in French Oak.

Made from a robust and tannic Petite Sirah, the Grand Durif is rich, ripe and full-bodied. Dominated by flavors of black plum, cherry, and cassis, oak aging adds notes of mocha, baking spice, and clove that are irresistible. Already a critic favorite, don’t miss the inaugural release of Caymus’ new baby!

title: Firesteed Willamette Valley Pinot Noir
body_html:
Firesteed Willamette Valley Pinot Noir

Firesteed Willamette Valley Pinot Noir has a very pale color but strong flavors that mirror the strength of the horse symbol that is associated with this estate. Enjoy hints of raspberry and cinnamon on the nose and delicious tastes of cocoa powder and cherries. Perfect for elegant dinner parties and pairs well with grilled steak.

title: Daou Vineyards Soul of a Lion Red
body_html:
Daou Vineyards Estate Soul of a Lion Red

Daou Vineyard Soul of a Lion Red is a robust wine that is the flagship red of this premium estate. 

Daou Vineyard Soul of a Lion Red Blend pairs perfectly with dishes with strong flavors such as roast lamb, venison pie, and roast duck.

On the palate, you can taste blackcurrant, graphite, wood, and ash which are typical of the old world style of this wine.

title: Caymus Cabernet Sauvignon 2016
body_html:
Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Vibrant as well as impressive, this Caymus Cabernet Sauvignon is cultivated in the sun-drenched state of California. Furthermore, this wine has a delicious tart flavor coupled with a great vanilla aftertaste that will delight your senses. This bottle of wine also pairs well with a high-quality steak.

 

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • 2016
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Domaine Serene R Rosé
body_html:
Domaine Serene R Dry Rosé Wine

The "R" is a very delicate style of Rosé with a dry finish that still retains a fresh, fruity taste. Perfect for drinking in the Spring at parties or even elegant dinners with friends. Enjoy tastes of strawberry and passion fruit with aromas of citrus and peach. Pairs well with seafood dishes but can by drunk on its own.

Rosé "r" is a delicate, dry style rosé artfully blended to achieve a graceful balance of freshness and richness along with an array of exotic fruit characteristics. This fascinating blend delivers on aromatic complexity, flavor intensity and textural balance.

title: Uppercut Rosé Wine Can
body_html:
Uppercut Rosé Wine Can

With today's Rosé craze in full swing you might be wondering what the hype is about. You will find out when you enjoy a delicious can of Uppercut Rosé Wine. It's lighter than most other red wines and you'll find it pairs extremely well with seafood dishes and other similar delicacies.

title: Uppercut White Blend Wine Can
body_html:
Uppercut White Blend Wine Can

This bright wine offers a pure fruit expression, combining aromatic pineapple and citrus fruits that leap into action with every sip. Backed up with a typical hint of Asian lemongrass to finish off that crisp taste of a classic sauvignon blanc. Splendid with grilled swordfish or blue marlin.

title: Uppercut Red Blend Wine Can
body_html:
Uppercut Red Blend Wine Can

The finest flavors are a perfect combination of the dark fruit and well-structured tannin. Uppercut Red Blend, such a smooth wine inspires you into the elegant nose. Feel the acidity of the wine with steaks and ribs of beef. Embrace the bold wine flavor with tones of caramel.

title: Soleil Mimosa Classic Sparkling Can
body_html:
Soleil Mimosa Classic Sparkling

375ml Can

It can be difficult to resist a delicious mimosa, especially when you try this Soleil Mimosa Classic Sparkling Wine in a Can. As an excellent brunch companion, it perfectly complements a hot fluffy pancake. Though you won't find this Mimosa served at your local IHOP you may find yourself seeking it out at a brunch buffet near you.

title: Stella Rosa Pink Mini 187ml
body_html:
Top Selling Stella Rosa Pink

Stella Rosa Pink Mini Split 187ml

Flirty, fun, and young are the words to describe this Stella Rosa Pink Split, the semi-sweet, semi-sparkling wine that is understated. She’s a tease on the eyes but means business on the palate. 187 ml Minis – Adds a delicate touch of elegance to gatherings and goody bags.

Fun wine is Strawberry and rose petals

The flavor profile for this flirty fun wine is Strawberry and rose petals, a delight that will be enjoyed by everyone.

Pair the Stella Rosa Pink with Gorgonzola and Brie cheeses, seafood linguine, braised salmon, black cherry chocolate cake, berry tart. Check out Quality Liquor Store

title: Gekkeikan Zipang Sparkling Sake
body_html:
Gekkeikan Zipang Sparkling Sake

250ml

From the House of Gekkeikan, Zipang Sparkling Sake is a fun and unique new sake. It is lightly carbonated while its sparkling style is obtained by secondary fermentation which occurs in a closed tank. Gekkeikan Zipang Sparkling Sake can be used to celebrate your anniversary, promotion, or even graduation. It perfectly pairs with a variety of appetizers and spicy food.

title: Mezzacorona Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Mezzacorona Pinot Grigio

Mezzacorona Pinot Grigio will make you think of an apple orchard on a sunny afternoon, since it has notes of apple and honeysuckle. This wine would go very well with grilled halibut and cilantro garlic butter or creamy smoked salmon pasta. It'll be like going to a fancy restaurant and a beautiful outdoor farm all at the same time.

title: Rombauer Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Rombauer Vineyards Merlot

The Rombauer Vineyards Merlot is like a lot of good movies: it starts off subtle and becomes much bolder and more dramatic later. The oak, cherries, and plums blend perfectly. Movies and beverages like that both tend to stay with you, especially if you decide to try them both at the same time.

TASTING NOTES

Ripe black plum, black tea and mint aromas mingle in the glass with subtle scents of spice, freshly baked pie crust, and vanilla. This wine's lively palate jumps with cherry and plum flavors with a touch of mint and hint of spice, all giving way to notes of dark chocolate and vanilla. Its signature palate is framed by very fine, yet soft tannins and a refreshing length, enhanced by its acidity.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Moscato Spumante Mini 187ml
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Moscato Spumate

Mini 187ml

Barefoot Bubbly Moscato Spumante Mini 187ml is a perfect fit for that night with friends or the special occasion you are planning. This deliciously sweet sparkling wine is laced with the peachy and apricot flavors that is mixed up with crisp acidity with edgy tangerine taste. This wine pairs well with any meal or dessert.

title: Wagners Caymus Red Schooner Voyage 6
body_html:
Wagner Family Red Schooner Voyage 6

While Caymus is arguably the Wagner family’s most famous wine, this rule-breaking Wagner Family Red Schooner Voyage 6 is a worthy addition to the portfolio. Full of cherries, plums, and soft, supple tannins, the Voyage 6 is made using Andes-grown Malbec produced in Napa using signature Caymus Cabernet techniques.

This Red Schooner Voyage 6 pairs well with a nice juicy steak seasoned to perfection and grilled medium rare.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Brut Rosé Mini 187ml
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Brut Rosé

Mini 187ml

Barefoot Pink Moscato = Same Look

Barefoot Bubbly Rosé Mini 187ml is perfect choice for the café lunches outdoors, ladies night out, a day at the pool or any whimsical event that your heart may desire. This treat is laced with flavors including a bit of sweet citrus aroma wafting in the background with an amazing hint of strawberry. The red berry and sweet berry flavors will not miss your tongue once you get the sip. Barefoot Rosé can pair perfectly with chilled pasta salad, almonds, or fruit plate.

title: Casillero Del Diablo Pinot Noir
body_html:
Casillero Del Diablo Pinot Noir

Let loose and have some fun while enjoying a bottle of Casillero Del Diablo Pinot Noir, a wine that has been described as having a slight immature edge to it. Whether you want to relax on the deck while watching the sun set or hitting the town with your friends, this wine will make the night better. Pair it with a beef roast and mashed potatoes for a great dinner.

title: Casillero del Diablo Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Casillero del Diablo Sauvignon Blanc

Casillero del Diablo Sauvignon Blanc is so good it will leave you feeling like you are floating in the Pacific Ocean near Chile, the country this wine originates from. This award-winning wine tastes like fresh peaches and goes very well with a plate of sea bass and pasta. A great wine to take to the beach and listen to the waves roll in.

title: King Estate Willamette Valley Pinot Gris
body_html:
King Estate Willamette Valley Pinot Gris

Our flagship wine, King Estate Willamette Valley Pinot Gris, reflects an excellence recognized worldwide. Made with the best selection of grapes each year, The King Estate Pinot Gris is sourced primarily from King Estate’s certified Biodynamic and organic vineyard as well as a handful of like-minded sustainably-farmed vineyards throughout the Willamette Valley.

91 PTS Editor's Choice - Wine Enthusiast

title: SeaGlass Rosé Wine
body_html:
SeaGlass Rosé Wine

Sweet strawberries on the palate and lush hibiscus on the nose give this refreshing Rose wine from SeaGlass winery elegant character. Light acidity balances the fruit-forward wine, with just a hint of dryness to prevent this wine from being cloyingly sweet. This pink wine pairs best with a simple spinach salad or grilled prawns.

A fragrant nose of wild strawberries and dried rose petals, echoing the ocean’s whisper across our Monterey County vineyards. A refreshing acidity balances the bright, juicy cherry and ripe raspberry flavors on the palate. This one belongs at every summer table.

TASTING NOTES

A beautiful reflection of Monterey County’s pristine coastal terroir, our Rosé opens with fragrant wild strawberries and dried rose petals on the nose. Flavors of juicy cherry and ripe raspberry are balanced by refreshing acidity and a crisp, clean finish. This vibrant wine is a diverse menu partner, pairing exceptionally well with prosciutto and melon or crab cakes with spicy aioli.

title: Monte Xanic Viña Kristel Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Monte Xanic Viña Kristel Sauvignon Blanc White

The next time you're helping yourself to a dry white to add to your closet or simply chill and open, don't forget that Mexico has begun offering some truly classic wines that just aren't that far from what you might find in Southern California including these rich, mineral whites that can hold their one against whatever you just pulled or purchased out of the ocean.

title: Monte Xanic Calixa Cabernet Sauvignon Syrah
body_html:
Monte Xanic Calixa Cabernet Sauvignon Syrah

Monte Xanic Calixa Cabernet Sauvignon-Syrah is a moderately intense, clean wine. Imported from Mexico, this cherry-colored wine offers a beautiful bouquet of flavors including plum, blackberry, vanilla, cinnamon, chocolate, and wood. This cabernet sauvignon-syrah blend pairs well with foods such as hamburgers and other grilled foods, pastas and pizzas, and Asian cuisine.

title: Wente Riva Ranch Chardonnay
body_html:
Wente Riva Ranch Chardonnay

Single Vineyard

For five generations, our family has been dedicated to the art of wine-making and to the philosophy that the quality of a wine originates in the vineyard. Our single Vineyard Chardonnay is sourced exclusively from our family's Riva Ranch Vineyard in Arroyo Seco, Moneterey, and has a perfect balance of tropical fruit and acidity with creamy notes of butter, vanilla and subtle oak from barrel aging.

Recognized as "California's First Family of Chardonnay, our family was the first in California to produce a varietally labeled Chardonnay made from our Wente clone. Today, many of the great Chardonnay vineyards in California are planted with the Wente clone, which originated from our family's estate.

title: Orin Swift Cellars 8 Years in the Desert 2016 - 8 Bottle Set
body_html:
Orin Swift Cellars 8 Years in the Desert 2016 Red Wine

8 Bottle Set

We proudly present you Orin Swift Cellars 8 Years in the Desert 2016 Red Wine, a perfect blend of Zinfandel, Petite Sirah, Syrah and a small amount of other red varietals. It is a dark garnet with a lucid rim, a charming aroma of briar, blackberry, and dark plum fruit. It is deep purple in the glass, and with a deep chewy palate and a hint of espresso.

A bit brawny, mid-palate, it has a complex mix of flavors of ripe fruit making it a perfect match for Ground Lamb, Lamb Chops, Leg of Lamb, or BBQ & Grilled Lamb.

title: Miraval Côtes de Provence Rosé
body_html:
Miraval Côtes de Provence Rosé

Don’t be as bored as Mr. and Mrs. Smith once were and partake in a few glasses of Miraval Côtes de Provence Rosé by, you guessed it, Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie. By the sea or by the pool, this delicious wine will hit the spot and it pairs very well with sea bass and an Asian salad.

Brangelina were known to take an active interest in producing the wine.

The first 1,000 cases of wine produced by Hollywood A-listers Brad Pitt and Angelina Jolie were sold out within hours.

A trio of Decanter panel tasters subsequently gave Miraval Côtes de Provence Rosé an average score of 91 points out of 100.

title: Ruffino Prosecco Mini 187ml
body_html:
Ruffino Prosecco Split Mini 187ml

Ruffino Prosecco Mini Split is non-vintage Italian wine at its finest. Brilliant in color, the straw yellow appearance of this product and ample amount of bubbles attests to its quality. Its aroma is fresh and fruity. It smells of apples, citrus fruit, pears, hawthorn, elder, and wisteria. The flavor it delivers is of fresh fruits such as peaches and apples.

title: Clos du Bois Rosé
body_html:
Clos du Bois Rosé

The Clos du Bois Rosé wine has a strawberry pink color with dazzling aromas of ripe red berries. Slightly sweet and crispy, this wine contains notes of juicy red cherry, strawberry, watermelon and cranberry tastes with a hint of pizzazz. The Clos du Bois Rosé is bright, light and finely balanced and can pair well with foods like crispy waffles and fried chicken.

TASTING NOTES

Vibrant, Pomegranate, Strawberry, Citrus

title: Simi Rosé
body_html:
Simi Rosé

The light, salmon-colored Simi Dry Rose wine is made primarily from California's best Cabernet Sauvignon grapes. Sweet and fruity, this wine has aromas of wild strawberries and rose hips, with light acidity and an elegant, dry finish. Ideal with grilled shrimp or seared scallops, and refreshing on a hot summer's day.

title: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Rum Barrel-Aged Merlot
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Private Selection Rum Barrel-Aged Merlot

The sweetness of dark rum is imparted to the rich red merlot as the Robert Mondavi Private Selection Rum Barrel-Aged Merlot ages. Plum, fruity jam flavors meld with aromas of blueberries and dark chocolate, with hints of sweet dark molasses from the rum. This wine pairs nicely with a rich New York Strip steak, charred to perfection.

title: Mezzacorona Rosé
body_html:
Mezzacorona Italian Rosé

Mezzacorona Rosé is made with Lagrein grapes, a local varietal from Trentino Alto Adige region. The grapes are hand-picked in early September. During the rosé vinification process, the grapes undergo cold maceration for 12 hours, followed by a soft pressing, in order to obtain a partial extraction of color from the berries while retaining freshness of the fruity aromas.

Ideal as an aperitif but also a perfect match with Italian cuisine.

title: Domaine Serene Evenstad Reserve Pinot Noir
body_html:
Domaine Serene Evenstad Reserve Pinot Noir

Add a note of class to your parties this holiday season with a bottle of Domaine Serene Evenstad Reserve Pinot Noir. This wine pairs well with meats such as beef, veal, game, and chicken. Promote yourself as a wine expert by drinking the flagship wine of this well-known estate. Enjoy notes of raspberry and chocolate on the palate.

title: Essentially Geared Rosé Wine Can
body_html:
Essentially Geared Rosé Wine Can

The perfect compliment for a Summer evening, a bonfire or a party with an Ocean view Essentially Geared Rosé Wine pairs well with sushi, salad, and Chinese takeout. Essentially Geared Rosé Wine packs fruit flavor with a smooth finish, that brings the cool to Sunday Brunch or weeknight Happy Hour.

title: Essentially Geared Sauvignon Blanc Wine Can
body_html:
Essentially Geared Sauvignon Blanc Wine Can

Enjoy a drink of crisp white wine wherever you go this holiday with this Essentially Geared Sauvignon Blanc Wine Can. This wine is perfect for pairing with corn dogs, BBq's and all the fun of summer. Light and fruity this is the ideal drink for every occasion with friends or family.

title: Essentially Geared Chardonnay Wine Can
body_html:
Essentially Geared Chardonnay Wine Can

This Chardonnay is the perfect drink for summer parties with friends in all the fun places. The Essentially Geared Chardonnay Wine Can is easy to transport no matter how far off the beaten track you are headed. Pairs perfectly with the comfort foods of life such as fried chicken and ramen noodles.

title: Essentially Geared Bubbles Wine Can
body_html:
Essentially Geared Bubbles Wine Can

This is the ultimate party drink in a can that is designed to fit in at any event. Bring the fun to the party with this Essentially Geared Bubbles Wine Can. Paired with interesting foods such as pop rocks and creamsicles, you will be at the center of every party with this drink.

title: Sutter Home Rosé
body_html:
Sutter Home Rosé

With the hints of strawberry and delicate floral tones, the Sutter Home Rosé will seem like a beautiful work of art. This wine will go perfectly with an asparagus and cheese appetizer, Greek chicken salad, and ricotta. These are also the sorts of dishes that people might enjoy at a fine art gallery opening.

title: Bonterra Organic Equinox Red Blend
body_html:
Bonterra Vineyards Organic Equinox Red Blend

Twice a year the sun crosses the celestial equator, resulting in a day and night of equal length. These occurrences are referred to as "equinoxes," and the twin lengths of day and night when they occur are amount the many ways nature demonstrates balance. At Bonterra, we strive for a similar natural balance in our organic vineyards and in our wines.

Equinox Red celebrates this vision, offering supple notes of juicy red and black fruit matched with a patina of intriguing spice, herb and oak tones.

title: House Wine Rosé Bubbles LE Can
body_html:
House Wine Rosé Bubbles Can

"Limited Edition"

Take your favorite bubbly drink to all the parties this holiday season with the easy to transport House Wine Rosé Bubbles Can. You won't have to worry about breaking a glass bottle and the can is easy to open. Enjoy the summery flavors of citrus and strawberry with a crisp finish. Pairs well with desserts and spicy Asian dishes.

title: Valley of the Moon Chardonnay
body_html:
Valley of the Moon Chardonnay

The Valley of the Moon Chardonnay is so smooth, zesty, and lively it will be like spending a day at the beach with a group of friends that are all playful and adventurous. You'll want to try this with salmon or tuna that's been prepared with a really rich sauce, which will remind you of the beach in a different way.

title: Wilson Creek Orange Mimosa Sparkling Wine
body_html:
Top Selling Mimosa's

Wilson Creek Orange Mimosa Sparkling Wine

Looking for a top selling Wilson Creek Orange Mimosa Sparkling Wine? Your search is over with our finest selection of sparkling wines. 

Sparkling wine with hints of orange and tangerine

A unique sparkling wine with hints of orange and tangerine, creating our own version of the famous Mimosa. See More Sparkling Wines

Popular for celebrations

For more than a decade, our sparkling wines have become not only popular for celebrations, but the favorite choice for any occasion. Not what your looking for? Try these suggestions!

title: Wilson Creek Rosé Sparkling Wine
body_html:
Wilson Creek Rosé Sparkling Wine

Wilson Creek Rosé Sparkling Wine is made in the traditional method using in bottle yeast fermentation. This wine is crisp and elegant with a hint of strawberries and cranberry on the palate. Add a sense of fun and drama to your next party with this bubbly, fruity wine. Pairs perfectly with sweet desserts such as cheesecake.

Wilson Creek Rosé is a traditional sparkling rose with a hint of strawberry and cranberry. For more than a decade, our sparkling wines have become not only popular for celebrations, but the favorite choose for any occasion.

Find out more about Wilson Creek Rosé Here.

title: Wilson Creek Coconut Nui Sparkling Wine
body_html:
Wilson Creek Coconut Nui Sparkling Wine

A refreshingly different sparkling wine featuring hints of coconut that will take your mind to an island paradise. Try the fun-loving Wilson Creek Coconut Nui Sparkling Wine this summer holiday. Natural coconut flavors are infused into the wine bringing out a new taste sensation. This drink goes perfectly with Jerk Chicken and other tropical dishes.

A unique sparkling wine with hints of coconut, creating our own favorite island paradise. For more than a decade, our sparkling wines have become not only popular for celebrations, but the favorite choice for any occasion.

TASTING NOTES

Semi-sweet or off-dry

title: Cakebread Cellars Merlot
body_html:
Cakebread Cellars Merlot

The Cakebread Cellars Merlot has the sorts of berry and herbal flavors that will make you feel like you're staying at a fancy resort where they feed you all-natural food in a scenic location. You should drink it with roast chicken cooked with onions and thyme, which is the sort of dish you'd eat at a resort like this.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Merlot

title: Cucina Mista Moscato d'Asti
body_html:
Cucina Mista Moscato d'Asti

A brilliant light color with rich aromas of peaches, and a touch of floral notes invite you to taste this Cucina Mista Moscato d'Asti wine. On the palate, there are soft, crisp flavors of peach, apricot and honey that balance perfectly with the light carbonation making this a perfect sipping wine when chilled.

title: Dark Horse Pinot Grigio Can
body_html:
Dark Horse Pinot Grigio Can

Bursting with the flavors of Granny Smith apples with a hint of lemon zest, Dark Horse Pinot Grigio Cans are perfect to tote along in your cooler to a party on the beach or to sip with a great meal of grilled pork chops and deviled eggs. The convenient cans also make Dark Horse Pinot Grigio an amazing option as favors for a wedding shower or reception.

title: Dark Horse Rosé Can
body_html:
Dark Horse Rosé Can

Dark Horse Rosé Cans are so versatile that they are great to take in a cooler with you to check out your favorite band in concert or can be used as a classy and chic party favor at a wedding or graduation party. Featuring a burst of red fruit flavors, this wine pairs well with pork sausages right off the grill along with peppers and eggplant.

title: Murphy-Goode Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Murphy-Goode Pinot Grigio

Murphy-Goode Pinot Grigio is a great wine to sip on the deck after a hard day at work or at a party with a group of wonderful friends. With beautiful floral notes and the flavors of citrus and pear, this wine is delectable with a light, seafood pasta or a salad flanked with salmon.

title: Spoken Barrel Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine
body_html:
Spoken Barrel Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine

With the fun flavors of fruits and pepper with a hint of berries dipped in white chocolate, Spoken Barrel Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine is an excellent wine to share with that special someone over a candlelit dinner or at a party on the beach. This wine is delicious when paired with hearty foods like a big bowl of chili or beef stir-fry.

title: Cooper & Thief Tequila Barrel Aged Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Cooper and Thief Cellarmasters Tequila Barrel Aged Sauvignon Blanc

An Artisan Wine Sauvignon Blanc Aged 3 Months In Tequila Barrels. Some winemaking traditions were meant to be broken.

That's why we rested our Bright & Crisp Sauvignon Blanc in Aged Anejo Tequila Barrels.

And when we cracked that barrel open after 3 Months, let's just say we knew pretty quickly that we were on to something Good.

Cooper & Thief Sauvignon Blanc is a Rich wine with hints of Citrus & Spice. Toasty Vanilla flavors and complex Floral aromas. It finishes with a Smooth Mouth Feel reminiscent of a Fine Tequila.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • 2016
  • Tequila Aged Sauvignon Blanc

title: Bollicini Sparkling Cuvée Can 187ml
body_html:
Bollicini Sparkling Cuvée

Can Mini Split 187ml

The Bollicini Sparkling Cuvée Can Mini is a great wine to bring to a celebration in more ways than one. After all, this wine might remind you of that emotionally steady friend who's great with people and who's always the life of the party. Smoked salmon and sharp cheeses will liven up this wine even further, although it really doesn't need it.

title: Bollicini Sparkling Rosé Can 187ml
body_html:
Bollicini Sparkling Rosé

Mini Split Can 187ml

If you've ever wanted to go to a party where everyone is just happy and relaxed, the Bollicini Sparkling Rosé Can Mini will give you that experience. If you're actually going to a party like that, this will be the perfect wine to take. The undertones of berries and cream are delicious, and they'll help contribute to a fun atmosphere.

title: Spoken Barrel Meritage Red Blend
body_html:
Spoken Barrel Meritage Red Blend

Drinking the Spoken Barrel Meritage Red Blend is like spending time with a fascinating free spirit who can turn anything into an interesting conversation. Thanks to the hints of red plum, chocolate, oak, citrus and blueberries, you'll know that you're with a sweet yet varied person. The strong tannin content will linger like an engaging discussion that you're still thinking about a decade later.

title: Charles Smith Band Of Roses Rosé
body_html:
Charles Smith Band Of Roses Rosé

The Charles Smith Band Of Roses Rosé wine is like that energizing best friend that you have who's always in a good mood and who knows how to make you feel better right away. The wine's citric and floral tastes are comforting and invigorating. Your cheerful best friend might want to take you out for a porterhouse steak or an eggplant pizza, and those dishes would perfectly complement this wine.

title: Decoy Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Decoy Sauvignon Blanc

Grassy knose with floral hints. This clean, crisp Decoy Sauvignon Blanc will strike your palate with melon, green apple and lemon zest , transporting you to the carefree days of summers spent frolicking on Grandpa's farm. Pair with decadent dishes: Angels on Horseback, Crab in Oyster Sauce, or grilled asparagus.

90 Points - Wine Enthusiast

title: Rombauer Diamond Selection Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Rombauer Diamond Selection Cabernet Sauvignon

Rombauer Diamond Selection Cabernet Sauvignon’s sophisticated bottle design isn’t all show. It’s what preserves the exquisite flavors of the red fruit. The black bottle with a diamond-shaped label isn’t just a fashion accessory, although it goes well with another classic, the little black dress. Showing up with dark blackberry, cassis, and black cherry wine to any engagement lets people know how serious you are about enjoying it. The wine’s light notes of milk chocolate, vanilla, and tobacco help it go well with game meats such as venison or grilled lamb chops.

title: Mirassou Chardonnay White Wine
body_html:
Mirassou Chardonnay White Wine

Look no further than this Mirassou Chardonnay White Wine for a crisp wine with plenty of beautiful, fruity flavors like peaches, pineapple, melon, citrus and pears. There are also hints of vanilla and florals to round it out and provide a creamy feel. It pairs beautifully with a mango caprese salad.

title: Mirassou Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Mirassou Vineyards Pinot Noir

By the bonfire on a cool, summer night. On the Thanksgiving dinner table with family and friends gathered around. Toasted in a glass with that someone special. You’ll find Mirassou Pinot Noir has a way of making all those special occasions feel, well, special!

title: Blanc de Bleu Cuvee Mousseux Brut Mini 187ml
body_html:
Blanc de Bleu Cuvee Mousseux Brut

187ml Mini Split

Place a bottle of this Blanc de Bleu Cuvee Mousseux Brut Mini right on each table for that next special event. With plenty of blueberry flavor, as well as aroma, and a sparkling accent, this wine pairs well with your best appetizers or your favorite sushi. It's something everyone will love taking home.

title: Blanc de Bleu Cuvee Mousseux Brut
body_html:
Blanc de Bleu Cuvee Mousseux Brut

When it's time to celebrate any occasion this Blanc de Bleu Cuvee Mousseux Brut is a great choice to place at every table for your guests. A miniature bottle with all of the great flavor, this sparkling wine offers a hint of blueberry and pairs perfectly with your favorite appetizer or even sushi.

title: Mirassou Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine
body_html:
Mirassou Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine

This full bodied, bold Mirassou Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine will enliven all your senses with flavors of blackberries and currants, accentuated by aromas of nutmeg, allspice, and vanilla. Try a glass alongside your ribeye steak dinner for a pairing that's sure to blow your guests away, and leave you reaching for another bottle.

title: Palazzo Right Bank Red Wine
body_html:
Palazzo Right Bank Red Wine

Filled with aromas of black currants, roast espresso, cherries and dark chocolate, Palazzo Right Bank Red Wine has a savory mouthfeel, leaving you craving for more. With a rich flavor and vibrant fruity taste, this excellent wine can be paired with either Duck Breast, Grilled Veal Chops or Roast Pork.

title: The Prisoner Chardonnay
body_html:
The Prisoner Chardonnay

Looking for a smooth, luxurious Chardonnay? The Prisoner Chardonnay is the perfect choice. With a rich aroma of ripe fruits and a hint of oak, this wine has a full-bodied flavor that is both complex and satisfying.

Crafted with care by experienced winemakers, The Prisoner Chardonnay is aged in oak barrels for a deep, velvety texture. You'll savor every sip of this premium wine, with its notes of vanilla and citrus.

Whether you're pairing it with a meal or enjoying it on its own, The Prisoner Chardonnay is sure to impress. Order a bottle today and experience the ultimate in wine indulgence.

Blend:
Chardonnay, Roussanne, Gewürztraminer

Aroma:
Vanilla, Apple Pie, Pineapple

Tasting Notes:
Baked Apple, Crème Brûlée, Toasted Oak

Pair with:
Chef Brett recommends pairing The Prisoner Chardonnay with a Grilled Cheese Sandwich or Halibut with Browned Butter, Lemon, and Capers

title: d66 Department 66 Facade Grenache Gris
body_html:
d66 Department 66 Facade Grenache Gris

Reminiscent of a California Gray Riesling, this cousin to Grenache Noir and Grenache Blanc, Department 66 Facade Grenache Gris, is earthy and spicy with a slightly oily palate that is similar to a Petit Syrah. Pair with hearty, braised meats (veal, lamb, chicken, beef, coarse game), cassoulet or delicately flavored Asian cuisine.

title: J Vineyards California Pinot Noir
body_html:
J Vineyards California Pinot Noir

J Vineyards California Pinot Noir has aromatic notes of spice, cherry preserves, and black tea. The palate is plush, jammy, and ripe with flavors of spicy black pepper, cola, and plum. The foods that will go just right with this wine are roast leg of lamb with a balsamic-fig reduction or cranberry glazed roast turkey breast with creamy mushroom risotto.

title: Kunde Magnolia Lane Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Kunde Magnolia Lane Sauvignon Blanc

Kunde Magnolia Lane Sauvignon Blanc is a medium bodied wine that burst with tropical fruit flavors such as guava and pineapple. Look forward to a smidgen of sweetness with a crisp finish that lingers on the tongue for awhile. The tangy aromas pair exceptionally well with seafood or spicy dishes.

title: Conundrum Rosé by Caymus
body_html:
Conundrum Rosé by Caymus

Conundrum Rosé by Caymus Wine is dry, sophisticated, and bold. The goal of its winemakers was to make a Rose that is uniquely bright and colorful, with more character than the majority of people expect. It is made mostly out of Valdique which makes this rose fruity, but not sweet. It has scents and flavors of strawberries and ripe peaches, which makes it an ideal wine for spring and summer. Foods that you can cook to serve with this wine include Tapas, Salads and cold vegetables, seafood and fish, Paella and rice dishes, chicken, pork, veal, and a variety of cheeses.

title: Acrobat Pinot Gris
body_html:
Acrobat Pinot Gris

The Acrobat Pinot Gris wine is light gold in color. It has bright, crisp flavors. This wine also has rose petal elements on the nose highlight its balanced citrus components of lemon and grapefruit. Following the nose, are flavors of fresh lime, lemon zest, and green apple. These flavors mingle on the mid-palate, rounding out a medium-bodied mouthfeel with a bright and refreshing finish. Foods you can prepare to serve with this wine are soy roast duck with hoisin gravy, crispy pork and vegetable rolls, and lettuce rolls.

TASTING NOTES

Rose petal elements on the nose highlight aromas of apple, pear and orange blossom. Following the nose are flavors of crisp Fuji apple, pear and minerality.

title: Apothic Brew Red Wine
body_html:
Apothic Brew

Infused With Cold Brew Coffee

Blended with Intrigue, Apothic Brew stirs your senses. Inspired by a passion for coffee, our winemaker has crafted an infusion like never before. This Limited Release Red Blend is Infused with Cold Brew Coffee. Notes of red fruit and toasted oak combine with hints of cold brew for a well-balanced blend that captivates you from the firsts pour.

Red Wine Infused With Cold Brew Coffee.

title: Irvine & Roberts Vineyards Estate Pinot Noir
body_html:
Irvine & Roberts Vineyards Estate Pinot Noir

Irvine & Roberts Vineyards Estate Pinot Noir is made from fruit that thrives in warm days and cool nights to achieve optimal maturity. It also creates a wine that bursts with flavors of red ripe and black fruit and intriguing spices.

From apps to desserts, these are the foods that should be prepared to serve with this wine: bacon stuffed mushrooms, Peking duck, roasted beef tenderloin, plank grilled salmon steaks, roast pork loin with potatoes and herbs, mushroom sauce, cheeses (Brie, Camembert, and goat cheese), and tuxedo strawberries for dessert. If you prepare these foods to go with this Pinot Noir, you will have a perfect meal.

title: Juggernaut Hillside Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Juggernaut Hillside Cabernet Sauvignon

Juggernaut Hillside Cabernet Sauvignon displays flavors of slightly earthy, dark fruits, with mild tannins to produce a smooth finish. The medium-bodied wine is favored by many as it exhibits aromas of dried herbs and cassis with hints of spice. Rack of lamb, Barbecue chicken, and risotto cakes pairs well with this wine.

Hillside vineyards are special. So is the wine that is crafted from them.

Wine Notes: Steep hillside vineyards present the ultimate challenge, but the results are extraordinary. The harsh conditions yield fewer clusters and smaller berries. The intensely flavored grapes are aged in new French oak barrels that creates a wine with luxurious flavor and texture. rich, ripe, and delicious.

Find information about Juggernaut. Everything you need here at Juggernaut Wine.

100% HILLSIDE VINEYARDS APPELLATION LIVERMORE VALLEY SIERRA FOOTHILLS ALEXANDER VALLEY LAKE COUNTY
  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Irvine & Roberts Vineyards Estate Chardonnay
body_html:
Irvine & Roberts Vineyards Estate Chardonnay

Irvine & Roberts Vineyards Estate Chardonnay bursts with flavors of intriguing floral aromas, stone fruit, and ripe citrus. This wine was produced in a style that evokes balance, elegance, and richness in texture and flavors. Lightly cooked shellfish such as prawns and crab, grilled and steamed fish pairs well with Chardonnay.

title: Stave & Steel Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Stave & Steel Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon

Stave & Steel Bourbon Barrel Aged Cabernet Sauvignon is aged for four months to impart additional layers of complexity, depth, and flavor. The result is a Cabernet that is full-bodied, refined, and with bold fruit flavors. Dark cherry, blackberry, and plum enrich the palate, provides an excellent structure, and has generous tannins. The bourbon influences add notes of vanilla, caramel, and spice that lead to a long, smooth finish.

Foods to serve with this Cabernet Sauvignon are steak, hamburgers, braised short ribs, roasted or grilled lamb, portabella mushrooms, and hard cheeses like aged cheddar or gouda.

title: Love Noir Rosé
body_html:
Love Noir Rosé

Love Noir Rosé embodies elegant floral notes, coupled with luscious fruit flavors it sure is a luxurious, seductive wine. Sourced from California's finest grapes, this wine delivers vibrant aromatics that creates a lush mouthfeel. The wine pairs well with an arugula salad with Stilton cheese or shaved parmesan, topped with smoked salmon.

title: TY KU Junmai Sake Daiginjo Ultra Premium
body_html:
TY KU Junmai Sake Daiginjo Ultra Premium

720ml

TY KU Sake Daiginjo Ultra Premium Sake is a very elite and highly rare Sake. It is also the “top destination for all Sakes.” This Sake is also for the true connoisseur as the people that have the ability to appreciate and distinguish the very best. It is also the crown jewel of all Sakes.

This Sake is made of four ingredients- premium, non-GMO rice, pure soft water, yeast, and handmade koji. These ingredients make it one of the purest alcoholic beverages on the planet.
