It is also a clean alternative to wine has 12 to 15 percent alcohol by volume and is Gluten-free, Sulfite-free, Tannin-free, and it is five times less acidic than wine. It is also handcrafted at and imported from the well-known Umenoyado right in the heart of Nara, Japan.

If you are in need of foods to serve with this Sake, you can serve mushroom risotto, burritos, hot dogs, fried chicken, popcorn, and chocolate bundt cake. They will bring out the flavor of this best Sake ever.

title: Simple Life Rosé Wine
body_html:
Simple Life Rosé Wine

The Simple Life Rose Wine has vibrant aromas of fresh florals, red fruits, and zesty citrus. The palate holds refreshing flavors of juicy strawberry, watermelon, cranberry, and hibiscus. Even though this wine tastes great all by itself, it pairs well with a fresh Caprese salad, smoked Gouda and mushroom quesadillas, and grilled salmon with pesto sauce.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Rosé

title: Cupcake Butterkissed Chardonnay
body_html:
Cupcake BUTTERKISSED Chardonnay

The Cupcake Butterkissed Chardonnay wine is wonderfully opulent and full of strong tastes and scents. It's possible to detect undertones of lemon as well as vanilla and cream. This wine has both sweetness and substance. The Cupcake Butterkissed Chardonnay would be ideally served alongside a dish that featured a lot of rich cheeses, such as chicken cooked with Parmesan, wood-fired pizza, or lasagna.

title: Simple Life Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Simple Life Cabernet Sauvignon

The Simple Life Cabernet Sauvignon has a sophisticated delicacy to it, and yet it is a rich and varied wine. There is something almost floral about the flavorings, which also include hints of blackberry and boysenberry.

The Simple Life Cabernet Sauvignon would go very well with a nice roasted duck breast or beef tenderloin, although it will work well with many substantial dishes.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Chloe Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Chloe Cabernet Sauvignon

The Chloe Cabernet Sauvignon offers a complex array of flavors, including cocoa, espresso, cherry, and a faint spiciness. This is a very robust and hearty wine that will leave a very powerful impression. The Chloe Cabernet Sauvignon is one of the best wines to drink when it starts to get colder, and it should complement many seasonal dishes.

TASTING NOTES

Sophisticated wine with luscious flavors of black cherry, ripe plum and dark chocolate, followed by delicate notes of roasted coffee and cinnamon bark.

title: Imagery Estate Winery Chardonnay
body_html:
Imagery Estate Winery Chardonnay

The Imagery Estate Winery Chardonnay is a truly sophisticated wine filled with many subtle nuances. It's possible to detect tinges of honeysuckle, lime, and crisp red apples, even though the wine itself has more of an oak flavor.

Serving Imagery Estate Winery Chardonnay wine alongside salmon fish cakes, Caesar salad, or meals made with buttery sauces is ideal.

title: Imagery Estate Winery Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Imagery Estate Winery Sauvignon Blanc

The Imagery Estate Winery Sauvignon Blanc has a delightfully sharp and bracing quality to it. Its minerality and herbal flavoring will offer anyone a memorable experience. This dry and invigorating wine will taste especially delicious when paired with oysters, goat cheese, Dover sole, and artichokes. It's possible to enjoy Imagery Estate Winery Sauvignon Blanc wine with many sumptuous meals.

title: Imagery Estate Winery Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Imagery Estate Winery Cabernet Sauvignon

A variety of regions and a broad range of climates globally support the growth of Cabernet Sauvignon, and so the wide-ranging flavors. The wine is profoundly red wine and contains pungent bell and black pepper essences of dark fruits.

Imagery Estate Winery Cabernet Sauvignon’s food pairings include pork, lamb, and steamed short grooved beef among others, such as tomato, goat cheese, olive, and roasted garlic.

title: Imagery Estate Winery Pinot Noir
body_html:
Imagery Estate Winery Pinot Noir

Imagery Estate Winery Pinot Noir is balanced and smooth from start to finish and it leads to a silky entry. Its jammy-strawberry, cherry, and boysenberry fruit flavors are enriched by integrated oak and it is blended with Petit Verdot to obtain a substantial body. This Pinot Noir also has jammy berry notes, silky tannins, and a long, layered finish. Petit Verdot contributes to the beautiful color and substantial body of this wine.

If you are looking for a food to pair with this amazing wine, fruity wines like this pair well with salmon or other fatty fish, roasted chicken, pasta dishes, duck and other game birds, casseroles, and stews like beef Bourguignon.

title: Santa Margherita Sparkling Rosé
body_html:
Santa Margherita Sparkling Rosé

Santa Margherita Sparkling Rosé is delicious for any occasion and as an accompaniment to brunch, desserts, antipasti, seafood or intensely-flavored cuisines. Santa Margherita Sparkling Brut Rosé is a well-structured sparkling wine with floral notes on the nose and hints of red berries demonstrates a brilliant personality – fresh and lively, while also quite versatile.

The blending of a fine Sparkling Rosé wine is a delicate art, and Santa Margherita is proud to share this masterpiece. We start with a white wine made from the Glera grapes used to produce Prosecco, then add Chardonnay and a small amount of Malbec to add color and richness. This tantalizing blend undergoes a month-long second fermentation followed by six months of maturation in pressurized tanks. Only then is this dry, sparkling wine ready to serve and enjoy.

TASTING NOTES

This pale pink wine brings a full bouquet of pleasing floral aromas with hints of red berry, artfully crafted with a blend of white wine made from Chardonnay and Glera grapes and a red varietal, Italian Malbec. Its flavor is delicate, but vibrant and well rounded, remaining on the palate and making this a delicious, easy-drinking wine.

title: Mount Veeder Winery Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Mount Veeder Winery Cabernet Sauvignon

Sourced from the great luscious valleys in Napa, Mount Vedeer’s Cabernet Sauvignon offers a deep, rich body with undernotes of olive, chocolate and spice. Finishing long and strong on the palate with a light grazing of black currant, this Californian beauty is sure to impress with a rare steak.

title: Ty Ku Sake Nigori Coconut Wine
body_html:
Ty Ku Sake Nigori Coconut Wine

720ml

*Possible Broken Seal In Transit

Brewed in the heart of Nara, Japan, Ty Ku Sake Nigori Coconut Wine is a sweet, luxurious, silky sake that is sure to warm the belly and the soul. Try pairing with nigri sushi with a bit of bite and spice to complement the creamy, vanilla texture and rich body of the sake.

title: Newton Mt. Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Newton Mt. Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon

Deep and distinctive blackberry, currant and aniseed flavor. Full bodied with deeper hints of mocha. Newton Mt. Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon offers a cool finish with its silky texture and savory tannins. Pair with beef tenderloin and blackberry dressing. The rich tenderloin and dark berry flavors share components with the wine.

Distinctive red and black currant and blueberry fruit with a lifted perfume of violets, mint, soy sauce and dried thyme. Full bodied with a grapey freshness and deeper dark flavors of mocha, red currant and asphalt. Rich with a silky texture, savory tannins and a long, cool finish.

title: Heitz Cellar Martha's Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Heitz Cellar Martha's Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon

96 PTS James Suckling
96 PTS Wine Enthusiast
96 PTS International Wine Report

Slow aging and a striking mintiness are the hallmark of Heitz Cellar Martha's Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon. This velvety wine is dark and bold with a delicious, fruit flavor and oaky finish. Pair this lush cabernet with a rustic tart of heirloom tomato slices, creamy goat cheese and garden-fresh basil.

The magnificent story of Martha’s Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon began in 1965 and continues unfolding today. The historic handshake deal between the Heitz family and the May family, who own Martha’s Vineyard, made Cabernet Sauvignon history! The cherished relationship between the families now spans three generations.

In 1966, Joe Heitz produced a wine so distinctive and stunning that the two families boldly added the name of the vineyard to the label, introducing Martha’s Vineyard Cabernet as the first vineyard-designated wine in the Napa Valley.

title: Heitz Cellar Trailside Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Heitz Cellar Trailside Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon

Heitz Trailside Cabernet Sauvignon has an aroma of blackberry, black cherry, black pepper, smoked licorice, vanilla, and violet. The palate is tannic and has a pure fruitiness. Since this wine has tighter tannins, it is made for fatty foods and foods full of protein. The meats that go well with this wine are burgers, brats, prime rib, grilled game, hearty sausage dishes, and lamb. Cheeses that go well with this wine are ones that have a strong flavor like Gruyere, cheddar, and Stilton. If you serve these foods with this wine, they will make a wonderful and tasty combination.

In the early 1980s, the Heitz Family acquired a marvelous Rutherford vineyard bordered on one side by the Silverado Trail and nudged on the other by the Conn Creek.

In 1989, we introduced our Trailside Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon --- an opulent wine that consistently expresses its lineage in bold, luscious statements.

title: Heitz Cellar Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Heitz Cellar Cabernet Sauvignon

The Heitz Cellar Cabernet Sauvignon has a rich varietal aroma that leads to delicious flavors of dark cherry with notes of spicy plum. A generous core of Cabernet fruit is nicely integrated with refreshing acidity and just the right amount of oak. This wine has a silky texture, which builds momentum as it crosses the palate to a lovely finish that is lingering as well.

The foods that will help bring out the flavor in this Cabernet Sauvignon are steak, hamburgers, beef short ribs, roasted or grilled lamb and portobello mushrooms. Cabernet goes well with cheeses as well, so you can serve blue cheese, gorgonzola, aged cheddar, gouda, or polenta with it. Serve any of them with this Cabernet and they will bring out the flavor of this beautiful wine.

Our Napa Valley Cabernet has impressed wine enthusiasts since we produced the first bottle in 1961.

Superbly crafted from estate-grown grapes, this popular wine is consistently noted for incredible flavor that exemplifies 100% of the varietal.

title: Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Chardonnay
body_html:
Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Chardonnay

The grapes for the FAT bastard Chardonnay are sourced from vineyards in the Languedoc-Roussillon, spanning the banks of the Rhône in the east, Carcassonne in the west, the foothills of the Massif Central in the north, all the way to the Mediterranean coast in the south.

The Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Chardonnay is full-bodied and lives up to its namesake. Crafted from a variety of grapes from different regions, it has the perfect balance of flavor and acid. With the smell of fragrant white flowers, the wine has a finish that is long and toasty.

Fat bastard Chardonnay by Thierry & Guy pairs well with most any seafood dishes.

TASTING NOTES

Golden yellow colour. Elegant with aromas of white fruits (peach, pear).
Full-bodied structure with great fruit flavours and hints of vanilla.

title: Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Pinot Noir
body_html:
Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Pinot Noir

Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Pinot Noir, a dark cherry in color, blends together fruit-forward flavors of wild raspberry and crushed strawberry with delicate tannins to follow. The smooth finish will stick around, leaving your taste-buds satisfied.

This Pinot Noir is best served with grilled pork sausage and salads tossed in a vinegary balsamic dressing.

TASTING NOTES

Bright ruby red. Mouthwatering with aromas of crushed strawberries, raspberries and cherries. Very elegant and round mouth with smooth tannins with fruit- forward flavours. Nice and long finish.

title: Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Sauvignon Blanc

Enjoy the bright lemon yellow with subtle green reflections color of this dry white wine. The aromas of grapefruit, lemongrass, and fresh flowers will entice your senses. Tastes of exotic fruits match the acidic finish of this crisp summer wine. A perfect accompaniment to seafood such as sushi or lean meats including herb roasted chicken.

TASTING NOTES

Brilliant lemon yellow with green reflections. Elegant and powerful aromas of grapefruit and boxwood. Enticing grapefruit and fresh exotic fruit flavours. A pronounced, crisp acidity followed by a long and round finish.

title: Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Syrah
body_html:
Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Syrah

Fat Bastard's Syrah is a full-bodied wine with dark ruby coloring that shows hints of purple. The heady aromas of spices, olives, and sweet blueberries mix together to provide a delightful nose. A strong mix of peony, tobacco, and paprika can be tasted on the palate. Perfectly paired with robust flavors such as minted lamb or roast venison.

TASTING NOTES

Dark ruby in color with vibrant purple reflections. Elegant with aromas of spices, black olives and peony. Mouthwatering wine with fruity and spicy notes (black cherry and ginger). Delicate vanilla finish.

title: Segura Viudas Brut Cava Mini 187ml
body_html:
Segura Viudas Brut Cava Mini 187ml

Segura Viudas Brut Mini 187ml is a brilliant champagne that is concentrated with aromatic flavors with subtle notes that will leave your palate with an elegant and rich aftertaste.

This bubbly can be paired with Pear and Walnut Salad.

title: Segura Viudas Reserva Heredad Brut Cava
body_html:
Segura Viudas Reserva Heredad Brut Cava

Segura Viudas Reserva Heredad Brut Cava is a buttery and floral Spanish wine made from a blend of non-vintage wines. Segura Viudas Reserva Heredad Brut Cava is then aged for two years using the great technique of method champenoise to bring out an elegant yet delicately rich flavor.

The wine has such finesse to it and can be paired with Tuscan Lamb Chop Skillet that looks very impressive and very tasty.

title: Flowers Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir
body_html:
Flowers Somona Coast Pinot Noir

Flowers Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir is a complex and balanced wine that has a fine blend of aromas like wild strawberries, cranberry, pomegranate and savory dried herbs that leave your palate with crispy, aromatic and fresh finish on your palate. It is food friendly and can be paired with steak au poivre with brandy cream sauce.

title: Flowers Sonoma Coast Rosé
body_html:
Flowers Sonoma Coast Rosé

Flowers Sonoma Coast Rose is a bold and rich Californian wine burst with aromas of strawberries, raspberries, star fruit, rose petal and talc. The bouquet from layers will leave your palate with an expressive yet elegant finish. It is a food friendly meal that can be paired with slow-Roasted Beef Tenderloin with marinated in horseradish cream flavor paired with spicy syrah.

title: Cambria Rose of Pinot Noir
body_html:
Cambria Rose of Pinot Noir

Hailing from California's Santa Maria Valley, Cambria Rose of Pinot Noir combines the refreshing tastes of several red fruits in a crisp, bright wine that is sure to please. Enjoy the flavors of raspberry, strawberry, and watermelon in each sip. Pairs well with fresh salmon sashimi or barbecued shrimp.

title: 14 Hands Run Wild Juicy Red Wine Blend
body_html:
14 Hands Run Wild Juicy Red Wine Blend

Fresh out of the Columbia Valley, 14 Hands Run Wild Juicy Red Wine Blend is a perfectly proportioned mix of succulent and an array of lively organic berries. With a smooth taste from start to finish, this red wine is the perfect pairing for a delicious steak dinner.

title: Murphy-Goode Red Wine
body_html:
Murphy-Goode Red Wine

Rich, ripe red fruits, firm tannins, and a hint of acidity give balance and structure to this red blend. Murphy-Goode Red Wine sources the finest California grapes, and has flavors of dark cherry, cola, and bittersweet chocolate. A slightly earthy aroma is on the nose. This bold red is a perfect complement to grilled meat.

title: Murphy-Goode The Fume Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Murphy-Goode The Fume Sauvignon Blanc

Bright citrus fruit flavors and aromas of lemongrass meld together in Murphy-Goode Fume Sauvignon Blanc. Racy acidity lends structure to this refreshing white wine, and gives it a balanced flavor profile. The slightly steely finish adds character. This light white is ideal with a grilled swordfish steak or a pasta primavera.

title: Murphy-Goode Liar's Dice Zinfandel
body_html:
Murphy-Goode Liar's Dice Zinfandel

Murphy-Goode Liar's Dice Zinfandel is an intense, medium-bodied wine bursting with flavor. The experience begins with an aroma of vanilla, cedary spice, and dark fruit, and continues with flavors of blackberry jam, black cherry, and black raspberry. Serve this wine with your choice of grilled fare, baby back ribs, or your favorite pasta with red sauce.

title: Segura Viudas Brut Rosé Mini 187ml
body_html:
Segura Viudas Brut Rose Mini 187ml

The Segura Viudas Brut Rose Mini is a flamboyant Spanish wine, full of fruit with strawberry, red currant and grenadine. Its balanced, delicate nature and aromas leaves your palate with a cherry aftertaste and a slightly light acidity. It has such brilliance and elegance and can be paired with foods like Italian- marinated chicken that is smothered in smothered creamy mushroom sauce.

title: Kendall-Jackson Grand Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Kendall-Jackson Grand Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon

This has clearly projected flavors and fragrance that brings such elegant balanced flavors with subtle chocolaty and toasted vanilla that leaves the palate with such a rich and bold finish. It also has fine grained tannins that add to the complexity and a subtle coarse taste. It is greatly paired with slow-roast lamb with fennel, cinnamon and citrus.

TASTING NOTES

blackberry and blueberry with enticing fragrances of mocha and nutmeg

title: Shannon Ridge High Elevation Zinfandel
body_html:
Juicy fruits of blackberry and cherry, hints of dried herbs, spices and sweet oak notes are the essential components of Shannon Ridge High Elevation Zinfandel.

  • Vintage
  • 2015

title: Shannon Ridge High Elevation Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Shannon Ridge High Elevation Sauvignon Blanc where the grapefruit, green mango and mineral notes tantalize without over-whelming. The palate is balanced and crisp, mimicking the aromas with hints of white peach adding a soft but full flavor and a lively finish. This food friendly wine pairs perfectly with a small gathering on a warm summer night.

  • Vintage
  • 2016

title: Shannon Ridge High Elevation Chardonnay
body_html:
Shannon Ridge High Elevation Chardonnay has notes of pear, green apple, melon and citrus with undertones of lightly toasted coconut,oak, caramel and a long juicy finish.

  • Vintage
  • 2016

title: Shannon Ridge High Elevation Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Our High Elevation Shannon Ridge Cabernet Sauvignon Collection is a careful blend of three appellations within Lake County. The clusters from High Valley bring red fruit and tannin, the Red Hills Appellation contributes lush fruit and ripe characteristics, and Big Valley grapes add complexity and texture to this wine.

  • Vintage
  • Current

title: Shannon Ridge High Elevation Petite Sirah
body_html: As Lake County discovers the varietals best suited to our growing region, our Shannon Ridge High Elevation Petite Sirah tends to stand out as one of the top three. True blue fruits, dark flavors and a lengthy finish are compliments of the region, requiring minimal wine making influence.

title: The Walking Dead Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Introducing The Walking Dead Cabernet Sauvignon; featuring a label that responds to the Living Wine Labels app, an augmented reality innovation that brings labels to life. To watch it, download the Living Wine Labels app from the Apple App Store or Google Play Store.

Bring your favorite show to life by sipping The Walking Dead Cabernet Sauvignon. This fantastic wine, known for its dark color and bold taste, is America's favorite red wine. If you love The Walking Dead, you will extremely enjoy sipping The Walking Dead Cabernet Sauvignon. This wine is made with the highest quality ingredients and the healthiest level of tannins. The Walking Cabernet Sauvignon features a label with a horde of zombies on it and an awesome red wine. It will make you reminisce every bloody episode of The Walking Dead. When paired with food, it can brighten up already delicious dishes. Try sipping this wine with your steak, pork chops and vegetarian stuffed peppers to truly appreciate its goodness. Rest assured, this wine is a sure winner and one of the best in the world.

The Walking Dead Cabernet Sauvignon label features a horde of zombies, and when the Living Wine Labels app is launched and pointed at the bottle, they break out of the label onto the phone screen. If you also purchase The Walking Dead Blood Red Blend and point the app at both labels, when the bottles are side by side, it triggers the characters to fight each other.

title: Tisdale Pink Moscato
body_html:
Tisdale Pink Moscato

Light-bodied and fruity, Tisdale Pink Moscato is a versatile wine designed for sipping at any time of day. The notes of passion fruit, peach, and raspberry, along with the low acidity, make this a great choice for pairing with refreshing summer salads, spicy curries, or pancakes topped with fruit. Serve chilled to enhance flavor.

title: Mumm Napa Brut Prestige
body_html:
Mumm Napa Brut Prestige Champagne

Mumm Napa Brut Prestige wine has a sophisticated blend of Chardonnay and Pinot Noir. It has a varied mix of fresh aromas that include a white blossom scent with a touch of melon and creamy vanilla, topped up with stone fruit and citrus. It can be paired with Potato and Leek Gratin.

title: Dolin Dry Vermouth de Chambery
body_html:
Dolin Dry Vermouth de Chambery

Dolin Dry Vermouth de Chambery has a dry, crisp, clean finish reminiscent of the fresh herbs found in the Alpine meadows surrounding Chambery, France. It pairs well with French Cheeses and makes an excellent addition to cocktails.

Try Dolin Dry Vermouth de Chambery on the rocks with a citrus twist.

title: Dolin Rouge Vermouth de Chambery
body_html:
Dolin Rouge Vermouth de Chambery

Botanicals from the Alpine meadows surrounding Chambery impart the freshness of herbs to Dolin Rouge Vermouth de Chambery. The complex flavors and sweet floral, grapey style make it excellent as an aperitif or with dessert.

Enjoy a glass of Dolin Rouge Vermouth de Chambery with your special dinner tonight.

title: BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Maria
body_html:
BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Maria Valley

The hot Santa Ana winds right before harvest enhance the fruitiness and deep garnet color of BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Maria. Hints of strawberry, blackberry, cherry, and crème de cassis balance a hint of acidity.

BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Maria is perfect for beef, continental Spanish, or rich Italian cuisine.

title: BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Lucia
body_html:
BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Lucia Highlands

BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Lucia has the earthiness of wild herbs. Blueberry pie and plum flavors provide sweet overtones that compliment a hint of toasted spice. The dark currant, black cherry, and ripe plum palate of BÖEN Pinot Noir Santa Lucia pairs well with beef, pork, or traditional Italian dishes.

title: Cakebread Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Our Apple Barn Vineyard sits on the site of a former apple orchard just north of the town of Boonville in the southern end of Mendocino County’s Anderson Valley.

This coastal appellation benefits from the combination of cool conditions of the nearby Pacific Ocean and bright, warm sun.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: The Crusher Petite Sirah
body_html:
The Crusher Grower's Selection Petite Sirah

The Crusher Grower's Selection Petite Sirah has an inky violet color with vivid aromas of ripe plum, blackberry, fig preserves, and pomegranate. The pronounced aromas ring true on the palate with bold flavors of juicy plum, baked fig, and ripe blackberries. This wine is also juicy, full-bodied with a rich texture and has smooth tannins with a beautifully extracted color. It imparts an impressive flavor with a lushness that lingers on the finish. The foods that you should serve with this wine are beef tenderloin and roasted leg of lamb.

title: Momokawa Pearl Creamy Nigori Sake
body_html:
Momokawa Pearl Creamy Nigori Junmai Ginjo Sake

The Momokawa Pearl Nigori is described as a favorite and the number one Nigori Genshu that you will be able to find. It has a creamy texture to it and it is rich to your palate. You will enjoy tasting tropical flavors which include banana and coconut. The flavors are not only rich, but they are powerful to your taste buds without taking over. It is a great sake that you will enjoy time and time again.

Momokawa Pearl Nigori pairs well with spice foods…Thai curry, a Mexican mole, or even a chocolate ganache.

title: JaM Cellars CaNDY Rosé
body_html:
JaM Cellars CaNDY Rosé

Inspired by the idea of attention-grabbing eye-candy, John & Michele chose to name our new rosé, California Candy. It's taken years to craft the perfect, delicious rosé blend of Syrah and Grenache, along with an eye-catching label that could live up to the name.

California Candy shimmers in the bottle is fresh and vibrant in the glass, and is so delicious…it’ll leave you wanting more.

title: Chronic Cellars Pink Pedals Rosé
body_html:
Chronic Cellars Pink Pedals Rosé

Chronic Cellars Pink Pedals Rosé features a light strawberry color and a crisp and refreshing taste. You'll taste and smell cherry jolly rancher, cantaloupe, pomegranate and watermelon notes. All grapes used to craft this classic Rose wine were grown for this particular variety of vino, and it shows in its taste.

Chronic Cellars Pink Pedals Rosé goes with just about everything, it does taste best with Turkey.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé Can 187ml
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé

187ml Can

Bursting with the fruity flavors of peaches, strawberries, currants, and pomegranate, this amazing wine comes in convenient cans that are perfect as party favors. Pair it with chicken or fish on the grill on a warm, summer night.

A unique wine as original and exceptional as the lady who inspired it, Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé 187ml Can is for the passionate person that loves to live life in the moment.

title: Tenuta Sassoregale Sangiovese
body_html:
Tenuta Sassoregale Sangiovese Maremma Toscana

Uncork the Tenuta Sassoregale Sangiovese for full-bodied wine, with flavor as bright as its ruby red color. Wild berries, subtle spices, and cherries create a crisp, potent flavor on both nose and palate. In it's home of Tuscany, Tenuta Sassoregale Sangiovese wine is paired with cheeses and cured pork, alternatively it pairs with grilled red meat.

title: Archery Summit Estate Pinot Noir
body_html:
Archery Summit Estate Pinot Noir

Teeming with the flavor of ripe, black cherries with Cola swirling throughout for a long finish, Archery Summit Estate Pinot Noir is a great wine for sipping on the patio or relaxing by a warm fire. Serve it up with some roasted duck or oven-baked salmon filet topped off with a piece of rich, chocolate cake for an intimate candlelit dinner.

title: Lloyd Prescription Chardonnay
body_html:
Lloyd Cellars Prescription Chardonnay

From Napa Valley's #1 Chardonnay Winemaker! 1st Rombauer - Now Prescription Perfection! Big, Rich and Buttery. Dig In...This is as Good As It Gets! — Vivino

Lloyd Cellars Prescription Chardonnay is fermented in one-hundred percent stainless steel with oak treatment. The aroma is of high-toned citrus, lemon peel, tropical fruit, and fresh lead into a mouthwatering palate. The flavors include guava, key lime, and creme brulee flow throughout a long, smooth, and mineral-laced finish.

Foods that you can prepare with Prescription Chardonnay are the cheeses Provolone, Gruyere, and mild Cheddar. Appetizers that go well with this wine are crab cakes, olives, oysters, stuffed clams, and smoked oysters. Main dishes that you can serve with this wine are chicken, pork, or shrimp with cream sauce and Caribbean cuisine. If you need a dessert, serve mango, pineapple, or honeydew. These are the foods that you can prepare to serve with Prescription Chardonnay.

TASTING NOTES

Lively aromatics of high-toned citrus and lemon peel (zingy acidity), tropical fruits and fresh cream lead into a refreshing and mouthwatering palate. Flavors of guava, papaya, key lime and crème brulée flow throughout a long, smooth, mineral laced finish. If you have one bottle for a surf and turf meal, this wine is beautiful with seafood and can easily match up to a steak.

For More Read This

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé Can 4 Pack
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé

4 Pack Can

A unique wine as original and exceptional as the lady who inspired it, Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé Can is for the passionate person that loves to live life in the moment. Bursting with the fruity flavors of peaches, strawberries, currants, and pomegranate, this amazing wine comes in convenient cans that are perfect as party favors. Pair it with chicken or fish on the grill on a warm, summer night.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Emerald Label Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Emerald Label Pinot Grigio

Grown in California, Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Emerald Label Pinot Grigio adds Hollywood cool to the classic Italian Pinot. It creates an exuberantly refreshing taste, playing with fruity pops of peach, passion fruit, tangerine, and even hints of apple and grapefruit. Although it pairs easily it is best matched with vegetarian and seafood dishes.

title: Peter Vella Vineyards Delicious Red
body_html:
Peter Vella Vineyards Delicious Red

Smooth on the palate with light bodied notes of strawberries and raspberries, the Peter Vella Delicious Red Wine is a colorful and fruity treat. It pairs nicely with pasta tossed in red or white sauce, but Delicious Red Wine is a delightful surprise when paired with ginger seasoned stir fries.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Brut Rosé

Bask in the sun poolside with your paramour sipping this crisp Sofia Brut Rose by Francis Ford Coppola. The tingling effervescence and refreshing peach color heighten romantic trysts. Pair this sweet Sofia Brut Rosé with shrimp and smoked salmon for a fulfilling dinner for two on a sultry summer night.

title: Stella Rosa Strawberry Rosé
body_html:
Stella Rosa Strawberry Rosé

This is a semi-sweet sparkling wine. The mountain berries and rose petals provide the wine with a distinct aroma, flavor and a bright look and taste. The wine’s character is clean and elegant.It will make you fall in love and spark up those memorable moments. It can go along with an excellent dish of delicately cooked rare lamb or rare roast lamb.

title: Wines of Substance Cs Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Wines of Substance Cs Cabernet Sauvignon

Wines of Substance Cs Cabernet Sauvignon has very attractive aromas and flavors of cassis, violet, pencil shavings, and tobacco/herbs to go along with medium-to-full-bodied, layered, rich, and a beautifully balanced profile on the palate. The nose is blackberry and dark chocolate that results in a very full-bodied and ripe of additional blackberry and chocolate supported by very supple but somewhat dusty tannins.

Some foods to serve with this wine are charred gruyere burgers, mushroom pizzas, marinated ribeye steaks, braised short ribs, and mushroom stroganoff. These are the best items to serve with Cs Cabernet Sauvignon and they will make this wine taste even more wonderful.

title: Wines of Substance Klein Bx Blend
body_html:
Wines of Substance Klein Bx Blend

Wines of Substance Klein BX Blend is a red wine with bold and structured flavors. The aromas of Klein BX Blend are complex and beautiful. This wine comes from the Columbia Valley in Washington State and the maker formerly labeled as Super Substance. Pair this wine with beef and venison to highlight the earthy flavors.

title: Napa Cellars Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Napa Cellars Sauvignon Blanc

Aromatic and flavorful, Napa Cellars Sauvignon Blanc's grapes are enhanced by warm days falling to cool nights during ripening. The wine presents blackcurrant and boysenberry fruit flavors lifted by vanilla and licorice accents and a bittersweet hint of smoky chocolate. Pair Napa Cellars Sauvignon Blanc with grilled or smoked salmon.

title: Folie a Deux Alexander Valley Merlot
body_html:
Alexander Valley Folie a Deux Merlot

Smooth, well-structured tannins form the solid foundation of the Alexander Valley's Folie a Deux Merlot, grown in hillside volcanic soils. Ripe black cherry flavors bring vanilla and toasted caramel notes from a combination of French and American oak barrels. Pair this coastally grown wine with meat such as mediterranean-spiced lamb.

TASTING NOTES

Deliciously approachable with vibrant, ripe black cherry flavors, accented by notes of toasted caramel and vanilla, with smooth, well-structured tannins.

title: J Lohr Hilltop Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
J Lohr Hilltop Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon

Nightly ocean breezes cool near-100°F daytime heat where J Lohr Hilltop Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon is grown. Typical flavors of blackberry and currant combine with hazelnut and cocoa powder expressions from French oak barrels, a brambly acidity, and an inspiring red fruit finish. Pair with a rosemary seasoned grilled ribeye.

title: Alexander Valley Sin Zin Zinfandel
body_html:
Alexander Valley Sin Zin Zinfandel

A bit of serendipity brought "sin zin" to the Wetzel family repertoire, first to friends and soon far and wide. Alexander Valley Wetzel Estate Sin Zin Zinfandel has plum and black cherry fruit flavors along with black pepper, vanilla, and cocoa powder. Pair with a leg of lamb or BBQ.

title: Seghesio Sonoma Zinfandel
body_html:
Seghesio Sonoma Zinfandel

Deep root systems, true "old vine" vineyards, and a Tuscan family heritage produce these Seghesio Sonoma Zinfandel wines. Look for red fruit, blackberry, black currant, and spicy/brambly essences varying with the Seghesio family vineyards used to produce these wines. Pair with spicy barbeque, choosing flavors to follow the wine's lead.

title: K Vintners King Coal Stoneridge Vineyard
body_html:
K Vintners King Coal Stoneridge Vineyard

This Cabernet Sauvignon King Coal Stoneridge Vineyard red wine is a 70/30 mix of Cabernet and Syrah. It has an intense black currant aroma and tantalizes tastebuds with notes of ripe dark berries, sweet cocoa oak, some jammy blackcurrant character, a hint of plum compote, cardamom and a touch of white chocolate. This wine pairs best with rich desserts and robust appetizers.

title: Tuck Beckstoffer Hogwash Rosé
body_html:
Tuck Beckstoffer Hogwash Rosé

There's nothing quite like a summer day at the beach. Tuck Beckstoffer Hogwash Rosé can take you to the glittering seaside with a sip of this crisp, cold wine. Hints of apricot and plum linger on the tastebuds making Tuck Beckstoffer Hogwash Rosé a perfect match for roast pork tenderloin, brazed asparagus, and new potatoes.

title: Opus One Napa Valley Red Wine 2012
body_html:
Opus One Napa Valley Red Wine

2012

Mother Nature favored the 2012 vintage with a superb growing season characterized by moderate temperatures and bountiful sunshine. At harvest, the fruit exhibited intense flavor, layers of complexity and excellent structure. Picking started on September 21st and continued through October 20th.

The wine effuses dark fruit aromas accentuated by subtler notes of forest-floor and graphite. The wine’s round mouthfeel and satiny tannins wrap around classic flavors of cassis, blackberry and black cherry. This refined and age-worthy wine offers lively acidity and a sturdy structure with a long lingering finish.

title: Elouan Oregon Rosé
body_html:
Elouan Oregon Rosé

No afternoon BBQ would be complete without a glass of Elouan Rosé in hand. The Elouan Rosé is a wonderful compliment to an afternoon get together with friends and family alike. The soft fruity and faintly sweet wine gives way to a nice and dry wine. Hailing from the Willamette, Umpqua and Rogue Valleys of Oregon, the coolness of the climate gives the wine a passionate arrangement that a Pinot Noir needs to set apart itself against others.

The Elouan Rosé accomplishes the combination of three fruits, three valleys and what seems like a million and one other Pinot Noirs without fail.

title: Elouan Oregon Pinot Noir
body_html:
Elouan Oregon Pinot Noir

Light bodied and delicate, the Elouan Oregon Pinot Noir is pale and restrained, with hints of sweet cherries and dried rose petals. Hints of earthy terroir and coffee on the nose meld with a hint of cinnamon. This food-friendly wine is delicious with roasted portabella mushrooms and grilled vegetable skewers.

title: Stella Rosa Red Apple
body_html:
Stella Rosa Red Apple

Grapes for our delicious Stella Rosa Red Apple are harvested from beautiful vineyards. This refreshing wine is combined with natural flavors of ripe red apple. Stella Rosa Red Apple is seductive, rich and full bodied with a hint of sweetness. Serve chilled with fresh fruit, cheese, spicy cuisine, and desserts. Stellabrate life with friends and a bottle of Stella Rosa Red Apple.

title: Darioush Signature Napa Valley Merlot
body_html:
Darioush Signature Napa Valley Merlot

The Darioush Napa Valley Merlot is elegant, structured, and blends rich plum, dark chocolate, and hints of chocolate flavors with firm tannin, and a smooth mouth-feel. Ripe and fruit forward, this wine has layers of complexity, making it perfect to sip on its own or pair with rosemary roasted prime rib.

title: Roth Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Roth Estate Cabernet Sauvignon

Full, rich, and elegant, the Roth Cabernet Sauvignon blends firm tannin with deep red fruit and a hint of blueberry. This dry, full-bodied wine has striking aromas of blackberry and cassis. As the wine breathes, the tannins soften and the wine becomes an excellent pair with filet mignon or a bison steak.

title: Belle Glos Dairyman Vineyard Pinot Noir
body_html:
Belle Glos Dairyman Vineyard Pinot Noir

Carefully cultivated, and hand selected throughout the process, the Belle Glos Dairyman Pinot Noir is a world-class bright crimson red worthy of any table setting. The Pinot Noir grapes are grown at one of four vineyards located in Sonoma County, Santa Maria Valley, Santa Lucia Highlands and Sonoma Coast to create the true embodiment of the California Pinot Noir. Aged in select French oak barrels, the true characteristics of each single vineyard wine flows through with each sip.

The Belle Glos Dairyman Pinot Noir pairs well with your tuna, chicken, duck and most notability vegetarian dishes.

TASTING NOTES

Deep garnet in color with abundant aromas of sun-warmed black cherry, raspberry compote, and dark chocolate followed by hints of cedar and black currant. Bold and rich tones layered with flavors of fresh strawberry cobbler and bramble accompanied by notes of cinnamon and nutmeg. This wine has rich tannins, nice concentration, depth, and natural acidity that expresses the authenticity of a Sonoma County Pinot Noir.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Belle Glos Clark & Telephone Pinot Noir
body_html:
Belle Glos Clark & Telephone Pinot Noir

Belle Glos Clark and Telephone Pinot Noir is a California vineyard wine that is produced at one of four vineyards. Created with a flavored surrounding December holidays, it’s a gift that keeps on giving with its cinnamon and nutmeg flavors and deep scarlet red coloring. Delicately grown Pinot Noir grapes are cultivated and carefully processed along the way with varying methods to ensure only the highest quality red wine crosses your table.

Take home a bottle of red Belle Glos Clark & Telephone Pinot Noir and enjoy a scrumptious BBQ chicken or pork dinner tonight.

TASTING NOTES

Deep purple with flecks of garnet in color with lavish aromas of warm blackberry pie, raspberry, licorice, and white pepper. Bold and sophisticated on the palate with flavors of dry cherry, crushed lavender, and chocolate covered blueberries. The texture is rich and velvety which leads to a long, structured finish.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Tio Pepe Fino Palomino Fino Extra Dry Sherry
body_html:
Tio Pepe Fino Sherry has a star-bright, pale golden color. It is elegant and distinctive and it has a smell of almonds and fresh bread. The palate of this sherry is full-bodied, crisp and very dry and it has a complex, long finish.

The foods that should be served with it are canapes, tapas, Asian food, and seafood. It also pairs well with fish-based dishes like caviar, oysters, anchovies, and tuna carpaccio.

title: Takara Plum Premium Wine
body_html:
Takara Plum Premium Wine

Takara Plum is a rich, sweet, and aromatic plum wine that makes a great aperitif. The plum flavor that is used for this wine is based on “Ume”, a special plum that is cultivated in Japan. The Ume has a really sour taste. It is made of premium white wine and it has a natural plum taste. Since this wine is known as a dessert wine, it goes well with fruits like cherries or served over your favorite ice cream but can be paired with many sweet treats.

title: Honoro Vera Organic Monastrell
body_html:
Bodegas Honoro Vera Organic Monastrell Grapes Red Wine

Honoro Vera Organic Monastrell is made with Monastrell grapes from vineyards that are planted on poor and stony limestone soil. This soil does not have a lot of nutrients in it and is not irrigated a lot. The result is a wine that has a high aromatic intensity and a great fruit concentration. It is very pleasant and easy to drink. The foods that you can make to go with this Monastrell wine are dark chocolate, blue cheese burgers, grilled lamb chops, braised oxtail stew, Milk-fed veal with baba ganoush, and baked eggplants stuffed with lamb mince.

title: Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Sauvignon Blanc

Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Sauvignon Blanc features the concentrated fruit flavors of blueberries and black cherries harvested on the North Coast of California. The robust layered wine leaves behind under-notes of cedar and baking spices. It is best enjoyed with broad bean and chèvre salad, grilled asparagus with hollandaise or bluff oysters with dill and lime vinaigrette.

Sauvignon blanc is a green-skinned grape variety that originates from the Bordeaux region of France, although has become extremely popular in parts of the US as well. The grape most likely gets its name from the French words sauvage and blanc due to its early origins as an indigenous grape in South West France.

title: Stella Rosa Tropical Mango Wine
body_html:
Stella Rosa Tropical Mango Semi-Sweet Wine

Stella Rosa Tropical Mango Wine is Semi Sweet with aromas of mango and subtle aromas of citrus and apple. The flavor is crisp and refreshing all at the same time. Ripe mango and other fruit dance oh so gently on the palate. This is an amazing wine to share with friends, bring it to your next gathering and be the hit of the party.

The Stella Rosa Tropical mango, is one of the best wines you could taste. The flavour of Stella Rosa Tropical Mango wine, captures the taste of the tropical Islands. Due to it tasting sweet yet with a fruity kick, its a fantastic wine to take to any party, it not only has the semi sweet taste to it, but it also has a beautiful smooth taste too. It's an easy going wine revealing a layer of tropical and mango flavours.

title: Korbel Champagne Brut Mini 187ml
body_html:
Korbel Champagne Brut

Mini 187ml

This bottle may be mini but it packs all of the powerful flavors that you are accustomed to with Korbel Champagne Brut. The 187ml Korbel Champagne Brut is a wonderful blend of crisp citrus flavors that are refreshing to your palate. You will experience a powerful yet delicate flavor of organic grapes and you will also have a nice hit of whit peaches, pear, and apple as well. The finish is a savory yet medium-dry flavor you’ll enjoy again and again.

The Korbel Champagne Brut 187ml pairs very well with chesses, pasta dishes that have a cheese topping, fish, poultry that’s braised and root vegetables that have been roasted.

Food Pairing:
The perfect start to an evening, a bubbly flute of Korbel Brut! Its crisp and bright acidity pairs beautifully with appetizers like strong cheeses, fresh oysters, smoked salmon, and fried or salty snacks. As for entrées, Korbel Brut is wonderful with seafood dishes and sushi as well as egg dishes and roasted poultry. This classic bubbly is also always great on its own!

title: Schweiger Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Schweiger Vineyards Merlot

Schweiger Vineyards Merlot is lush and supple, with ripe jammy fruit and a floral nose. Medium tannins provide structure to this full-bodied red wine. Sweet plum flavors meld well with notes of blueberry and chocolate, with a dry finish. This wine pairs well with grilled game meats or chargrilled steaks.

title: Matua Valley Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Matua Valley Sauvignon Blanc

Matua Valley Sauvignon Blanc is light and refreshing, yet still complex. With bracing acidity highlighted by bright citrus lemon-lime notes and aromas of fresh cut grass, this lighter bodied white wine is a perfect palate refresher. Ideally paired with grilled swordfish or sauteed shellfish, this wine is a crowd pleaser.

TASTING NOTES

Lemony, citrus notes and a hint of vibrant passionfruit and basil. The palate is fresh and vibrant with concentrated blackcurrant leaf and a hint of classic cut-grass and green melon. So refreshing, you’ll be left wanting another glass.

title: Matua Valley Pinot Noir
body_html:
Matua Valley Pinot Noir

Light and fresh, yet complex, Matua Valley Pinot Noir is a flexible, food-friendly red wine. With mild tannin and light acidity to give it structure, this wine is light bodied with a mild finish. Flavors of dark cherry and plum meld with aromas of fresh earth. This wine pairs well with a wild mushroom ragout.

TASTING NOTES

Your palate will be met with notes of red fruit and soft, supple tannins, seasoned with a dash of oak providing a light, toasty taste. On the end is a delightful fresh finish that you won’t soon forget.

title: Cigar Box Old Vine Malbec
body_html:
Cigar Box Old Vine Hand Harvested Malbec

Rich and full-bodied, Cigar Box Old Vine Malbec is a powerhouse red. With ripe red berry flavors and dried raisin notes, this wine is well balanced with structured tannin. There are aromas of coffee, bittersweet chocolate, and dried fruit along with a dry finish. This wine pairs well with grilled steak or game meats.

title: Etude Lyric Pinot Noir
body_html:
Lyric Etude Pinot Noir

The Lyric Etude Pinot Noir hits your palate with an exquisite blended taste of grapes, blackberry, cranberry, vanilla and clove. At the end of your sip you will also notice a smoky, roast pork taste that you will enjoy. As you sip you will get an aroma of floral hints and a sense of what reminds you of cherry pie.

Lyric Etude Pinot Noir pairs well with fish and salads that use a balsamic vinaigrette dressing.

title: BÖEN Pinot Noir Russian River
body_html:
BÖEN Russian River Pinot Noir

Elegant and complex, BÖEN Pinot Noir has flavors of dark cherries and coffee, with notes of dried rose petals and a hint of earthiness. Tart acidity lends fullness to the wine. Light-bodied yet structured, this smooth-drinking red is ideal for a number of cuisines. Enjoy with roasted duck and autumnal vegetables.

title: Bread & Butter Pinot Noir
body_html:
Bread & Butter Pinot Noir

Bread & Butter Pinot Noir is best described as red fruit that’s juicy. When this Pinot Noir hits your taste buds you will instantly sense the raspberries and cherries and you will also have a hint of cassis. That is followed by a touch of bay leaf that helps keep the sweetness down, smoke and cedar as well. You will see the amazing balance the bouquet has. It has a great, smooth finish that melts in your mouth.

Bread & Butter Pinot Noir pairs well with Peking duck, pork chops as well as lasagna.

title: Bread & Butter Chardonnay
body_html:
Bread & Butter Chardonnay

The Bread & Butter Chardonnay is a delicate option with an amazing note of almond husk along with vanilla bean. When you sip on this Chardonnay you will have an instant sensation of a creamy custard along with a minor sweet taste of tropical fruit. It is aged in American Oak as well as French Oak.

Bread & Butter Chardonnay pairs well with mild cheese, fish dishes and anything with a creamy sauce.

title: Trump Winery Chardonnay
body_html:
Trump Winery Chardonnay

Made from estate grown grapes, Trump Winery Chardonnay goes through a dual aging process…85% of the time in stainless steel and 15% of the time in the finest French oak. When you sip this Chardonnay you will get a creamy yet fresh hint of lemon, white peach, orange blossom, and a slight note of spice and butterscotch.

Trump Winery Chardonnay pairs best with fresh seafood, roasted chicken and sauces of cream.

title: Wagners Caymus Red Schooner Voyage 5
body_html:
Wagner Family Red Schooner Voyage 5

While Caymus is arguably the Wagner family’s most famous wine, this rule-breaking Wagner Family Red Schooner Voyage 5 is a worthy addition to the portfolio. Full of cherries, plums, and soft, supple tannins, the Voyage 5 is made using Andes-grown Malbec produced in Napa using signature Caymus Cabernet techniques.

This Red Schooner Voyage 5 pairs well with a nice juicy steak seasoned to perfection and grilled medium rare.

title: Hundred Acre Kayli Morgan Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon 2014
body_html:
Hundred Acre Kayli Morgan Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon

2014 Vintage

Limited terroir wines from California's Napa Valley are consistently the best in the world, and the Hundred Acre Kayli Morgan Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon 2014 is no exception. Sourced from a small plot along the Silverado Trail in Napa, the Cabernet Sauvignon grapes grown here ripen slowly, for a more refined wine. This firm, full-bodied red wine is similar in style to red Bordeaux wine, with distinct mineral aromas, coupled with rich currant and blueberry notes. With a whiff of bittersweet chocolate on the nose and firm tannin for structure, this wine is complex and elegant.

Enjoy Hundred Acre Kayli Morgan Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon with tender filet mignon steak.

title: Gary Farrell Russian River Chardonnay
body_html:
Gary Farrell Russian River Chardonnay

Rich and sumptuous, the Gary Farrell Russian River Chardonnay is full bodied and complex. Flavors of sweet pear and honey meld seamlessly with lanolin aromas and the scent of fresh lilies and a toasty oak finish. Mild acidity lends structure to the wine. Best with grilled salmon Florentine or a Rosemary roasted chicken.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: Chandon Etoile Rosé
body_html:
Domaine Chandon Etoile Rosé

Domaine Chandon delivers one of the best quality sparkling wines from California. The Domaine Chandon Etoile Rose is perfect to celebrate any special occasion, with plenty of frizzante and light sweetness. Delicate strawberry flavors and fragrant aromas of rose petals are pleasing to any palate. Ideally serviced with seared scallops or lobster.

title: Hundred Acre If You See Kay Red
body_html:
Hundred Acre If You See Kay Red

Hundred Acre If You See Kay Red Wine is described as bold. It is also thought of as a wine that arouses all of the senses. It is a combination of dry raspberries, juicy blackberry jam, plums, zesty cocoa nibs. Other special ingredients in this wine are a bit of spice and rock and roll attitude with moderate tannins and a pleasing acidity. This wine is a mixture of Cabernet Sauvignon (eighty percent), Petit Verdot (fifteen percent), and Primitivo from Lazio, Italy (five percent). Since this wine is a combination of three wines, there are a lot of foods that can be paired with it.

This wine is made mostly of Cabernet Sauvignon. Foods that go well with Cabernet Sauvignon are braised beef short ribs, grilled steak and arugula salad, roast leg of lamb, and dishes that contain portabello mushrooms.Party foods that go well with this wine are sharp, full-flavored cheeses like Cheddar, Asiago, and Gouda and more robust dishes like Prosciutto ham or mini meatballs. The foods that can be served with Petit Verdot are foods that a lot of weight, fat, and protein. They include barbecue, beef stew, roasted rack of lamb, and game birds. Foods that can be served with Primitivo are grilled cheese pizza, juicy burgers, and baked penne pasta with sausage and ricotta. With three different wines combined to make this Kay Red Wine, there are many wonderful dishes that can be served with it.

title: Gekkeikan Kobai Plum Wine
body_html:
Gekkeikan Kobai Plum Wine

Gekkeikan Kobai Plum Wine is sweet and refreshing with notes of almond and apple blossom enhancing the natural plum flavors. It is finished with honey and meyer lemon making it a perfect match for parmesan, blue cheese and foie gras. This wine pairs well with Chinese food choices and starters that include cheese.

title: Clos du Bois Pinot Noir
body_html:
Clos du Bois Pinot Noir California

Grapes were de-stemmed, but not crushed, to stainless steel fermenters and the must chilled to 50°F for a three-day cold soak. Next, yeast was added for alcoholic fermentation and the juice was pumped over the skins two to three times per day for about eight days, until fermentation was complete. Lots were then pressed off to barrels to undergo 100% malolactic fermentation. After seven months in a combination of French, Eastern European, and American barrels (27% new), the wine was racked in preparation for bottling.

TASTING NOTES

Cherry, Strawberry, Raspberry

title: Clos du Bois Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Clos du Bois Pinot Grigio

Light and refreshing, Clos du Bios Pinot Grigio is a perfect crowd pleaser. Very quaffable, the tangy aromas of citrus and lime are well-supported by racy acidity. This food-friendly wine is ideal for light appetizers, perfect for a holiday party. For a meal, enjoy the Pinot Grigio with grilled chicken or a salad.

TASTING NOTES

Crisp, Peach, Melon, Grapefruit, Lime

title: Callie Collection Chardonnay
body_html:
Callie Collection Chardonnay

Fresh and bright, the Callie Collection Chardonnay has attractive aromas of pear and citrus, supported by medium acidity. Fresh golden delicious apple flavors meld well with a toasty oak finish. This rich white wine can be best enjoyed with a hearty cream sauce pasta, or with grilled swordfish or salmon.

title: Callie Collection Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Callie Collection Pinot Grigio

The Callie Collection Pinot Grigio has a full mouth-feel, imparting notes of melons, pear, citrus, and minerals. It's a white wine with a pale, almost pearlescent color. Callie Collection Pinot Grigio pairs well with seafood bites, garlic and lemon dishes, and crab salad.

title: Cocobon Vineyards Red Blend
body_html:
Cocobon Vineyards Red Blend

The Cocobon Vineyards Red Blend is a perfect choice for a chilly winter night. Ripe red fruit, raspberry, and jammy plum meld well with aromas of dark chocolate. The medium-bodied red has mild tannin, perfect for those who don't like a dry wine. This red wine pairs nicely with a ribeye roast, or prime rib.

title: Beaulieu Vineyard BV Napa Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Beaulieu Vineyard BV Napa Cabernet Sauvignon

The Beaulieu Vineyard BV Napa Cabernet Sauvignon has an unctuous fruit character and a dense structure. This complex wine has a broad spectrum of briary blackberry, black cherry and currant notes, and nuances of violet and bittersweet chocolate. The muscular tannins support the plush, expansive palate, while impeccably balanced acidity adds vibrancy.

The foods that go best with this wine are charred gruyere burgers, marinated ribeye steaks, braised short ribs, and mushroom stroganoff. If you serve these foods with this wine, you will have a wonderful meal.

title: Block Nine Caiden's Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Block Nine Caiden's Vineyards Pinot Noir

Block Nine’s Caiden's Vineyards Pinot Noir is beautifully long and is also rich in the tastes of berry and cherry flavors. The aromas exhibit generous bright fruit that is a combination of strawberries, violets, plums, tea, and a hint of clove. It is also flavorful and silky in the mouth and it has a good body. This wine is also seductive showing with its wild cherries and a hint of sandalwood to complete its complex finish. There are quite a few foods that go very well with this wine as well.

If you are looking for a meal to go with Block Nine’s Caiden's Vineyards Pinot Noir, roasted or grilled pork with a light marinade or dry rub. You could also serve duck, pheasant, or other “gamier” foul, salmon or other stronger fish. For those of you that want to serve seafood with this wine, lobster, shrimp, or crab without a cream sauce is a good idea. When it comes to pasta and vegetable dishes, pasta with pesto or lighter tomato cream sauces and mushrooms in a light wine sauce are good ideas. These are the foods with that go very well with this Block Nine Pinot Noir.

title: Simi Chardonnay
body_html:
Simi Chardonnay

Expressive notes of pineapple, white peach, green apple, Meyer lemon, and orange blossom laced with hints of butter, toasty brioche, vanilla, and flint.

Simi Chardonnay has a very clear hue that is described as “golden straw with glimmers of light.” The color dramatically sets the stage for what a person that is going to drink this wine will experience. The nose is similarly demonstrative, with expressive notes of pineapple, white peach, green apple, Meyer lemon, and orange blossom laced with hints of butter, toasty brioche, and smoke.

All these great flavors combine well together on the palate with zesty, fresh flavors of tangerine, lemon curd, stone fruit, white peach, and nectarine. Then these flavors are framed by sweet toast and vanilla followed by wet-stone minerality and orange peel on the finish.

The foods that you can serve with Simi Chardonnay are smoked salmon with lemon and mayonnaise seasoned with garlic and toasted brioche, spot prawns sauteed with garlic, lemon, and parsley. You can also serve a Caprese salad with ripe peach slices, basil, and fresh mozzarella. These are the foods you can serve with this Chardonnay and they go well with this wine.

title: Robert Hall Merlot
body_html:
Robert Hall Merlot

Enjoy a soft, supple Merlot from Robert Hall for your Thanksgiving meal. Rich flavors of sweet plum, dark cherry, and tart blueberry are supported by mild tannin and an easy finish. Best with roasted duck breast, or baked Thanksgiving ham, this approachable red wine is a sure crowd pleaser.

title: Starmont Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Starmont Cabernet Sauvignon

Created by the Merryvale family of vintners, Starmont Cabernet Sauvignon is perfectly crafted to be approachable, from the aging in new oak barrels to soften the rich tannins to the selection of ripe grapes. Notes of dark roasted coffee and plums are supported by firm tannins. This wine pairs best with the cheese course.

For more information on Starmont Wines Click Here.

title: Merryvale Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Merryvale Cabernet Sauvignon

The Merryvale Cabernet Sauvignon, handcrafted from the very best grapes in California, is an ideal wine for your holiday meals. Rich and complex, with firm tannins providing structure, this wine has aromas of espresso, leather, and ripe plums. Delicious with a slow roasted eye of rib, or roast duck breast with cherries.

For more information on your favorite Merryvale wines please Click Here.

title: Orin Swift Mercury Head Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Orin Swift Mercury Head Cabernet Sauvignon


Lush yet tightly structured, the Orin Swift Mercury Head Cabernet Sauvignon 2015 vintage is an incredible example of a small appellation California Cabernet. Tartly sweet blueberry flavors and hints of green pepper blend with aromas of bittersweet chocolate. Heavy tannins give structure to the wine. Ideal with a grilled filet mignon.

The wine opens with a nose brimming of ripe boysenberry and cassis, complemented by hints of cigar box, fir and graphite. Full-bodied on entry, the luscious palate is full of ripe cherry and a touch of blackberry with elegant traces of sage. It closes with a satiating finish that is long and textured, supported by ample red berries and soft, dusty tannins.

title: Robert Hall Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Robert Hall Sauvignon Blanc

Robert Hall Sauvignon Blanc is a vivid straw-green in color and it greets the senses with crisp apples and citrus aromas as well as a hint of pear. In the mouth, this Sauvignon Blanc wine exhibits bright full flavors of grapefruit, lime, apple, lemongrass, and pear that echo the aromas.

It is refreshingly dry and medium-bodied with a rich crisp acidity that is wrapped around a mineral core. If you are looking for foods to pair with this wine cheese (especially goat cheese), green vegetables (asparagus, zucchini, fresh peas, and artichokes), and oysters are good foods to serve with it.

You can also serve a delicate fish like sole, fresh herbs, mild vinaigrettes, herbal, briny sauces, and pesto. These are the foods that go well with Robert Hall Sauvignon Blanc.

title: Marques de Casa Concha Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Marques de Casa Concha Cabernet Sauvignon

Imagine the color of dark red rubies as you pour yourself a glass of Marques de Casa Concha Cabernet Sauvignon. Your filrst sip of this flavorful red wine takes your taste buds on a fruit-filled journey. Notice the aroma of dark, sweet cherries and blackberries that is delicately entwined with a hint of smoke. This delicious Cabernet Sauvignon is delicious with prime rib, and rich, firm cheeses.

title: Trapiche Medalla Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Trapiche Medalla Cabernet Sauvignon

The Trapiche Medalla Cabernet Sauvignon has a deep red color with violet hues. This wine is very well structured and has the complex aromas of plum jam, green pepper, raisins, tobacco, and a delicate touch of oak. It is also balanced and very persistent in the mouth with ripe and soft tannins. The foods that taste good with this wine are red meats, cheeses, and pastas with spicy sauces. These foods will taste good with the Trapiche Medalla Cabernet Sauvignon.

title: Mionetto Gran Rosé Extra Dry Mini 187ml
body_html:
Mionetto Gran Rose Spumante Extra Dry

Mini 187ml

Enjoy a sparkling taste of Italy with Mionetto Gran Rosé Extra Dry Mini 187ml Split! This gem from the Prosecco region is perfect served on its own, with light appetizers, or with seafood and fish. With its crisp golden apple taste and its appealing peach blossom pink appearance, this rose will make an impression at your next gathering.

Available in the single serve size, the elegant bottle is convenient for entertaining, travel, or gift giving. Whatever your needs, Mionetto Extra Dry Rose 187ml is the mini with big appeal!

TASTING NOTES

APPEARANCE:
Pink peach blossom.

AROMA:
Fruity bouquet with evident notes of honey, berries and citrus.

PALATE:
Well-balanced acidity with refreshing notes of red berries and grapefruit with elegant fine bubbles.

FOOD PAIRINGS:
Enjoy on its own as an aperitif, with appetizers and with fresh seafood, grilled fish and ideal with risotto.

title: Coastal Estates Chardonnay
body_html:
Coastal Estates Chardonnay

The BV Coastal Estates Chardonnay has a delicious yet subtle pear fruit and buttery tone on the nose. Smooth yet with an enticing and subtle sweetness this wine is sure to go down a treat at dinner parties and special occasions alike, and is well paired with poultry or a rich fish.

title: Moet & Chandon Nectar Imperial Rosé
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Nectar Imperial Rosé

Ideal for a special celebration, the Most & Chandon Nectar Imperial Rose is a favorite of many. Crisp frizzante is festive and gives a tasty mouthfeel. Sweet strawberry flavors are ripe and tart, balanced with bright acidity. This sparkling wine us best with fresh strawberries or oysters on the half shell.

TASTING NOTES

A bright color

Coral color
With intense rose gold reflections
An intense nose

The intense fruitiness of mature red fruits, strawberry soup, raspberry, pomegranate
Notes of sweet spices (vanilla, brown sugar)
Hints of fresh mint

title: Trapiche Broquel Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Trapiche Broquel Cabernet Sauvignon

Graced with elegant aromas of cassis and raspberry comes the smoky flavor of Trapiche Broquel Cabernet Sauvignon. A spicy fusion of roasted pepper and balsamic notes offer an Old World semblance that merges successfully with the modern, thus setting the stage for avant-garde in its truest form. Due to its creamy, composite, and enduring aftertaste, the best food pairing would be any dish of your favorite pasta.

title: Trapiche Medalla Malbec
body_html:
Trapiche Medalla Malbec

With soft oak aging comes the contemporary blend of Trapiche Medalla Malbec wine! Its full-bodied blend of plums, cherries, and raisins are evenly tapered with the sweetness of vanilla and coconut. Its tannins are noted for being powerful and vibrant yet smooth and creamy, thus lending a unique, satirical ending. All this and more make this delectable spirit a delightful mate with your favorite smoked meats.

title: Trapiche Oak Cask Reserve Malbec
body_html:
Trapiche Oak Cask Reserve Malbec

The deep red color of Trabec Oak Cask Reserve Malbec adds an eclectic delight to your cool, fall evenings. The flavorful intensity melds very well with its dark, purplish red colors, as the wine has a natural blend of blackberry, plum, and vanilla sweetness mixed with the chic texture of smooth tannins. The wine is best when paired with an elegant feast of beef and venison.

title: Trapiche Broquel Malbec
body_html:
Trapiche Broquel Malbec

Deep, red ruby colors and a touch of contemporary purple bring a modern vibe to Trapiche Broquel Malbec wines. Its redolence of red and black fruits mix very well with natural minerals, thus adding a touch of earth to its overall trendiness. And it goes without saying that a refined, smoky zest just might make this wine an ideal companion for grilled, red meats of any ilk.

title: Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Rioja
body_html:
Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Rioja

Decorated with aromas of blackberry, cherry, and dansom plum, Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Rioja offers a sharp, sparkling acidity amidst a smooth backdrop. Plus, the wine offers the best of both worlds, as it can be enjoyed alone or with dinner among friends. Upon review of the diverse food pairings, slow-smoked barbecue ranks second to none.

title: Menage a Trois Moscato
body_html:
Ménage à Trois Moscato

Reconnect with family and friends over a naughty glass or two of Menage a Trois Moscato. This premium California white wine has sweet floral notes and peach flavors that nicely compliment this year's Thanksgiving pumpkin pie. Be thankful for this irresistible white moscato adding a little spice to the holidays.

title: Luc Belaire Rare Gold Brut
body_html:
Luc Belaire Rare Gold Brut

Be a king or queen for the day with Luc Belaire Rare Gold Brut. The eye-catching glass bottle and golden liquid command attention, but it is the crisp citrus finish that wins hearts. Only the most authentic French chardonnay grapes were used to create this luxurious sparkling wine. Pair with a light appetizer such as bruschetta.

title: Middle Sister Mischief Maker Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Middle Sister Mischief Maker Cabernet Sauvignon

Middle Sister Mischief Maker’s Cabernet Sauvignon is flirtatious and full-bodied. A spicy blackberry and plum scent composes the foreground, with tantalizingly smooth and silky cherry vanilla notes facilitating the delivery of a delightful medley of jam, dried herbs, and cocoa flavor. Mischief Maker's Cabernet Sauvignon perfectly pairs with almost any snack or dish.

title: Walt Blue Jay Pinot Noir
body_html:
Walt Blue Jay Pinot Noir

Walt Blue Jay Pinot Noir is sourced from the very best grapes in California. Cool days and balmy night's help the fickle Pinot Noir grape ripen slowly, and enhance the wine's flavor.

Tart Bing cherry and hints of raspberry flavors are balanced with mild tannin and light acidity. Fruit forward, with aromas of bitter chocolate and earthy notes, this complex wine is very drinkable.

A true food friendly wine, Walt Blue Jay Pinot Noir pairs nicely with grilled portabella mushrooms, shallots, and feta cheese, a fresh egg yolk ravioli, or roasted duck breast with sauteed cherries. Drink now - no cellaring required.

title: Bota Box Dry Rose 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Dry Rose

Bota Box Dry Rose is a crisp, no-nonsense rose perfect for rose fans off on their next adventure. Made with 100% recyclable packaging, this rose is best served chilled. Enjoy the subtle strawberry flavors of this California rose while on a romantic sunset picnic and try pairing with a charcuterie platter for a zesty combination.

title: Achaval Ferrer Malbec
body_html:
Achaval Ferrer Malbec

Achaval Ferrer Malbec is a full-bodied, rich red wine sourced from the finest grapes in Argentina. Ripe red berry flavors meld with hints of earth, coffee, and chocolate, balanced with velvety tannins. Bold yet luscious, this red pairs nicely with a grilled ribeye steak, or game meats, such as venison or bison.

title: Achaval Ferrer Cabernet Sauvginon
body_html:
Achaval Ferrer Cabernet Sauvginon

Achaval Ferrer Cabernet Sauvignon is rich, elegant, and full-bodied. This red wine is made from the best grapes in Mendoza, Argentina. Ripe red currant and blueberry flavors swirl with velvety tannins and structured acidity. With a full mouthfeel and bone-dry finish, this wine is ideally suited to pair with richly marbled steaks.

title: Bella Sera Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Bella Sera Pinot Grigio

750ml

Light and crisp, Bells Sera Pinot Grigio is an easy crowd pleaser. The slight acidity balances well with flavors of sweet melon and citrus. Perfect to serve well-chilled at a summer party, this light white wine pairs nicely with a shrimp garden salad, baked tilapia or grouper, or simply enjoyed on its own.

title: Bella Sera Pinot Grigio 1.5 Liter
body_html:
Bella Sera Pinot Grigio

1.5 Liter

Bring the Bella Sera Pinot Grigio - available in a 1.5 Liter bottle - to your next summer cookout. This light bodied white is best served chilled, very refreshing. Light acidity and pleasant floral, melon, and citrus flavors make this large bottle a crowd pleaser. Enjoy with grilled fish or fresh salad.

title: Taylor Fladgate 325th Anniversary
body_html:
Taylor Fladgate 325th Anniversary Reserve Tawny Port Back Label

Taylor Fladgates 325th Anniversary port was made to celebrate the company's 325th anniversary. It is filled with rich fruit and it has a great depth and spicy richness as well being impressively fresh. The dried fruits and red plums are lifted with a hint of smoky wood and good acidity. A classic food pairing with this port is any dessert that has cherries, plums, dried fruits, caramel, butterscotch, or nuts in it.

An example of a good dessert pairing with this port is a molten chocolate cake, creme brulee, flan, or a chocolate-walnut tart. They also pair well with these cheeses: Stilton, Bleu d'Auvergne, Mimolette and Roquefort cheeses and they also go well with any eggy desserts. Any of these foods will taste good with the Taylor Fladgate 325 Anniversary port and this will port will make a good dessert or snack with them.

More Info

title: Opus One Napa Valley Red Wine 2014
body_html:
Opus One Napa Valley Red Wine

2014

Opus One is the Flagship wine of the Robert Mondavi company. This rich, lush red wine is sourced from the finest Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Cabernet Franc grapes the Napa Valley has to offer.

Full bodied, made in the style if classic Bordeaux blends, Opus One is the perfect accompaniment to a gourmet dinner, or to impress that special someone.

Dark Berry and currant flavors swirl with hints of chocolate and coffee, with well balanced acidity and velvety tannins. Best suited to luscious filet mignon or Waygu ribeye steak, Opus One can either be enjoyed now, or cellared for several years.

title: Peter Vella Vineyards White Zinfandel
body_html:
Peter Vella Vineyards White Zinfandel

This Peter Vella Vineyards White Zinfandel 5 Liter Box wine is the perfect size for celebrating and dining with large groups of your friends and family. Bright and sweet with flavors of strawberry and watermelon, this wine offers a crisp clean finish. Enjoy it with a delicious chicken or turkey roast.

title: The Original Dark Horse Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
The Original Dark Horse Sauvignon Blanc

The Orginal Dark Horse Sauvignon Blanc pairs racy acidity with fresh, crisp citrus and lemon notes. Medium bodied and well balanced, this white wine is best served well chilled. A flexible wine for many food pairings, Dark Horse Sauvignon Blanc complements a pasta with cream sauce or cedar grilled salmon.

title: Dark Horse Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Dark Horse Pinot Grigio

Dark Horse Pinot Grigio is light enough for a novice wine drinker, yet complex enough to please your connoisseur friend. With bright acidity and lovely floral, citrus, and lemon notes, this well balanced, light bodied white wine is best served well chilled. Enjoy with grilled shrimp or a vegetable ragout.

title: La Marca Prosecco Mini 187ml
body_html:
La Marca Prosecco

187ml Mini

The perfect size bottle to share with friends and family, La Marca Prosecco Split 187ml is a deliciously crisp sparkling wine with notes of citrus, green apple, and a hint of honey and florals. Slightly dry and not overly sweet, it can be enjoyed on its own or paired with mild cheeses, salads, or light seafood dishes.

title: Union Wine Underwood Get It Girl White Wine
body_html:
Union Wine Underwood Get It Girl White Wine

The Get it Girl White WIne is a crisp, white blend of Riesling, Gewurztraminer, and Pinot Gris. It is full of jasmine aromas, with juicy and tart flavors, of lime and melon. The Union White wine pairs well with sweet foods and complement salty, sour, and spicy dishes.

This wine goes well with these seafood items: oysters, crab, lobsters, clams, shrimp, mussels, and grilled, baked, or sauteed fish..When it comes to meat, you can serve chicken, Cornish game hens, and chicken with this wine. If you need an appetizer, cheese, or salad to serve with this food, you can serve Havarti, Gouda, and Muenster cheeses, and a variety of appetizers and salads. Get it Girl is a great tasting white wine and these delicious dishes will go well with it.

title: Union Wine Underwood Riesling Radler Can
body_html:
Union Wine Underwood Riesling Radler

12oz Can

The combination of crisp grapefruit, sweet Riesling, heady hops, and smooth malt make the Union Wine Underwood Riesling Radler the perfect summer refreshment. Affordable and conveniently canned, these radlers are ideal for when you want to enjoy some craft wine without all the fuss of opening a whole bottle.

title: Bogle Phantom 3 Liter
body_html:
Bogle Phantom

3 Liter

Rich and robust, Bogle's "Phantom" red blend is scary delicious. Sourced from the finest grapes in sunny California, Bogle's winemakers combing Syrah, Mourvedre, and Zinfandel to create a full-bodied wine rich in red fruit flavors and subtle peppery aromas.

Bogle Phantom is reminiscent of classic Cotes du Rhone from the South of France, with the upfront fruit bombs expected from red wines from the California Valley. With the use of the Zinfandel grape instead of the lighter Grenache in a Cotes du Rhone, Bogle's "Phantom" displays much more jammy fruit than its GSM cousin.

This wine would overpower lighter fare; enjoy with grilled steaks, roast lamb, or a hearty burger. The 3 Liter size bottle means invite your friends - there's plenty to share!

SELECTIVE GRAPE GROWING
From fields around California, our winemakers combine grapes of unsurpassed quality and complexity.

AMERICAN OAK
Wild berries and black pepper are framed by the influence of oak aging with baking spices and a hint of toasty vanilla.

title: d66 Pharaon Department 66 Grenache
body_html:
d66 Pharaon Department 66 Grenache

2014 Vintage

d66 Pharaon Department 66 Grenache is sourced from very old Syrah and Grenache vines in California's central valley, created by noted winemaker Dave Phinney, from Orin Swift wines. These gnarly grapevines product small and concentrated fruit, which results in a big fruit bomb of a red wine. Blackberry pie, purple plum, and tangy ripe raspberry almost leap out of the glass.

Aging in new oak barrels helps to tame the sweet, and imparts a sweet, smoky oak aroma on the nose. This luscious wine is full-bodied, with medium tannin and a dark garnet color, yet is still approachable.

The high alcohol content of this wine makes it overpowering for lighter fare - stick with roasted game meats, grilled steaks, and even creamy, pungent cheeses. This meaty red is perfect to share in front of the fireplace on a winter's night.

title: Buehler Russian River Chardonnay
body_html:
Buehler Russian River Chardonnay

The Russian River Valley in cool Sonoma California produces Buehler Russin River Chardonnay. Subtle aromas of fig, melon, and pineapple meld with buttery vanilla aromas finishing with well-balanced acidity. This full-bodied, lightly oaked white wine is ideal for sipping alone or paired with succulent shrimp dishes or roasted chicken.

title: Caymus Cabernet Sauvignon 2015
body_html:
Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Rich and robust Caymus Cabernet Sauvignon is sourced from sunny California. Tart current flavors and rich vanilla roll over the palate, finishing with bracing tannins. Full bodied and designed to stand up to rich food, this wine is best enjoyed with a marbled ribeye or blue cheese encrusted filet mignon.

2015 is being lauded as one of the top vintages in Napa , garnering a 97 point rating from Wine Advocate.

94 pts, Robert Parker's Wine Advocate

"Deep purple-black in color, the 2015 Cabernet Sauvignon springs from the glass with lifted crème de cassis, violets and chocolate box notes plus hints of lilacs, raspberry leaves, anise and cardamom. The perfumed black fruit preserves and chocolate-laced notes completely pack the full-bodied palate, with soft, velvety tannins and just enough freshness, finishing very long and very spicy. Definitely one for hedonists seeking immediate gratification."

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • 2015
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Chloe Red Blend No. 249
body_html:
Chloe Red Blend No. 249

The North Coast of California offers a special vintage with Chloe Red No. 249. This rich red blend is a celebration of the dark fruit flavors, and pairs well with the steak dinner of your choice. Leaving a lingering taste of espresso and spice, a glass of Red No. 249 is as satisfying as the meal itself.

TASTING NOTES
