An enticing nose precedes deep layers of expressive, dark fruit flavors blended with notes of rich espresso and spice on the palate. A full, luxurious mouth feel gives way to an alluring and lingering finish.

title: Chloe Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Chloe Pinot Grigio White Wine

The Chloe Pinot Grigio white wine from Valdadige, Italy is the perfect companion to a light dinner of chicken, steamed vegetables, and rice. Drawn from the flavors of juicy white peaches, sumptuous melons, and the crispness of apples, this Pinot Grigio white gives it all for true wine enthusiast.

TASTING NOTES

On the palate, fruit-forward flavors of juicy white peach, soft melon, crisp apple and floral honeysuckle lead to a crisp, refreshing finish with a subtle undertone of Meyer lemon.

title: Signorello Padrone Proprietary Red Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Signorello Padrone Proprietary Red Cabernet Sauvignon

2013 

Padrone is dedicated to Ray Signorello Sr., a visionary whose dream came to a reality in our wines at Signorello, and whose life was as full of character as our wines. Padrone is a wine that expresses the quality and dignity of Signorellos Vineyards and is a fitting tribute to our founder. Our stunning hillside vineyard along the Siverado Trail provides a variety of exposures allowing us to create wines with great complexity. The grapes for this proprietary wine are sourced from the oldest Cabernet Sauvignon blocks on our estate planted in 1990.

Salute! Raymond Signorello, Jr.

title: Listel Cuvée Pink Sparkling Rosé
body_html:
Listel Cuvée Pink Sparkling Rosé

Rh a chocolatey dessert for a sweet finish to your meal.

efresh your palate with a glass of effervescent Listel Cuvée Pink Sparkling Rosé. This easy-drinking sparkling wine is naturally sweet, delivering rich, fruit-forward aromas of blackberry, raspberry, plum and cherry, complemented by an invigorating fizz and reduced alcohol content.

Serve this bubbly rosé on its own as an aperitif to awaken your taste buds or pair it wit

title: TY KU Junmai Ginjo Sake Black
body_html:
TY KU Junmai Ginjo Sake Black

720ml

TY KU Junmai Ginjo Sake Black is brewed in and imported from Nara, Japan. It is quickly becoming the most popular Sake in America with its exceptional quality, taste, and style. It has a rich and silky texture with hints of peach and vanilla notes. It is made out of specialty Yamada Nishiki & Akebono Sake rice. The rice it is made out of is so polished that only 55% of the grain remains, a process that gets rid of impurities and it refines the taste. Foods that go well with this Sake are meat skewers, steak, seafood (especially crabs and raw oysters), Soba, Hot Pot, and ice cream (especially vanilla topped with sweet Sake).

title: TY KU Sake Junmai Premium White
body_html:
TY KU Junmai Sake Premium

720ml

The TY KU Junmai Sake Premium wine is made from only 4 pure ingredients: premium non-GMO rice, pure soft water, yeast, and handmade koji – making it one of the purest alcoholic beverages on the planet. It is fresh and smooth and pairs well with fresh shellfish, especially prawns, langoustines, mussels and raw oysters.

title: R Wines Bitch Bubbly Rosé
body_html:
R Wines Bitch Bubbly Rosé

R Wines Bitch Bubbly Rosé features a pale strawberry color with tastes of strawberries and raspberries enhanced with toffee notes and just a hint of sweet citrus like clementines. It is best enjoyed chilled and pairs beautifully with rice and pasta dishes as well as quick roasted seasonal vegetables and baked croutons.

title: Sables d'Azur Rosé
body_html:
Sables d'Azur Rosé

Sables d'Azur Rosé is light bodied, medium plus acidity wine. It is dry on the palate with strawberries, cherries, lemons, citrus, green apples, grapefruits, spices and white pepper and has a bitter almond finish. This wine does well on it's own or paired with light salads and starters with mild cheeses.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Sparkling Rosé
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Sparkling Rosé

Sourced from the sunny California coast, Cupcake Vineyards Sparkling Rose is delicious and festive. Sweet flavors of strawberry and fresh melon and a breezy frizzante make this wine ideal to enjoy well-chilled on a hot summer day. Delicious with prosciutto wrapped melon, a fresh goat cheese salad, or lightly grilled whitefish.

title: Ravenswood Winery Old Vine Besieged
body_html:
Ravenswood Winery Old Vine Besieged

Usher in All Hallows’ Eve with this Ravenswood Winery Old Vine Besieged red blend out of Sonoma. The rich, full-bodied flavor profile of blackberry and plum carry spicy notes of vanilla, cardamom, and cedar.

Pair this deliciously robust wine with an equally hearty beef tenderloin roast or grilled BBQ steak.

title: Chloe Merlot
body_html:
Chloe Merlot

Chloe Merlot is perfect for an elegant evening out on the town. Its full-bodied flavor hints of berries, cherries and plums while invoking memories of summer nights all year round. A deep burgundy color, Chloe Merlot is low in tannins, meaning less bitterness and more smooth acidity in its flavor. This Merlot pairs nicely with steaks and chocolate desserts.

TASTING NOTES

Abundant flavors of freshly picked blackberries, black cherry and ripe plum lead to a plush, velvety mouthfeel followed by delicate notes of vanilla, mocha and spice.

title: Chronic Cellars Purple Paradise Zinfandel
body_html:
Chronic Cellars Purple Paradise Zinfandel

Chronic Cellars Purple Paradise Zinfandel is a rich, stand up, red fruit bomb. Sourced from sunny California, aromas of strawberry, black raspberry, and vanilla clove are prominent.

Full bodied with supple tannin, Chronic Cellars Purple Paradise Zin is best enjoyed with bruschetta, Margherita pizza, or on the porch with friends.

title: Chronic Cellars Sofa King Bueno Red
body_html:
Chronic Cellars Sofa King Bueno Red

Chronic Cellars Sofa King Bueno Red is a classic Grenache, Syrah, Mourvedre blend. Produced in the stunning Paso Robles region known for this red, Sofa King presents full red berry fruit and subtle pepper aromas.

Full bodied with medium tannin, this wine pairs nicely with roasted duck, Bolognese, or dark chocolate dessert.

title: Chronic Cellars Suite Petite Sirah
body_html:
Chronic Cellars Suite Petite Sirah

Chronic Cellars Suite Petite Sirah is a fun, fruit-forward, red bomb of a wine. With medium tannin and well-balanced acidity, coupled with typical Syrah notes of red berries, coffee, and pepper finishes smoothly enough to sip.

Chronic Cellars Suite Petite Sirah pairs nicely with grilled steak, tomato sauce-based dishes, such as bolognese, and lamb.

title: Chronic Cellars Stone Fox
body_html:
Chronic Cellars Stone Fox

Chronic Cellars Stone Fox is an unusual white blend, featuring Viognier, Grenache Blanc, and Picpoul grapes. With steely acidity and a firm, full bodied mouthfeel, this wine presents slightly fruity, melon aromas.

Pairs nicely with cream sauces and roasted chicken.

title: Ménage à Trois Decadence Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Ménage à Trois Decadence Cabernet Sauvignon

The Ménage à Trois Decadence Cabernet Sauvignon is the perfect present for special events such as engagement or anniversary parties. The three varieties of grapes from California's grand growing regions that have gone into this wine ensure it is a delectable accompaniment to a delectable marinated rib-eye steak.

title: VOGA Italia Sparkling Rosè 187ml
body_html:
VOGA Italia Sparkling Rosè

187ml Mini

The VOGA Italia Sparkling Rosè 187ml mini, lovingly made from the pink skinned Pinot Grigio grape, is a great gift idea for birthdays and other special events. This delicious wine is best enjoyed with a porterhouse steak served medium to rare.

title: A to Z Wineworks The Essence Pinot Noir
body_html:
A to Z Wineworks The Essence Pinot Noir

A to Z Wineworks "The Essence" Pinot Noir is a limited edition blend of the winery's finest Pinot Noir grapes. A perfect cool season allowed the delicate grapes to ripen slowly. giving subtle cherry and coffee notes to this surprisingly subtle wine. Pairs nicely with wild mushroom risotto or grilled duck.

TASTING NOTES

Ripe, red, blue and black fruit aromas. These are followed by hints of floral and confectionary (rose, peony, star anise, red licorice, nutmeg) and warmer, classic Pinot Noir notes of cola, cinnamon, mocha, white pepper, truffle, sandalwood, loam, and tobacco. On the palate, the wine is as generous as it is on the nose with fresh, abundant red fruit flavor reinforced by ready acidity and a judicious use of French oak bringing texture and personality.

title: A to Z Wineworks Pinot Noir
body_html:
A to Z Wineworks Pinot Noir

What makes A to Z Pinot Noir different? The grape, of course. Pinot Noir is at home simply paired with any foods, but the elegance and texture of this wine make it perfect for refined gatherings.

Pour drinks you'll love. The A to Z Pinot Noir can be enjoyed alone or with food, making it a versatile option for nearly any occasion. Swirl the wine in your glass to get a traditional wine aroma, then take a sip of this silky, smooth wine to experience the blend of red cherry and wild strawberry flavors. Sip on this refreshing pinot noir alone or pair with grilled salmon and capers for a delectable dinner.

Wine Spectator's "Best Of" award honors A to Z Wineworks Pinot Noir. This light yet complex red from Oregon features classic cherry and coffee notes of Pinot Noir and racy acidity. Subtle red fruit and earthy aromas give this wine flexibility with foods such as grilled game meats or cream sauces.

TASTING NOTES

Opens with compelling aromatics suggesting red fruit (berries, plum, cranberry, pomegranate), spice (clove, turmeric, gingerbread), herbs (tea, thyme, mint, lavender), wood (spruce, cedar), and savory (bacon, dried mushroom) notes. The palate is succulent and round, with flavors like blackberry, black cherry, and pomegranate at the forefront. The oak profile adds complexity with hints of sandalwood, mesquite, vanilla, sweet spices, coffee, and chocolate.

title: A to Z Wineworks Rosé
body_html:
A to Z Wineworks Rosé

A to Z Wineworks Rose is designed to go from grape to glass. Light yet complex. this classic summer favorite combines aromas of flower petals, strawberries, and hibiscus. Best served chilled, the Rose is perfect with seared scallops or a delicate field greens salad. Best enjoyed watching the sun set with a friend.

TASTING NOTES

Delicate aromas of rose petal, hibiscus, and lime blossom and reminiscent of strawberry cream, watermelon, and tart cherry. On the palate, the wine’s minerality provides a beautiful backbone for the juicy yet restrained fruit flavors. A touch of sweetness is followed immediately by a line of acidity that gives energy to the mid-palate leading to a smooth finish with lingering flavors of grapefruit, citrus zest, and white peach.

title: A to Z Wineworks Pinot Gris
body_html:
A to Z Wineworks Pinot Gris

A to Z Vineyard's Oregon Pinot Gris is light and fruity with well-balanced acidity. Notes of sweet lemon and light floral complement the fresh finish. Subtle cinnamon and kiwi round out the flavors. This bright white pairs best with fresh white fish, grilled shrimp, and sauteed summer vegetables.

TASTING NOTES

Bountiful fruit – pear, white peach, apricot, lime zest, papaya, melon, guava, gooseberry – and non-fruit aromas – honeysuckle, rose, apple blossom, ginger, fresh cut hay, beeswax.

title: A to Z Wineworks Chardonnay
body_html:
A to Z Wineworks Chardonnay

A to Z Wineworks Chardonnay from Oregon. This fruit-forward chardonnay is unoaked, with notes of tangerine, melon, and citrus. With aromas of quince and honey, this full bodied white is light enough to pair nicely with grilled fish, a hearty salad, or for sipping on the porch.

TASTING NOTES

Leads with faintly tropical notes. Other aromas emerge as the wine opens: apple, lemongrass, cut hay, honey, flint, and mint. The compelling palate has apple, linalool, and citric notes with a round, ripe, mid-palate fullness.

title: A to Z Wineworks Riesling
body_html:
A to Z Wineworks Riesling

A to Z Wineworks Riesling is a sweet white grape wine from the pacific northwest. A light and fresh fruity taste that goes perfectly with those spicy dishes you crave when it's cold. Wineworks Riesling, with just a hint of citrus, is the perfect compliment to a spicy chile rellano.

TASTING NOTES

Both floral and fruity aromatics abound – honeysuckle, hibiscus, apple-blossom and other white flowers, apricot, white peach, lime zest, lychee, gooseberry and mandarin orange precede rose tea, lemon verbena, even lime cordial notes. The wine is lively and buoyant on the palate leading with tangy acidity followed by a slight honey sweetness and juicy flavors. There are hints of grapefruit, apple, lime juice and honeydew melon flavors as well as candied ginger, spearmint, event orange Triple Sec.

title: 19 Crimes Hard Chard
body_html:
19 Crimes Hard Chard Chardonnay

19 Crimes "Hard Chard" Chardonnay is as bold and forward as the name suggests. Full bodies with a smoky oak finish, this complex white has a smooth, buttery mouth-feel. Flavors of honey dew melon pop with more subtle vanilla and honeysuckle. Pairs nicely with baked salmon or grilled swordfish.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: 19 Crimes The Uprising Red Wine
body_html:
19 Crimes The Uprising

Red Wine Aged In Rum Barrels

The Uprising, a new wine aged for 30 days in rum barrels, pays homage to Australia's "Rum Rebellion" of 1808. Due to the Government's hindering of the rum trade, the rebellion was the only time a group of soldiers and citizens banded together to overthrow the Government. A portion of this hand-crafted wine has thus been aged for 30 days in rum barrels and is dark with jammy flavors and a smoky finish.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • (Red Wine)

title: 19 Crimes Shiraz
body_html:
19 Crimes Shiraz

19 Crimes Shiraz from Australia is rich and full bodied, with subtle peppery notes and a rich currant aroma. Red berry fruit complements soft tannins for a structured, approachable red. Fresh and youthful, this wine pairs nicely with grilled lamb or game birds, or pizza on the porch with friends.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Shiraz

title: Santa Margherita Chianti Classico 375ml
body_html:
Santa Margherita Chianti Classico

375ml (Half Bottle)

Santa Margherita Chianti Classico is known for its sophisticated style, and with this bottle size (375ml) you can entertain guests with a bottle on every table at a wedding or dinner party.

It is an authentic Italian wine that offers the aromas of plums and black cherries with a floral hint of gladiolus.

The fruit and spice tannins make this wine pair well with grilled and braized meats, rich tomato-based sauces, and Tuscan food items like lasagna and spaghetti. If you serve these delicious foods with this wine, then your feast will be Fantastico.

title: Apothic Wines Inferno
body_html:
Apothic Inferno Aged In Whiskey Barrels Red Blend

This California Apothic Inferno Wine has been aged in whiskey barrels. A full flavor red wine with just a hint of the rich flavor of whiskey. A complex wine that begins with a dark red flavor and is followed by full-flavored black grapes and berries. Pair this with smoked barbecued ribs.

title: Dry Creek Vineyard Fume Blanc
body_html:
Dry Creek Vineyard Fume Blanc

Sauvignon Blanc

Dry Creek Vineyard's historic Fume Blanc is crisp and pleasantly acidic. Bright citrus and herbaceous notes highlight the elegant structure and grassy aromas of a classic Sauvignon Blanc. This medium bodied white pairs perfectly with fresh trout or a warm pear and goat cheese salad.

title: Stella Rosa Black L'Originale LE Halloween
body_html:
Stella Rosa Black L'Originale Limited Edition Halloween

1.5 Liter

Stella Rosa Black L'Originale Limited Edition Halloween has a sleeve that's as inviting and distinct as its semi-sweet taste. This limited edition bottle is sure to be the hit of Halloween this year. Inviting and seductive, the semi-sparkling red blend is a double threat not to be contended.

title: Ernie Els Big Easy Red Blend
body_html:
Ernie Els Big Easy Red Blend

The Ernie Els Big Easy Red Blend is a dry red wine with an alcohol content of 14.57%. Its light body is delightful on the palate and the aromatic fragrances of strawberry and French perfume are unmistakable. This Shiraz is elegantly paired with a Filet Mignon.

title: Simi Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Simi Cabernet Sauvignon

The most striking thing about Simi Cabernet Sauvignon is its color. Dark like garnets with a bright red ruby edge, it smells as delicious as it looks. Dark fruit such as blackberry, black cherry, and plum give the wine its pleasant aroma. Hints of cocoa, pepper berry, cedar, and cassis round it out. This wine is great to serve with chicken marsala or prime ribs.

title: Chalk Hill Pinot Noir
body_html:
Chalk Hill Pinot Noir

Chalk Hill Pinot Noir combines the fresh fruitiness of ripe berries and cherries with the decadent flavors of chocolate. It’s an elegant wine with a smooth finish. When deciding what to pair it with, many people enjoy pork loin or salmon with a berry glaze. The wine is versatile with acidity that is well-balanced.

title: Peter Vella Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Peter Vella Vineyards Merlot

Peter Vella Vineyards Merlot is like Cabernet Sauvignon but with a softer flavor. It tastes like cherries and raspberries and has a light mouth feel. This box wine remains a favorite for many people because of its flavor and how portable it is to travel with. It goes well with rich pasta dishes especially those using fresh ingredients for their sauce.

title: Sebastiani Vineyards Zinfandel
body_html:
Sebastiani Vineyards Zinfandel

Sebastiani Vineyards Zinfandel is a perfect summer wine that features the deliciously fragrant aromas of vine-ripened raspberry and strawberry, and balanced by the gentle nuances of vanilla oak and cedar. Savor this elegant, refreshing wine with bleu cheese burgers fresh off the grill, Teriyaki shrimp, or spare ribs slathered in barbecue sauce.

title: GIFFT Kathie Lee Gifford Red Blend
body_html:
GIFFT by Kathie Lee Gifford Red Blend

GIFFT by Kathie Lee Gifford is the gift of wine that keeps on giving. The exquisite Red Blend embodies the spirit of Kathie Lee—extraordinary and smooth. Uniquely crafted in the Monterey wine region of California, the medium-bodied blend is lush and delightful. Pairs well with aged cheddar, smoked gouda or asiago.

Coming up with the final blend, comprised of 6 different varieties, was like a wonderful experiment, with plenty of mixing, discussion, adjustments and lots of tasting. While the final result certainly falls in the category of “easy-drinking red,” the complexity, balance and lushness make it a wine for casual drinkers and serious wine-lovers alike. ~ Kathy Lee Gifford

Tasting Notes (download)

title: Vanderpump Rosé by Lisa Vanderpump
body_html:
Vanderpump Rosé

In typical French tradition, Vanderpump Rose combines the worlds of the elegant and the simple. Inspired by reality star Lisa Vanderpump, its fresh, sparkling taste blends very well with hints of tangerine, strawberry, and peach flavors.

Vanderpump Rosé, rose colored vintage goes easy on the nose with its gentle aromas of red currant, pepper, and sweet citrus. The wine is best when served with Moules Frites.

TASTING NOTES

Color
Pale rose, peach color.

Nose
Elegant nose with delicate red currant and hints of pepper as well as sweet citrus.

Palate
On the palate, it reveals a touch of strawberry, tangerine and peach in a dry, classic style.

We Love Vanderpump Rosé

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Rosé

title: Cherry Pie Pinot Noir
body_html:
Cherry Pie Pinot Noir


Sweet flavors of red berry and Bing cherry dominate the zesty landscape of Cherry Pie Stanly Ranch Pinot Noir! Additional hints of mint, cinnamon, and clove blend well with floral aromas to offer a light finish to the wine. Fine tannins provide a long, smooth finish, making it the perfect dinnertime companion for a rare to medium rare steak.

title: GIFFT Kathie Lee Gifford Pinot Grigio
body_html:
GIFFT by Kathie Lee Gifford Pinot Grigio

Let your palate escape with the fruity tropical flavors of Gifft Kathie Lee Gifford Pinot Grigio. This delightful white wine is sure to be pleasant and tantalizing to the palate. Notice its bright and crisp citrus acidity with each satisfying sip of this well-crafted wine. It is a great everyday wine for dinner or for dinner parties with friends. It goes great with chicken piccata or grilled sea scallops in a garlic butter.

title: GIFFT Kathie Lee Gifford Chardonnay
body_html:
GIFFT by Kathie Lee Gifford Chardonnay

With its crisp, refreshing acidity and blend of tropical fruits, Kathie Lee Gifford Chardonnay is a unique wine that celebrates love and friendship. Its fine mixture of tropical fruits is carefully blended with natural French oak and has a slight buttery flavor that brings forth a smooth, even finish. Fig and pistachio baked brie would make an ideal dinner companion.

title: Haute Couture Blanc 2 Pack Sparkling Champagne
body_html:
Haute Couture Blanc

2 Pack Sparkling Champagne

Let your eyes feel intrigued by the pale yellow color of Haute Couture Blanc 2 Pack Sparkling Champagne. When you pour your first glass of this elegant lightly effervescent sparkling wine you notice hints of white flower blossoms that gently permeate your nasal passages. As you take your initial sip, you taste bright tropical fruits such as juicy pineapple and ripe papaya. Then you notice the sweet, succulent Southern peach taste. This is an amazing champagne that is perfect for toasting. It is excellent with desserts such as fruit tart or delicate hand-crafted chocolates.

title: Napa Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine
body_html:
Napa Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine

Napa Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon is characterized by delicate, concentrated aromas of fresh blackberry, black cherry, and cassis. Slight hints of blueberry bring out the wine's gentle, fruity taste. The wine also boasts a rich, dark fruit blend with undertones of chocolate, toffee, star anise, and zesty black pepper for a finish that is sharp yet smooth. Lamb Bolognese makes an ideal dinner companion.

title: Justin Rosé Wine
body_html:
Justin Rosé Wine

Justin Rosé is a clear pink peach wine with an apple, white peach, and strawberry aroma. The wine is made entirely of Cabernet Sauvignon, the flagship grape variety of Justin. The palate is fruity on entry, but has herbal subtleties that pairs nicely with wood fire pizza or herb cured olives.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Rosé

title: Locations TX - Texas Red Wine Dave Phinney
body_html:
Locations TX - Texas Red Wine

Created by Dave Phinney, Locations TX - Texas Red Wine is produced by McPherson Cellars. With a dusty plum hue, this wine gushes with the aromas of black plum and raspberries coupled with lilac and rose with hints of black tea, slate, and cedar. Flavors of red fruits, cranberries, grapefruit, and cherry cola create a taste that lingers. This delicious wine pairs well with a great steak or roast beef.

title: Locations NZ - New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Locations NZ - New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc

Dave Phinney Wine

New Zealand Sauvignon Blanc is a dazzling blend of herbaceous and fruity tones. Combining notes of capsicum, gooseberry, tropical fruit, fresh cut grass, tomato stalks and grapefruit. Perfect for sipping and an excellent complement to seafood, shellfish, citrus and garlic based sauces. A critically acclaimed wine that has taken the world by storm.

title: GIFFT Kathie Lee Gifford Pinot Noir Rosé
body_html:
GIFFT by Kathie Lee Gifford Pinot Noir Rosé

GIFFT by Kathie Lee Gifford Pinot Noir Rosé is a dry and crisp wine that has distinctive notes of berries, rose petal and fresh stone fruits. The refreshing finish of this wine makes it the perfect choice for parties since it pairs beautifully with any food and the bright flavor appeals to every palate.

title: Andre Spumante Sparkling Wine
body_html:
Andre Spumante Sparkling Wine By The Best Wine Store


Andre Spumante Sparkling Wine

If you like fruity sweetness and effusive effervescence, then you are sure to love Andre Spumante Sparkling Wine. Crafted in traditional Italian style, this muscat varietal opens up with a fruity nose and warm, sweet mouthfeel culminating in a crisp aftertaste.

Serve chilled with barbecue or as a dessert wine.

title: Freixenet Cordon Negro Rosé
body_html:
Freixenet Cordon Negro Rosé By The Best Wine Store

Known affectionately by enthusiasts as "black bottle bubbly," Freixenet Cordon Negro Rosé initially captivates you with a fragrant fruit cocktail and raspberry nose.

Medley of ripe pear, apple, and citrus flavors

Next, the palate is treated to a medley of ripe pear, apple, and citrus flavors culminating in a long finish with a snappy touch of ginger. A blend of Xarel.lo, Parellada, and Macabeo grapes, black bottle bubbly goes well with Mexican fajitas or Greek kebabs.

Get my bottle of Freixenet Cordon Negro Rosé NOW!

title: Dona Paula Rose Of Malbec
body_html:
Dona Paula Rose Of Malbec

Mendoza - Argentina

Perfect for hot weather picnics and barbecues, Dona Paula Rose of Malbec romances the nose with grownup, candied aromas. Its medium soft palate bears just enough astringency to support the piquancy of citrussy and nectarine flavors. Like many rose wines, this Argentinian Malbec Rose from Dona Paula works well with light salads and seafood dishes.

title: Line 39 Excursion Red Blend
body_html:
Line 39 Excursion Red Blend By The Best Wine Store


Line 39 Excursion Red Blend

Line 39 Excursion Red Blend is a medley of varietals containing Petit Sirah, Merlot, Verdot, and Zinfandel.

 

Aged in American and French casks

Aged in American and French casks, the resulting red blend opens with aromas of ripe raspberries and blackberry jam and a hint of mocha -- reminiscent of breakfast on the veranda on a warm, summer morning. The palate is delighted with dark, chocolaty plum warmed up with vanilla and spice.

Enjoy with rack of lamb or smokey sausage pizza.

 

Get My Bottle NOW!

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Rosso Lux Semi-Sweet
body_html:
Stella Rosa Imperiale Rosso Lux Semi-Sweet

Celebrate life with Stella Rosa Imperiale Rosso Lux Semi-Sweet sparkling wine, a lively Italian blend. Its fresh strawberry and red berry palate is fine on its own, or mixed with citrus vodka, lemon juice and, yes, strawberry jam in a delightful "Jam I Am" wine cocktail. Serve with poached salmon or poached bears and brie.

title: The Prisoner Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
The Prisoner Cabernet Sauvignon

Looking for a bold and full-bodied wine that will leave you feeling captivated? Look no further than The Prisoner Cabernet Sauvignon. With its deep ruby color and aromas of blackberry, vanilla, and toasted oak, this wine is sure to please even the most discerning palate.

Crafted from carefully selected grapes grown in the Napa Valley, The Prisoner Cabernet Sauvignon boasts a rich and complex flavor profile, with notes of dark fruit, chocolate, and spice. This wine is aged for 12 months in a combination of French and American oak barrels, adding depth and complexity to the finished product.

The Prisoner Cabernet Sauvignon is the perfect choice for a special occasion or a night in with friends. Whether you're pairing it with a hearty steak or simply enjoying a glass on its own, this wine is sure to impress. So why wait? Try The Prisoner Cabernet Sauvignon today and experience the ultimate in flavor and sophistication.

Blend:
Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Syrah, Malbec, Petite Sirah, Charbono

Aroma:
Black Cherry, Vanilla, Ripe Plum

Tasting Notes:
Blackberry, Cocoa, Baking Spice

Pairs with:
Chef Brett recommends pairing The Prisoner Cabernet with Grilled Ribeye or Aged Gouda Cheese.

title: Luc Belaire Rare Luxe Brut
body_html:
Luc Belaire Rare Luxe Brut Sparkling Champagne

With Luc Belaire Rare Luxe Brut, you can savor a taste from France’s very own Chablis vineyards. It is a cuvée made from 100% Chardonnay from Burgundy with a lightly sweet, crisp palate with aroma notes of grapefruit, peach, and honeysuckle.

Often used whet the appetite before a meal, it also pairs well with fresh fruit and grilled meats.

title: Haute Couture Rosé Champagne
body_html:
Haute Couture Rosé Champagne

A perfect example of style, elegance, and grandeur, Haute Couture Rose Champagne emits a gentle breeze of pink petal aromas that float straight from the bottle itself. A fusion of dry, tart cherries, natural raspberries, and white apricot intermingle with the floral scent of fresh spring bouquets, all of which serve to accentuate its delicate, bubbly texture. Fresh seafood makes an ideal dinner companion.

title: Haute Couture Blanc Champagne
body_html:
Haute Couture Blanc Champagne

Toasted bread aromas grace the fruity background of Haute Couture Blanc Champagne! Hints of pear and peach flavors add a soft touch which accentuates the champagne's bubbly consistency. A hint of sweetness adds to the overall zest, giving the champagne a full-bodied finish to add balance to its refreshing sparkle. A suggested food pairing may be curry laksa.

title: Raymond LVE Legend Red
body_html:
Raymond LVE Legend Red

Inspired by none other than John Legend, Raymond LVE Legend Red bears a unique blend that is guaranteed to open your taste buds with passion. The wine is a mixture of oak, blackberry, and licorice, all of which are graced with the fine aromas of cocoa and dark fruit. Undertones of warm, mellow spices and chocolate render this deep, ruby red favorite a long, savory finish, making it the ideal companion for aged montegrappa cheese.

title: Raymond LVE Legend Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Raymond LVE Legend Cabernet Sauvignon

2013

LVE Legend Cabernet Sauvignon has fascinating and seductive aromas of cassis, blackberry, dark chocolate, and a small amount of black tea. The luxurious and splendid flavors consist of juicy cherry, raspberry, and caramelized oak are harmonious and well-balanced with a hint of minerality. This Legend Cabernet Sauvignon also has sweet tannins, complex flavors, and a long finish that is full of luxury that makes it a wine that is truly enjoyed by a lot of people. If you are in need of foods to pair with this wine, there are many for you to choose from.

There are a lot of foods that go well with LVE Legend Cabernet Sauvignon. If you need a fish, tuna and swordfish will go swimmingly with this wine. When it comes to meats, braised meat dishes, rib eye, steak, beef short ribs, hamburger, beef stew, rack of lamb, and butterflied leg of lamb with portabello mushrooms. Some fruits and vegetables that pair well with this wine are Brussel sprouts, broccoli rabe, grilled radicchio, kale, and spinach. Cheeses that go well with this wine are Gorgonzola, Gouda, Cheddar, Vella Jack, mild blue cheeses, and aged cheddar. To end your meal, these desserts go well with this wine: dark chocolate cake, coffee ice cream, berries in dark chocolate sauce, dark chocolate chip, almond, walnut, or vanilla cookies, or blackberry, raspberry, or boysenberry pie. Cooking these foods with this Cabernet Sauvignon will make your meal cook.

title: Raymond LVE Legend Chardonnay
body_html:
Raymond LVE Legend Chardonnay

Awaken your senses with the floral aromas of Raymond LVE Legend Chardonnay! This wine boasts a unique blend of honeydew, toasted hazelnut, and creme brulee, all of which add balance to the wine itself. Vanilla creme and toasted oak integrate very well with slight undertones of spices and provide a long, smooth, yet energetic finish. Eggs benedict makes a fine dinner companion.

title: Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Pomegranate
body_html:
Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Pomegranate

With a raspberry pop of color, Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Pomegranate is a delicious mixture of refreshing and enticing. It's perfect for a mid-morning brunch with friends, or an outdoor dinner in the fall. This white wine pairing perfectly balances sweet and tart, with notes of cranberry and honey.

title: Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Mango
body_html:
Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Mango

Get transported to a tropic paradise as you take your first sip of Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Mango. The sweet tropical mimosa flavor will wake up your taste buds and transform your mouth into a tropical oasis. This bubbly beverage is made with bright, crisp white wine and succulent fresh-squeezed orange juice. Infused with ripe mango, you will be swept away to an exotic island with just one glass.

title: Wilson Creek Almond Mini 187ml
body_html:
Wilson Creek Almond Champagne

Mini 187ml

Wilson Creek Almond champagne is a uniquely mild sparkling wine that will leave you pleasantly surprised. This delicately flavored white wine pairs well with romantic evenings, delicate cheeses and light dinners of chicken or seafood. The 187ml mini bottle also works well as a wedding table gift or party favor.

This irresistible little Wilson Creek Almond Mini Split Sparkling Wine for a true Bachelor / Bachelorette Party. This sparkling wine was created to capture the excitement, romance and incredible passion people around the world possess. Wilson Creek Almond 187ml is crafted to take you on your own romantic journey as you experience every moment of love.

title: Moet & Chandon Ice Imperial Demi Sec Rosé
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Ice Imperial Demi Sec Rosé

Moet & Chandon Ice Imperial Demi Sec Rose enjoys the fine distinction of being the first and only champagne that can be served on ice. Hence its name. Golden highlights underscore its fine, rose-colored hue, both of which are complemented by the deep, fruity aromas of Morello cherry, cranberry, and lingonberry, blended with fig, nectarine, and grenadine.

A refreshing grapefruit finish adds just enough sparkle to be enjoyed at your summertime pool party. A simple midday snack of fruits and cheeses would suffice as a food pairing.

TASTING NOTES

A gleaming color

Vivid pink|
With golden highlights
A vibrant, fruity bouquet

Mainly scents of fragrant red berries and cherries: morello cherry, lingonberry and cranberry
Nuances of juicy summer fruits: fig and nectarine
An appetizing note of grenadine

title: Cook's Champagne Brut Mini 187ml
body_html:
Cook's Cellars Champagne Brut

187ml Mini

Sourced in California, Cook's Cellars Champagne has a familiar aroma of crisp apples, enhanced with notes of jasmine, kiwi, and peach. The popular champagne comes in a split mini of 187ml each, making it the perfect companion drink with salty food items like potato chips.

title: Cook's Extra Dry Mini 187ml
body_html:
Cook's Cellars Champagne Extra Dry

187ml Mini

Cook's Cellars Extra Dry (187ml Mini / Split) is perfect for those solo celebrations when nothing but bubbly will do. Keep your bubbles effervescent with Cook’s Cellars Extra Dry which mixes the springtime flavors of apple, lime and gooseberry for a lip-smacking finish. Pair with Pecorino and asparagus penne for a perfect meal.

title: Freixenet Carta Nevada Brut Cava Mini 187ml
body_html:
Freixenet Carta Nevada Brut Cava

187ml Mini

Freixenet, Carta Nevada Brut Cava 187ml makes an excellent introduction into Spanish bubbly. The effervescent Freixenet, Carta Nevada Brut Cava is full of vest, yet delicately sweet without losing any of its brut characteristics. There are hints of apricot, vanilla and lemon in this flavorful Spanish Cava. Fresh squeeze oranges and mix with Freixenet, Carta Nevada Brut Cava mini makes a perfect Mimosa. Pair with blueberry pancakes and hickory smoked bacon for an unforgettable brunch.

title: Giulio Straccali Chianti Wicker
body_html:
Giulio Straccali Chianti Wicker

Giulio Straccali Chianti Wicker is an iconic Tuscan wine that delights the palate through the distinctive flavors of Tuscany. The Giulio Straccali Chianti Wicker is created through the process of Governo Alla Toscano, or twice fermenting the grapes to complete the full body and lusciousness of the Chianti by being stored in oak barrels to mature.

Pair Guilio Straccali Chianti Wicker with a juicy, roast lamb with rosemary and grilled asparagus to complete the taste.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chianti

title: Giesen Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Giesen Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc

Giesen Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc is from New Zealand and has a complex dry sweetness. Alex and Theo Giesen began in the 1980s and expanded into many large vineyards throughout the Wairau Valley. Giesen Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc has a supple tropical top note which is complimented by the hints of mint and lemon. The finish on the palate is clean with a light kiss of citrus. Combine Giesen Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc with grilled swordfish and seafood risotto.

title: Quintessa 2012 Red
body_html:
Quintessa 2012 Red

Quintessa 2012, Cabernet Sauvignon from Rutherford, Napa Valley, California is exceptionally graceful and elegant. This Bordeaux-style red blend is seamlessly balanced. The tannins are extremely polished, enticing the senses with aromas of violets, acacia flowers and black and red fruits. Pairs best with classic meat dishes, game, mushrooms and pasta.

title: Quintessa 2014 Red Wine
body_html:
Quintessa 2014 Red Wine

The Quintessa 2014 red wine is special. Celebrate dense aromas blending the best from the Napa Valley ingredients - rich Rutherford grapes, dark cherries and blackberries with cedar spice, herbs, dark chocolate and violets.

Enjoy this rewarding Quintessa 2014 red wine with beef, lamb, poultry and game (deer, venison) meats.

title: Decoy Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Decoy Cabernet Sauvignon

From the incredibly fertile Alexander Valley in California's Sonoma County, Decoy Cabernet Sauvignon is a remarkable combination of quality and value. Rich, full-bodied, with just a hint of vanilla from our imported French oak barrels, it pairs perfectly with steak, burgers, lamb chops, and even portabella mushrooms.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Decoy Chardonnay
body_html:
Decoy Chardonnay

Experience the bright allure of Decoy Chardonnay with baked lemon chicken. The sweetness of citrus and melon lingers on your tongue while the smooth finish goes well with a deep kiss. Decoy Chardonnay has a crisp quality that stimulates taste buds for dessert or whatever comes after dinner.

title: Decoy Pinot Noir
body_html:
Decoy Pinot Noir

Indulge you taste buds with a glass of Decoy Pinot Noir. This rich, medium-bodied wine from Sonoma County is aged for eight months in French oak, delivering ripe red fruit aromas, like cherry, strawberry and blackcurrant, with hints of violet and cola. Mild tannins and subtle smokiness make proteins such as duck or pork chops a perfect pairing.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Duckhorn Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Duckhorn Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Enjoy the robust character of Duckhorn Vineyards' Cabernet Sauvignon. This complex, medium-bodied Nappa Valley red is dominated by cabernet sauvignon, blended with merlot, cabernet franc and petit verdot to deliver vibrant layers of red and black fruit, licorice and tobacco. Accenting floral notes and ample tannis create a balanced flavor profile that pairs perfectly with slow-roasted beef or a hard cheese.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Duckhorn Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Duckhorn Vineyards Napa Valley Merlot

This Duckhorn Vineyards Napa Valley Merlot has a lovely structure and a fascinating and seductive appeal. It also is a classic expression of Duckhorn Vineyards Merlot. It has strong aromas of ripe cherry, plum, and black fig rise from the glass. These tastes are underscored by hints of leather and cedar. The palate is lush and supple and also has a bright acidity and velvety tannins that support layers of raspberry and black cherry This Merlot also has small amounts of coffee and chocolate that carry on the long finish. There are also foods that you should dine on when drinking Duckhorn Merlot.

Foods that you can dine on with this wine are hamburgers, grilled or roast chicken, roast beef, filet mignon. braised short ribs, and Jambalaya. Other meats you can serve are lamb, roast pork, pork loin, turkey, and veal chops. When it comes to cheese, blue cheese, cheddar cheese, and gorgonzola go well with this wine. For seasonings, garlic and tarragon are great choices to season foods that are cooked to serve with this wine. You can also serve berries and fruit (especially with red fruit sauces) and pasta dishes with tomato based sauces. These foods are what you should dine on with Duckhorn Vineyards Merlot.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Merlot

title: Duckhorn Three Palms Vineyard Merlot
body_html:
Duckhorn Three Palms Vineyard Merlot

One of the favorites at the Boston Wine Expo, Duckhorn Three Palms Vineyard Merlot is bursting with the flavors of ripe plum, candied cherry, red licorice, mocha, and currant. With the aromas of dark cherry, cocoa, plum, and hints of sweet Asian spices, this red wine pairs well with a good steak and baked potato.

WINEMAKER NOTES

Once again, the famed Three Palms Vineyard has yielded a fascinating and full-bodied Merlot. Luxurious aromas of black cherry, plum, raspberry, cedar and wet slate rise from the glass where they mingle with hints of chocolate and sweet baking spices. On the palate, dusty tannins add nuance and sophistication to a round, fleshy texture, with flavors of black and red fruit, fig and iron-rich earthy notes drawing the wine to a long, resonant finish.

#1 Winner of Wine Spectator 2014 Vintage (We ONLY Have Current Vintage)

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Merlot

title: Duckhorn Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Duckhorn Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

Blended with the boldness of elaborate Semillon, Duckthorn Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc is a lightly aged wine that holds the goodness of fresh citrus and other tropical fruits. Seductive aromas of lychee, nectarines, and pineapple cake characterize the wine with a blend of lime and other fruits to bring a balance to offset its sweetness. A rich yet smooth texture combined with a fresh acidity bring this citrus delight to a harmonious finish. An eight ounce glass makes a perfect companion for a dish of shellfish.

title: Duckhorn Sauvignon Blanc "375ml"
body_html:
Duckhorn Vineyards Napa Valley Sauvignon Blanc

375ml (Half Bottle)

Refresh your palate with Duckhorn Sauvignon Blanc. This crisp and refreshing Mini Napa Valley white is a delicate blend of sauvignon blanc and semillion that strikes a perfect balance between silky smoothness and acidity.

Its elegantly layered exotic aromas of pineapple and lychee are complimented by bright citrus notes, perfect for pairing with seafood or a chilled salad.

Find more information at Duckhorn Vineyards

title: Illumination Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Illumination Sauvignon Blanc

Raise a glass of Illumination Sauvignon Blanc with a lightly seasoned lamb dish to bring out the herbal elements of this citrus-toned mix. Asian pear and papaya soften a mineral undertone, and the Illumination Sauvignon Blanc has a bright finish that's extremely drinkable while relaxing on a balcony, sharing an intimate conversation.

title: Gerard Bertrand Cote des Roses Rouge
body_html:
Top Selling Gerard Bertrand Cote des Roses Rouge

2015


Gerard Bertrand Cote des Roses Rouge

From the Languedoc region of Southern France, the Gerard Bertrand Cote des Roses Rouge is more than a beautiful bottle. Get More Options

Full-bodied GSM

This full-bodied GSM red blend is characterized by silky texture, dark fruit notes, spicy hints and a strong mineral accent. Serve with braised lamb or spicy stews. Get my bottle NOW!

title: Santa Margherita Chianti Classico
body_html:
Santa Margherita Chianti Classico 750ml

A timeless Italian classic, Santa Margherita Chianti Classico enjoys the distinction of being a wine that is not too far from refinement. An authentic blend of Sangiovese grapes and simple tannins mix very well with rich, savory aromas of black cherry, dried plum skin, purple flower, and dried herbs, all of which accentuate the cherry scent, thus making it pleasing to wine lovers everywhere. Vanilla aging helps to give its dry flavoring the finish it needs to bring about a smooth, even balance. The wine is best when paired with a snack of aged cheeses.

TASTING NOTES

The aromas of this complex red wine range from cherries and plums to gladiolus flowers and earthy flint. The tannic, oak-aged flavors are bright and round, with a dry, warm, fresh earthy finish.

title: Rashi Joyvin Red Kosher Vino da Tavola
body_html:
Rashi Joyvin Red Kosher Vino da Tavola

A simple yet elegant table wine, Rashi Joyvin Red Kosher Vino da Tavola has a unique red blend which spans across many vintages and locations. Lightly fermented red grapes make this special wine a delight both for Passover and for any other kosher meal and is best when served chilled.

When served in an 8 ounce glass, the wine makes a perfect companion for seasoned fish or a chicken dish of your choice.

title: Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Pineapple
body_html:
Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Pineapple

Revive your taste buds with the refreshing flavor of Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Pineapple wine! This fine fruity treat boasts a unique blend of orange and pineapple, both of which are combined with 8% alcohol and a hint of sweetness for your tasting pleasure. Even when served in a small glass, Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Pineapple brings the tropical sun of Hawaii right into your home. The wine is best when enjoyed with Kung Pao Chicken.

Soleil Champagne - Sparkling Wine

This Pineapple Mimosa is a blended refreshment wine with Caribbean pineapple juice, fresh-squeezed orange juice, and our premium quality white wine graced with a light effervescence.

title: Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Classic
body_html:
Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Classic

Brunch with your friends or lounging by the pool, Soleil Sparkling Mimosa Classic is perfect for any occasion or event. With subtle hints of orange zest and white flowers, this already-made cocktail is a beautiful mix of fresh-squeezed orange juice and crisp, white wine. This delicious Mimosa pairs well with cheddar and gruyere cheese grilled on a sourdough bread or California rolls.

TASTING NOTES

sweet + fruity + fresh orange + zest

title: Day Owl Rosé
body_html:
Day Owl Rosé

The Day Owl Rose is a crisp, fruity Italian varietal that is meant to be accompanied by barbecued foods. It's a versatile wine that radiates with red floral notes and orange zests, with an elegant dry finish with every sip. The aesthetic of the bottles is just as impressive as the passion behind the sophisticated drink.

title: Bodegas Atalaya Laya
body_html:
Bodegas Atalaya Laya

Deep red cherry in color. Elegant, fresh and complex nose that highlights ripe fruit and floral notes. Nice and fresh on the palate, well-balanced with sweet but still young tannins, a delicious mouthful sensation that lingers on the very long and smooth finish.

title: Gerard Bertrand Kosmos Red Blend
body_html:
Gerard Bertrand Kosmos Red Blend

Produced with a distinct blend of Syrah, Grenache, and Mourvedre, the Gerard Bertrand Kosmos Red Blend has a refreshingly earthy characteristic to it. The tangerine oil ends a sip with a slight citrus kick, augmented with blueberry and blackberry. It's a creamy red blend, with a mouthful that is velvety and soft, going particularly well with hearty, tomato based dishes.

title: Gerard Bertrand Cuvee Thomas Jefferson Brut Rosé
body_html:
Gerard Bertrand Cremant de Limoux Cuvee Thomas Jefferson Brut Rosé

Gerard Bertrand Crémant de Limoux is produced with only the finest grapes from the vineyards south of Carcassonne. The grapes are produced in just the right soil conditions and altitudes to give their wine the right flavor. The Rosé really shines in this wine and it has a rich flavor. It pairs well with sweet or spicy dishes, fruity desserts, or fish.

title: Michael David Sixth Sense Syrah
body_html:
Michael David Winery 6th Sense Syrah

Unlock your mystical powers with a bottle of Michael David Winery 6th Sense Syrah. This bouquet of California grapes leads with fragrances of spice, cherry, and bacon that flow effortlessly into layers of plum, pepper, and Cuban cigar. This wine pairs gracefully with cooked red meats or a rack of lamb.

TASTING NOTES

A glimpse into Michael and David’s cabinet of curiosities, we invite you to unpack the mystery and complexities of our Sixth Sense Syrah. Deep ruby in hue, layered aromas of berry cobbler, plum and cigar box fill the nose. Full bodied flavors of ripe raspberry, black licorice and tobacco lead to a long, captivating finish that will have you reaching for another sip.

title: Gekkeikan Zipang Mango Sparkling Sake
body_html:
Gekkeikan Zipang Mango Sparkling Sake

250ml

Bring a tropical twist to this traditional Japanese drink with Gekkeikan Zipang Mango Sparkling Sake. It is produced to be lightly-carbonated so that you are not overpowered by the fizziness. It has a tropical fruit flavor and it goes well with light appetizers or spicy food.

title: Harken Barrel Fermented Chardonnay
body_html:
Harken Barrel Fermented Chardonnay

This rich Californian Chardonnay is fermented in only high-quality oak barrels. It spends 7 moths fermenting to produce its rich flavor.

Upon tasting the finished product, you will notice a fruity aroma of apples and pears. Once it reaches your taste buds, you will notice a smooth buttery yet spiced flavor instead of the expected fruitiness.

It is perfect to pair with light main dishes like crab, shellfish, or hearty vegetable soups.

title: Dom Pérignon Brut Rosé
body_html:
Dom Pérignon Brut Rosé

If you're looking for elegance and tradition, it's impossible to beat Dom Pérignon Brut Rosé. This effortlessly effervescent champagne welcomes with notes of strawberry and closes with a flourish, lavishing your palate with subtle hints of cocoa, orange, and hay.

A sure-fire crowd-pleaser at any occasion, this versatile champagne pairs best with spiced chicken thighs and fried calamari.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Brut Rosé

title: Dark Horse Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Dark Horse Cabernet Sauvignon

Place your bets on a proven winner with a bottle of Dark Horse Cabernet Sauvignon. This full-bodied red wine opens with aromas of blackberry and espresso, and charges to the finish line with rich essences of cherry and exotic spice. This bold cab lends itself to an elegant dinner of zucchini gratin or braised oxtail.

title: Dark Horse Rosé
body_html:
Dark Horse Rosé

Boldness can still be refreshing, and Dark Horse Rosé is living proof of that. This light, Provence-style wine boasts a complex, fruity bouquet with floral undertones and earthy aromas. Specially crafted with summertime in mind, Dark Horse Rosé goes especially well with chips, dips, and grilled Black Angus beef burgers. Pick up a bottle at The Best Wine Store today.

title: The Original Dark Horse Pinot Noir
body_html:
The Original Dark Horse Pinot Noir

Share the elegance of a timeless classic with a bottle of The Original Dark Horse Pinot Noir. Silky smooth but secretly complex, this medium-bodied wine displays an abundance of riches, from its cherry and raspberry flavors to its cedar aroma. Subtly earthy undertones make this wine ideal for a dinner of poached salmon or braised duck breast.

title: Michael David Winery Chardonnay
body_html:
Michael David Winery Chardonnay

Brisk and refreshing, Michael David Winery Chardonnay is as subtle as it is elegant. This charming California white blends fragrances of peach, melon, and pear with a medium-bodied blend of green apple, oak, and citrus. This light and delicate wine goes best with summer seafood fare, including crab, prawns, and fish pâtés.

TASTING NOTES

Deep straw in color, our 2021 Chardonnay bursts with aromas of lemon zest, buttered popcorn and hints of vanilla on the nose. Full bodied and luscious, flavors of caramel, butterscotch, melon and honeydew are carried through by a lingering, oak-inspired finish.

title: Michael David Freakshow Red
body_html:
Michael David Winery Freakshow Red

Stun your guests with something new by treating them to a glass of Michael David Winery Freakshow Red. This latest edition of a modern classic blends boldness with finesse, from its aromas of brandy and espresso to its full-bodied essences of chocolate mousse and pipe tobacco. Pair this wine with beef brisket or baby back ribs for a celebration of flavor and good taste.

TASTING NOTES

The man, the myth, the untamed and refined – our Freakshow Red Wine unveils the wild, unruly blend staring our very own man meets beast. Composed of Syrah, Petite Sirah and Souzao, the act unveils aromas of juicy raspberry, black cherry, butterscotch and toasted baguette. Full bodied with polished, velvety tannins, flavors of dried plum, crème brulee and toasted oak are carried through a long finish that will have you reaching for more.

title: Michael David Freakshow Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Michael David Freakshow Cabernet Sauvignon

Tap into the wildness within by savoring a bottle of Michael David Freakshow Cabernet Sauvignon. This quirky California red isn't afraid to let its freak flag fly, with intriguing notes of oak and pomegranate that transition gracefully into after-tones of licorice and cedar. Pair this wine with mini buffalo sliders or garlic chicken wings for an unforgettably flavorful evening.

TASTING NOTES

Flexing a brand new stage, the Strongest Man on Earth continues to be the star of the show for the vintage! With amazing brawn and finesse, our Freakshow Cab opens with aromas of black cherry, raspberry and toasted hazelnut. He’s larger than life, medium in body and showcases flavors of juicy dark fruit, strawberry jam and clove with a smooth, lasting finish that will surely have you coming back for the second act.

title: Michael David Winery Petite Petit Sirah
body_html:
Michael David Winery Petite Petit Sirah Lodi

Petit Sirah meets Petit Verdot in the award-winning Michael David Winery Petite Petit. This intriguing, tannin-rich blend combines the best of both worlds for a wealth of aromas ranging from blueberry to licorice, and a complex body that reminds one of spice, smoke, and oak. This unique hybrid pairs noticeably well with grilled steak or spiced pork.

TASTING NOTES

As full bodied as the two stars of the label, Petite Petit is a grandiose, booming, larger-than-life type of wine! Opening with show stopping aromas of ripe summer berries, Bing cherry and worn leather, this wine showcases rich flavors of plum, boysenberry and dark chocolate on the palate. Dark, robust and deeply satisfying!

title: Michael David Winery 7 Deadly Zins' Zinfandel
body_html:
Michael David Winery 7 Deadly Zins' Zinfandel

Explore your deviant side with Michael David Winery 7 Deadly Zins' Zinfandel. This California red is uniquely rich in character, with notes of currants and black cherry preceded by aromas of exotic spice.

This refreshingly bold zinfandel gets along best with a pairing of spare ribs, venison, or Italian sausage.

title: Michael David Winery Seven Deadly Red
body_html:
Michael David Winery Seven Deadly Red

Sometimes good taste feels a little sinful, and to that end Michael David Winery Seven Deadly Red is an especially decadent update of a California classic. This latest edition of the Seven Deadly line combines bold introductory notes of cherry and blackberry with departing hints of vanilla and smoke. Pair this wine with spicy chicken wings or pad thai for a rich and vibrant wining and dining experience.

title: Michael David Wine Lust Zinfandel
body_html:
Michael David Lust Zinfandel

Give in to the seduction of full-bodied passion with a bottle of Michael David Winery Lust Zinfandel. This alluring red wine is an ideal Valentine's Day gift for that special someone in your life. It charms with aromas of incense, caramel, and cherry that work their way down into a concentrated blend of cocoa, blackberry, and mesquite. Sure to make your partner's heart skip a beat, this potent zinfandel packs a punch (at 16.9% ABV), but goes down smooth with its rich and juicy texture.

Pair this wine with curry chicken or grilled salmon for dinner and dark chocolate for dessert.

TASTING NOTES

Seductive as its name, Lust Zinfandel is a dark ruby red beauty exuding seductive aromas of raspberry, violet, honey, almond and vanilla. Lush, sultry offerings of plum, caramel, clove and cacao are rounded out with delicate spice notes and an alluring, dark chocolate finish.

title: Michael David Winery Inkblot Cabernet Franc
body_html:
Michael David Winery Inkblot Cabernet Franc

Put your taste to the test with a bottle of Michael David Winery Inkblot Cabernet Franc. This earthy red is wildly popular for a reason: it opens with a fruity flourish of black cherry and closes with hints of pepper and tobacco. A critical and commercial success, Inkblot Cabernet Franc is rich in tannins that are seamlessly blended into its deeply textured body. With origins in the Bordeaux region of France, this wine represents American innovation at its finest, combining Old World elegance with New World ingenuity.

This instant classic is a welcome companion for a dinner of pasta bolognese with olives and mushrooms.

TASTING NOTES

Like ink splattering across a page, our 2020 Inkblot Cabernet Franc overflows with concentration and complexity. Opening with decadent aromas of ripe plum, berry medley and almond toffee, full bodied flavors of cherry preserves, raspberry pie and licorice lead to a remarkably long finish.

title: Carpano Antica Formula 1786 Vermouth
body_html:
Carpano Antica Formula 1786 Vermouth

1-Liter

Carpano Antica Formula 1786 Vermouth is a slightly bitter vermouth with floral notes. It is a combination of citrus, cherries, mint, vanilla, raisins, and root beer is some of the flavors that tantalize the palate. It tastes great on the rocks but also in a Negroni.

Some foods that you can cook to go along with this wine are risotto, chicken, pork, and spicy tuna rolls. It also goes well with dried fruit, cheese, and chocolate When these dishes are cooked or food items are served with this Vermouth, your meal be a very good one.

title: Carpano Antica Formula 1786 Vermouth 375ml
body_html:
Carpano Antica Formula 1786 Vermouth

375ml

Carpano Antica Formula 1786 Vermouth in 375ml size is perfect for parties or get-together's. Carpano Antica Formula 1786 Vermouth is a fine Italian vermouth that is essential for fine cocktails. It has distinct vanilla notes and a flavorful bouquet to help you craft refined drinks.

title: Infinite Monkey Rosé Wine Can
body_html:
Infinite Monkey Rosé Wine Can

4 Pack

Elevate your beach picnic with this Infinite Monkey Rosé Wine Can. This berry-flavored wine has basil accents that complement baguette sandwiches and fruit. This Infinite Monkey Rosé Wine Can won't break and travels well in a cooler, so that you can amp up the mood whenever you are ready.

title: Michael David Earthquake Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Michael David Earthquake Cabernet Sauvignon

Shake up your wine routine with Michael David Earthquake Cabernet Sauvignon. This bold, red cab isn't afraid to boast about its stirring flavors of spice and vanilla, or its deeply satisfying aftershock of toffee and tobacco. Pair this wine with blue cheese crostini or goat cheese tarts for a faultless night out on the patio.

TASTING NOTES

Shattering the mold with off the chart, concentrated flavors, our 2020 Earthquake Cabernet is a force to be reckoned with. Deep ruby in hue, this wine opens with bold, layered aromas of dark plum, blackberry and mocha in the glass. Full bodied, this 2020 Cab is filled with intense flavors of boysenberry, espresso and toasted marshmallow leading to a trembling, oak-inspired finish.

title: Michael David Earthquake Zinfandel
body_html:
Michael David Earthquake Zinfandel

Shock your senses with a bottle of Michael David Earthquake Zinfandel. This California red is the wine that keeps on giving, from its introductory hints of pepper, huckleberry, and sage, to its closing notes of spice and licorice. This wine is a natural fit for a dinner of barbecue ribs or the olde leg of lamb.

TASTING NOTES

This rich, burly Zinfandel offers over the top concentration and intensity that will leave your taste buds trembling! Opening with luscious red fruit and brown sugar aromas, this full-bodied Zin overflows with strawberry jam, molasses and vanilla bean flavors carried though by a fruit laced finish that lingers until the next quake.

title: Mionetto Prosecco di Treviso Brut
body_html:
Mionetto Prosecco di Treviso Brut

750ml

Awaken your palate with a bottle of Mionetto Prosecco di Treviso Brut. This sparkling white wine introduces itself with a fizzy, mineral-rich fragrance that ushers you into a full, citrus-heavy body with herbal undertones.

Its light and try texture lends itself to a light dinner of homemade chicken parmesan with Caesar salad.

TASTING NOTES

APPEARANCE:
Light straw in color with bright yellow highlights

AROMA:
Aromas of golden apples, honey and white peach

PALATE:
Well-balanced acidity provides a fresh and lively mouthfeel with a clean dry finish

FOOD PAIRINGS:
Enjoy on its own as an aperitif, throughout the meal or in cocktails.

title: Mionetto Organic Prosecco Brut
body_html:
Mionetto Organic Prosecco Brut

For a full-bodied wine with natural roots, look no further than Mionetto Organic Prosecco Brut. This certified organic wine is derived from grapes that are grown without the aid of synthetic fertilizers for a pure and wholesome taste.

Aromatic and fresh, this unique white wine lavishes the palate with flavors of apple and elder-flowers that go well with braised chicken or seafood risotto.

TASTING NOTES

APPEARANCE:
Bright, yellow in color

AROMA:
Delicate notes of elderflower and green apple.

PALATE:
An explosion of green apple on the palate with a refreshing crispness from the delicate bubbles.

FOOD PAIRINGS:
Enjoy as an aperitif or during a meal, with Gorgonzola with dates or figs, Prosciutto with melon.

title: Mionetto Prosecco Brut Mini 187ml
body_html:
Mionetto Prosecco di Treviso Brut

187ml Mini

Blend boldness and beauty with a Mini bottle of Mionetto Prosecco Brut. This Chairman's Trophy-winning white wine harvests the essence of the very best grapes from the north of Italy for a uniquely crisp and clean taste.

Ideal for a cool summer evening, this wine's lemon and lime undertones pair naturally with grilled fish or pasta with cream sauce.

Our 187ml Split bottles make for an ideal parting gift after a garden party.

TASTING NOTES

APPEARANCE:
Light straw in color with bright yellow highlights

AROMA:
Aromas of golden apples, honey and white peach

PALATE:
Well-balanced acidity provides a fresh and lively mouthfeel with a clean dry finish

FOOD PAIRINGS:
Enjoy on its own as an aperitif, throughout the meal or in cocktails.

title: Villa Maria Private Bin Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Villa Maria Private Bin Sauvignon Blanc

Treat your guests to a glimpse of the refined life with Villa Maria Private Bin Sauvignon Blanc. This critically acclaimed white wine is rich with herbal fragrances and aftertouches of jalapeno and lemongrass. Its fresh body satisfies with essences of citrus and fruit that pair well with shellfish, shrimp, and garden salads.

title: Andre Strawberry
body_html:
Andre Strawberry

André Strawberry is a California Champagne with fresh strawberry flavors and a citrus finish. This sweet sparkling wine pairs perfectly with a tart asiago or bleu cheese and crisp fruits such as raspberries or apples. To add an extra fun kick try it with spicy salami or prosciutto.

title: Andre Peach
body_html:
Andre Peach

With the delicious flavor of peaches and cream, Andre Peach (Previously known as Peach Moscato) is a California wine with Georgia Peaches and cream, anyone? André Peach Moscato is a California Champagne with Georgia sensibilities. With hints of orange and the flavor of peaches, this wine has a crisp finish and is delicious when chilled and paired with iced treats.

title: Mazzoni Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Mazzoni Pinot Grigio

Mazzoni Pinot Grigio contains flavors of citrus fruit, while on the nose it has a floral aroma. On the palate it is fresh and has this mineral note which underlines its savory tone.

The structure of the Mazzoni Pinot Grigio wine makes it excellent with seafood platters and dishes with fish and crustaceans.

title: Josh Cellars Legacy Red
body_html:
Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Legacy Red

Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Legacy Red is a California wine that features intense, spicy, black fruit to create a medium-bodied red blend that is pleasing to the palate. The aroma of blue fruits and brown spices mixed with a hint of crushed pepper will delight the nose. This wine pairs well with a delicious steak and baked potato.

title: Groth Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Groth Cabernet Sauvignon

2014

Groth Cabernet Sauvignon is a fantastic wine for those that enjoy a fruity bouquet and flavor. This lush red wine not only has blackberry and black cherry flavors featured, but a vanilla character. This is achieved thanks to the aging process that involves 22 months in wine barrels. Described as smooth without being overbearing.

Groth Cabernet Sauvignon pairs well with a nice juicy steak dinner or other beef entrees.

title: Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Pinot Noir
body_html:
Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Pinot Noir

Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Pinot Noir is an amazing, dark garnet wine under country singer Zac Brown’s label. With aromas of toasted oak, blueberry, and caramel, this delectable wine pairs well with pasta and sirloin steak. This wine’s full-bodied and robust flavor will leave a long-lasting impression on your palate with a smooth, full finish.

WINEMAKER NOTES

This lush and layered Pinot Noir is overflowing with intense aromas of black cherry, vanilla and toasty oak. Smooth with supple tannins, robust flavors of fresh raspberry jam and strawberry are complemented by silky underpinnings of rich mocha and caramel. Jammy and voluminous, rich juicy ripe fruit lingers on through the finish.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Brut Cuvee Mini 187ml
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Brut Cuvee

187ml Mini

Barefoot Bubbly Brut Cuvee 187ml Mini, the perfect Party Favor Treat is a Chardonnay-dominated blend of deliciousness. This sparkling California wine comes in a mini that is oh so perfect as a party favor for birthdays, weddings, showers and much more. With the amazing fruity flavors of green apple, peach, kiwi, and jasmine, this fine wine pairs well with lobster and butter or fresh fruits.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Pink Moscato Mini 187ml
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Pink Moscato 187ml Mini

Barefoot Brut Rose = Same Look

With the amazing flavors of vanilla, raspberry jam, and buttered toast, this wine pairs well with fried chicken, a large ham sandwich, or fresh fruit.

Barefoot Bubbly Pink Moscato 187ml Mini is perfect for party or wedding favors. Guests will delight in the sweet flavor of this bubbly Moscato.

title: Josh Cellars Chardonnay
body_html:
Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Chardonnay

Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Chardonnay offers a taste that's unforgettable! This white wine concoction is made from grapes that originate from the central regions of California. A healthy mix of strong citrus and tropical fruit flavors make this Sonoma County classic an unforgettable treat! Its strong, buttery flavor make this particular Chardonnay a favorite when paired with a simple macaroni and cheese snack.

title: Andre Brut Rosé California Champagne
body_html:
André Brut Rosé

André Brut Rosé is a bottle of bubbly that has a satisfying fruity flavor. It has a brilliant layer of citrus from strawberries and raspberries that are accommodated with subtle hints of pears and apples.

It is advised to pair your bottle of André Brut Rosé with desserts made with red berries, red meat, or starchy appetizers.

title: Hanna Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Hanna Sauvignon Blanc

Hanna Sauvignon Blanc is a fresh, crisp white wine, that has the aromas of fig, nectarine, apricot, guava and quince flower with a zingy acidity. It is a rich wine with a concentrated fruity flavor that goes seamlessly well with various kinds of seafood. Its light body and texture can also be nicely paired with a grilled salmon steak.

title: La Playa Estate Series Red Blend
body_html:
La Playa Estate Series Red Blend

Taking a year to make in the beautiful Colchagua Valley, La Playa Estate Series - Red Blend is a perfect wine for any meal heavy in beef. Deep rich purple in color, it carries a fruity, mixed aroma of cherries and coffee beans along with a taste of nuts and mint.

TASTING NOTES

A rich maroon color. On the nose, ripe strawberry with hints of black pepper. It has great balance between structure and flavor with a light approachable palate.

title: Poppy Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Poppy Wines Cabernet Sauvignon

Poppy Wines Cabernet Sauvignon displays blueberry, black cherry, and currant flavors with nuances of licorice, violets, and cigar box all wrapped together with a small amount of mocha and vanilla. It is medium to full-bodied, well-balanced, has soft tannins, and has a lot of dimension with a seamless finish that lingers on the palate.

Savory dishes like lamb and roasted meat are foods that can be cooked with this wine. It also has tighter tannins which make this wine built for fat and protein. Burgers, brats, prime rib, grilled game, hearty sausage dishes, and strong flavored cheese like Gruyere, Stilton, and cheddar go well with this wine as well. If you cook these foods to serve with this wine, your meal will be captivating.

title: Poppy Wines Chardonnay
body_html:
Poppy Wines Chardonnay

Poppy Wines Chardonnay has a focused and elegant aroma features sweet golden apple, ripe citrus, tropical fruit and almond with touches of creamy yeast, vanilla, and oak in the background. On the palate, the rich flavors are complemented by a light touch of toasty oak and refreshing citrus with mineral notes and bright acidity in the finish.

Foods that can be prepared and served with this wine are Baja fish tacos, monkfish, trout, and butter-poached lobster or crab. Other foods that can be served with this wine are tomato-based dishes, light poultry dishes such as chicken or Caesar salad, Nicoise salad, seared tuna, and tartare. If you need a sauce to compliment a meal that is served with this wine, you should make tomato, citrus, cream/butter based, and fumes. If you prepare and serve these foods with this wine, your meal will be wholesome.

title: Veuve Clicquot Rich Rosé Champagne
body_html:
Veuve Clicquot RICH Rosé

Celebrate tradition by looking to the future with Veuve Clicquot RICH Rosé. The first champagne crafted with mixology in mind, Veuve Rich Rosé is a flavorful, effervescent experience unlike any other. With the bold and boisterous zest of red berry fruit, Rich Rosé takes the best elements of Pinot Noir and Meunier grapes and blends them into the most blissfully Rich champagne on the market.

Serve Rich Rosé on ice with pineapple, lime, ginger, or tea for a sparkling summer cocktail that you and yours will remember for years to come. Whether mixed or unadorned, Rich Rosé pairs gracefully with triple cream cheese and smoked salmon.

title: Veuve Clicquot Rich Champagne
body_html:
Veuve Clicquot RICH

Blend elegance and innovation with Veuve Clicquot RICH. The first champagne dedicated to mixology, RICH is a groundbreaking twist on a timeless tradition. Serve RICH on ice with pineapple, cucumber, pepper, or tea for a one-of-a-kind cocktail experience.

As a standalone champagne, RICH pairs naturally with lobster, risotto, and Gruyère cheese.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Sauvignon Blanc

Gnarly Head Sauvignon Blanc has aromas of bright citrus and nectarine. It also has crisp flavors of honeydew melon and green Granny Smith apple. Some of the foods that go well with this wine are cheese (especially goat cheese) and green vegetables like asparagus, zucchini, fresh peas, and artichokes. If you want a seafood to go with it, serve oysters or a delicate fish like sole. Other foods that go well with this wine are fresh herbs, mild vinaigrettes, dishes with tangy dairy ingredients, herbal, briny sauces, and pesto. When you serve these foods with Gnarly Head Sauvignon Blanc, you could possibly have the best meal ever.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Pinot Noir
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Pinot Noir

The Gnarly Head Wines Pinot Noir is a powerful pinot with colorful aromas of red cherry, vanilla, earth and spice, accompanied by a black cherry and plum with hints of toasted hazelnut, tobacco and cigar box. The wine pairs well with salami and arugula pizza, slow roasted pork loin, or dry brined chicken stuffed with sausage and peppers.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Gnarly Head Wines Old Vine Zin Zinfandel
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Old Vine Zin Zinfandel

The Gnarly Head Wines Old Vine Zin Zinfandel is a wine that reflects its name, being harvested from gnarled 35-80 year old head trained vines. The Gnarly Head Wines Old Vine Zin Zinfandel features a rich core of, jammy blackberries and mocha notes with hints spice and vanilla balanced by complex French and American oak toast.

Gnarly Head Old Vine Zin pairs with short ribs, chicken enchiladas or dark chocolate.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Merlot
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Merlot

Gnarly Head Merlot has bold aromas of blackcurrant, blackberry, and notes of toasted oak. The juicy flavors this wine has are black cherry, ripe plum, and sweet herbs with a hint of spice rounding out the finish. Since this wine has supple, velvety tannins and lush fruit make it possible for hamburgers, beef sliders, tandoori chicken, and chocolate mousse to go with this wine and make this Merlot marvelous.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Chardonnay
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Chardonnay

Crisp, refreshing, and ideal for a warm summer's evening, the light, airy Gnarly Head Wines Chardonnay is perfection in a glass. A juicy, full-bodied wine rich with vibrant tropical fruit flavors and just a hint of vanilla, this delectable beverage pairs well with shrimp, vegetables, or grilled chicken.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Cabernet Sauvignon

The Gnarly Head Wines Cabernet Sauvignon is a dark, bold Cabernet comprised of hints of tannins and jammy fruit, muddled with aromas of black cherry, blackberry, freshly-cracked black all wrapped in a warm full linger finish. the wine pairs well with grilled lamb skewers, strong cheeses or a spaghetti Bolognese.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Red
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Red

The Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Red is a solid wine a rowdy mix of Zinfandel. Its core is a juicy lush collection of black cherry and raspberry flavors with hints of spice and vanilla. the Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Red pairs boldly this wine with BBQ a hearty burger, or New Orleans-style red beans and rice.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Harvest Blend
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Harvest Blend

Savor the atmosphere of early autumn any time of year with Gnarly Head's Authentic Harvest Blend. Close your eyes and take in the effervescent fragrances of wild berry and spices from the orient. The first sip tantalizes with rich undertones of cherry and vanilla. This distinctively luscious blend pairs well with beef stew, barbecue chicken, and grilled mushrooms.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Black
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Authentic Black

Explore your dark side with Gnarly Head's Authentic Black. This bold Petite Sirah-based blend doesn't beat around the bush, enticing with fragrances of cherry, licorice, and vanilla that flow seamlessly into the chocolate- and boysenberry-rich texture of a full-bodied black wine. Pair Authentic Black with pizza margherita or sirloin steak for a harmonious dining and drinking experience.

title: Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Proprietary Red Blend
body_html:
Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Proprietary Red Blend

Z Alexander Brown Uncaged Proprietary Red Blend is a vintage ruby-colored wine made from grapes grown in the North Coast of California. Featuring a bold, full-bodied palate, it features flavors such as black cherry, blueberry and baking spice. As a smooth and balanced wine, it perfectly complements a variety of foods, including beef or lamb.

WINEMAKER’S NOTE

Dark garnet in the glass, commanding aromas of blueberry, caramel and toasted oak preview a bold, mouth-filling palate stacked with concentrated layers of ripe dark fruit, black cherry and milk chocolate. Robust and full-bodied with excellent weight in the mid-palate, this complex wine leaves a lasting impression with a smooth, round and full finish.

title: Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Cabernet Sauvignon

Free your palate with a bottle of Z. Alexander Brown Uncaged Cabernet Sauvignon. This tannin-rich North Coast classic beckons with fragrances of cherry and mocha. Its urbane, flavorful hints of blackberry, chocolate, and black currant make it an excellent pairing for a sirloin steak dinner or a summertime backyard barbecue.

WINEMAKER’S NOTE

Z. Alexander Brown Cabernet Sauvignon unfolds with rich aromas of black cherry, mocha and sweet toasted oak notes. Soft, mid-palate tannins frame this full-bodied, juicy wine with mouth-filling flavors of black cherry and milk chocolate. Smooth and balanced, an elegant finesse defines the long and lingering finish.

title: Darioush Signature Shiraz
body_html:
Darioush Signature Shiraz

The robust Darioush Signature Shiraz always seems to say just the right thing. With a smoky fragrance that alludes to spices from distant lands, and a silky smooth body emboldened by hints of wild berry and espresso.

This Napa Valley vintage pairs exceptionally well with salmon, pork, or beef dishes.

title: Castello Banfi Bell'Agio Chianti
body_html:
Castello Banfi Bell'Agio Chianti

Castello Banfi Bell'Agio Chianti has a fresh and floral aroma with hints of ripe berries and plums and just a touch of oak. Bursting with fresh raspberries, the firm tannins and good balancing acidity round out this wine that has a lot of flavor in it. There is some cuisine that pairs well with this delicious wine.

Cuisine that Chianti goes well with is tomato-based sauces like marinara. For that reason, they are regularly paired with pasta dishes. This wine also goes well with light meats like chicken and pork. If you need a vegetable to serve with this wine, roasted garlic, zucchini, and asparagus pair well with this wine. If you serve this wine with this cuisine, then you will have a meal that is C'est’ Bion.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Rosso Red Wine
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Rosso & Bianco Rosso Red

The Francis Ford Coppola Rosso & Bianco Rosso Red Wine is a combination of Zinfandel, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Syrah. It has a supple texture and rich, juicy flavors of plum, cherries, mocha, and strawberry jam.

Medium-bodied wines like this Francis Ford Coppola Rosso pair well with these foods: beef, pork, lamb, turkey, duck, and goose dishes. If you want to serve a cheese with it, they go well with cheese made out of sheep’s milk. If you eat these foods with this Rosso wine, your meal will turn out to be really great.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
