  • Rosso Red

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Black Lux
body_html:
Stella Rosa Imperiale Black Lux

The Stella Rosa Imperiale Black Lux is a delicious black champagne (or blanc de noirs) made only with the best Pinot noir and Pinot Meunier grapes. The wine’s minimal contact with these darker grapes gives the wine its unusual yet astounding darker color. This premium wine pairs incredibly well with smoked salmon and mushroom-based dishes.

FLAVOR PROFILE

Blackberries, blueberries, raspberries

title: PromisQous Red Wine
body_html:
PromisQous Red Wine

PromisQous Red Wine combines Zinfandel, Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Petit Sirah for an orgy of bold, rich flavor. It's sweet and smooth blend of red and dark berries and various peppers enhances any red or dark meat, or even pizza! Drink it promiscuously at home or your next toga party.

title: Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Brut 375ml
body_html:
Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Brut

375ml Mini (Half Bottle)

The Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Brut is a champagne-style wine with deliciously fresh fruit flavors. The blend of the wine also contains premium yeast elements that only add to the already great existing flavor. It also features a pleasant flowery aroma that meshes well with the fruity qualities of the wine which helps it pair extremely well with shellfish. This extraordinary 375ml bottle is sure to make a splash with your friends as a party favor or gift and makes a terrific wedding table wine.

title: Middle Sister Drama Queen Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Middle Sister Drama Queen Pinot Grigio

Middle Sister Pinot Grigio is a stunning Pinot Grigio that is ideal for any social event from fashion shows to fundraisers. It is a combination of Pinot Grigio, Chenin Blanc, and Chardonnay. The scent of this Pinot Grigio is apples, pears, and a hint of lemongrass. The flavor is an explosion of apples and pears with a small amount of mineral on the finish.

At meal time, it goes well with minestrone soup, fried calamari, ham and cheese sandwiches, and an Antipasto platter of olives, roasted peppers, and marinated mushrooms. This wine combined with these magnificent foods will make a meal a meal.

title: Moet & Chandon Brut Champagne Mini 375ml
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Brut Champagne Mini

375ml

The color of Moet & Chandon Brut Champagne Mini is an elegant golden straw with amber highlights. When it comes to describing the smell of this wine, it is best described as radiant and revealing bright yellow-fleshed fruits (apples, pears, and yellow peaches) honey, floral nuances (lime blossom), and elegant blond notes (brioche and fresh nuts). It has a seductive palate that has a lot of flavor and smooth. The palate is also generous, subtle, full, and vigorous and it is followed by a delicately fresh crispiness (fruit with seeds) to reveal the magic balance of champagne. There are some very delicious foods that go absolutely fantastic with Moet & Chandon Champagne.

Fried mushrooms are the first food that goes well fantastic with this champagne. Other foods that go well with it are macaroni and cheese, butternut squash ravioli with brown butter sage, bbq chicken sandwich, fish tacos, corn dogs with dijon mustard, vegetarian red bean chili, pear, parmesan, candied pecan, and rocket salad, Pugliese w/Olive Oil & Dukkah, and Fresh Spring Rolls w/Spicy Sweet Chili Sauce. With this magnificent mini champagne and these marvelous foods, they can make any meal a mega-tastic meal.

title: Darioush Caravan Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Darioush Caravan Cabernet Sauvignon

Darioush Caravan Cabernet Sauvignon is made up of a one-of-a-kind blend of Merlot and Cabernet Franc or Malbec. There is a lot of depth and complexity to the flavor. The flavor is of ripe, saturated fruit and it has an elegantly textured finish. The foods that will go deliciously with this wine are high in fat and protein. Some delicious delectables to eat with this Cabernet Sauvignon are steak, duck, game, hearty stews, ribs, and dark rich sauces. These foods along with Darioush Cabernet Sauvignon will make any meal a splendid experience.

title: Nuclear Red Table Wine
body_html:
Nuclear Red Table Wine

Enjoy a wine that comes in a can when you drink Nuclear Red Table Wine. This beverage will stay cold on the slopes or on the beach, making for a refreshing taste year-round. Pair this wine with select beef and lamb dishes for a feast you will enjoy eating with family and friends.

title: Josh Cellars Rose
body_html:
Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Rose

Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Rose is alight and refreshing wine. A delicious light American offering from California with subtle flavors of strawberry and melon. Try it with barbeque, kabobobs, or fish. The perfect spring or summer wine or to enjoy nightly with dessert.

title: Louis Latour Duet Chardonnay - Viognier
body_html:
Louis Latour Duet Chardonnay - Viognier

Louis Latour Duet Chardonnay is a pale yellow wine with a full-bodied taste. It is nicely balanced with an apricot finish. A tantalizing combination of the smoothness of Viognier and the purity of Chardonnay. Complements salmon, seafood, salads, and light desserts.

title: Nuclear White Chardonnay
body_html:
Nuclear White Chardonnay

12oz Can

For the person who is not afraid to drink wine from a can, Nuclear White Chardonnay features the aromas of pineapple and apricot and the flavors of tropical and orchard fruits. Made from the Chardonnay fruits of the California coast, this wine pairs well with chicken smothered in herbs and butter or baked fish.

title: Casillero del Diablo Reserva Malbec
body_html:
Casillero del Diablo Reserva Malbec

A ruby red wine with the amazing aromas of black fruit with hints of vanilla, pepper, and dark chocolate, Casillero del Diablo Reserva Malbec has the delicious flavor of dark plums and spices. This delectable wine pairs well with all types of barbecue foods along with ripe cheeses, sweet- and-sour sauces, stews, and herbs.

title: Casillero del Diablo Reserva Carmenere
body_html:
Casillero del Diablo Reserva Carmenere

Smooth and velvety, with undertones of chocolate, coffee, blackberry, and raspberry, Casillero del Diablo Reserva Carmenere offers an outstanding deep red color which makes it the perfect wine to serve on a cold winter's night paired with a deeply flavored steak, such as a New York cut or a rib-eye accompanied by steamed vegetables and well seasoned salad greens.

title: Justin Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Justin Sauvignon Blanc

Pale gold with notes of cantaloupe and citrus, Justin Sauvignon Blanc represents the accumulation of the wine trade in San Luis Obispo County. After your first sip, you'll be met with a unique crisp due to its mineral and boxwood base. Its acidity can be livened with appetizers like gazpacho or fried calamari with a lemon zest.

title: Schweiger Vineyards Dedication 2010 Vintage
body_html:
Schweiger Vineyards Dedication 2010

A simple Bordeaux blend of fine, ripened grapes characterizes the distinct flavoring of Schweiger Vineyards Dedication! Combined with a New World fusion of matured fruits, strong tannins, and black currant, this deep red combination is balanced by a blend of mint and eucalyptus. Schweiger Vineyards Dedication wines are best when paired with a classic beef and venison dish.

title: Vina Maipo Vitral Carmenere
body_html:
Vina Maipo Vitral Carmenere

Enjoy the unique flavor of Vina Maipo Vitral Carmenere! This vintage favorite is characterized by a bold, luxurious blend of plum and black currant, both of which are balanced with hints of coffee and chocolate. The wine is composed of undertones of American oak complemented by a smooth, methodical finish. A snack of fine, aged cheeses would suffice to offset its rich, fruity texture.

title: Joel Gott Wines Rosé
body_html:
Joel Gott Wines Rosé

Vibrant aromas of strawberry and melon give Joel Gott Rose wines their distinctive character! Its light, pink rose color makes the spirit look very attractive, even to those who aren't normally wine aficionados. A blend of tropical fruits gives the wine the ability to loosen the taste buds for a fresh, exhilarating zest that is evenly tempered with a long, mellow finish. A simple dinner of chicken and turkey can easily offset the wine's zesty fruit decorum.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott Central Coast Rosé has aromas of strawberries, honeydew melon and cherries with limeade and citrus notes. On the palate, the wine opens with bright fruit flavors and minerality followed by crisp, refreshing acidity and a clean, balanced finish.

title: 3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Merlot
body_html:
3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Merlot

The 3Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Merlot is a dark ruby fine wine that gives a hint of dried cherries, spearmint, juicy raspberries, plum and cedar. It pairs perfectly with a hearty slice of freshly baked, blueberry pie. Only the most sophisticated palettes can truly appreciate this wonderfully rich and indulgent wine.

title: 3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Firehouse Red
body_html:
3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Firehouse Red

The 3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Firehouse Red has a full cherry aroma with notable earth notes. It's an intense dark blend formulated with Petite Sirah and Syrah, with Merlot giving the wine a soft mouthfeel. 3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Firehouse Red pairs well with fresh fruit and cheeses, with its bright fruitiness pairing well with many dishes.

title: Girl & Dragon Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Girl & Dragon Pinot Grigio

Your first sip of our refreshing Girl And Dragon Pinot Grigio will wow you with its first impression with its citrus lime and sweet honeysuckle opening notes. it's light enough to pair with these seared scallops but bold enough for this rich lemon chicken piccata. What are you waiting for? Pour a glass and sip the summer heat away.

title: Rombauer Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Rombauer Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

Rombauer Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc is a light, fruity California white wine with a pronounced body. It can be served with a spicy Asian or Indian cuisine, but with its combination of sweet apple, citrus, tropical, and vanilla flavors and herbal aromas, it may make a good dessert on its own.

TASTING NOTES

Lifted aromas of Key lime, honeydew melon, and passion fruit all jump out of the glass, supported by hints of freshly cut grass in the background. Those fresh lime and honeydew flavors continue to the palate, joined by kiwi and subtle herbaceous notes, all mingling together in a lively way. The wine is linear and focused, ending with enticing, mouthwatering acidity that will leave you wanting more.

title: Torres Mas La Plana Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Torres Mas La Plana Cabernet Sauvignon

Torres Mas La Plana Cabernet Sauvignon presents the utmost and memorable flavors among wines. For the wine connoisseur Mas La Plana completely satiates the palate. Bold flavors of truffle, toast, cloves, pepper and white chocolate transport you to an exotic place. Enhance meat and game dishes with this exquisite wine choice.

title: Game of Thrones Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Game of Thrones Cabernet Sauvignon

Game of Thrones Cabernet Sauvignon is a smooth supple wine with mellow notes of blackcurrant, briar and Tahitian vanilla that warm the palate. Smooth tannins with just a hint of cocoa make this an excellent choice with savory foods like red meat, game, lamb, and stews as well as rich flavorful cheeses like gouda.

title: Game of Thrones Red Blend
body_html:
Game of Thrones Red Blend

Game of Thrones Red Blend is characterized by big bold flavors of black cherry, brambly blackberry, vanilla, and cocoa. This may be a favorite if you prefer dry robust reds with its warm spicy flavors and warm tannins. This rich bold red wine is best paired with savory foods like hearty meats, roasts, and blackbird pie.

This blend of select lots is considered among the finest in the Seven Kingdoms by those who prefer dry, robust reds. And we do like red. Often served at feasts, paired with hearty meats, roasts and blackbird pie, poured at Small Council sessions.

title: Game of Thrones Chardonnay
body_html:
Game of Thrones Chardonnay

Game of Thrones Chardonnay blends Chardonnay and Riesling. It fosters bold, strong flavors indicative of the strength of the games' characters. Any fowl dish will shine accompanied with this wine. It incorporates tangerine, Meyer lemon, apricot, peach, honey and spices with a faint oak aroma. Cheers to the victory!

title: Girl & Dragon Malbec
body_html:
Girl & Dragon Malbec

Girl and Dragon Malbec wine is a fierce red wine bright berry flavors. It has a soft and lush texture. Some of the foods that pair with it are Paella, grilled meats (like pork), and hearty stews. Other foods that go well with it are lean cuts of beef and lamb, roasted pork, gamier fowl (such as duck), and pasta with pesto or lighter cream tomato sauces. These foods will make this great Girl and Dragon Malbec wine a great wine.

title: Girl & Dragon Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Girl & Dragon Cabernet Sauvignon

Girl & Dragon Cabernet Sauvignon is a bold and refreshing red wine that has a profile of dark, lush fruit. It's aesthetic is also impressive, with the wine pouring in a red, almost black tinge. It's palate and low acidity pairs well with lamb and steak tartare.

title: Kim Crawford Rosé
body_html:
Kim Crawford Rosé

Rosé wine by Kim Crawford has a pretty pale pink color. It is a bright and juicy rose wine that has fresh berry fruit and watermelon flavors. The finish of this wine is refreshingly dry There are quite a few foods that it pairs well with.

If you are in need of an appetizer to serve with this rose wine, anchovies (canapes can be made with them), melon and prosciutto, salads (especially Salad Nicoise), olive appetizers, and hummus. Meats and seafood that go well with rose wine are crab meat, shrimp, fried fish, grilled fish, lobster, tuna, turkey, salmon, hamburgers, grilled sausage, and grilled chicken. If you want a light meal or snack to go with this wine, you can eat pizza, couscous, and sandwiches and wraps. These foods are what goes best with this rose wine, and they will make this wine an even more wonderful wine.

TASTING NOTES

COLOR:
Pretty pale pink color

AROMA:
A lively nose, brimming with bright berry and tropical fruit.

PALATE:
Soft and luscious, this refreshing Rosé is richly fruited with hints of watermelon and strawberry.

APPELLATION:
New Zealand

PAIRINGS:
Ideal as an apéritif or summer sipper, this easy-drinking style wine also pairs perfectly with lighter salads and other fare.

title: Monogamy Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Monogamy Cabernet Sauvignon

Marriage to one person for eternity deserves celebrating with Monogamy Cabernet Sauvignon! Mouth-watering flavors of black cherry jam, ripe plums and capped off with a slight caress of vanilla will more than satisfy. Begin your married life sipping this fine wine with a steak dinner, dessert or while sharing a bubble bath.

title: Martini & Rossi Asti Spumante DOCG Mini 187ml
body_html:
Martini & Rossi Asti Spumante DOCG

Mini 187ml

Perfect for gifting on any occasion is the 187ml sized Martini & Rossi Asti Spumante. Pairs great with desserts incorporating fruit, pastry or ice cream.

The supreme Moscato Bianco grapes in Italy produce a sparkling wine lower in acidity and alcohol with the sweetness of fresh fruit. Divertiti (enjoy)!

title: Buena Vista Vinicultural Society Pinot Noir
body_html:
Buena Vista Vinicultural Society Pinot Noir

With its bouquet of cherry and blueberry, Buena Vista Vinicultural Society Pinot Noir is sure to excite the taste buds. This delectable award winning red wine is produced with some of the best Pinot Noir grapes found in Sonoma. With flavors of cola, plum, and fresh cherries it can be paired well with duck, goose, and many other game birds.

title: Gnarly Head Wines Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Gnarly Head Wines Pinot Grigio

Described as the Maserati of white wine from California, Gnarly Head Wines Pinot Grigio is fruity and fun. The pino gris grape releases the aromas of white peach, citrus blossom, honeysuckle and tropical fruit, accompanied by flavors of honeydew, nectarine and lemon, ending in a crisp finish. Serve as an aperatif or alongside grilled seafood or gingery pork.

title: Noble Vines 667 Pinot Noir
body_html:
Noble Vines 667 Pinot Noir

With hints of rose petals and lilac and a light, dry but fruity oak body, this wine hailing from Monterrey, California captivates the senses with its chocolate and berry custard aroma and pleasant taste. Paired best with a fine cheese and pork or ham.

title: Noble Vines 515 Rosé
body_html:
Noble Vines 515 Rosé

Noble Vines 515 Rose is crisp and refreshing. You’ll first notice the smell of raspberries then mandarin and floral notes. This wine consists of raspberry, blueberry, rose petals, and citrus. It pairs well with lighter fare common with summertime.

Think vegetable, pasta, and fruit salads. The creator of the wine and his team drink it daily at 5:15 pm hence its name.

title: Noble Vines 337 Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Noble Vines 337 Cabernet Sauvignon

Noble Vines 337 Cabernet Sauvignon is a complex wine full of tannins and flavor. In addition to the vibrant smell of black cherry, ripe currant, roasted coffee, and fresh herbs, it tastes like blackberries, black cherry, and oak with notes of black better. It goes with herb-roasted pork, chicken, and barbecued steak.

title: Noble Vines 242 Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Noble Vines 242 Single Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc

Noble Vines 242 Single Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc is fun and fruity. The aromas of peach, honeydew, and citrus fill your nose. The flavors of nectarine, melon, and lime zest help round out this refreshing wine. It has a medium-body and is crisp with acidity. It is a great dessert wine.

title: Noble Vines 181 Merlot
body_html:
Noble Vines 181 Merlot

From the majestic vines growing in the red clay landscapes of Lodi, California comes Noble Vines 181 Merlot. The smell of Black cherry and vanilla with a touch of clove and nutmeg bring a sense of simplicity to life. The wine is flexible enough to be enjoyed with Pasta dishes and seared steak. The full-bodied wine offers a softer tone than other wines on the market.

title: Noble Vines 152 Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Noble Vines 152 Pinot Grigio

The San Bernabe Vineyard in Monterey, California is home to the classic Noble Vines 152 Pinot Grigio wine. This fruity wine with its exciting flavors of nectarine and lemon bring citrus to a whole new level. Have a glass with a fresh salad to cool off on a warm summers day.

title: Noble Vines The One Black
body_html:
Noble Vines 'The One' Black

Savor the aromas of blackberries and black cherries as you take a whiff of Noble Vines "The One" Black wine. This dark and inviting red wine tastes of sweet blackberry jam. The notes of spice and toasty oak give it a warm and earthy feel. This fruity and floral wine is amazing with rare roasted prime rib of beef and garlic mashed potatoes or a grilled chicken Caesar salad.

title: Buena Vista Vinicultural Society Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Buena Vista Vinicultural Society Cabernet Sauvignon

Created from the vineyards of Sonoma County, Buena Vista Vinicultural Society Cabernet Sauvignon is a truly delightful wine. Its dark purple color has the essence of black cherry with a hint of spice. With the first sip, a tantalizing berry flavor along with cocoa and added spices dance across the tongue making it beg for another taste. This delicious wine goes well with beef and venison.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Merlot
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Merlot

Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Merlot is light and silky with boysenberry and spice flavors that stay on the finish. It provides ripe fruit berry aromas and jammy flavors typical of Wahluke Slope reds, It has a full bodied style of warm climate Merlot with a warm and supple finish.There are foods that can be served with this wine.

Hamburgers (minus the sweet BBQ sauce) are the first food that goes well with this wine. Peppercorn crusted filet mignon with balsamic red wine sauce will also go well with this wine. Jambalaya is another dish that will go just right with this wine. The rich and spicy flavors are a great compliment for Merlot’s balanced fruit and tannins, and its acid offsets the acid from the tomato. These foods served with the Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Merlot will make this super wine spectacular.

TASTING NOTES

The Indian Wells Merlot offers ripe berry fruit aromas and jammy flavors. This is a full-bodied style of warm climate Merlot with a round, supple finish. We added Wahluke Slope Syrah to enhance the mouthfeel and rich fruit character.

title: Meridian Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Meridian Vineyards Chardonnay

Meridian Vineyards Chardonnay is the go-to white wine for those yearning for a crisp quaffe at a garden party or simply sitting with a good book. Maybe it's because of the uncomplicated aroma of vanilla and honeysuckle, backed up by flavors of grapefruit and pineapple. Great paired with pasta or chicken.

title: Ecco Domani Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Ecco Domani Pinot Grigio

The Ecco Domani Pinot Grigio is a pale straw in color, with delicate floral aromas and a light hint of citrus. The wine has tropical fruit notes on the palate, with a crisp and energetic finish. Pinot Grigio pairs well with light fish dishes like Orange Mango Braised Fish with Lime Coconut Quinoa.

Ecco Domani Pinot Grigio has notes of light citrus and delicate floral aromas that are complemented by hints of tropical fruit flavors. This wine is medium-bodied, with a pleasantly soft palate and a crisp, refreshing finish. It pairs well with a lot of foods as well.

title: Stella Rosa Stella Peach Mini 187ml
body_html:
Stella Rosa Stella Peach

187ml

When you are looking for a sweet moscato with a unique twist, then you need look no further than this Stella Rosa Stella Peach. With natural yellow and white peach flavors , this semisweet wine is a perfect pair with fresh fruit or with a cheese platter, particularly with sharp cheddars and other bold cheeses.

title: Torres Sangre de Toro Garnacha
body_html:
Torres Sangre de Toro Garnacha

Torres Sangre de Toro Garnacha is a full rustic red that combines the freshness of berries with a punch of pepper. While the dry oak finish compliments a variety of meat dishes ranging from grilled steak to paella, the mellow tannins and subtle sweetness make it a pleasure to drink all on its own.

title: Torres Sangre de Toro Tempranillo
body_html:
Torres Sangre de Toro Tempranillo

Torres Sangre de Toro Tempranillo is a delectable Spanish wine that is produced by Miguel Torres Carbó. It is made from the Tempranillo grape to create a superb, crimson red wine that features enticing raspberry aromas mixed with clove and a hint of woodland undergrowth. It is silky and smooth with soft tannins that pairs well with a good steak or any other meat along with creamy cheeses.

title: Torres Altos Ibericos Crianza
body_html:
Torres Altos Ibericos Crianza

This Torres Altos Ibericos Crianza is a velvety and smooth red wine with a wonderfully fruity bouquet and flavors of raspberries, strawberries, and hits of spices and smoke. Pairing this robust and smooth red wine with red meat like steak or beef pot roast will bring out the delectable flavors of both the wine and the food.

· 90 points, Tim Atkin 2018 (United Kingdom)

Altos Ibéricos Crianza Fact Sheet

title: Cliff Lede Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Cliff Lede Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Stags Leap

With and air of Spring, the fragrance of jasmine, lavender, and fresh flowers arouse the senses when a Cliff Lede Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon bottle opens. Created in the Poetry Vineyards of Cliff Lede's Twin Peaks estate, this dark purple wine allures the taste buds with plum, blackberry, black currants and a hint of licorice making this bold wine go well with Beef and Venison.

title: Stella Rosa Moscato Mini 187ml
body_html:
Stella Rosa Moscato

Stella Rosa Stella Peach 187ml by The Best Wine Store

Stella Rosa Moscato is a semi-sweet wine from the Piedmont region of Italy. It is sweet, but not overly sweet and it has just the right amount of bubbles. It is great as an aperitif or to be served with small meals. It also has a refreshing taste with a clean finish. Not only is it good as a wedding gift or party favor, it pairs well with a lot of foods. See Quality Liquor Store Wines

Moscato Drink while it is young, fresh, and vibrant

Moscato is meant to be drunk while it is young, fresh, and vibrant. It needs to be served well chilled as well. It pairs well with apple desserts, fresh berries, summer salads, meringue pies, peach cobbler, hazelnut desserts, and lemon poppy bread and cakes.

Best with sweet food products

Other foods that it pairs well with are spicy Asian fare due to the fact that the sweetness of the wine tames the heat of the food. Even though Moscato goes best with sweet food products, cheeses like charcuterie or antipasto go well with this wine. This is a marvelous wine, but when these foods are served with them, it becomes totally magnificent. See all wines

title: Stella Rosa Rosso Mini 187ml
body_html:
Stella Rosa Rosso

Stella Rosa Rosso 187ml

Relax and be happy with this sweet, sparkling Stella Rosa Rosso. Its 187ml size is perfect

to share with the wedding party and serve at the reception with smoky gouda and fruit tarts. Quality Liquor Store Wines

Stella Rosa Rosso help you celebrate love

Let Stella Rosa Rosso help you celebrate love, romance and that special spark with your partner. See all wines

title: Irony Pinot Noir
body_html:
Irony Pinot Noir

Aged for three months in French and American oak, this young Irony Pinot Noir bears a fruity nose of black cherry and sweet plum mixed with coco and violet. The fragrance leads you to a sweet, nutty taste of lush fruit with a hint of almond. Enjoy on its own or paired with grilled salmon and a robust green rocket salad.

title: Noble Vines 446 Chardonnay
body_html:
Noble Vines 446 Single Vineyard Chardonnay

Escape to a tropical oasis the minute you open up a bottle of Noble Vines 446 Single Vineyard Chardonnay. Notice the fragrant aromas of ripe melons, juicy Hawaiian pineapples, and luscious pears and let your eyes be taken in with it's tantalizing golden yellow hue. The flavors of exotic coconut and juicy peaches are met with hints of zesty lemon and vanilla spice.

Enjoy this delightful wine with a plate of soft cheeses such as brie and Camembert, sliced golden apples and pears, and crusty French bread.

title: Tobin James Rock & Roll Syrah
body_html:
Tobin James Rock & Roll Syrah

Tobin James Rock & Roll Syrah is a wild wine with a berries and smoke, full bodied finish. This Paso Robles winemaker is making a way for their wine to their own hall of fame. This easy to drink, dark berried beauty is enhanced with a gastronomy infused Dim Sum.

title: Tobin James Ballistic Zinfandel
body_html:
Tobin James Ballistic Zinfandel

Tobin James Ballistic Zinfandel is precise on the flavors of currants, cocoa and nutmeg. A delectable layering of fruit with a good acidity and a hint of oak in the second sip. This wine would pair well with a traditional family beef roast with roasted red potatoes, carrots, red onions, parsnips and rosemary.

title: Tobin James Notorious Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Tobin James Notorious Cabernet Sauvignon

Tobin James Notorious Cabernet Sauvignon is sure to get in you trouble with it's easy drink ability and lip smacking tartness found in grapes only grown in beautiful Californian soil. This cherry and low acid duo beg the mouth to take another sip. These delicate tastes invoke a sense of place.

title: Tobin James Chateau Le Cacheflo
body_html:
Tobin James Chateau Le Cacheflo

Tobin James Chateau Le Cacheflo features bold fruit aromatics with cherry and dark fruit flavors that combine for a Mediterranean twist. Pairs well with a variety of cheeses such as blue cheese, sharp cheddar or gruyere. White meats such as grilled chicken or pork also pair wonderfully with this dry, red wine.

title: Locations by Dave Phinney F - French Rosé Wine
body_html:
Locations F - French Rosé Wine

French Rose wine by Locations is labeled F for Locations French Rose, and is a delicately sweet pink wine that tastes delicious with hummus, hamburgers, couscous, or chicken. Enjoy the fruity flavor with notes of citrus in French Rose wine for a drink that pleases most wine drinkers. It is a pleasant variety that has universal appeal.

title: Cooper and Thief Bourbon Barrel Aged Red Wine
body_html:
Cooper and Thief Bourbon Barrel Aged Red Wine

Some winemaking traditions were meant To Be Broken. That's why we rested our Dark and Jammy Red Blend in Smoky Aged Bourbon Casks. And when we cracked that barrel open after 3 months, let's just say we knew pretty quickly that we were on to something Good.

Cooper and Thief is a Rich wine with Warm Vanilla flavors and some subtle Spicy notes. It finishes with a Smooth Mouth Feel reminiscent of a Fine Bourbon.

Cooper & Thief Cellarmasters Bourbon Barrel Aged Red will give you a sweet taste of mischief and have you dreaming about the bluegrass hills of Kentucky with this vibrant red wine. The silky tannins and vanilla tertiary aroma makes for a dry and leggy finish. This wine is sure to get your dinner guests talking about this complex red, perfect for the outdoor meal of Korean Barbecue and rosemary potatoes.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Bourbon Barrel Aged Red

title: 7 Moons Red Blend
body_html:
7 Moons Red Blend

7 Moons Red Blend is an amalgam of different grapes like Syrah, Malbec, Granache, Cabernet, Petit Sirah, Merlot and Zinfandel. 7 Moons Red Blend is vibrantly flavorful with touches of strawberry while remaining dry on the palate. This full bodied wine would be well paired with veal and home made orchiette.

title: Hahn Family Wines SLH Chardonnay
body_html:
Hahn Family Wines SLH Chardonnay

Hahn Family Wines SLH Chardonnay out does itself with this hand stirred and fermented in French oak barrels wine. Layers of vanilla and the satiny notes of nectarine and fresh peach are the fragrant aspects to this light and dry Hahn Family Wines SLH Chardonnay. The wine is ideal for the warmer months outside by the pool with friends.

title: Hahn Family Wines SLH Pinot Noir
body_html:
Hahn Family Wines SLH Pinot Noir

Hahn Family Wines SLH Pinot Noir. The Hahn Family excels with this full bodied, semi dry SLH Pinot Noir. The secondary aromas of hazelnut and warm tannins give the body a rush of heat as this hand stirred wine that's been fermented in French oak barrels flows down the palate. The Hahn Family Wines SLH Pinot Noir should be served with a special meal like coq au vin.

title: Jam Jar Sweet White Moscato
body_html:
Jam Jar Sweet White Moscato

Jam Jar Sweet White Moscato is perfect with a warm seaside evening and a friend. This South African wine is summer in a bottle. The honeysuckle and apricot flavors compliment the light acidity of the wine. This would best be served with a board of Manchego, Himalayan salted almonds and a scattering of blueberries.

title: Jam Jar Sweet Shiraz
body_html:
Jam Jar Sweet Shiraz

Jam Jar Sweet Shiraz is the perfect picnic wine. Pack a bag with sharp cheddar cheese, Gruyere puffs and a bottle or two of this delectably lush wine. You will be pleasantly surprised with the opening kiss of sweet notes of raspberry and a sumptuous finish. This wine is perfect for sangria and serving with chocolate cheesecake. It is too sweet for just one bottle.

title: Locations P - Portuguese Red Wine
body_html:
Locations P - Portuguese Red Wine

Locations P -Portuguese Red Wine pairs fantastically with grilled food like kabobs or Portobello mushrooms, or other savory dishes that bring out the bright notes of this wine. The well-rounded flavor balances the smokiness in a smooth wine that pleases the palate and goes well with a variety of foods.

title: Locations OR - Oregon Pinot Noir
body_html:
Locations OR - Oregon Pinot Noir

Locations Wine OR Pinot Noir is a deep red color and tastes like strawberries, spicy black cherries, and earthy notes. Enjoy drinking this robust red wine with duck, pasta dishes, or salmon. The fragrant aroma and sweet taste are a pleasing combination for the palate.

title: Locations I - Italian Red Wine
body_html:
Locations I - Italian Red Wine

Locations I from Dave Phinney is an Italian red wine that will make your tongue sing and is budget-friendly. A fresh dark cherry aroma upon opening, and a taste of cherry, blueberry, olive, and plum along with a thick, dry texture. Decant for an hour for best results and try pairing with lasagna.

title: Kuleto Frog Prince Red Wine
body_html:
Kuleto Frog Prince Red Wine

Indulge yourself with the smooth and supple taste of Kuleto Frog Prince Red Wine, delicately crafted with a rare red fruit blend that will have your palate bursting with an exhilarating blend of fruit coupled with a nutty tannin quality. This classically rich choice pairs well with lamb for a truly flavorful sensation.

title: Locations WA - Washington Red Wine
body_html:
Locations WA - Washington Red Wine

Locations WA, Washington Red Wine is developing as one of the innovators of modern wine cultivation. The complex tones of this leggy red are savorable with chocolate cheesecake. The nourishing and wet soil of Washington provides grape varietals with all the nutrients they need to thrive while producing a complex Washington Red Wine that is delicately tangy with flavors reminiscent of dark chocolate and red plums. Enjoy a Washington Red Wine with a ribeye steak and grilled asparagus with lemon drizzle!

title: Sileni Estates Cellar Selection Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Sileni Estates Cellar Selection Sauvignon Blanc

Made in New Zealand, Sileni Estates Cellar Selection Sauvignon Blanc is a medium-bodied white wine that tastes of citrus and tropical fruits. As a result, it is a refreshing but nonetheless well-balanced experience, thus making it an excellent choice for a wide range of food that include but are not limited to cheese, green vegetables, and lighter forms of seafood.

title: Locations F - French Red Wine
body_html:
Locations F - French Red Wine

People clamor from all over the world for French Red wine. The sumptuous history of the France and their expertise of developing the art of wine cultivation is famous for a reason. The complexities of the different variety of wines from France, grace our tables at Thanksgiving with our traditional Bourgelais The honored Bordeaux with a cigar. Or a savored Burgundy with a piece of Fair Trade chocolate. These are wines to appreciate with loved ones.

title: Locations E - Spanish Red Wine Dave Phinney
body_html:
Locations E - Spanish Red Wine

Locations E - Spanish Red Wine is a delectable wine that is created from a blend of Garnacha, Tempranillo, Monastrell and Cariñena. The deep ruby-violet wine features mixed berry aromas and is the fourth release by famous winemaker Dave Phinney. This E - Spanish Red Wine is produced by Locations Wine and pairs well with a variety of foods including seasoned lamb chops.

title: Locations Corse Vermentino by Dave Phinney
body_html:
Locations Corse Vermentino

Corse is short for "Vin de Corse," so it should come as no surprise to learn that Locations Corse Vermentino is a white wine from the island of Corsica that smells of blossoming flowers but tastes of green apples, bittersweet almond, and even Thai basil. It is this exceptional balance that makes it compatible with such a wide range of cuisines and cooking, with calamari and white fish being particular favorites.

title: Locations CA - California White Wine
body_html:
Locations CA - California White Wine

California wines are known as quality grapes comparable with Italy. The diverse climates of the desert south and mountainous northern California, allow for a wide selection of grape varietals to thrive throughout the state. California white wine is crisp with hints of aprioct in Pinot Grigio and Chardonnay wines. California White wine is as complex and exotic as its' inhabitants.

title: Locations CA - California Red Wine
body_html:
Locations CA - California Red Wine

California is as well known as France when it comes to grape varietals. The lush taste of cherries and hints of leather warm the palate. Syrah's and Zinfandel's pack a more complex punch that taste decadent with a steak of vension and rosemary roasted potatoes. California wine is famous for the rich soil and plump, diverse grapes.

- Robert Parker's "Value Winemaker of the Year"
- Wine Spectator's Top 100 7 Times in past 11 years

title: Locations AR - Argentinian Red Wine
body_html:
Locations AR - Argentinian Red Wine

Argentina is the world's fifth largest producer of wines. A sense of place is invoked when an Locations AR Argentinian Red Wine is uncorked. The radical changes in climate in Argentina give the locals an edge allowing them to produce the biting beauty of Malbecs or the complex La Rioja's. Argentinian Red Wine is delicious. Yes, you will need two bottles.

title: Kuleto Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Kuleto Estate Cabernet Sauvignon

Bold and bright, Kuleto Estate Cabernet Sauvignon provides a rich, deep flavor perfect for any special occasion. Carefully crafted with grapes grown on the Eastern edge of Napa Valley, this one-of-a-kind red features a vibrant acidity peppered with notes of blackberry and fresh thyme. Enjoy a glass with a hearty entrée of beef, lamb, or venison.

title: Hill Family Estate The Barrel Blend Red
body_html:
Hill Family Estate The Barrel Blend Red

The Hill Family Estate Barrel Blend Red is a heady Napa Valley blend of Merlot, Syrah, Malbec, Zinfandel and Cabernet Sauvignon grapes. Dark berry, raisin and chocolate notes helps this "kitchen sink" wine hold its own alongside a classic steak or strong cheese. Decanting makes it taste even better.

The Hill Family Estate Barrel Blend is put together with the help of Kyle Knox, a great surfer and a wine professional, who loves the idea of “being in the barrel”

title: Bonterra Organic Rosé
body_html:
Bonterra Organic Rosé

Bonterra Vineyards Organic Rosé is a decadent flavor quencher, with the many notes and aromas of strawberry, key lime, pineapple, peaches and watermelon.

This wine pairs wonderfully well with Asian-style cuisine, such as a crisp Kimchi Salad or a bowl full of chicken curry.

title: Candoni Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Candoni Pinot Grigio

Candoni Pinot Grigio Friuli proves both rich and sophisticated in taste, with its well balanced apricot and vanilla tones. Not too sweet and deliciously crisp, this delectable wine couples well with shrimp, crab and other shellfish as well, or even fresh vegetables.

title: Bogle Vineyards Petite Sirah
body_html:
Bogle Petite Sirah

Bogle Vineyards Petite Sirah is known for its concentration and intensity. Inky purple in color, this deeply colored wine resonates with juicy blueberries and hints of freshly turned earth. This wine also has succulent and savory notes of dark berries and roasted spices create a supple and mouth-filling texture.

Aged in American oak for a year to capture and concentrate the flavors that lead to a finish with chewy and chalky tannins. These tannins are laced with vanilla, toasted brown sugar, and dark cocoa. If you need a food pairing to go with this wine, smoked lamb shoulder with rosemary, braised short ribs with blackberry barbecue sauce, and smoked gouda cheese are a few items that can be served with this wine.

Big red fruits and vanilla are backed with black pepper and a little cinnamon. There is a ton of oak hiding the natural fruits of the grapes.

Bogle Vineyards Petite Sirah where layers of fine tannins pile up to make a firm, thick texture that supports lots of deep berry flavors and cleans the palate as you sip. It will make a good match with grilled and roasted beef, lamb or game.

title: Bogle Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Bogle Pinot Noir

Bogle Vineyards Pinot Noir is not made using the produce of a single location but rather a number of Californian landscapes that range from coastal hills to the Clarksburg Delta. The result is a refined red wine that smells of ripe summer strawberries before leading into the taste of cherries and tannins, which go well with sauteed mushrooms as well as a number of cheeses.

title: Bogle Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Bogle Sauvignon Blanc

Enjoy Bogle Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc with a fresh salad of greens, a goat cheese plate, or shellfish. This white wine is aged is fermented in stainless steel tanks to complement the zesty flavor. Savor hints of lychee, lemon zest, and tropical fruits in a drinkable wine.

title: Bogle Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Bogle Merlot

Bogle Vineyards Merlot is a smooth, fruity red wine that can be enjoyed every day. Try it with chicken or a Margarita pizza. The juicy flavor combines notes of anise, cola, cherries, and plums for a savory wine that finishes with a silky feel.

title: Bogle Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Bogle Chardonnay

Bogle Vineyards Chardonnay is aged in oak barrels and has a pleasing taste that goes well with just about any foods, including seafood or dessert. This white has notes of pear, guava, and pineapple that adds just the right amount of sweetness to your meal.

title: Bogle Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Bogle Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Bogle Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon creates a warm, full-bodied flavor that pleases the pallet. Complex notes of dried cherry, Madagascar vanilla, and tobacco taste fruity and satisfying. Try this red wine with steak, a hearty Italian pasta dish, or with a chocolate dessert.

WINEMAKERS NOTES

Created in a traditional, fruit-forward style with ample structure for ageabilty.

title: Bodega Tapiz Alta Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Bodega Tapiz Alta Collection Cabernet Sauvignon

Superbly intense and rich, the Tapiz Alta Collection Cabernet Sauvignon wine greatly compliments and highlights the flavors of beef and venison. This seductively delicious wine will leave your taste buds gasping for more of its blackberry, cocoa, chocolate and raspberry hints.

title: Orin Swift Abstract Red Wine
body_html:
Indulge in the rich, complex flavors of Orin Swift Abstract. Aged in French oak barrels for 10 months, this versatile wine pairs well with any meal.

With its deep ruby color and aromas of dark fruit, chocolate, and spice, Orin Swift Abstract is a rich and complex wine that's sure to impress.

Crafted from a blend of Grenache, Syrah, and Petite Sirah, this wine boasts a full-bodied flavor profile, with notes of blackberry, raspberry, and clove. Aged for 10 months in French oak barrels, it's the perfect combination of power and finesse.

Orin Swift Abstract is a versatile wine that pairs well with a variety of foods, from grilled meats to hearty pasta dishes. Or simply enjoy it on its own, savoring its bold flavors and smooth finish.

BLEND
Grenache, Petite Sirah, Syrah

MATURATION
8 months in French Oak, 21% New

title: Orin Swift Machete
body_html:
Orin Swift Machete

(Labels may be Different)

Orin Swift Machete is a bold and intense wine that's sure to impress. With its deep purple color and aromas of dark fruit, vanilla, and spice, this wine is a standout.

Crafted from a blend of Petite Sirah, Syrah, and Grenache, Orin Swift Machete boasts a full-bodied flavor profile, with notes of blackberry, blueberry, and espresso. Aged for 10 months in French oak barrels, it's the perfect combination of power and finesse.

Orin Swift Machete is a versatile wine that pairs well with a variety of foods, from grilled meats to hearty pasta dishes. Or simply enjoy it on its own, savoring its bold flavors and smooth finish.

BLEND
Petite Sirah, Syrah and Grenache

MATURATION
Aged for 14 months in French Oak, 34% new

title: Antigal 1 Uno Malbec 375ml
body_html:
Antigal 1 Uno Malbec

375ml (Half Bottle)

Antigal 1 Uno Malbec an intense dark red wine begins with an aroma of wild berry and plum with a touch of coffee working its way to the palate where it’s joined with vanilla and smoke to a velvety finish.

Hailing from Argentina, Antigal 1 Uno Malbec offers a multilayered experience. It’s an excellent choice for meals including roasted leg of lamb or red meats.

title: Freixenet Cordon Negro Extra Dry Cava 187ml
body_html:
Freixenet Cordon Negro Extra Dry Cava

187ml Mini

Not overly imposing, Freixenet Cordon Negro Extra Dry Cava is a superb choice for any day of the week. Crisp and "not too dry," Freixenet is light and refreshing on the palate with peach, melon and citrus essences. The hint of sweetness and creamy texture allows you to pair it with slightly spicier foods.

title: Freixenet Cordon Negro Brut Mini 187ml
body_html:
Top Selling Cordon Brute

Freixenet Cordon Negro Brut Cava

187ml (Mini)

A Cava with an exceptional, fresh, fruity style and a lingering aroma. It is the perfect partner for the finest food and excellent at any time. See more product options

Why Our Freixenet Cordon Negro Brut Mini 187ml?

"Finely meshed, with a lightly spiced finish. This shows more finesse than many of its peers, displaying a subtle juiciness, joined by aromatic apricot, quince, mandarin orange and almond notes."  Get More Pair Ideas

Reviewed by: Wine Spectator - 87pts

title: Kuleto Estate India Ink Red Wine
body_html:
Kuleto Estate India Ink Red Wine

If you're a bold, independent person, Kuleto India Ink Red Wine will thrill you. This deep, earthy red holds its own against the most savory Asian dishes or smoky brisket. Kuleto Estate India Ink Red Wine is a powerful, take-charge wine made for those who know what they want.

More About Kuleto Wines

title: Bogle Vineyards Old Vines Zinfandel
body_html:
Bogle Vineyards Old Vines Zinfandel

Notice the aroma of fresh cracked white peppercorns and ripe raspberries when you open up a bottle of Bogle Vinyards Old Vines Zinfandel. The flavors of tart cranberries and juicy red berries burst into your mouth when you take your first sip of this delicious dark red wine. Savor the finish of juniper berries with a hint of herbs as a memory. This wine is amazing with pungent Gorgonzola cheese or oven-roasted tandoori chicken.

title: Union Wine Co. Underwood The Bubbles Can
body_html:
Union Wine Co. Underwood The Bubbles Can

375ml

Bring the fun with you with Union Wine Co. Underwood The Bubbles Can. Canned wine keeps cold and is perfect for picnics. Easy to transport and keep cold, this sparkling wine tastes great with fresh seafood, sandwiches, fruit or a cheese plate. Toast to a great time with this convenient canned wine.

title: Union Wine Co. Underwood Rose Bubbles Can
body_html:
Underwood Rosé Bubbles Can

375ml Can

Have can, will travel! Socializing is easy when you have a can of Union Wine Co. Underwood Rosé Bubbles in hand. Sweet and tangy, it’s the embodiment of BYOB. You’ll taste wild strawberry, fruit cocktail, and tart cherry. Pair it with a salad made with fresh goat cheese and strawberries glazed in balsamic vinegar.

title: Smoke Tree Rosé
body_html:
Smoke Tree Rosé

Crisp and fruity, Smoke Tree Rosé is a dry wine that is meant to be enjoyed all year long. Its vibrant flavor complements the freshness of summer salads, grilled seafood, and vegetarian meals. It’s elegant and fresh which is perfect to drink on the hottest days of the season alone or with friends.

title: Sebastiani Gravel Bed Red
body_html:
Sebastiani Gravel Bed Red

With a delightful nose of sweet black cherries, bright currants, Cabernet spice, tropical coconut, hints of black tea, and earthy wood your olfactory sense is embraced with a variety fragrances. Crisp fall leaves and juicy blackberries and raspberries burst onto your taste-buds with your first sip of Sebastiani Gravel Bed Red wine. Excellent with a thick, juicy porterhouse grilled to perfection, or a delicious berry cheesecake for dessert.

title: Rombauer Vineyards Zinfandel
body_html:
Rombauer Vineyards Zinfandel

2017

Let your eyes be taken in by rich crimson hue and deep ruby red color of Rombaur Vineyard Zinfandel. Take a whiff of zesty cloves and spice along with lush aromas of blackberries and raspberries. Be taken aback by the fruity flavors of sweet cherries, juicy blackberries, strong licorice and just the slightest hint of vanilla and pepper.

Rombaur Zinfandel goes great with a hearty bowl of chili, or have it as part of an appetizer or snack with herbed cheese spread of on fresh foccaccia or melba toast rounds.

TASTING NOTES

The wine bursts with bright fruit aromas of cherry and red plum, with notes of vanilla, holiday spices, and lavender all jumping out on the nose. Plum flavors continue to the palate, joined by layers of raspberry jam, mocha, clove, and white pepper. The mid-palate is soft and creamy, framed by fine tannins and ending with a long, lush finish that will leave you wanting another sip.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Zinfandel

title: Rombauer Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Rombauer Vineyards Chardonnay

Pop open a bottle of Rombauer Vineyards Chardonnay and savor the aromas of juicy apple and citrus, laced with baking spices and buttery creme brulee. Tropical fruit and baked apple flavors combine with toasted vanilla to produce a juicy acidic finish that pairs perfectly with pasta, grilled fish or chicken.

TASTING NOTES

Ripe peach, citrus fruits, spice, and pie crust aromas all mingle and lift from the glass. The citrus supported by notes of apricot continues onto the palate which is concentrated with a rich, creamy middle palate, and strong supporting acidity. The finish is long and marked with hints of vanilla. This wine will continue to build richness as it ages in the bottle.

title: Celler Barcelona Brut Cava
body_html:
Celler Barcelona Brut Cava

Add a touch of excitement to your sophisticated evening with Celler Barcelona Brut Cava. This crisp sparkling wine features a light citrus and apple blend with a smooth hint of vanilla. Fun and easy to serve, this versatile sparkling wine can be paired with almost any party dish.

title: Bogle Vineyards Phantom
body_html:
Bogle Vineyards Phantom

Enjoy the intense taste of ripe berries and unique spices with the Bogle Vineyards Phantom. This mysterious red wine offers several flavorful notes that linger and taunt taste buds. Pair this complex red wine with warm and hearty meals, such as turkey or squash.

While Phantom can be enjoyed easily today, hide a bottle in your cellar to allow it to age and develop…and haunt another day.

SELECTIVE GRAPE GROWING
From fields around California, our winemakers combine grapes of unsurpassed quality and complexity.

AMERICAN OAK
Wild berries and black pepper are framed by the influence of oak aging with baking spices and a hint of toasty vanilla.

title: Bogle Vineyards Old Vine Essential Red
body_html:
Bogle Vineyards Old Vine Essential Red

Be prepared for nearly any situation with the Bogle Vineyards Old Vine Essential Red. This versatile red wine features a ripe blend of black plums, dark berries, juniper and spicy cedar. A unique blend makes it easy to pair this wine with anything from barbecue burgers to sophisticated steak dinners.

title: Orin Swift Palermo Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Orin Swift Palermo Cabernet Sauvignon

Become entranced by the finesse of the Orin Swift Palermo Cabernet Sauvignon. This soft yet hearty red wine offers a strong cherry and raspberry taste with subtle hints of black tea, star anise and other unique spices. Pair this full-bodied red wine with grilled steak or pork dinners for an unforgettable evening.

Make an impression with the alluring scent of Orin Swift Palermo Cabernet Sauvignon. This hearty red wine features strong cherry and raspberry notes with hints of unique spices. Pair this hearty and sweet wine with grilled steak or pork dinners and rich conversations.

The rich, full-bodied aroma of cabernet sauvignon made an impression on wine maker Dave Phinney when an old friend presented him with a batch of [Macintosh caramel apples] that included 12 ounces of red wine in the recipe, along with sugar, water and heavy cream. Every time Dave produces a run of Orin Swift Palermo Cabernet Sauvignon, he whips up a few dozen of the of the tasty and almost-healthy morsels.

BLEND
Cabernet Sauvignon

MATURATION
Aged for 11 months in French and American Oak , 34% New

title: Moet & Chandon Ice Imperial
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Ice Imperial

Seductively bright and fruity with a sophisticated palate and bright flavor, Moet & Chandon Ice Imperial Champagne is the only champagne created strictly to be served over ice. Light and refreshing and made of a beautiful compilation of Chardonnay, Pinot Noir, and Pinot Meunier grapes for the perfect flavor and notes. With just the right amount of bubbles, this upscale frosty champagne will give you just the right chill up your spine and leave you aching for more.

TASTING NOTES

A dense color

Deep gold
With amber highlights
An intense, fruity bouquet

The powerful aroma of tropical fruits (mango, guava)
The sumptuousness of stonefruits (nectarine)
An original note of raspberry

title: Fleurs de Prairie Rosé
body_html:
Fleurs de Prairie Rosé

Add a hint of wildflowers to your meal with Fleurs de Prairie Rosé. This delicate pink wind features a relaxing blend of lavender, poppy, wisteria, and sunflowers for a taste of Mediterranean summer. Pair this delicate Rose with hearty eggplant and asparagus dishes for a balanced taste.

title: Ulysses Cabernet Sauvignon Red Wine
body_html:
Ulysses Cabernet Sauvignon Oakville Napa Valley

Bring home the sculpted, refined taste of Napa Valley with Ulysses Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon Wine. Created from sustainable farming and refined aging practices, this minimalist wine offers a distinctive Cabernet Sauvignon taste with a gentle finish.

Ulysses Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon is a minimalist wine offering the perfect ripeness and elegant taste you crave. Serve decanted wine with summer favorites like grilled lamb or hearty Italian pastas, or go completely rouge and serve this decanted wine with summer favorites like grilled beef to create the perfect California meal.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • 2012
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Chardonnay
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Chardonnay

Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Chardonnay celebrates some of the best wine Sonoma County has to offer. A rich, creamy mouthfeel enhanced by barrel age is preceded by tastes of Fuji apple, vanilla, allspice, and peach. Combine this excellent wine with a light dish such as crab, or risotto with spring vegetables, and you’ll pull out a sophisticated taste combo that will satisfy even the most particular palates.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Cold Creek Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Cold Creek Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon

Chateau’s Cabernet Sauvignon has silky tannins, a rich complexity, and concentrated fruit. There are foods that ought to be served with this fantastic wine. We are going to discuss desserts first.

It is said, “Life is short, eat dessert first.” The same could go with what to serve with this wine. It never hurts to start with dessert first and there are some great desserts that go well with this wine. They include dark chocolate cake, coffee ice cream, berries in a dark chocolate sauce, dark chocolate chip, almond, walnut, or vanilla cookies, and blackberry, raspberry, or boysenberry pie. Now that we have taken care of dessert, we can move on to the main course.

The main courses that should be served with this wine provide some variety. If you want to serve fish, swordfish and tuna are the best choices. Other meats that go well with it are braised meat dishes: rib eye, steak, beef short ribs, hamburger, beef stew, rack of lamb, and butterflied leg of lamb. If you need to veg out and create an appetizer or simple meal, then these vegetables, fruits, and cheeses also will make it possible.

Vegetables and fruit are a great choice for side dishes that ought to accompany the fish or meat entree. The vegetables and fruits that go well with this wine are portabello mushrooms, Brussel sprouts, broccoli rabe, grilled radicchio, kale, and spinach. Fruits that will go fantastically with this wine are plums and black cherries.Cheeses like gorgonzola, gouda, cheddar, vella jack, mild blue cheeses, go well with this wine.

Good food makes everything better, including wine. No matter which of these foods you choose to serve with this wine, it will make this wonderful wine even more wonderful.

TASTING NOTES

Planted in 1973, the south-facing Cold Creek Vineyard is a warm, dry site with high heat accumulation. This Cabernet has broad-shouldered structure, concentrated fruit characters and deep color.

title: Rodney Strong Sonoma County Chardonnay
body_html:
Rodney Strong Sonoma County Chardonnay

Rodney Strong Sonoma County Chardonnay is fermented in a barrel in new and seasoned French oak with toasty vanilla and spice complexities. It is fermented in a barrel for a year and, during that time, the winemakers stirred the lees in the barrel. The addition of the lees to the barrel gives the wine an elegant fullness and creamy texture on the palate. This wine also has a creamy and crisp to it and the flavors of golden delicious apples, Meyer lemon, and baking spices with a hint of minerality on the finish. There are quite a few foods that go right with this wine and should be paired with it.

A few of the foods that will go right with this wine are soft cheeses, fresh crab, or roasted pork loin. Other foods that can be paired with this wine are fuller-bodied seafood dishes like salmon, halibut, or trout. There is also no wrong way to serve pork with this wine. Other meats that go right with this wine are

title: Rodney Strong Merlot
body_html:
Rodney Strong Merlot

The name says it all. Rodney Strong Merlot is a powerful blend of plum and blueberry flavors with a hint of oak. The rich, smooth taste is best enjoyed with tender cuts of beef or chicken. Straight from Sonoma County, California, this affordable blend of wine is the perfect choice for any dinner.

title: Rodney Strong Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Rodney Strong Cabernet Sauvignon

Select Rodney Strong Cabernet Sauvignon as a perfect pairing for beef, pork, or lamb. This full-bodied red wine includes hints of spice, dark cherry, and plum. Rodney Strong Carbernet Sauvignon is rich in tannins, which give this wine a strong and complex mixture of flavors.

title: Meiomi Rosé
body_html:
Meiomi Rosé

Meiomi Rosé is a tasty sweet wine that is well paired with certain Asian dishes. It is best with either a spicy tuna roll or spicy tofu. With hints of watermelon and orange peel, you will love the flavors coming together for a delicious experience. You will love enjoying this wine.

Meiomi Rosé is a wine with a light salmon color. This tasty, sweet wine is well paired with sushi. It is best with either a spicy tuna roll or spicy tofu. It is a wine that you will love for its hints of watermelon and orange peel.

title: Rodney Strong Charlotte's Home Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Rodney Strong Charlotte's Home Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc

Treat yourself to a tropical paradise with Rodney Strong Charlotte's Home Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc! Its fresh, invigorating taste is complemented by a citrus blend of lemongrass, lime blossoms, and grapefruit, all of which are the by products of the Russian River Valley. Its savory tropical blend comes with a hint of honeydew melon, giving the wine the gentle backbone that is needed to seal its flavor. That being said, the wine is best when paired with a snack of fresh goat cheese.

title: Rodney Strong Rosé of Pinot Noir
body_html:
Rodney Strong Rosé of Pinot Noir

If you're looking for a fresh tasting, vibrant Rosé then look no further than Rodney Strong Rosé of Pinot Noir. This tasty bottle of wine is packed full of fruit flavors such as strawberry and white peach, with a hint of jasmin to finish it off perfectly.

Its bright and fun color means that it is perfect for a dinner party with friends, especially when you're serving up fresh sea food, summer salads and tasty cheeses such as goats cheese.

title: RoseRock Pinot Noir
body_html:
Roserock Drouhin Oregon Eola-Amity Hills Pinot Noir

When my husband comes home late, I slip into something comfortable and hand him a glass of RoseRock Pinot Noir. Its sweet blackberry flavor lingers on the tongue and finishes smoothly, relieving tension. The dusky RoseRock Pinot Noir with strawberry shortcake always puts him in the right mood for me.

When you need a more subtle wine with a clear flavor palette, reach for RoseRock Pinot Noir. We recently served this with salmon, and its musky blackberry flavor paired well with the salty fish. The RoseRock Pinot Noir was a hit since murkier blends overpowered the subtle dish.

title: Andre Extra Dry California Champagne
body_html:
Andre Extra Dry California Champagne

This wine's name is quite misleading. Don't be fooled by Andre Extra Dry California Champagne! It may feel a bit sweet, but the aromas will make you think of apples and pears. Pugliese w/ Olive Oil & Dukkha will pair well with this tasty wine. So sit back and enjoy!

title: Andre Brut California Champagne
body_html:
Andre Brut California Champagne

Do you have a fond taste for delicious wines? Then you should try Andre Brut Califorina Champagne with some delicious proscuitto-wrapped appetizers. This wine has the driest bubbles with a fruity taste that makes you think of apples and sweet lemons. You will love this wine. Try it out today!

title: Champs de Provence Cotes de Provence Rosé
body_html:
Champs de Provence Cotes de Provence Rosé

Champs de Provence Cotes de Provence Rosé is a pleasant, dry rose sipper that features an eye-pleasing light salmon orange color. As a classic dry rosé wine with vibrant tasting notes of red berries, orange blossom, and citrus, this medium bodied wine pairs well with shellfish and other seafood varieties.

title: Fleur de Mer Rosé
body_html:
Fleur de Mer Rosé

Fleur de Mer Rosé is an outstanding example of Provencal rosé wine, meaning that it benefits from a perfect environment as well as centuries and centuries' worth of wine-making expertise and experience. The result smells of lavender but tastes of peaches and melons as well as herbs and melons, making it an excellent choice with salads, seafood, and chicken.

title: Barefoot Cellars Rosé
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Rosé

Barefoot Cellars Rosé will bring a fruity blush to your cheeks as the delicate notes of watermelon, strawberry land pleasantly dry on your palate. A hint of sweetness brings out the savory, butter flavor when paired with grilled tuna and an almond and arugula salad. The Barefoot Cellars Rosé is perfect with any dark chocolate indulgence too.

title: San Antonio Specialty Velvet Burgundy
body_html:
San Antonio Specialty Select Velvet Burgundy

Take a sip of San Antonio Winery's Special Select Velvet Burgundy and be transported to sunny Los Angeles where the desert soil produces a grape even the French can't beat. Pair this fruity, succulent and luscious San Antonio Winery Special Select Velvet Burgundy with a lean fillet of venison for a heavenly meal that will have your guests refilling their glasses.

title: San Antonio Winery Classic Chianti
body_html:
San Antonio Winery Classic Chianti

The San Antonio Winery Classic Chianti is a rich and intense red wine that pairs remarkably well with both lamb and pasta. It has a sweet, lingering finish that will stay with you well after you've finished your glass. It's an easy choice for a house wine, and will be enjoyed by both conisseurs and those new to wine.

title: Fetzer Valley Oaks Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Fetzer Cabernet Sauvignon

The Fetzer Valley Oaks Cabernet Sauvignon is pleasantly soft supping wine. The fruit flavors overflow the glass with cherry, blackberry, and subtle hints of vanilla striking the palate. This complex red wine is a crowd pleaser and goes amazingly with savory meat dishes such as beef short ribs or garlic chicken wings.

title: Croft Reserve Tawny Port
body_html:
Croft Reserve Tawny Port

The Croft Reserve Tawny Port is a smooth and easy to drink aged tawny with a hint of spice. Light red with an amber hue, the flavor palate denotes hints of spice, redcurrant, and butterscotch with a finish reminiscent of strawberry jam. This Port goes well with dried fruits as well as desserts made with nuts like pecan pie.

93 POINTS - FINALIST, GREAT VALUE Ultimate Wine Challenge

title: Cockburn's Fine Tawny Port
body_html:
Cockburn's Fine Tawny Port

Cockburn's Fine Tawny Port is a tawny port with a smooth and full flavor that gives hints of butterscotch and toffee. It is a great companion to rich, creamy desserts as well as dried fruits. Be sure to try this wine gently drizzled over vanilla ice cream for a remarkable treat.

title: Stella Rosa Gold
body_html:
Il Conte dAlba Stella Rosa Gold

Sweet and light, Il Conte d'Alba Stella Rosa Gold is the ideal accompaniment to fresh fruit, cheese, or dessert. Alternatively, pair it with spicy food for a delightful variety of complementary flavors. This Italian white wine combines notes of peach and honey for a wonderfully refreshing taste.

Grapes for our delicious Stella Rosa Gold are harvested from beautiful vineyards located in the Italian countryside. A refreshing white with flavors of honey and peach. Serve chilled with fresh fruit, cheese, spicy cuisine, and desserts.

title: Fetzer Shaly Loam Gewurztraminer
body_html:
Fetzer Shaly Loam Gewurztraminer

The Fetzer Shaly Loam Gewurztraminer is a sweet wine with bold flavors of sugared oranges, honeysuckle, and white-fleshed tropical fruits. A bold and complex texture, this white wine has a dynamic mouthfeel that stops short of a treacle-esque finish. Be sure to enjoy this wine alongside roast duck for a remarkable taste sensation.

title: Fetzer Sundial Chardonnay
body_html:
Fetzer Sundial Chardonnay

Fetzer's Sundial Chardonnay is a medium-bodied, light and smooth white wine. This Chardonnay is rife with aromas and flavors of flowers, herbs, pear, and pineapple. A wine that is as versatile and it is delectable, it is well suited for most apps, salads, chicken, and any seafood dish you can think of.

title: Fetzer Echo Ridge - Valley Oaks Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Fetzer Echo Ridge - Valley Oaks Sauvignon Blanc

This Sauvignon Blanc from Fetzer Vineyards is a subtle, fresh white wine that has a very light and refreshing flavor of greens such as cucumber and celery. It has a soft texture and a short finish. Fetzer Echo Ridge - Valley Oaks Sauvignon Blanc is a great priced delicate wine that goes well with cheeses, especially goat cheese.

title: Alexander Valley Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Alexander Valley Vineyards Chardonnay

Alexander Valley Vineyards Chardonnay is rich and creamy with a slightly floral component, and long aftertaste. With aromas of pineapple, pear, apple, and vanilla, and flavors of tropical fruit, pear, apricot, and apple, it is quite balanced and offers a lasting rich mouth-feel. Enjoy a bottle with a plate of creamy fettuccine alfredo, topped with roasted chicken breast.

title: Alexander Valley Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Alexander Valley Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Alexander Valley Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon, the estates flagship wine, is medium-bodied with juicy fruit flavors, and polished tannins. With aromas of cherry, blackberry, plum, vanilla, and dark fruit, and rich flavors of cherry, plum, cassis, chocolate and spice, it is smooth, and balanced. Enjoy a bottle with roasted beef in mushroom sauce, and sauteed eggplant.

This is an elegant wine with aromas of black cherry, cassis, plum, vanilla, oak and a hint of chocolate. In the glass there are lush flavors of cherry, cassis, blackberry and chocolate. The Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon evolves with each sip. This is a graceful wine with great balance and a long, lingering finish. Enjoyable upon release, this wine will reward those with the patience to lay down a few bottles.

title: Bonterra Vineyards Organic Zinfandel
body_html:
Bonterra Vineyards Organic Zinfandel

Its rural origins notwithstanding, Bonterra Vineyards Zinfandel has a classic mixture of blueberries, black stone fruit, and a hint of black pepper. This intense, garnish blend starts well on the palate and leaves a long-lasting, lingering flavor that is tempered by a hint of oak.

Free of pesticides and preservatives, this organic concoction is best when paired with spaghetti and meatballs in spicy marinara sauce.

title: Bonterra Organic Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Bonterra Vineyards Organic Sauvignon Blanc

A hearty blend of grapefruit, citrus, and kiwi fragrances give Bonterra Organic Mendocino County Lake County Sauvignon Blanc a pleasing, natural scent, which is balanced by a piquancy of lime and melon flavoring. Its smooth finish is complemented by a culmination of tartness. This unique version of Sauvignon Blanc is best when enjoyed with beef and vegetable stir-fried noodles.

title: Bonterra Vineyards Organic Chardonnay
body_html:
Bonterra Vineyards Organically Grown Chardonnay

Knowing how much I love the citrus and pear flavor of Bonterra Vineyards Organically Grown Chardonnay, my boyfriend had some chilled when I arrived for dinner. Instead of takeout, he had prepared linguine with shrimp, which went perfectly with the organic Bonterra Vineyard Chardonney, which made a lovely evening unforgettable.

title: Bonterra Vineyards Organic Merlot
body_html:
Bonterra Vineyards Organic Merlot

With an abundant mixture of cherry and ripe berry, Bonterra Vineyards Organic Merlot has a consistency of modern tannins to balance its flavor. Its old-world style is characterized by deep aromas of chocolate, cola spice, and cranberry.

With its touch of herb and natural light oak, this fine, delicate wine synthesizes well with a dish of Greek Mousakka.

title: Bonterra Vineyards Organic Pinot Noir
body_html:
Bonterra Vineyards Organic Pinot Noir

Pinot noir originates in Burgundy, but has been widely adopted by vineyards everywhere. When you taste Bonterra Vineyards Organic Pinot Noir, you’ll see why. The hints of strawberry and raspberry go exceedingly well with the vanilla and slight oak that make up the taste profile of this wine. The soft tannis and rich feel in the mouth cap this wine off and it all adds up to a winner. Couple this wine with a pasta dish, and leave your whole dinner party satisfied.

title: Bonterra Organic Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Bonterra Vineyards Organic Cabernet Sauvignon

When you think of red wine, you're probably thinking of Cabernet Sauvignon. If you want a full-bodied wine with hints of blackcurrant and green peppers, you can’t get better than Bonterra Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon. Because of the famously high alcohol content of Cabernet Sauvignon, it’s recommended you pair this wine with a hearty food, such as a simple dish of meatballs.

title: Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Cabernet Sauvignon

With its fruity aromas of cherry and cassis, Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Cabernet Sauvignon boasts a smooth, cinnamon finish replete with smooth tannins. A hint of lavender and cloves render this full bodied yet sophisticated wine an excellent companion for the dinner of your choice. This elegant dinnertime companion is best when paired with Italian beef stew or slow cooked barbecue ribs.

title: Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Pinot Noir
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Pinot Noir

The highly regarded Kenwood Vineyards Six Ridges Pinot Noir brings flavors of pomegranate and raspberry together with nutmeg and vanilla. The grapes in Pinot Noir are notoriously difficult to cultivate, but Kenwood Vineyards has managed to produce a versatile wine with rich mouthfeel, a medium body, and an excellent finish. Paired with a dish of salmon, this wine will be the talk of the night.

title: Smoking Loon Blue Loon Moscato
body_html:
Smoking Loon Blue Loon Moscato

Your senses will thank you when you introduce them to the light scent of honeysuckle, paired with the fruit medley of honeydew melon, sun-dried apricot, peach, mandarin, and a touch of honey. Try Smoking Loon Blue Loon Moscato paired with a dish of light chicken, and find out why Moscato has been enjoying a massive surge in popularity in recent years.

TASTING NOTES

Smoking Loon California Moscato opens with the enticing perfumed aromas of orchid blossom and juicy, ripe mango nectar. The palate presents flavors of tropical fruit with notes of peach. The finish is sweet and holds a brightness to the end. Aged three months in stainless steel, this Moscato with its bright flavors and refreshing acidity make it perfect to sip alone or as a wonderful accompaniment to a wide variety of foods.

title: Trump Winery Meritage
body_html:
Trump Winery Meritage Monticello Red Wine

Put your feet up with a glass of Trump Winery Meritage and savor lightly toasted aromas. As you sip, the fruity flavor rolls over your tongue with hints of black cherry and herbs. Treat yourself to a bowl of cherry vanilla ice cream as you settle into your evening.

Awards
Silver, 2018 Int'l East Meets West
Bronze, 2018 San Francisco Chronicle

title: Trump Winery Reserve New World Red
body_html:
Trump Reserve New World Red Blend

Trump Winery's goal is to produce the best wine anywhere in the world. This signature red showcases our best terroir producing a wine that is complex, round, and silky, with well-developed flavors of black currant, dark cherries, and toasted oak. Pairs well with steak, lamb, and hard, salty cheeses such as Gruyere.

Imagine yourself cozily in front of a crackling fire place enjoying a nice big steak and a glass of Trump Reserve New World Red in the Blue Ridge Mountains. The Trump Winery New World Reserve Red is a deep aromatic blend that will be sure to keep you warm on a brisk evening.

This signature Bordeaux-style blend is complex and round with well-structured tannins and developed flavors of toasted oak, currant, and black cherry. Just released, this wine will develop and evolve in the bottle softening into a seamless wine with aging potential. Enjoy with steak, lamb, and hard, salty cheeses such as gruyère.

If you are interested, there may still be some available here.

title: Tisdale Winemakers Selection Sweet Red
body_html:
Tisdale Winemakers Selection Sweet Red

Sweet Red Of California

With notes of black cherry and raspberry jam our medium-bodied wine has a velvety soft finish.

We invite you to enjoy our outstanding wine chilled with your favorite spicy dishes or barbecue and share in life’s endless possibilities.

title: Sandeman Ruby Port
body_html:
Sandeman Fine Ruby Port

Sandeman Ruby Port is not a single wine but rather a well-balanced blend of wines, which provide it with its characteristic rich and robust taste of plums and other red fruits. This taste makes it well-suited for pairing with not just creamier cheeses but also chocolates and fruit pies, which should come as welcome news to people who love their desserts.

title: Sandeman Tawny Porto
body_html:
Sandeman Tawny Porto

Aged in small oak casks, Sandeman Tawny Porto has a clear red amber color and opens with the aroma of vanilla. The fresh flavor of red fruits unfolds in the mouth, the finish evokes raisins and hazelnuts. Perfect pairing with any caramel dessert such as crême brulée or a strong Roquefort cheese.

title: Sandeman Rainwater Madeira
body_html:
Sandeman Rainwater Madeira

Sandeman Rainwater Madeira is a fine Portuguese white wine, made on the little island of Madeira in its traditional estufas (wine-making stoves). It is light yellow in color, with a medium body and nutty finish. You may enjoy it with hors d'oeuvres like pate, or with desserts such as marzipan and walnut tarts.

title: Sandeman Founder's Reserve Ruby Porto
body_html:
Sandeman Founder's Reserve Ruby Porto

Sandeman Founder's Reserve Port has been aged for 5 years to produce a rich melange of flavors that bring both fire and fruit to mind, which is most appropriate when it comes in the brilliant red of rubies. Some will savor it most on its own, while others will like it most when paired with cheeses and chocolates.

title: Sandeman Armada Superior Cream Sherry
body_html:
Sandeman Armada Superior Cream Sherry

The Sandeman Armada Superior Cream is a top quality Sherry. Aged for seven years, this Sherry has a robust, well-rounded flavor that pairs divinely with sweet desserts such as cake, ice cream, chocolates, or even blue cheese. It finishes with a smooth, velvety aftertaste that lingers on the tongue for quite some time.

title: Sandeman Character Medium Dry Amontillado Sherry
body_html:
Sandeman Character Medium Dry Amontillado Sherry

The Sandeman Character Medium Dry Amontillado Sherry is a premium 9 year old Sherry aged in small casks to develop a medium golden amber color before being blended with a small amount of Pedro Ximénez Sherry to give this dry, complex wine a hint of sweetness. This wine works well with soups, pâtés, and smoked meats.

title: Sandeman 10 Year Old Tawny Port
body_html:
Sandeman 10 Year Old Tawny Port

Sandeman 10 Year Old Tawny Port, aged in small oak barrels, opens with an aroma of ripe fruit with hints of vanilla and raisins. A soft, sweet, suave fruit palate is followed by a nutty complex finish. A perfect match to rich desserts from tarte tatin to pudding with figs and nuts.

title: Cockburn's Special Reserve Port
body_html:
Cockburn's Special Reserve Port

Cockburn's Special Reserve Port is a premium Port made with only the top quality grapes. Cockburn's Special Reserve is aged in oak barrels for a few extra years compared to their other Ports offering it an unrivaled balance and smoothness. Be sure to pair it at room temperature with cheeses as well as other desserts to bring out the best of this wine.

title: The Crusher Pinot Noir
body_html:
The Crusher Grower's Selection Pinot Noir

If you are looking for a rich and fruit-filled red wine, then The Crusher Grower's Selection Pinot Noir is the perfect wine for you. Flavors of boysenberries, ripe cherries, and raspberries characterize this deliciously complex wine. Pair The Crusher Grower's Selection Pinot Noir with a roasted chicken dish or a lovely turkey dinner and you will bring out the full flavors of this delectable wine.

title: The Crusher Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
The Crusher Wilson Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon

With its signature dash of spice, the Crusher Wilson Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon has deep aromas of raspberries and plums which add to its overall allure.

Silhouetted in blackberry flavor, this particular blend of Cabernet Sauvignon has an interesting if not intricate taste that includes hints of ground coffee flavor and dry leather, all of which are tempered with a deep and slow finish of smooth, matured tannins.

This bold and masculine blend is best when paired with spicey lamb sliders or classic steak.

title: Luc Belaire Rare Rose Sparkling
body_html:
Luc Belaire Rare Rose Sparkling

This Luc Belaire Rare Rose Sparkling wine is a rare treat indeed. From the label stamped "Produit de France" (product of France) to its beautiful, deep pink color and delicious strawberry and black currant notes, it is most impressive. It is a very romantic sparkling wine, one which would pair well with strawberries and melted chocolate.

title: Fonseca Ten Year Old Tawny Port
body_html:
