Fonseca Ten Year Old Tawny Port

Nothing is more classy or deliciously decadent than sipping a glass of port after a meal, and Fonseca Ten Year Old Tawny Port is just the right drink for the job. With flavors of mouth-watering tart cherries, and delectable ripe plums as well as wild berries, this Fonseca Ten Year Old Tawny Port is best served at room temperature or slightly chilled with a nutty and not-so-sweet dessert.

TASTING NOTES

Fonseca 10 Year Old Tawny is russet in colour with brilliant crimson highlights and a fragrant, ripe-fruit bouquet. Its smooth, silky texture and subtle oak nuances are balanced by a fresh acidity and tannic "grip" that culminate in a long, elegant, plumy finish.

title: Luc Belaire Rare Brut
body_html:
Luc Belaire Rare Brut

The Luc Belaire Rare Brut is a refreshing sparkling wine with a fruity flavor of citrus and stone fruits. It's dry with an enticingly crisp finish, and its flavor profile makes it the perfect drink to pair with almost any dish as a chilled aperitif. It goes exceptionally well with fish, cheeses, and poultry.

title: Aquinas Pinot Noir
body_html:
Aquinas Pinot Noir

Aquinas Pinot Noir is an intensely aromatic wine displaying notes of sweet cherry, Tahitian vanilla creme brulee, and raspberry compote. It has a remarkably rich fruit flavor of sweet cranberry and pomegranate, both nuances of Napa, along with sour cherry and a pleasant earthiness, that comes from the Sonoma Coast. Bright acidity leads some of the fruit flavors to have a tart edge followed by a hint of dried lavender and a delicate touch of French Oak to round out the palate. The addition of Petite Sirah gives mid-palate weight to this bright, medium-bodied wine. A lot of foods go nicely with Aquinas Pinot Noir.

Pinot Noir pairs well with a great variety of foods-fruiter versions make a great match with salmon or other fatty fish, roasted chicken, or pasta dishes. Pinot with more tannins in them goes nicely with duck and other game birds, casseroles, and stews like beef bourguignon. Pinot Noir is a nice wine and these delicious foods being paired with it will make it extra nice.

title: Aquinas Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Aquinas Cabernet Sauvignon

Aquinas Cabernet Sauvignon delights with the aromas of crushed currants, blackberry jam, and fresh violet petals. On the palate, decadent toasted oak notes from the combination of American and French Oak aging regimen blend with black cherry and sweetened cranberry. It is a fruit-forward, rich and satisfying in flavor or sound,, and delightfully structured wine. There are foods that should be served with this wine as well.

When it comes to meat, beef (especially grilled, roasted, or stewed), braised dishes like lamb or venison, filet mignon, game and game birds, foie gras and truffles risotto, lamb (especially roasted or rack of lamb), Korean-style beef, steak, and short ribs. If a cheese is needed to go with this wine, then aromatic cheeses like Roquefort, Blue, and Camembert will pair perfectly with it. Vegetables that should be served with this wine are roasted eggplant, lentils, and potatoes. Seasonings that can season food to be served with this wine are mint, mustard, black pepper, rosemary, and thyme. The last food item that goes well this wine is pasta, especially those with cream sauce.

Cabernet Sauvignon is a delightful wine and these foods and spices will make it even more delightful. People can delight in pairing these delicious foods and spices with this wine.

title: Lillet Rose Aperitif
body_html:
Lillet Rose Aperitif

Maison Lillet introduces the first product to leave its vineyards in over fifty years, the Lillet Rose Aperitif. It is a dry rose wine with luscious hints of sweet and bitter orange peel, and the perfectly named product for Lillet, since it wets your appetite and leaves you wanting more. Serve in a snifter or an aperitif glass before a meal on its own, or with light, sweet appetizers.

title: Smoking Loon The Original Old Vine Zinfandel
body_html:
Smoking Loon The Original Old Vine Zinfandel

Smoking Loon The Original Old Vine Zinfandel offers the palate a hint of black raspberry and cinnamon and the complex aroma of plum and blackberry. Background coconut and vanilla are evidence of American oak aging. This Zinfandel is balanced with soft tannins pairs well with grilled lamb, hamburgers or steak.

TASTING NOTES

Old Vine Zinfandel invites you with a beautiful color in the glass and aromas of blackberry liquor, and brambly fruit. On the palate, this medium-bodied wine offers flavors of tart raspberry, cobbler, dark plum, with peppery lingering notes of pomegranate. A lengthy finish of coconut and vanilla derived from a combination of 10 months of aging in American and French Oak make this a wonderfully approachable wine.

title: Sebastiani Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Sebastiani Vineyards Merlot

Sebastiani Vineyards Merlot is a Merlot swimming with rich flavors of black tea, classic red fruits, black cherry, and just a hint of cocoa powder. The finish ends refreshingly with lingering hints of herbal flavors. It will go exceptionally well when paired with a leg of roast lamb and garlic mashed potatoes or any hardy meal.

title: Black Box Rose
body_html:
Black Box Rose

Award winning food friendly Black Box Rose is crisp with notes of sweet fruits and a velvety finish that will quickly become one of your favorite wines. This fruit-forward Rose is perfect for warm weather drinking and it pairs well with lobster and seared wild salmon as well as desserts such as ripe peaches.

title: Martini & Rossi Sparkling Rosé
body_html:
Martini & Rossi Sparkling Rosé

Martini & Rossi Sparkling Rosé is a sparkling wine crafted from premium Moscato Bianco, Brachetto and Malvasia grapes grown in Italy. Light, crisp and aromatic with hints of citrus, elderflower and soft peach.

The palate is slightly sweet and a perfect pairing with rich, creamy cheeses as well as fruits like peaches and apricots.

title: Seven Daughters Rich Red Winemaker's Blend
body_html:
Seven Daughters Rich Red Winemaker's Blend

Seven Daughters Rich Red Winemaker's Blend offers intense aromatics of blackberry, followed by lavender and vanilla. It opens with blackberry and dried cherry flavors and closes with a note of peppery spice. This blend can be enjoyed on its own or paired with light pasta, grilled poultry or beef dishes.

title: Chloe Rosé
body_html:
Chloe Rosé

Flavored with ripe cherries, dried peaches and blackberry and just the right amount of pressed linen, Chloe Rose has a tart but dry fruity flavor that you're going to love, along with a sweet finish and a little bit of chewy tanin. Pair it with grilled salmon, duck confit, or smoked salmon mousse and you'll have an excellent meal.

TASTING NOTES

Delicate notes of fresh strawberries, raspberries and watermelon dance on the nose and palate, unfolding into a crisp and well-balanced wine with bright acidity and a refreshing finish.

As Seen In Cosmopolitan

title: Love Noir Satin Red
body_html:
Love Noir Satin Red

This full flavored wine features berry jam, roasted nuts, latte and vanilla cherry paste flavors that are going to make it fruity and supple. Paired with the honeyed apple, oak and cedar, you're getting a dry and fruity, light-to-medium fullness that goes beautifully with baked ham, lasagna or meatloaf for your next dinner.

title: Slow Press Chardonnay
body_html:
Slow Press Chardonnay

Slow Press Chardonnay offers lemon and apple blossoms plus a tiny bit of honeydew meld for a pleasant nose on this wine. The energetic palate offers fresh green apple and lemon salt flavors that packs a punch. It pairs well with butter-poachedlobster or crab, tomato-based dishes, and lighter chicken salads.

title: Slow Press Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Slow Press Cabernet Sauvignon

Just the right deep notes of dark fruit and blackberry make this smooth wine a little bit darker and more full. With a medium body and a velvety feel, the Slow Press Cabernet Sauvignon definitely lingers on your tongue. All you need for this sweet wine is beef, lamb, game meats or poultry.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Rosé
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Rosé

Cupcake Vineyards Rose comes from the finest vineyards of the Côtes de Provence region in southern France. Refreshing aromas of rose petals and hints of wild lavender with flavors of strawberry and white peach are found in this wine. Pair it with a summer salad with turkey and cranberries or tomatoes Provençale.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Let your tongue sink into dark cherries, juicy blackberries, and bright cassis in the deep and inviting Cupcake Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon. Notice the subtle hints of toasted oak and rich cocoa in dark and sultry red wine. Let your mouth linger in its soft and silky finish as you enjoy the soft tannic texture. Pair it with a salad filled with roasted colorful beets and bitter arugula or tender, grilled flank steak.

title: AVA Grace Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
AVA Grace Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

AVA Grace Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc is a delightfully dry but fruity wine that pairs well with chicken. It's flavors deliver hints of honeydew melon, tropical fruits, dried peach and kiwi. This wine offers a rich texture with a smooth finish of lemon and fruit tannins in a light to smooth body.

title: AVA Grace Vineyards Red Blend
body_html:
AVA Grace Vineyards Red Blend

The AVA Grace Vineyards Red Blend is full of dark berry flavors including blackberry and raspberry with just the right amount of cranberries, roses and rhubarb. You'll also love the flavors of vanilla and dark cherry that finish it off. You'll love the little bit of spice that makes this wine pair perfectly with sauteed mushrooms, goat cheese pizza and prosciutto.

title: AVA Grace Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
AVA Grace Vineyards Merlot

This deep red wine is filled with flavors of black cherry, plum and blueberry that pair wonderfully with just a little bit spice, vanilla and mocha to finish it out. You'll get a smooth finish to this silky wine, especially when you accompany it with grilled flat iron steak or a grilled mushroom swiss burger.

title: AVA Grace Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
AVA Grace Vineyards Chardonnay

An ideal mix of white peach and apple with a little bit of lemon for tartness, this AVA Grace Vineyards Chardonnay is a smooth choice for your dinner plans. It finishes with a little richness from the vanilla, oak and almonds and goes well with grilled cayenne prawns and risotto or a garden vegetable soup.

title: Simple Life Pinot Noir
body_html:
Simple Life Pinot Noir

The Simple Life Pinot Noir is a refreshing wine with subtle hints of red licorice and vanilla. Aged for ten months in 100% French oak, this delicious red wine goes down smooth and pairs wonderfully with both chicken and turkey.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Smoking Loon The Original Chardonnay
body_html:
Smoking Loon The Original Chardonnay

Smoking Loon Chardonnay opens with aromas of toasted almond and apricot, with nuances of vanilla and baked apple. Medium-bodied and well-balanced, flavors of fresh fruit salad, and creme brulee intermingle on the palate. The long finish and soft acidity makes it a great food pairing with calamari and spicy aioli sauce, and grilled chicken.

TASTING NOTES

Smoking Loon Chardonnay opens with aromas of pineapple, pear and baked apple. Creamy and medium-bodied, the wine is nicely balanced with a soft lingering finish, ideal for pairing with foods such as hummus with pita chips or shrimp pasta.

title: Smoking Loon The Original Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Smoking Loon The Original Cabernet Sauvignon

Smoking Loon Cabernet Sauvignon offers the palate ripe blackberry, black currant notes and balances with vanilla and coconut from the American oak aging. This Sauvignon has aromas of blackberry liqueur, oak, spearmint and kola nut. This medium-bodied wine pairs with grilled steak, roasted vegetables and braised short ribs.

TASTING NOTES

Smoking Loon Cabernet Sauvignon has vibrant aromas of blackberry and boysenberry fruit along with pleasant f loral notes framed by the use of American and French oak. The French oak brings vanilla aromas that work well with cherry and blackberry fruit f lavors. The use of American oak helps provide a smooth, silky tannin structure. This medium-bodied Cabernet Sauvignon is approachable, well-balanced and lends a long lasting, flavorful finish.

title: Smoking Loon Unoaked Chardonnay
body_html:
Smoking Loon Unoaked Chardonnay

The Smoking Loon Steelbird Unoaked Chardonnay is a medium-bodied Chardonnay with a floral bouquet of honeysuckle and orange blossom, followed by notes of apricot, pear nectar and ruby red grapefruit and Fuji red apple. This Chardonnay pairs with vibrant foods like lobster, crab, salads, butter based sauces and tomato-based dishes.

TASTING NOTES

Smoking Loon “Steelbird” Chardonnay represents the true characteristics of Chardonnay, free from the influence of oak aging. 100% stainless steel aging allows vibrant aromas and flavors of pineapple, green apple and lemon rind to shine through. Refreshing yet rich flavors are rounded out by a pleasant citrus acidity. With a creamy, silky mouthfeel—obtained by re-suspending the lees during tank aging—and persistent finish, our unoaked Chardonnay is in a league of its own. A bright medium length finish make this a versatile food-pairing wine. Serve our “Steelbird” Chardonnay with light appetizers, seafood, grilled vegetables and spicy Mexican or Indian dishes.

title: Smoking Loon Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Smoking Loon Sauvignon Blanc

The Smoking Loon Sauvignon Blanc has plenty of bright aromas like lychee, lime and granny smith apples but the flavors are what really set it apart. The sweetness of each of these flavors over a base white wine makes it pair perfectly with grilled shrimp or Asian-inspired barbeque chicken for an ideal finish.

TASTING NOTES

Smoking Loon Chilean Sauvignon Blanc opens bright and lively, with aromas of guava, lime zest, and pomelo fruit notes. Aged eight months in stainless steel, this refreshing Sauvignon Blanc delivers a vibrant acidic structure with a mouthful of flavors of Meyer lemon, key lime and bright citrus on the finish.

title: Smoking Loon Pinot Noir
body_html:
Smoking Loon Pinot Noir

Fruity wine lovers will be delighted to find Smoking Loon Pinot Noir. The combination of cherry, tart raspberries, vanilla and fresh button mushrooms gives the wine both a fruitful and earthy taste, with a hint of thyme. Smoking Loon Pinot Noir goes particularly well with fish, especially salmon, pork, and mushrooms.

TASTING NOTES

Smoking Loon Pinot Noir features aromas and flavors of vanilla, wild strawberry and juicy cranberry. The light fruit flavors balance with notes of herbal flavors in this every day wine. Try pairing with baked salmon with a pecan panko crust, garlic rosemary pork loin or roasted mushrooms in a browned butter and garlic thyme sauce.

title: Smoking Loon Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Smoking Loon Pinot Grigio

Invite the crisp, lush taste of Smoking Loon Pinot Grigio to your next gathering. Take in the bright aromas of lemon peel and pear, while flavors of citrus, green apples, and subtle minerals appease the palate. This light straw colored wine pairs well with creamy pasta dishes and light seafood.

TASTING NOTES

Smoking Loon Pinot Grigio opens with bright aromas of lemon meringue and honey suckle blossom offering a light straw color with almost a platinum hue. Refreshing and bright, this medium bodied Pinot Grigio offers juicy kiwi and red apple favors. Crisp acidity and a zesty finish make this wine a versatile food wine.

title: Smoking Loon Merlot
body_html:
Smoking Loon Merlot

Smoking Loon Merlot from Chilean grapes, with cranberry, black currant, and toasted oak aromas. Warm days and cool nights give this Merlot extra intensity and a good structure. Smooth, crisp finish. Makes a great wine to go with your hearty flavorful dinner, from a grilled steak to a deep dish pepperoni pizza.

title: Smoking Loon El Carancho Malbec
body_html:
Smoking Loon El Carancho Malbec

Smoking Loon El Carancho Malbec is a sweet and savory Malbec wine with complex aromas of root beer, wild strawberry and mint. The palate of blueberry, caramel and fig make a delightful balance. This Malbec pairs well bold flavors, juicy meats, stews, or sweet and spicy sauces on the barbecue.

TASTING NOTES

Our Smoking Loon Malbec opens with aromas of crushed raspberry and hints of leather. On the palate, bright fruit and oak flavors mingle with notes of crushed oregano and cinnamon spice. A medium-bodied, fruit-forward style of Malbec with a soft, lingering finish.

title: Apothic Wines Rose Winemaker's Blend
body_html:
Apothic Wines Rose Winemaker's Blend

Light in color yet deliciously bold in flavor, the unique Apothic Rose Limited Release is a wine unlike any other. Crafted from the combination of Zinfandel and Cabernet Sauvignon crops and treated using a process known as saignée that extracts the most color and depth from each grape, every sip is more satisfying than the last. Boasting a rich yet fruity profile with hints of watermelon, raspberry, and strawberry, this wine pairs perfectly with cheese and charcuterie.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Rose

title: Black Box Shiraz
body_html:
Black Box Shiraz

Savor the rich cherry and plum flavors with hints of vanilla in the Black Box Shiraz. Bursting with luxurious fruit and tempered with traces of oak, this smooth, full-bodied wine hits all the right notes. Enjoy it with spicy stews, lamb roasts, or grilled steak.

title: Black Box Riesling
body_html:
Black Box Riesling

Unlike most box wines, Black Box Riesling enjoys the prestige of being strong on excellent flavor. Its harmonious mix of peach and green apple is blended with hints of honey and vanilla, which create a touch of sweetness. The smooth savoriness is balanced with kick of acidity to bring it to a sparkling finish. The wine is best when paired with a salmon pesto dish.

title: Black Box Red Elegance
body_html:
Black Box Red Elegance

Lose the bottle and embrace the box with Black Box Wines Red Elegance. This fruity berry blend coats the tongue then leaves a savory finish of sweet chocolate. Black Box Red Elegance elevates grilled meats and doubles as a dessert wine for chocolate-based delicacies.

title: Black Box Pinot Noir
body_html:
Black Box Pinot Noir

Black Box Pinot Noir displays enticing aromas of strawberry, cherry, and rose petal with complementary notes of toasty oak. Fresh berry and cocoa flavors lead to a delicate, lingering finish. Delicious with herb-roasted chicken, baked ham, mild cheeses and tapas.

title: Black Box Merlot
body_html:
Black Box Merlot

Black Box Merlot Wine displays aromas of leathery plums and cinnamon-spiced oak. The palate is smooth, medium weight and aged textured with a sweet red currant taste. It has a long finish that is warm with reserved tannins. The acidity in it allows it to be paired with a lot of foods like hamburgers.

The classic American meal of a big juicy is the best food that can be paired with Merlot as long as there are no sweet BBQ sauces on the burger. It also goes well with most cheeses that can be put on a cheeseburger. Braised short ribs go well with Merlot as well. Peppercorn crusted filet mignon with a balsamic red wine pair extremely well with this wine. The last food that will make this Merlot marvelous is a plate of spicy jambalaya. The rich and spicy flavors are a great compliment for Merlot’s balanced fruit and tannins, and its acid offsets the acid in the tomatoes. If you serve any of this meals with the Black Box Merlot, it will make your meal a very marvelous one.

title: Black Box Malbec
body_html:
Black Box Malbec

Award winning Black Box Malbec has luscious floral and cherry aromas. The palate is dry and medium-bodied, with juicy blueberry flavors and hints of tobacco and chocolate. The earthy, robust structure and well-balanced acidity lead to a smooth finish. Malbec pairs well with juicy steaks, grilled meats and vegetables.

title: Gekkeikan Horin Ultra Premium Junmai Daiginjo Sake
body_html:
Gekkeikan Horin Ultra Premium Junmai Daiginjo Sake

The Gekkeikan Horin Ultra Premium Junmai Daiginjo Sake is a mild and fruity delicacy mixes cantaloupe, honeydew, with a hint of pear to give you a flavour that has to be tasted to be believed. The sake masters at Gekkeikan have combined fresh spring water with two premium types of sake rice for a smooth aroma that will refresh your body.

title: The Federalist Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
The Federalist Cabernet Sauvignon

The Federalist Cabernet Sauvignon is an American wine from the region of California, created in honor of Benjamin Franklin. This revolutionary full-bodied wine will tickle your palette with the rich texture of cardamom, spicy black pepper, and oak along with ripe fruit. The perfect choice when serving beef or duck or uncork a bottle for your next barbeque.

title: The Federalist Zinfandel
body_html:
The Federalist Zinfandel

The Federalist Zinfandel is a wine that was created to cause a great deal of change by paying homage to the first president of the United States, George Washington. Just like Mr. Washington and the rest of our founding fathers, this wine offers bold and original expressions of this truly American grape. This wine brings together all of the founding fathers love of wine, some of them that owned their own vineyards, with the historic appellation title known for its old vine Zinfandel. All of this came together to make a revolutionary wine. There are many foods that fare well with this fabulous wine as well.

No matter whether you need a meat or just a cheese, there are a lot of foods that fare well with Zinfandel wine. If you need a meat to go with it, pork, beef, lamb, italian sausage, spare ribs. Brisket, and venison go well with it. When it comes to poultry dishes, you can serve turkey, duck, quail, pheasant, and chicken. For pasta and Zinfandel meals, serve lasagna, cannoli, and spaghetti with this wine. Seafood and fish meals that go good with this wine are: tuna, Cioppino, and Bouillabaisse. Pizza, beef stew, and chili are cold night meals that will make this wine even more marvelous. To season the foods that you serve with this wine, Black Pepper, Basil, Thyme, Italian Parsley, Bay Leaf, and Fennel will spice up the taste of this wine. Cheeses that go well with this wine are: Parmesan, Aged Cheddar, Aged Gouda, Asiago, and Dry Jack.

This wine is like a part of our history and is part of the heart of our nation. With every sip of this wine, you are honoring our founders by drinking of a wine that was created in homage to all the honorable things that they did for our country and the whole world as well.

title: The Federalist Chardonnay
body_html:
The Federalist Chardonnay

The Federalist Chardonnay pays homage to the work of our Federalist Founding Fathers fighting for our country's liberty. We decided the Statue of Liberty was the best symbol of their accomplishment - she stands tall, exposing drinkers to the rich flavors, ripe fruits, and bright acidity of Sonoma chardonnay. It is full-bodied with a long, lingering finish. Our Chardonnay boasts an oak backbone balanced with big fruit flavors and a nice acidity.

title: Simple Life Chardonnay
body_html:
Simple Life Chardonnay

Simple Life Chardonnay is a truly bright and fruity white wine with sunny and crisp flavors. Tropical fruit flavors like lime, juicy ripe pineapple, and orange zest characterize this light and refreshing wine. This Simple Life Chardonnay pairs deliciously with grilled chicken as well as pasta dishes. Pork tenderloin is also tasty with this white wine.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: Hahn Family Wines Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Hahn Family Wines Cabernet Sauvignon

There are times when all you want is a nice smooth glass of wine to top off your day and this Hahn Family Wines Cabernet Sauvignon is just the wine for the occasion. This wine has a rich fruit flavor characterized by flavors of fresh red cherries and hearty berries. If you are feeling adventurous, pair the Hahn Family Wines Cabernet Sauvignon with a venison dish and if you are feeling more traditional, a basic steak or beef roast will also pair well with it.

title: Tozai Blossoms Of Peace Umeshu
body_html:
Tozai Blossoms Of Peace Umeshu

Sake connoisseurs seeking a sake with a difference will be delighted to find Tozai blossoms of peace umeshu. The semi-sweet liquid offers a palette of ripe plums soaked for three months in Japanese sake, combined with a hint of almond and marzipan. Best served with glazed salmon, pulled pork or even peach cobbler.

title: Tormaresca Pietrabianca Castel del Monte
body_html:
Tormaresca Pietrabianca Castel del Monte

Get a taste of Puglia in sunny Italy with this Tormaresca Pietrabianca Castel del Monte Chardonnay. You’ll catch a whiff of citrus fruit, a light floral sensation and vanilla before tasting the freshness of white grapefruit, pears, apricots, white flowers and stone fruit. Enjoy on its own or serve with seafood, river fish or cheeses.

title: Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Estate S.L.V Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Estate S.L.V Cabernet Sauvignon

This Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Estate S.L.V Cabernet Sauvignon is special 40th anniversary edition of one of Stag's Leap's finest wines. It is a bold red wine with a powerful and rich flavor. With the flavors of black currants and ripe wild berries, this wine has a robust fruitiness. Added to that are hints of warm vanilla and licorice creating a smooth yet complex flavor profile/ Pair the Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Estate S.L.V Cabernet Sauvignon with earthy dishes like a roasted rack of lamb or classic juicy steak.

title: Tozai Junmai Nigori Snow Maiden Sake
body_html:
Tozai Junmai Nigori Snow Maiden Sake

Tozai Junmai Nigori Snow Maiden Sake appropriately carries the image of a coy its label as the sake is named after Japan’s most famous coy named Hanako. With its rice and fruit combination, the sake has a creamy fruity taste of radish, raw pumpkin, and honeydew melon. Best served with spicy foods, seafood or pork.

title: Line 39 Petite Sirah
body_html:
Line 39 Petite Sirah

Grown on the north coast of California, Line 39 Petite Sirah is a mixture of grapes, a bouquet of red and black fruits, oak and a sprinkling of baking spices. With its alluring aroma and full bodied taste, it’s the perfect choice for a dinner party when you are serving read meats.

title: Kuleto Estate Native Son
body_html:
Kuleto Estate Native Son

Kuleto Estate Native Son red wine is a culmination of various types of red grapes that give it an eclectic flavor and color. Notice the floral nose of violets and roses. Let your palate grasp its fruity notes of blueberries, currants, and raspberries. Savor the finish of earthy cedar, rich vanilla, and toasty mocha. A delicious table wine that is great with a pasta with a rich meaty Bolognese sauce.

title: Bodega Tapiz 'Zolo' Reserva Malbec
body_html:
Bodega Tapiz Zolo Reserva Malbec

Enjoy the great taste of grapes every time you taste Bodega Tapiz 'Zolo' Reserva Malbec. This fruity drink is a bold red wine that has a nice taste and strong appeal. Use Malbec paired with most beef and venison dishes such as a hearty New York strip or a filet mignon, and you will have a dinner that is a feast for the eyes.

title: Beau Joie Special Cuvee Brut Rose
body_html:
Bertrand Senecourt Beau Joie Special Cuvee Brut Rose

Beau Joie Special Cuvee Brut Rose is a festive and lively sparkling wine with a crisp and sultry finish. Hints of watermelon, strawberry and citrus on the nose make this celebratory champagne perfect to pair with tapenade or a Niçoise salad, a paella or grilled chicken, fish or lamb.

Light, crisp taste, which is fresh and fruity, with the color of delicate rose petals. BEAU ROSÉ has just the right balance of sweetness to make an evening of a bottle with someone to remember.

title: Tapiz Black Tears Malbec
body_html:
Bodega Tapiz Black Tears Malbec

 

Bodega Tapiz Black Tears Malbec is an incredible, deliciously crisp, complex wine that features the intense flavors and aromas of vine-ripened blackberry, roasted plum, lemon peel, and oak. With muscular tannins and savory flavors, enjoy a bottle with slow-roasted leg of lamb, or marinated skirt steak with grilled vegetables.

TASTING NOTES
Intense pruplish red color. Flavors and aromas reminiscent of ripe red fruits, dried plums, figs, fruits compote and jams. Has a nose with very subtle floral and menthol notes. Its passage through oak
provides notes of dark chocolate and roasted coffee. Presence of sweet and ripe tannins. A specimen with an elegant personality, intense in flavor and an impeccable balance.

Read more about Tapiz Black Tears Malbec Wine here...

AWARDS
Black Tears 2013 - 92 Pts - Wine Enthusiast
Black Tears 2012 - 93 Pts - James Suckling
Black Tears 2012 - 91 Pts - Wine Advocate
Black Tears 2012 - 93 Pts - Wine Enthusiast
Black Tears 2012 - 91 Pts + Editor's - Guía Descorchados 2017
Black Tears 2011 - 94 points + Editor's Choice + #100 Top 100 Wines of 2016 - Wine Enthusiast

  • Varietal
  • Current

title: Chalk Hill Chardonnay
body_html:
Chalk Hill Chardonnay

Chalk Hill Chardonnay has a zesty and pungent aroma of cloves, lemons, and vanilla. Tastes the balanced acidity of lemon cream, tangerine, velvety vanilla, and the minerality of wet stone. This flavorful white wine is great for any occasion or even a typical weeknight meal. It is wonderful with a succulent roast chicken, root vegetables, or even pasta with fresh shrimp or crab.

title: Altvs Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Altvs Cabernet Sauvignon

Altvs Cabernet Sauvignon, a luxury class wine grown in California’s famous Napa Valley. Offering a full-bodied taste, this delicious red wine is harvested and produced in extremely small batches, which only adds to its exclusivity. Paired with a pasta dish and Caesar salad, you will impress everyone at your dinner table.

title: Boneshaker Lodi Zinfandel
body_html:
Hahn Family Wines Boneshaker Zinfandel

Notice the aroma of black cherry jam and dried plums along with a hint of vanilla as you pour your first glass of Hahn Family Wines Boneshaker Lodi Zinfandel. Notice its rich, deep brick red and deep purple color. As you take a sip, notice the flavors of black licorice, dark chocolate, and blackberries. This delicious zinfandel makes an excellent pairing with a juicy hamburger with sautéed mushrooms, or a rich, meaty chili.

title: Rutherford Ranch Two Range Red
body_html:
Rutherford Ranch Two Range Red

Rutherford Ranch Two Range Red is a supple wine that hails from the world-renowned wine growing region of Napa Valley. Rich and full-bodied, the flavor and aroma of this wine features ripe black cherry, fresh raspberry and smooth dark chocolate.

Enjoy a glass of Rutherford Ranch Two Range Red with braised short ribs, or a spicy steak fresh off of the grill.

title: San Antonio Winery Villadoro Moscato
body_html:
San Antonio Winery Villadoro Moscato

As you pour a glass of San Antonio Villadoro Moscato notice the beauty of its golden straw color. Take note of its fragrant aroma of its fragrant aroma of honeysuckle and wildflowers. Let your palate and tongue savor the sweet flavors of honey and peaches. This delicate fruity white wine is perfect during summertime for a barbecue, with a fresh Cobb salad, or a light fruit and cheese platter.

title: SeaGlass Riesling
body_html:
Top Selling Riesling SeaGlass Riesling

Monterey County combines cool ocean air and minimal rainfall with a longer growing season, which provide SeaGlass Riesling with a characteristic sweetness that is influenced by more subtle hints of pear, peach, and honey. Get my bottle now

Stimulate the appetite

Its main use is being served before the meal in order to stimulate the appetite, but it can also be paired with ribs and lobster to spectacular effect. See more options

TASTING NOTES

The aromatic nose of our Riesling showcases ripe apricot, sweet peach and tropical fruit, framed by floral undertones. White flowers on the palate are supported by flavors of juicy apricot, peach and melon, with hints of honeysuckle. A balanced acidity leads to a lingering finish in an off-dry style. This Riesling pairs well with spicy Asian dishes, smoked salmon, lobster salad and blue cheese.

title: SeaGlass Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
SeaGlass Sauvignon Blanc

Fermented at cold temperatures to preserve its tropical flavor, SeaGlass Sauvignon Blanc combines the taste of tangerines and gooseberries with the smell of lime, lemon, and fresh-mown grass to create a clean and crisp beverage that is sure to please. Its tart finish makes it well-suited for cheeses made with garlic and herbs, grilled fish, and all sorts of other grilled seafood.

TASTING NOTES

This Central Coast Sauvignon Blanc has exhilarating aromas of lemon, lime, grapefruit and fresh cut grass. A clean, crisp palate of gooseberry, tangerine and a touch of minerality paves the way for mouthwatering acidity and a lightly tart finish.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Sauvignon Blanc

title: SeaGlass Pinot Grigio
body_html:
SeaGlass Pinot Grigio

The SeaGlass Pinot Grigio is a crisp and light white wine with a wonderful minerality and a delightfully tart finish. With rich fruity flavors of apples and decadent ripe pears as well as hints of grapefruit and tangerines, this SeaGlass Pinot Grigio pairs well with seafood dishes like fresh scallops or grilled white fish.

TASTING NOTES

The Central Coasts unique coastal terroir shines brightly in this crisp, clean Pinot Grigio. Lovely aromas of lemongrass, grapefruit and honeysuckle lead to decadent flavors of ripe pear, apple and hints of tangerine. A touch of minerality on the palate is balanced by mouthwatering acidity and a light, tart finish. Extraordinarily food-friendly, this Pinot Grigio f its naturally alongside seafood or Asian fare with a hint of spice.

title: SeaGlass Pinot Noir
body_html:
SeaGlass Pinot Noir

Grown in Santa Barbara, the grapes used in SeaGlass Pinot Noir have been permitted to ripen in a slow, even manner, which provides it with an intriguing tartness as well as a complex blend of fruit flavors. As a result, this particular wine is perfect for pairing with either lamb, grilled salmon, or earthier mushrooms.

TASTING NOTES

This Pinot Noir is a quintessential expression of Central Coast cool-climate vines, with its elegant, light-bodied style. Delicate aromas hint at the bright red cherry, cranberry, and strawberry flavors on the palate. Beautifully balanced with vibrant acidity, this wine is the ideal complement for grilled salmon, lamb, and earthy mushrooms.

title: Beau Joie Champagne Brut
body_html:
Beau Joie Brut Champagne

Beau Joie Champagne Brut is a blend of 60% pinot noir and 40% chardonnay grapes. This zero dosage champagne has notes of flowers and yeast. The tastes are citrus and apple with a perfect balance of sweet to dry. Pairs well with dark chocolate or berries of any kind.

A unique, zero-dosage champagne with none of the added sugars common in other champagnes, BEAU’s true, uninhibited flavors rise through to the palate, boasting the perfect balance of dryness and sweetness resulting in a clean, crisp taste from start to finish.

title: Wagner Family Red Schooner Voyage 4 by Caymus
body_html:
Voyage 4 Red Schooner Red Wine of the World

Beautiful Argentina is legendary in the production of fine Malbec wine. Inspired to create Red Schooner, we designed an efficient method to ship grapes over ocean waters while retaining their precious qualities. Our plan was to pinpoint a high-caliber vineyard on the slopes of the Andes Mountains, then harvest and chill the fruit, transporting our valuable cargo by sea voyage to Caymus Vineyards. The fruit arrived in excellent condition, looking as though it had just been harvested. We used great care to extract deep color and rich tannins through a slow and delicate fermentation.

The wine was then aged 16 months in French oak barrels (50% new) before bottling in June 2015. Each annual release of Red Schooner will be a designated sequential voyage - this bottling is Red Schooner Voyage 4.

title: Daou Vineyards Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Daou Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon

Sometimes, you want to just unwind after a long day with a glass of wine with strong flavors and a long smooth finish.

With this Daou Vineyards Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon, you can do just that. Enjoy the flavors of black currants, plums, vanilla, and ripe blueberries, along with just a hint of pipe tobacco.

Pair this Daou Vineyards Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon with a slow-roasted beef dish or braised short ribs.

title: Barefoot Cellars Moscato
body_html:
Barefoot Moscato

When you are looking for a spectacularly sweet white wine with a delicious fresh, fruity flavor, you can do not better than this Barefoot Cellars Moscato. Flavors of ripe peaches along with notes of orange citrus make this wine absolutely delectable and a perfect pairing with a savory cheese tray or with fruit for dessert.

title: Barefoot Cellars Sangria
body_html:
Barefoot Sangria

Barefoot Cellars Sangria has a red wine base with flavors of orange, grapefruit, berry and lemon. Served over ice with fresh sliced fruit, this sweet summery drink pairs well with fish tacos, blackened chicken or calamari, shrimp and fish. For dessert try fruit tarts and yogurt dishes. A crowd pleaser.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Chateau Ste Michelle Sauvignon Blanc

This Chateau Ste. Michelle Sauvignon Blanc is a crisp and sharp white wine that is light and refreshing. With delicious notes of ripe and summery melons, peaches, and apples as well as unique herbaceous notes, this sauvignon blanc is best paired with fresh seafood. Try the Chateau Ste. Michell Sauvignon Blanc with oysters or mussels for a truly transcendent experience.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Gewurztraminer
body_html:
Chateau Ste Michelle Gewurztraminer

Refresh after a long day with a glass of Chateau Ste. Michelle Gewurztraminer. This zingy wine has pear and tangerine flavors with a lively finish, but high acidity lowers the perceived sweetness. Try Chateau Ste. Michelle Gewurztraminer not with dessert but with pan-fried chicken and fresh vegetables.

title: Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Pinot Gris
body_html:
Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Pinot Gris

Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Pinot Gris contains ripe citrus flavors with rich aromas of melon and peach. The balance between ripe, juicy fruit flavors and crisp acidity make this a very refreshing medium-bodied wine. The bright fruitiness and layered texture make the crisp, dry finish a pleasant surprise. Great on a picnic, this ideal summer wine is delicious with smoked fish, fried chicken and prosciutto-wrapped asparagus.

TASTING NOTES

ripe citrus with rich aromas of tropical mango, melon and juicy pear

title: Ravage Knight Fall Dark Red Blend
body_html:
Ravage Knight Fall Dark Red Blend

Filled with black cherry and spices, the Ravage Knight Fall Dark Red Blend is designed to give you just a hint of spice with plenty of boldness to back it up. This wine is very dark, decedent and smooth and the Knight Fall blend makes it even more unique for beef, veal and lamb.

title: Coastal Estates Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Coastal Estates Cabernet Sauvignon

Notice the fruity forward, earthy taste, and notes of rich oak as you let the taste of Coastal Estates Cabernet Sauvignon engulf your palate. Taste sweetness of dark, ripe berries. Memorize its light tannin and distinct boldness with each sip that you take. Try this rich, dark wine with a nice rare, top sirloin steak, cappelini pasta with a zesty tomato sauce, or a simple piece of fine, dark chocolate.

title: Coastal Estates Merlot
body_html:
Coastal Estates Merlot

The oastal Estates Merlot is a rich and hearty addition to your meal. This five-time award winning wine is a smart choice for those who appreciate a young, ardent flavor. Crafted in the foothills of the Mayacamas Mountains, this vigorous merlot pairs well with a tricolor stuffed pork loin and roasted parsnip and potato medley.

title: Coastal Estates Pinot Noir
body_html:
Coastal Estates Pinot Noir

The Coastal Estates Pinot Noir pairs excellently with pork. Flavored excellently with plum, toasted oak and strawberry, you'll love the sweetness and the simplicity that comes along with it. This mildly acidic wine has a berry fragrance and plenty of fruitiness everywhere, which goes well with the off dry style of the wine.

title: Bodegas Honoro Vera Red Blend
body_html:
Bodegas Honoro Vera Red Blend

The bold, exotic spiciness resembling white pepper finish this Bodegas Honoro Vera Red Blend wine; while enticing aromas of dark plums and sweet cherries tempt your senses. The ripest grapes are carefully chosen from age-old vineyards on the hills of Calatayud, then fermented in French oak barrels for two months. Enjoy with Chilaquiles Verdes, a perfect pair.

title: Bodegas Honoro Vera Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Bodegas Honoro Vera Cabernet Sauvignon

The Bodegas Cabernet Sauvignon has a soft texture, is fully bodied, and is also well balanced. It is also a widely ripened wine with a moderate depth and a long finish. It is flavored with plum, cherry, red licorice, and modest oak. There are a lot of foods that go best with the Bodega Cabernet Sauvignon.

When you are searching for a main dish to serve with this delightful wine, you can serve beef dishes that are grilled, stewed roasted and braised dishes like braised lamb or venison. You can also serve foie gras with truffles, game and game birds, lamb (especially roasted or rack of lamb), Osso Bucco, pasta dishes especially those that have cream sauce on them, steak, and short ribs. If you are in need of a cheese to serve with this wine, Roquefort, blue cheese, and Camembert are good choices. For a side dish, you can serve roasted eggplant, lentils, potatoes, and risotto. Lastly, if you need a spice to use, use mint, mustard, black pepper, rosemary, and thyme.

These foods are best to serve with Bodegas Cabernet Sauvignon and will make a good meal a great meal when you pair this wine with any of these wonderful foods.

title: Sonoma-Cutrer Chardonnay
body_html:
Sonoma-Cutrer Chardonnay

Awarded 2017 San Francisco Chronicle Wine Competition: Gold

The Sonoma-Cutrer Chardonnay has a rich texture, a lovely mid-palate creamy richness, and a bright acidity that leads to a finish with a long richness of flavor. There are complex distinctive and very pleasant smells that consist of caramel, roasted nuts, honey, fresh Bosc pear, ripe peach, nectarine, and honeydew melon. These wonderful smells are accented with nougat, brown sugar, baking spice, and red apple. The flavors of peach, apple, and creme brulee mix together with a small amount of butterscotch, apple, pie crust just out of the oven, and baked apples with just a taste of light vanilla and oak spice. There are many wonderful different types of cuisine that pair well with this Chardonnay. Many different types of cuisine from appetizers to desserts pair well with Chardonnay. If you want to serve a cheese, serve Provolone, Gruyere, or Mild Cheddar cheese. When it comes to an appetizer, serve crab cakes, olives, oysters, stuffed clams, and smoked salmon. For those of you that desire a main dish, serve chicken, pork, or shrimp with cream sauce and Caribbean cuisine. At the end of the meal, finish it with these fruits: mango, pineapple, and honeydew. These cuisine items will help you complete your meal with Chardonnay from beginning to end.

The Sonoma Coast is as much about lifestyle as it is about the celebration that this wonderful grape deserves. Our winemakers are selective about the fruit that goes into this wine to ensure that vintage after vintage, we are producing an exceptional Chardonnay. This wine has all of the elements of a classic Chardonnay. It is a wine you serve when you want to show people you care about them. Or, sometimes it’s just for you – because you have earned it.

Aromas of nectarine, stone fruit, white peach and oak spice are accented with hints of vanilla, toasted nuts and a touch of butterscotch and light caramel with a subtle cinnamon spice undertone. This wine has the distinctive Sonoma-Cutrer balance between elegance and richness for a medium-bodied, mouth-filling wine. The creamy texture of this wine offers flavors of ripe pear and peach that is balanced with a nice, bright acidity. There is lots of finesse’ to the long, silky finish highlighted with long barrel spice notes.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: Sonoma-Cutrer Grower Vintner Russian River Valley Pinot Noir
body_html:
Sonoma-Cutrer Grower Vintner Russian River Valley Pinot Noir

When you are looking for a delicious deep and rich red wine, the Sonoma-Cutrer Grower Vintner Russian River Valley Pinot Noir is the right choice for you. This red wine features flavors of fresh wild strawberries and rich red bing cherries along with cocoa and warm spice. Pair the Sonoma-Cutrer Grower Vintner Russian River Valley Pinot Noir with a juicy red steak or rack of lamb.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Tinto Negro Malbec
body_html:
Top Selling Malbec

Tinto Negro Malbec

The Tinto Negro Malbec offers intense floral scents upon uncorking and features the traditional cool climate style found within most Malbecs. See more about this Malbec

Strong flavor of dark fruits and a refined texture

Upon touching the palate, the strong flavor of dark fruits and a refined texture becomes apparent. The six month french oak aged Tinto Negro Malbec pairs perfectly with steak, spaghetti & meatballs, lamb shanks, and dark chocolate. See more options!

title: Tom Gore Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Tom Gore Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

The Tom Gore Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc is a deliciously bright white wine with flavors of lime, tangerine, and citrus. This wine's finish is crisp and wonderfully acidic. Pair the Tom Gore Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc with a fresh bright salad of spring lettuce or even fresh spinach to bring out the flavors of the vegetables as well as the wine itself.

title: Tom Gore Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Tom Gore Vineyards Chardonnay

Tom Gore Vineyards Chardonnay is a creamy textured, full finish Chardonnay. It has aromas of vanilla and ripe apple and initially hits the palate with the flavor of unripe pear before finishing with notes of citrus. Tom Gore Vineyards recommends pairing their Chardonnay with baked salmon with fennel yogurt sauce.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Cabernet Sauvignon

The Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Cabernet Sauvignon is perfectly paired with stuffed peppers and bleu cheese and duck, veal or lamb. Filled with dark fruity flavors like plum as well as aromas of spice, vanilla, dill and deep bruits you're definitely going to love this wine with your next meal.

TASTING NOTES

Since 1967, the dedicated winemakers at Chateau Ste. Michelle have crafted some of the most spectacular wines in the world - notably through the meticulous approach to Indian Wells. Specially selected and carefully aged, this premier Cabernet Sauvignon showcases a lush texture and concentrated flavors of blackberry and black cherry.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Red Blend
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Red Blend

The Chateau Ste. Michelle Indian Wells Red Blend is designed with flavors of thick boysenberry. It pairs well with nearly all types of meat including duck, veal, lamb, beef and venison. With fruity flavors of pear and apricot, this wine is dry but creamy at the same time, for a smooth finish.

TASTING NOTES

Specifically selected and carefully aged, this premier red blend highlights warm-weather vineyards with a robust palette of boysenberry and biscotti.

title: Clos Pegase Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Clos Pegase Cabernet Sauvignon

The Clos Pegase Cabernet Sauvignon is flavored with a number of fruits including black cherry and blackberry liqueur. Even more, this is accented with flavors of black pepper, sage and violets that create a rich and full flavor that is perfectly balanced and ripe. This wine pairs wonderfully with Mexican food, beef, lamb and smoked meats.

title: Nobilo Regional Collection Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Nobilo Regional Collection Sauvignon Blanc

The Nobilo Regional Collection Sauvignon Blanc is a light yellow, citrusy wine that pairs well with the flavors of lemon-herb chicken and summer salad. At first impression, notes of guava and nettle hit the nose and introduce the balanced tropical flavors of pineapple and passionfruit, with subtle hints of nettle.

title: Union Wine Co. Underwood Pinot Gris
body_html:
Union Wine Co. Underwood Pinot Gris

Looking for something a little different and unique? Union Wine Co. Underwood Pinot Gris is wine that comes in cans instead of the traditional bottle, so you can enjoy it just like your favorite beer. With flavors of peach, grapefruit and pear you're definitely going to love the fruitiness and the little bit of acid from the lemon. It pairs very well with a nice cheese.

title: Bota Box Shiraz 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Shiraz

With a mixture of blackberry, cherry, and blueberry, Bota Box Shiraz is a wine impossible to pass up! A tinge of white pepper and plum offer this fruity mixture an ambiance allowing for a smooth and flavorful zest. Bota Box Shiraz is best when paired with a grilled meat or any type of moderately spicy food.

The Bota Box Shiraz is an excellent wine with grilled meats and only slightly spicy foods or even aged cheese. The medium body of the wine, alongside flavors of blueberry jam and cherry accent it perfectly. The aromas of blackberry and plum alongside white pepper give just the right amount of spiciness.

title: Bota Box Old Vine Zinfandel 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Old Vine Zinfandel

Your nose will notice the fruity aromas of black cherries, blackberries, and earthy-rich toasted oak while you begin to take your first sip of Bota Box Old Vine Zinfandel. Notice the flavors of fruit jam, oak, and black pepper as you finish each memorable and lingering sip. An excellent wine that can be paired with roasted meat such as prime rib or chicken, or along with a blackberry charlotte dessert.

With heavy and dark scents of toasted oak, black cherry and blackberries, this Bota Box Old Vine Zinfandel has plenty of fruity flavors to accent your palate. You'll catch plenty of that fruitiness with just a little bit of oak and the perfect hint of black pepper coursing through the finish. Pair with roasted pork tenderloin, grilled burgers or chocolate brownies.

title: Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Pinot Noir
body_html:
Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Pinot Noir

The Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Pinot Noir has a dry and silky feel with smoky flavors as well as spices, cola, raspberries and cherries. Brightly acidic with firm tannins, this wine pairs best with duck, goose and other game birds for a perfectly smooth, rich and balanced finish.

The Roots Run Deep Winery 'Educated Guess' Pinot Noir is paired best with duck, goose and other game birds. A smooth and supple wine, it features just the right amount of acidity to counter the lush fruit flavors of wild berry, ripened strawberry and red cherry. Just the right amount of spice and cola finish off the blend.

title: Hypothesis Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Roots Run Deep Hypothesis Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon Oaksville

Deep flavors of blackberry, dark cherry and currant make Roots Run Deep Winery Hypothesis Cabernet Sauvignon a deep wine with firm tannins. The complexity and dryness are perfectly paired with beef and venison for a full flavor that tastes great right away but even better with a few more years of fermentation.

The Roots Run Deep Winery 'Hypothesis' Cabernet Sauvignon is perfectly paired with beef and venison. With dark flavors of blackberry, dark cherry and currant in levels to make a heavy wine, Hypothesis has firm tannins and a deep structure that pairs beautifully with the complexity and dryness of the blend.

title: Yellow Tail Merlot
body_html:
Yellow Tail Merlot

Yellow Tail Merlot is a delicious Australian red wine that delivers with an excellent combined taste of flavorful berries and a touch of spice. Yellow Tail Merlot is soft to taste and fruit driven which makes for a rich flavor. Enjoy the Yellow Tail Merlot with a meat dish, specifically with a barbecue.

Although dry, the tangy zest of Yellow Tail Merlot is smooth and pleasing to the palate. With its fusion of plum, black cherry, and an authentic dash of tobacco, Yellow Tail Merlot can be enjoyed alone or with dinner. This mild, velvety Merlot blend is best when paired with lasagna or a simple chicken dish of your choice.

Style
Soft, velvety, and smooth, [yellow tail] Merlot is an excellent alternative to the heavier and more tannic red varieties.

Aroma
Soft aromas of ripe plums, mulberries, lingering vanilla and the sweet spiciness of Christmas cake.

Flavor
Soft and smooth, with notes of dark plum, mulberries and subtle spice.

Enjoy
With antipasto, good times and great friends.

title: Yellow Tail Big Bold Red
body_html:
Yellow Tail Big Bold Red

Amp up the evening entertainment by passing around glasses of Yellow Tail Big Bold Red. Its dark fruit flavor has hints of spice and vanilla, as well as a rich oak finish that inspires deep conversation. Pair this Yellow Tail Big Bold Red with pepper steak or other spicy fare.

Yellow Tail Big Bold Red is a delicious Australian wine that is fruity and rich. Yellow Tail Big Bold Red is packed with flavors of dark fruits, such as plums; berries and cherries, spices and vanilla. Enjoy the Yellow Tail Big Bold Red with steak in any form for a delicious evening.

Style
Bursting with ripe dark fruits that inspired the name, this wine will keep the taste buds entertained with every sip.

Aroma
Big and bold with aromas of boisterous red fruits and hints of cherry, dark chocolate and oak.

Flavor
Big and bold, jammed with lush dark fruits, spice and a touch of vanilla.

Enjoy
With a pepper steak and good conversation.

title: Yellow Tail Moscato
body_html:
Yellow Tail Moscato

Yellow Tail Moscato is a sweet, slightly effervescent wine featuring the intense flavors and aromas of juicy cantaloupe, ripe pear and tropical fruit. Yellow Tail Moscato's refreshing crispness makes it very versatile, pairing especially well with Szechuan Shrimp, a savory Chinese dish with shrimp, bell peppers, celery, water chestnuts and onion sauteed in a sweet and spicy sauce.

Enjoy dessert even more with a glass of Yellow Tail Moscato. Its zingy flavor provides a sweet counterbalance to spicy Asian foods and is very easy to drink. Yellow Tail Moscato has hints of passionfruit and melon that are refreshing after a long day.

Style
The light, perky fizz is what makes [yellow tail] Moscato a little bit special. The bright fruit flavors and soft palate make it zingy, refreshing and easy to drink.

Aroma
Bright fruit aromas of white peach, passionfruit, and floral orange blossom.

Flavor
Zingy and refreshing, bursting with passionfruit, kiwi and sweet melon flavors.

Enjoy
Chilled on its own, or with spicy Asian-inspired food.

title: Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio

Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio is a delicious Australian white wine. Filled with zest, the wine is packed with citrus flavors and tones of pear and apple. Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio is bursting with lime and pineapple making it tropical and elegant. Pair Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio with seafood such as oysters or shrimp.

Heighten the experience of a balmy summer evening with Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio. Its flavor boasts apples, pears and passionfruit for a fresh, zesty lift during warm weather. Yellow Tail Pinot Grigio tastes great served well-chilled and with Asian-inspired food.

Style
Pinot Grigio is not only great drinking, but excellent for matching with food. It will feel like you've made a little trip to Italy – without the long haul flight!

Aroma
Delightfully fresh, with aromas of pear, hints of red apples and kiwi fruit.

Flavor
Fresh and zesty, bursting with red apple, pear and passionfruit flavors.

Enjoy
With Asian inspired food on a warm summer evening.

title: Yellow Tail Pinot Noir
body_html:
Yellow Tail Pinot Noir

End your evening with a bright, juicy glass of Yellow Tail Pinot Noir. Its deep fruit flavor derives from cherries, red berries and sweet spice, making it a savory wine perfect for late evening. Pair this Yellow Tail Pinot Noir with citrus-glazed Duck or roasted pork tenderloin.

Bursting with flavors and aromas of red berries, fresh cherry, and a hint of dark chocolate, Yellow Tail Pinot Noir fades into an enticing palate of gentle spice and ripe raspberry. Framed in toasted oak, it flows into a velvety smooth finish that pleasantly lingers. Pair this Australian Pinot Noir with savory beef stew, or poached salmon.

Style
Pinot Noir is an ideal red wine for any time of the year. It is bright, juicy and easy to drink.

Aroma
A very pretty aroma of rose petals with berry notes, redcurrant fruit and a hint of mocha.

Flavor
Soft and velvety, with notes of cherries, red berries and a hint of sweet spice.

Enjoy
Slightly chilled at a picnic with friends, or on its own after a long day.

title: Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon 1.5 Liter
body_html:
Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon

1.5 Liter

Cook up a Sunday roast, and invite your family over to share it with a glass of Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon. Its deep flavor profile derives from blackcurrants, mocha and spice and will stand out against even your spiciest dishes. Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon is velvety, rich and leaves you feeling satisfied.

title: Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon

Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon is a light wine which is smooth in texture. With a hint of beef jerky, soy sauce, and light tannins, this select Cabernet version is savory enough to quench your thirst. Furthermore, Yellow Tail Cabernet Sauvignon is best when paired with duck breast canapes, or pulled beef risotto.

Style
Cabernet Sauvignon is fragrant and rich, a perfect wine to accompany a hearty meal.

Aroma
A fragrant aroma of red fruits and blackcurrants fills the nose, along with blackberries and sweet mocha.

Flavor
Classic and velvety, with notes of juicy blackcurrants, sweet mocha and spice.

Enjoy
With a Sunday roast, family and friends.

title: Yellow Tail Chardonnay 1.5 Liter
body_html:
Yellow Tail Chardonnay

1.5 Liter

Plan a romantic picnic in the park with this Yellow Tail Chardonnay. Its flavor has a complex profile of peaches, melon and hints of vanilla, making it very easy to drink on its own. This refreshing Yellow Tail Chardonnay goes well with roast chicken or salmon cakes.

title: Yellow Tail Chardonnay
body_html:
Yellow Tail Chardonnay

Indigenous to Australia, Yellow Tail Chardonnay boasts a complex mixture of honeydew and citrus fruits with a touch of oak flavor. A malleable blend of a light tartness combined with a rich and velvety finish make this elegant yet simple Chardonnay a festive favorite among friends. What's more, Yellow Tail Chardonnay can also be enjoyed when alone. This wine is best when paired with a California Cobb salad or cheese souffle.

Style
An all-time popular varietal, [yellow tail] Chardonnay has a rich creamy finish while being silky smooth and easy to drink.

Aroma
Aromas of melon and white peach fill the nose, with a light spice and vanilla undertone.

Flavor
Rich and vibrant, with fresh peach and melon flavours and a hint of vanilla.

Enjoy
With roast chicken or a picnic in the park.

title: Yellow Tail Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Yellow Tail Sauvignon Blanc

The Yellow Tail Sauvignon Blanc is a delectable and beautifully light and refreshing white wine. Flavor notes of grapefruit and passion-fruit create a citrusy and crisp wine experience. Enjoy this Yellow Tail Sauvignon Blanc with some light seafood fare like a grilled tilapia or fresh crab. It can also be enjoyed with a refreshing summer salad.

Yellow Tail Sauvignon Blanc is a delicious Australian white wine that is easy to drink and great to enjoy with company. The Yellow Tail Sauvignon Blanc is fresh and crisp and filled with flavors of passionfruit and grapefruit. Pair the Yellow Tail Sauvignon Blanc with seafood for an excellent dinner.

Style
Sauvignon Blanc is best known for its drinkability. It is a crisp wine with delicious flavors and a high refreshment factor.

Aroma
Aromas of light citrus and passionfruit with undertones of gooseberry.

Flavor
Crisp and refreshing, bursting with zingy passionfruit and grapefruit flavors.

Enjoy
With seafood, sunshine and great friends.

title: Yellow Tail Shiraz - Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Yellow Tail Shiraz - Cabernet Sauvignon

Yellow Tail Wines, known for being the best Australian made wines, have mastered the heavy fruit flavors found in this Yellow Tail Shiraz-Cabernet Sauvignon. Born from grapes in Australia's dry, hot desert region in the South, this red will remind you of dried plums, chewy dried currants and dark, juicy raisins. Perfectly paired with a slice of mincemeat pie, it is sure to please.

If you have sampled Yellow Tail Shiraz-Cabernet Sauvignon before, taste it all over again. Each year's vintage is unique to the seasonal changes in Australia's wine regions, providing you with a new taste sensation every year. Pair this vintage with a well-seasoned rack of lamb or steaks "on the barbie."

Style
Shiraz and Cabernet are perfectly compatible, offering a full bodied, robust red wine with the perfect blend of savory and spice. This [yellow tail] Shiraz Cabernet is no exception.

Aroma
Dark fruit aromas of rich plum, blackcurrant and raspberry, in addition to mocha, oak and lingering spice.

Flavor
Rich and vibrant, with notes of plums, blackcurrants and a touch of vanilla.

Enjoy
With your favourite pasta dish and good conversation.

title: Yellow Tail Shiraz
body_html:
Yellow Tail Shiraz

Flavored with just the right mix of red berries, spice and licorice, the Yellow Tail Shiraz is a vibrant and smooth wine you're going to love. Paired perfectly with steak, this wine has a fragrance of ripe cherries with a hint of butterscotch that adds just the right amount of sweetness.

Style
Often referred to as the classic Australian red wine, Shiraz is an easy to drink, all-time favourite.

Aroma
Concentrated red cherry and plum is complemented by notes of vanilla, mocha and spice.

Flavor
Rich and smooth, with juicy red berries and hints of vanilla and spice.

Enjoy
With steak or in front of a roaring fire.

title: Yellow Tail Sangria
body_html:
Yellow Tail Sangria

With inspiration from Spanish tradition, the Yellow Tail Sangria is a delightful combination of citrus and red wine. Red berry, orange rind, and citrus notes play nicely on the palette, allowing a hint of alcohol to shimmy through. Enjoy a bottle with freshly grilled shrimp and chicken kabobs with cilantro-lime infused rice.

Savor the vibrant and zesty flavors of fresh citrus in a premium red wine that is inspired by the favorite drink of Spain as you enjoy Yellow Tail Sangria. This sweet wine is a must have for summer with its refreshing flavors of limes, lemons, and oranges. Enjoy with a crisp salad or serve it with your favorite grilled steak at your next barbecue.

Style
Inspired by the traditional drink of Spain, [yellow tail] Sangria combines premium red wine with a splash of sweet citrus. A party favorite!

Aroma
Perfumed aromas with intense mandarin, citrus and orange peel.

Flavor
Sweet and citrusy, bursting with mandarin and orange flavors with a hint of red fruits.

Enjoy
Enjoy in a jug with lots of ice, diced orange and lemon at a party with friends.

title: Korbel Organic Brut Champagne
body_html:
Korbel Cellars California Champagne Organic Brut

Korbel Brut Organic Champagne is ranked at #73 Wine Spectator Top 100 of 2016. With flavors of baked apple and just a little light citrus, the Korbel Cellars California Champagne Organic Brut is a refreshing appetizer wine. Perfectly paired with shellfish, oysters, smoked salmon and caviar, it even goes quite well with sushi and egg dishes. With a medium-dry profile, this organic wine has just the right balance of savoriness at the end, which definitely shows why it won second in the Los Angeles International Wine Competition of 2015, along with several other awards throughout the country.

Korbel Champagne, one of the award winning Top 100 Wine/Champagnes in the country, has all the taste, body, color and bubbly finish you would expect. It is, in fact, America's favorite and most affordable champagne for any special occasion. This Korbel Cellars California Champagne Organic Brut is dry, but with is lovely when paired with freshwater fishes, like orange roughy.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Chardonnay
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Chardonnay

With its natural blend of citrus and light apple comes Chateau Ste. Michelle Chardonnay! Crafted with authentic Chardonnay grapes straight from the vineyards of Columbia Valley, this white wine is aged in a combination of American and French oak barrels for a smooth taste. With a dash of spice, this dinnertime favorite is best when paired with a ham and fresh herb lentil stew dish, or cauliflower gratin with gruyere.

TASTING NOTES

We craft our Columbia Valley Cabernet to highlight concentrated Washington red fruit in an accessible style. This inviting cab is rich with red fruit flavor, the complexity and structure of this Cabernet Sauvignon remains delectable at every sip – especially when paired with beef, game or burgers.

title: Pine Ridge Vineyards Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Pine Ridge Vineyards Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

Pine Ridge Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is jewel-like in color as it sparkles like a ruby and the smell of fresh black raspberry, boysenberry, ripe red plum, red licorice, fragrant cinnamon, and vanilla creme brulee appeals to the nasal passages. The palate is very charming, attractive, and it also has a pleasingly rich and sweet taste and it starts with dark ripe cherry and juicy blackberry that combine with just a taste of white pepper, fresh mint leaf, and berry cola. The complex combination of tastes sticks around through the long finish, supported by polished tannins and integrated oak. There are also some super foods that are perfect to pair with this wine.

Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon is expressive, elegant, and extremely food-friendly. For these reasons, it will pair delightfully with a great number of dishes that include grilled skirt steak with salsa verde to pasta shaped like broad flat ribbons that is usually served with a meat sauce and a rabbit cut into small pieces that are highly seasoned and stewed with vegetables. They also go well with Turkish-style lamb meatballs. To make an unforgettable cheese course, try pairing this wine with Cantal that is a semi-hard cow's milk cheese from the Rhone region of France. These super meals and cheese plate pair well with this wonderful Cabernet Sauvignon.

title: Pine Ridge Chenin Blanc + Viognier
body_html:
Pine Ridge Chenin Blanc + Viognier

The Pine Ridge Chenin Blanc + Viognier offers awesome acidity and inherently sweet flavors. This lively bouquet of honeydew, pomelo and starfruit aromas include hints of soft white florals and spun sugar. The crisp palate leads with the fruit flavors that linger through the finish and pairs well with Asian Cuisine.

title: 14 Hands Winery Kentucky Derby Limited Release Red Blend
body_html:
14 Hands Winery Kentucky Derby Limited Release Red Blend

Like the race it's named for, 14 Hands Winery Kentucky Derby Limited Release Red Blend is a mix of superior breeds, including Merlot, Cabernet Franc, and Petit Verdot. Look for the flavors of plums, black cherries, blackberries, chocolate, and spice. Pair with Italian fare, salads, and roast chicken or pork.

title: 14 Hands Winery Chardonnay
body_html:
14 Hands Winery Chardonnay

14 Hands Winery Chardonnay is a lighter offering, featuring the bright flavor and robust aroma of sweet limes, pears, and a subtle hint of baking spice. Also look for caramel, butter, and vanilla. Pairs especially well with seafood, Caesar salad, roast chicken or pork, Greek cuisine, and grilled salmon.

title: 14 Hands Winery Merlot
body_html:
14 Hands Winery Merlot

14 Hands Winery Merlot is a delightful treat, well-rounded yet structured, with the flavor and aroma of plums, blackberries, cherries, and just a hint of mocha. Like any fine merlot, it goes great with almost any kind of food, but really shines paired with Italian cuisine, salads, and roast chicken.

FOOD PAIRINGS

BBQ Ribs, grilled tri-tip, burgers, spaghetti with red sauce and meatballs.

title: Talbott Vineyards Monterey County Pinot Noir
body_html:
Talbott Vineyards Monterey County Pinot Noir

The Talbott Vineyards Monterey County Pinot Noir exhibits a garnet color or shade, with a youthful intensity and excellent clarity. The smells of this wine that include: fresh, ripe fruit, cherry, and plum lead to signature floral notes and elements of sweet French oak and spicy cinnamon. On the palate, this wine is graceful and stylish in appearance. It also has a very rich texture and amazing ripe fruit and is underscored by a lively acidity that is very refreshing to the palate. This wine pairs well with some very tasty foods as well.

Pinot Noir is a versatile wine and can be paired with a variety of different foods. They include proteins cooked in many different ways, earthy and rustic vegetables, and bright red to black fruits like cherries, cranberries, and plums. For those who wish to dine on meat while drinking this wine, salmon, halibut, trout, all pork dishes, grilled meats from chicken to venison, braised meat, and duck with a cherry gastrique. Other foods that pair well with Pinot Noir are braised stews, and root vegetables and mushrooms. When a person needs a sauce to pair with this wine, they should use butter/cream based sauces, fonds, reductions, gastrique, fumes, roux-based, and tomato based sauces. If they serve Talbott’s Pinot Noir with these tasty dishes, they will find that their meal turns out terrific.

title: Kenwood Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Merlot

From the vineyards of Sonoma County, California, where the best in grapes are harvested comes Kenwood Vineyards Merlot. Its deep red fruit flavor is blended with a shy hint of licorice and a mix of tannin and oak to whet your appetite! This light mixture is best when paired with a soy glazed pork loin.

title: Taylor Fladgate 10 Year Old Tawny Port
body_html:
Taylor Fladgate 10 Year Old Tawny Port

Taylor Fladgate 10 Year Old Tawny Port is fully matured in oak casks which creates its characteristic 'tawny' color. The port combines wood notes and mature fruit for a mellow and elegant palette. Taylor's 10 Year Old Tawny Port will compliment rich desserts accompanied with dark berries and chocolate as well as mature cheeses. This port will complete the end of a meal and is most appropriate for Summer evenings.

TASTING NOTES

Deep brick colour with amber rim. Rich and elegant nose combining aromas of ripe berry fruit with a delicate nuttiness and subtle mellow notes of chocolate, butterscotch and fine oak wood. Smooth and silky on the palate and full of ripe figgy, jammy flavours which persist on the long finish.

title: Savory & James Fino Sherry
body_html:
Savory & James Fino Sherry

Savory and James Fino Sherry is a particularly dry sherry. The sherry's taste is fresh, delicate and has a discreet hazelnut flavor and is light in color. Savory & James Fino Sherry is produced in the Jerez region of Spain. This sherry is best served after a meal alongside a fruit based dessert.

title: Peter Vella Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Peter Vella Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

The Peter Vella Cabernet Sauvignon is offered as a box wine. A light wine with soft notes of cherry fruit, it offers a smooth finish. A great plus in this Cabernet is its versitility. The mellowness pairs well with a steak, bowl of chilli, spicy fajitas or Spanish rice.

title: Menage a Trois Chardonnay
body_html:
Folie a Deux Menage a Trois Chardonnay

The Menage a Trois Chardonnay offers a crisp lemon and lime taste with powerful and alluring toasty aromas . This full bodied wine will leave you satisfied, but still wanting more. Because of the richness of the oak-aged wines, they pair well with equally rich foods like lobster and halibut.

title: Peter Vella Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Peter Vella Vineyards Chardonnay

Taste the crisp, rich flavors of a delicious California white wine when you try this incredible Peter Vella Vineyards Chardonnay. This light tasting wine combines the flavors of citrus, peach and apple with the subtle aromas of Chardonnay grapes. When you have a craving for an enticing white wine, try Peter Vella Vineyards Chardonnay.

title: Don Miguel Gascon Colosal Red Blend
body_html:
Don Miguel Gascon Colosal Red Blend

With rich layers of flavor showcasing dark cherry, ripened plum, and sweet blackberry, Don Miguel Gascon Colosal Red Blend also boasts hints of oak, mint, and luscious chocolate to create its distinctive taste. This sumptuous red features a sophisticated blend of Malbec, Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Bonarda and makes an outstanding accompaniment to foods like grilled steak, succulent lamb, or even complex dishes like coq au vin.

title: Whitehaven Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Whitehaven Sauvignon Blanc

Let your eyes capture the bright clarity and pale yellow-green hue of Whitehaven Sauvignon Blanc. As you begin to taste your first sip, notice the fragrance of boxwood greengage plums, gooseberries, black currant leaves, and just a hint of tropical fruit. Taste bright fruit flavors and notice its vibrant acidity, then recall its long and clean finish. This wine goes great with salads, lobster, whitefish, or green mussels in a white wine sauce.

WINEMAKING NOTES

We source the fruit for this wine exclusively from a blend of Marlborough sub-regions, giving Whitehaven a backbone of bright fruit character, well-balanced texture and a food-friendly finish. Our Sauvignon Blanc grapes were harvested in cool conditions throughout March, then pressed immediatelywithminimalskincontact.Aftercoldsettling,theclearjuice was fermented entirely in stainless steel tanks at very low temperatures with selected yeast strains to preserve the inherent varietal characteristics and classic Marlborough flavors.

title: Carnivor Zinfandel
body_html:
Carnivor Zinfandel

Savor the dark red richness of Carnivor Zinfandel. This intense red wine is filled with the flavors of ripe red berries and touches of toasted oak. It is bold and robust with a pungent and lasting finish that lingers slightly on the palate. It has a smooth and silky texture that goes great with a variety of dishes containing poultry or red meat such as a thick porterhouse steak, chicken parmigiana or roasted quail.

title: J Vineyards & Winery Pinot Gris
body_html:
J Vineyards & Winery Pinot Gris

Feel the tickle on your nose of honeysuckle, roasted pineapple, and candied lemon rind as sip the vibrant J Vineyards & Winery Pinot Gris. Notice the flavors of tart tangerines, zesty orange, and crisp Asian pear. Let your palate savor on its silver minerality along with notes of jasmine and honeydew. Delicious with an Israeli couscous salad or a halibut ceviche.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • 2016
  • Pinot Gris

title: Talbott Vineyards Kali Hart Chardonnay
body_html:
Talbott Vineyards Kali Hart Chardonnay

Talbott Vineyards Kali Hart Chardonnay makes for an excellent dinner companion. With its rich, dynamic taste, Kali Hart Chardonnay shares hints of honeydew and pineapple combined with a refreshing edge it is the wine to enjoy with friends or at parties. For a festive touch, this wine is best when paired with an appetizer of goat cheese and crackers.

title: Clos du Bois Merlot
body_html:
Clos du Bois Merlot

Let your nose savor the aromas of lightly toasted oak, cassis, rich mocha, and black cherries in Clos du Bois Merlot. Savor the flavorful taste and notes of dark chocolate, mocha, and sweet dark cherries for a heavenly experience. This wine has a luxurious and rich texture that will leave you wanting more and more. It is an excellent wine for main dishes that contain roasted or grilled red meats such as a juicy T-bone steak or a standing rib roast with seasoned root vegetables. Try it with dark chocolate truffles or a dense black forest cake.

TASTING NOTES

Rich, Black Cherry, Brown Spice, Mocha

title: Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir
body_html:
Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir

Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir offers a big flavor profile featuring plums and cherries with a smooth sandalwood finish and hints of a verdant forest floor. This full-bodied wine pairs best with grilled salmon, roast chicken, vegetarian lasagna using medium yellow cheese, or a succulent pork tenderloin.

title: Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma County Chardonnay
body_html:
Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma County Chardonnay

Elegant creme brulee and applesauce scents mingle with classic Chardonnay oak undertones woven with accents of yellow orchard apples and ripe apricots and peaches. Notes of nuts and caramel provide a soft finish to Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma County Chardonnay. Pair it with delicate foods such as shellfish or spring vegetables.

title: Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon

Sebastiani Vineyards Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon is rich with classic Cabernet notes of black cherries and dark spices with subtle hints of vanilla. Cabernet pairs best with anything with a similarly rich flavor palette such as beef steaks, lamb, and desserts made from chocolate or spices.

title: Sebastiani Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Sebastiani Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

Tart layers of ripe lemongrass and notes of freshly squeezed grapefruit juice feature prominently in Sebastiani Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc, with soft stone fruit flavors as accents. Pair this fresh, bold white wine with herb-crusted roast pheasant as an entree and also performs well with first-course salads containing dark greens.

title: Sebastiani Cherryblock Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Cherryblock Sebastiani Cabernet Sauvignon

Sebastiani Cherryblock Cabernet Sauvignon is a dry wine with a lot of body. It is also able to be aged for a long period of time. This wine also has one-of-a-kind green flavors such as green bell pepper, eucalyptus, and mint. When a Cabernet is grown in California, it tends to be more fruit-forward, not harsh, and soft with rich dark fruit notes of blackberry and blueberry as well as earth, dust, and cedar. The medium to high amount of tannins and concentrated flavors make it easy to be served with a lot of different entrees.
