Some of the entrees that go well with Sebastiani Cherryblock Cabernet Sauvignon are porterhouse steak, braised pork belly, hearty lamb stews, portobello mushrooms, and grilled burgers. For those of you that are looking for a more informal meal, this wine also pairs well with pepperoni pizza

From pizza during a football game to pork belly at the dining room table, this wine can perfectly be paired almost any type of food.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Red Velvet
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Red Velvet

You can have your cake and drink it too with the Cupcake Vineyards Red Velvet wine. The smooth flavor and awesome aroma of blended chocolates, blackberry, red fruits, mocha and a hint of coconut pairs perfectly with your favorite cut of steak or red meat.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Pinot Noir

An aroma of black cherries and strawberries as well as the flavor of raspberries and cream, the Cupcake Vineyards Pinot Noir is designed to give you a sweet flavor with just a little bit of spice. It pairs excellently with triple cream cheese, pulled pork or quinoa salads and sourdough toast points.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Moscato d'Asti DOCG
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Moscato d'Asti DOCG

Cupcake Vineyards Moscato d'Asti DOCG is fruity with peaches, lychee and other tropical fruits. It also has floral notes to help with the sweetness which pairs very well with cake and creams. With just the right amount of bubbles, you're going to get a perfect balance and a lusciousness as well.

Crafted with fine effervescence that tickles the palate, Cupcake Moscato d’Asti is a vibrant wine with flavors of nectarine, honey and peach. Pair with coconut pudding or a fruit tart.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Malbec
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Malbec

Argentina is the largest wine producer in South America and the Cupcake Vineyards Malbec comes from Argentina's Mendoza region. The wine has a heady, yet dry nose with aromas of blueberries and leather. The palate has intense flavors of chocolate, mocha, and plums, matched by a soft velvety texture and hint of spice. A great choice to accompany Rack of Lamb or a New York Strip.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Black Forest Red
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Black Forest Red

Cupcake Vineyards Black Forest is a Red blend of grapes from selected California’s coastal vineyards. It has a dark dusty garnet color and bright, funky aromas of ripe black mulberries and toasty oak. A dry full body with rich, deep flavors of blackberry and dark cherry accompanied by hints of spice and mocha with woody tannins. An excellent pairing with a Bacon Cheeseburger or a Classic Italian Marinara.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Merlot

Cupcake Vineyards Merlot from California's Central Coast pours with a ruby color and opens up with bright, fruity aromas of cherry, cocoa, vanilla, and cassis. This wine is a merlot for the cabernet lover with a rich earthy finish with well-integrated tannins and moderate oak. Pairs well with beef, lamb and veal.

title: Edge Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
edge Cabernet Sauvignon

Paired perfectly with beef and venison, this Edge Cabernet Sauvignon has notes of peppercorn, cola and leather along with cedar. That goes well with the fullness and heavy fruit flavors like blueberry and raspberry alongside chocolate and black cherries. It's a smooth and luscious wine with vanilla and some silky tannins to finish it off.

title: Clos du Bois Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Clos du Bois Sauvignon Blanc

Of the Sauvignon Blanc collection, Clos du Bois has a flavor special to your tastes! This California favorite is custom made and produced in seven regions north of San Francisco, including the famous Napa Valley area. Its rich, verdant fruit flavors consist of gently pressed grapes ripened just right for perfect fermentation. Coupled with a hint of lime-grapefruit, citrus, and a touch of spicey oak, this fine dinner favorite is best when paired with tasty ceviche, shellfish, or a salad of your choice.

TASTING NOTES

Refreshing, Melon, Lemongrass, Lime Zest

title: Clos du Bois Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Clos du Bois Cabernet Sauvignon

Let your eyes be taken with the rich ruby red color of Clos du Bois North Coast Cabernet Sauvignon. Notice its sweet aroma of fresh dark blackberries. Taste its scrumptious flavors of juicy dark berries, bittersweet chocolate, and faint hints of rich mocha. Notice how its flavor is enhanced with supple, yet firm tannins. This is a great wine that can be served with beef wellington or pasta with a rich meat sauce. Or, serve it with luscious chocolate soufflé for a memorable dessert experience.

TASTING NOTES

Smooth, Black Currant, Blackberry, Toasted Oak

title: La Marca Prosecco
body_html:
La Marca Prosecco

For a wonderful sparkling wine from Italy's Prosecco region, try La Marca Prosecco. From its golden color and floral and citrus nose, to the crisp effervescence, it's not too overpowering or sweet.

The tart green apples and ripened limes offer a clean finish on your palate with just a touch of minerality. Serve with a duck prosciutto for a well-balanced pairing.

title: HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Pinot Noir
body_html:
HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Pinot Noir

HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Pinot Noir has an American and French regime and it goes through a methodical process of maturing. For these reasons, this wine shows how much character a Pinot Noir wine truly has. This wine has a deep red color and smell that is very appealing to all of the senses that are offset by the dry and harmonic combination of black cherry and vanilla. The delicious mixture lingers to leave a good taste on the palate. There are a lot of benefits to drinking this wine and they include: being easy to drink, having a fruit-forward profile, and a fine balance between soft and subtle and complex and bold, and it also pairs well with a lot of different foods like roasted or grilled pork.

Roasted or grilled pork with a light marinade or dry rub goes well with this wine because it is leaner than beef. Do not eat fatty pork with this wine because it needs heavy tannins to get the fat off of the taste buds, and, as a light wine, Rooster Pinot Noir does not have heavy tannins. Duck, pheasant, and other “gamier” tasting animals go well with this wine (especially duck) due to the fact that it has more fat than other game (though less than beef or lamb), and even though this wine has light tannins, they still properly compliment each other. Seafood also fares well with Rooster Pinot Noir.

Salmon is a food that fares well with this wine because it has a strong and one-of-a-kind taste and heavier oil content that would overwhelm a white wine. Other fish entrees that go well with Pinot Noir are mackerel, anchovies, herring, and mullet. Lobster, shrimp, and crab collaborate with this wine as long as they are not cooked in a cream sauce. Pinot Noir is not a perfect match for this wine, but it is the best red wine if you do not want to pair it with white wine. Certain pasta dishes also pair well with Rooster Pinot Noir.

Pasta with pesto sauce pairs well with Rooster Pinot Noir because it has a strong herbal flavor. Combining the pesto sauce with some tomato will give it extra flavor to blend well with the Pinot Noir. Mushrooms in a wine also mix well with red wine. It is a natural pairing because they pair well with Pinot Noir’s mild red flavor.

This wines deep red flavor of berries and vanilla tastes so good with all of these great-tasting foods. They fare so well together that anyone that eats will enjoy a meal that is truly full of ecstasy

title: HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Pinot Grigio
body_html:
HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Pinot Grigio

Enjoy the abundant lemon-lime and citrus aromas sprinkled with lavender and intense floral notes in the HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Pinot Grigio. It’s racy, bright and beautifully balanced that leaves you with a refreshing finish. Pair this wine with a delectable fish taco or steamed mussels in a savory broth.

title: HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Merlot
body_html:
HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Merlot

The HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Merlot pairs excellently with root vegetables and squash. It also has just the right amount of acidity that goes with cassis, cherry and even cedar to give an excellent flavor. There's even a little bit of spiciness and fullness to the flavors involved.

title: HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Sauvignon Blanc

HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Sauvignon Blanc is a bright, versatile wine featuring the fruity summer flavors of citrus, nectarine, and honeydew melon. Enjoy a bottle with prosciutto-wrapped melon, mint and white balsamic vinaigrette; crackers topped with goat cheese and hot pepper jelly; or a delicious green olive tapenade.

title: HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Chardonnay
body_html:
HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Chardonnay

HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Chardonnay is a good oak quality wine under $10. This bold white has depth, a shadow of currant and pairs will with chicken or fish. Named after the star attraction at a Texas circus, RM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Chardonnay will surprise you every time you sip.

title: HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
HRM Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster Cabernet Sauvignon

Rex Goliath Giant 47 Pound Rooster is red royalty at its finest! This imperial favorite comes in three distinct tastes: blackberry, savory plum, and black pepper spice. This dinnertime favorite is best compared with herb roasted beef or chocolate at dessert.

Like most red wines, its smooth velvet taste inspires relaxation and motivates conversation, rendering it a party choice among friends.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

Cupcake Sauvignon Blanc has a complex and a vibrant zing that reminds people of a lemon chiffon cupcake. The smells are integrated and the Meyer lemons and key limes delight the senses with a lot of flavor and a finish that wakes up the appetite. Some of the cuisines that combine well with are seafood dishes.

Some of the cuisine that this wine combines well with are oysters on the half shell and creamy lobster risotto. Another entree that it goes well with is avocado and crab salad. Other foods that go well with this wine are grilled fish, especially oily fish like mackerel and sardines. They also go well together with fried fish like goujons, whitebait, and fish and chips with simply grilled chicken or lamb (without a powerful marinade) and Mexican and Greek food.

Cupcake Sauvignon Blanc also goes well with Mexican and Greek food, tomatoes, green onions, olives, and sharp cheeses like feta (do not neutralize their character with dresses that taste too much like lemon). Large garlicky prawns, chargrilled squid, and cheeses that have garlic and herb flavors mix well with this marvelous wine.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Moscato Still Wine
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Moscato Still Wine

Let the tropical fruit flavors of Cupcake Moscato Still Wine dance in your mouth as you sip this vibrant white wine. Let your nose take in its delicate floral notes as you let this wine take you away on an imaginary journey to an exotic, warm tropical island. This is a fun wine for any occasion that goes great with grilled chicken skewers, grilled mahi mahi, or even a fruit-based dessert such as pineapple upside down cake.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Sparkling Prosecco
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Sparkling Prosecco

Cupcake Vineyards Sparkling Proseco has the distinction of being the one of the best in sparkling wines! With its mixture of 100% Glera grapes, white peach, honeydew, and melon, it adds a soft, velvety touch with just a hint of carbonation. It even boasts a savory hint of lemon and other fresh, citrus flavors, giving it a fruity zest with just a touch of smoky brioche. For a good dining experience, Prosecco is best when paired with gorgonzola crostini.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Chardonnay

A big, rich wine from California's Central Coast, the elegantly textured Cupcake Vineyards Chardonnay is luscious, creamy and silky with flavors of butter, cream, bright citrus and vanilla. Grapes sourced from Monterey County give it a crisp and vibrant Chardonnay character. A great wine chilled with fresh green salad and seared Ahi tuna.

title: Cupcake Vineyards Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Cupcake Vineyards Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT

Cupcake Vineyards Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT is a celebration in a bottle. With aromatic hints of peach skin and lemon zest, this fruity Pinot Gris pairs well with BBQ Chicken or Pad Tai. As ephermal as a summer kiss, Cupcake Vineyards Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT will keep you in the moment.

title: Simi Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Simi Sauvignon Blanc

Simi Sauvignon Blanc is a delicious, rich wine, fermented and aged 100% in stainless steel. It is guaranteed to please the palate with its classic, clean and lively citrus taste. The pale, straw colored wine is bright and crisp, pairing well with light seafood, goat cheese ravioli and red onion.

Sonoma County Sauvignon Blanc

SIMI Winery Executive Chef Kolin Vazzoler suggests pairing this wine with shaved spring vegetables and radicchio with shallot Sauvignon Blanc vinaigrette, Dungeness crab salad with endive and Meyer lemon dressing, BBQ scallops with salsa verde, arugula pesto tortellini, and roasted sole with parsley, capers, and garlic. It’s also a great aperitif with prosciutto and melon, goat cheese, poke salad, or raw oysters.

title: Ruffino Il Ducale Toscana
body_html:
Ruffino Il Ducale Toscana IGT

The Ruffino II Ducale Toscana IGT features notes of cherry, plum, chocolate, vanilla and spice alongside flavors of fruits, vanilla and herbs. The round and supremely elegant tannins in this wine pair nicely with herb-roasted chicken, sun-dried tomato risotto and beef carpaccio. You'll love the mix of dark and light flavors and the fullness of the wine.

TASTING NOTES

Color:
Ruby red with violet reflections.

Aroma:
Il Ducale shows notes of cassis, cherries, plums, and chocolate, which then fade into aromas of vanilla, tobacco, vanilla, eucalyptus, and spice.

Tasting profile:
The wine opens with fruit-driven notes that unfold into round, elegant tannins. This well-balanced wine finishes with ripe fruits and aromas of vanilla and balsamic herbs. Il Ducale is a modern Tuscan wine born from Ruffino’s century-old winemaking traditions.

title: Ruffino Chianti DOCG
body_html:
Ruffino Chianti DOCG

The Ruffino Chianti DOCG is an easy drinking wine that is predominantly fruity and floral with hints of spice and hazelnut. It is a soft and pleasant medium bodied wine delicately balanced, aged for four months in stainless steel and concrete vats. Its brightness and acidity pairs well with traditional Italian meals such as ravioli, pizza and carpaccio.

TASTING NOTES

Color:
Ruby red.

Aroma:
Ruffino Chianti DOCG is an approachable, easy-drinking wine that has predominantly fruity and floral aromatics, with hints of spice and hazelnut.

Tasting profile:
On the palate, Chianti DOCG is soft with a medium body and nice balance, displaying pleasantly fruity characteristics.

title: Unbridled Sustainable Winery Pinot Noir
body_html:
Unbridled Sustainable Winery Pinot Noir

2014

The Unbridled Sustainable Winery Pinot Noir has generous aromas of vanilla, blackberry, and cherry followed by underlying white pepper and lavender. This wine is full-bodied with supple tannins and ripe fruit flavors. Unbridled Sustainable Winery Pinot Noir pairs well with beef short ribs, roast pork loin, and grilled Portobello mushrooms.

title: Tom Gore Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Tom Gore Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

The best in red wines, Tom Gore Cabernet Sauvignon remains an American dinnertime favorite! From the vineyards of the Central and Northern coasts, the wine is crafted from grapes using a natural fermenting process. This adds a pure zest pleasing to your palette! Plus, this fine, aged spirit is crafted with a unique blend of cherry, currant, leather, and tobacco leaf. With just a hint of chocolate and mocha, this exquisite beverage can be enjoyed with your favorite beef brisket dish, or a simple bowl of cheesy meatballs.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Primal Roots Red Blend
body_html:
Top Selling Red Wine Blend

Primal Roots Red Blend

Relish a bottle of Primal Roots Red Blend featuring the aromatic layers and flavors of succulent boysenberry, fresh Bing cherry, and ripe blackberry. 

Versatile wine is food friendly

With hints of oak and Tahitian vanilla bean, this versatile wine is food friendly, and pairs well with a backyard barbecue of beef, lamb, veal, and poultry. See all red blends

title: Unbridled Sustainable Winery Chardonnay
body_html:
Unbridled Sustainable Winery Chardonnay

If you are looking for a rich and creamy white wine, then you cannot do better than Unbridled Sustainable Winery Chardonnay. In addition to having tasting notes of pineapple and coconut, this wine from Wild Horse Winery is also created from sustainable viticultural practices. This means that you can sip your delicious bottle of Unbridled Sustainable Winery Chardonnay and know that you are doing what is right for the environment. Pair this wine with crab legs or other shellfish dish and you will bring out the best flavors of both the wine and the food.

title: J. Lohr Estates South Ridge Syrah
body_html:
J. Lohr Estates South Ridge Syrah

Sometimes, you want a delicious dry red wine that offers unique flavor varietals. When that is the case, you can do not better than the J. Lohr Estates South Ridge Syrah. This wonderful syrah combines the flavors of blueberries and black tea with hints of smoke and oak that cannot be beat. Pair the J. Lohr Estates South Ridge Syrah with a classic BLT sandwich or a slow-cooked pork roast.

title: J. Lohr Estates Falcons Perch Pinot Noir
body_html:
J. Lohr Estates Falcons Perch Pinot Noir

The J. Lohr Estates Falcons Perch Pinot Noir is a plump red wine that delivers aromas of strawberry and sage. It is signed and lifted by vanilla spiced oaks and gently touches the palate with notes of talc and rhubarb. This dry wine is a fantastic pairing to spicy, Southern food like shrimp gumbo.

title: Mouton Cadet Rouge Bordeaux Red Blend
body_html:
Mouton Cadet Baron Philippe de Rothschild

Created in 1930 by winemaker Baron Philippe de Rothschild, Mouton Cadet artfully blends several classic grape varieties of the Bordeaux region : Merlot, Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc. A traditional Bordeaux, Mouton Cadet carries flavors of black currants and oak. Wonderful pairing with rib-eye steak or rack of lamb.

title: Montes Classic Series Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Montes Classic Series Cabernet Sauvignon

The best in wine is finally here! Montes Classic Series Cabernet Sauvignon has a distinct blend of strawberry, raspberry, and spice for your tasting pleasure. With an added fusion of vanilla, licorice, and caramel, you can enjoy a savory sweetness to whet your appetite! Commonly known as the "Burger Wine," this mild tasting Chilean mix can be enjoyed with chicken and rice or grilled sausage.

title: La Playa Rosé
body_html:
La Playa Rosé

Explore the approachable flavor of La Playa Estate Series Rose. With this well-balanced, Chilean rose, you'll experience a dry, floral wine with just the smallest hint of raspberry. The La Playa Estate Series Rose is best paired with a rich, Mediterranean palate, like a seafood paella.

TASTING NOTES

Delicate pink color. On the nose, floral notes with hints of rose petal and raspberry. It is a dry wine with good acidity and refreshing strawberry palate.

title: Chandon Brut Rose
body_html:
Domaine Chandon Brut Rosé

Domaine Chandon Brut Rosé has a pink salmon color and it notes of wild strawberries and cream with ripe apple and just a small amount of peach blossom. It has a well-balanced and refreshing acidity, small persistent bubbles, and a medium-long finish. For all of these reasons, this wine is a great drink to consume before a meal to stimulate an appetite and it has just the right amount of intensity to make a nice food sparkler. Whenever you are ready to drink it, it is ready to be consumed and it also pairs nicely with some very delicious foods.

Chandon Brut Rose should be paired with salty, creamy, or nutty foods like Caesar salad, fried calamari, oysters, fresh sushi, and fresh sashimi. The meats that this wine goes well with are white meats like chicken, pork, and turkey. If you want to pair cheese with it, it pairs well with these cheeses: Brie, Camembert, Feta, Gruyere, Monterey Jack, Muenster or Swiss Parmesan, and Asiago or Reggiano. Other foods that can be eaten with this wine are: Bruschetta, Mediterranean food, Teriyaki, and egg dishes.

Chandon is a colorful wine that is full of flavor. If you pair any of these foods with this wonderful wine, you and your guests will experience a marvelous meal that will linger on your palates for a long time.

title: B Side Red Wine
body_html:
B Side Red Wine

This beautifully deep purple B Side Red blend is a perfect blend of Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, Malbec, Petit Verdot and Cabernet Franc. This Bordeaux style blend is flavored with cranberry, rich cherry, Tahitian vanilla. Hints of basil, oregano, blackberry compote, black currant and sandalwood come together to please the palate. It is perfectly paired with braised lamb.

title: B Side Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
B Side Cabernet Sauvignon

Napa Valley's B Side Cabernet Sauvignon is a splendid, full-bodied wine featuring the rich flavors of chocolate truffle, espresso, and cherry cobbler, with hints of juicy blueberry, and dried tea leaf. Enjoy a bottle with Gouda cheese, buttery portabella mushrooms prepared with garlic, rosemary and thyme, or savory, slow-braised beef short ribs and grilled radicchio.

title: Stags' Leap Winery 'The Investor'
body_html:
Stags' Leap Winery The Investor

A blend of 38% Merlot, 32% Petite Sirah, 18% Cabernet Sauvignon and 12% Malbec, Stags' Leap Winery The Investor is aged 16 months in French and American oak. Captivating for its lush blackcurrant, plum and blackberry with hints of vanilla, tobacco and sandalwood. Full bodied with moderate tannins, enjoy it with beef, lamb and veal.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red

title: Stags' Leap Winery The Leap Estate Grown Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Stags' Leap Winery The Leap Estate Grown Cabernet Sauvignon

Aged 20 months in 50% new French oak, Stags' Leap Winery The Leap Estate Grown Cabernet Sauvignon presents a beautiful nose of floral-infused blackberries, blueberries and cassis. Sizable, dry tannins should integrate with the bright fruit and minerality over time, should drink well for 20-25 years. Excellent pairing with beef and venison.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Justin Isosceles Bordeaux Blend Red
body_html:
Justin Isosceles Bordeaux Blend Red

The Justin Isosceles Bordeaux is a combination of Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Cabernet Franc. It has a bright and deep ruby/purple core at the rim. It has a strong smell of ripe black cherry and black currants as well as classic baking spice elements: sweet tobacco, cocoa, coffee, cedar, and subtle mint. The palate is full-bodied with concentrated ripe black cherry, cassis, and boysenberry jam on the entry. This wine is also layered with toasted vanilla, cinnamon, and licorice spice and this wine also has some classic Cabernet savory notes.

This wine has classic Cabernet savory notes that emerge on the mid-palate with dark chocolate, coffee, and minty accents. The finish is very long, balanced, and fresh, with a continuous layering of black fruit, cherry candy, and spice elements all framed perfectly with mouth-filling but very fine tannins that surround and support this wines flavorful core. This wine is full of flavor and pairs well with foods that are full of flavor.

Two of the foods that pair well with the Justin Isosceles Bordeaux Blend Red are a juicy rib-eye and ratatouille made with fire-roasted vegetables. The classic pairings for this type of wine are are red meats like beef and lamb. It can even be paired well with a regular old hamburger. The reason for this is that the tannins react with the proteins in these meats to compliment the flavors of both the meat and the wine.If you want to pair the Bordeaux with other meats, it also blends well with duck, goose, bison, and venison. You can even serve this wine with your dessert.

This wine is ideal to serve with a dessert as long as the dessert is made of a dark and rich chocolate. A dark chocolate dessert with this wine would be the perfect ending to a meal with your choice of a variety of meats. Your meal will be like no other if you pair this wine with the foods that it fares well with.

title: Robert Hall Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Robert Hall Cabernet Sauvignon

Robert Hall Cabernet Sauvignon is a deliciously supple, medium-full bodied wine featuring the rich flavors of dark chocolate, plush ripe berries, and black fig with accents of licorice, oak, cedar, and anise.

Enjoy a bottle with red meat such as hamburgers fresh off the grill, a hearty pot roast, or steak and potatoes.

title: Mulderbosch Cabernet Sauvignon Rosé
body_html:
Mulderbosch Cabernet Sauvignon Rosé

Mulderbosch Cabernet Sauvignon Rose wine is a delicious and brillant wine for virtually any occasion. With flavors of juicy ripe strawberries, white peach, and delectable cherries, this fruity and refreshing rose is a crowd-pleaser, perfect for a dinner party or for a romantic evening for two.

Pair this wine with fruit and cream desserts or with savory herb roasted chicken or turkey.

title: Estancia Estates Pinnacles Ranches Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Estancia Estates Pinnacles Ranches Sauvignon Blanc

A playful and zesty selection from this popular winery, Estancia Estates Pinnacles Ranches Sauvignon Blanc showcases bright citrus notes of lemon and lime along with hints of a variety of tropical fruits, accentuated with a musky, full-bodied aroma. Pair with seafood such as scallops and broiled flounder or sushi, chicken or pork, or vegetarian fare.

title: Gary Farrell Russian River Pinot Noir
body_html:
Gary Farrell Russian River Pinot Noir

An elegant, flavorful, and eclectic selection featuring a diverse ensemble of subtle notes including wild strawberry, raspberry and pomegranate, along with a delicate aroma that combines roses and violets, cinnamon, and pink peppercorn. Perfect with lighter fare such as grilled salmon and baby peas and any type of pasta dish.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Mark West Black Pinot Noir
body_html:
Mark West Black Pinot Noir

Mark West Black Pinot Noir draws strong aromas from young plums, vanilla and raspberry. Red and black cherries are the stars of the rich, flavor developed wine. Mark West Black Pinot Noir is interesting in itself so try it with a different type of meal; venison pizza with goat cheese and Kalamata olives.

TASTING NOTES

Intense notes of black cherry, mocha, vanilla and caramel.

title: Dreaming Tree Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
The Dreaming Tree Sauvignon Blanc

Juicy and fresh with aromas of kiwi and passion fruit. The Dreaming Tree Sauvignon Blanc finishes clean and crisp with hints of lime and grapefruit. This is the perfect wine to sip as the summer heat melts into dusk. It goes well with shellfish, soft cheeses, and leafy salads. The Dreaming Tree Sauvignon Blanc is an approachable and versatile wine that will certainly satisfy.

TASTING NOTES

Grapefruit, Pineapple, Zesty lime, Crisp, clean finish

title: Dreaming Tree Pinot Noir
body_html:
Dreaming Tree Pinot Noir

California's Dreaming Tree Pinot Noir boasts complex aromas and flavors of toasty caramel, delicious black cherry, and vine-ripened, wild strawberries, balanced by hints of vanilla and tannins. Enjoy a glass at a backyard barbecue, or with root vegetables, tender, roasted chicken, grilled root vegetables and creamy mushroom risotto.

TASTING NOTES

Wild strawberry, Caramel, Soft, juicy tannins

title: Dreaming Tree Crush Red
body_html:
The Dreaming Tree Crush Red

The Dreaming Tree Crush Red is medium weight bodied with mostly Merlot and Zinfandel blends. It's a very smooth wine that is easy to share with others. It pairs well with barbecue ribs, chicken wings or grilled steak. The Dreaming Tree Crush Red is reasonably priced and available at most food and wine retailers.

TASTING NOTES

Juicy, red fruit, Dark fruit, Ripe, jammy flavors, Long, soft finish

title: Dreaming Tree Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
The Dreaming Tree Cabernet Sauvignon

With aromatic hints of vanilla and cherry, Dreaming Tree Cabernet Sauvignon is an elegant and yet subtle California blend. Taste the soft tannins and toasted vanilla that blend well with dry herb notes balanced with cherry and blackberry. Smooth with a clean finish, pair with a lamb or rib-eye steak dish.

TASTING NOTES

Toasted caramel, Dark chocolate

title: K Vintners Charles Smith Vino Rosé
body_html:
Top Selling Vino Rose

Charles Smith Vino Rosé by The Best Wine Store

K Vintners Charles Smith Vino Rosé

This rose is great for a refreshing drink on a hot summer day and thus is great with a light meal. See All Vino Rose Wines

Great Vino Rose with your favorite foods

Charles Smith Vino Rose is best paired up with some crispy fish tacos with a jalapeno sauce. Not what your looking for? Click Here

title: Cook's Sparkling Moscato
body_html:
Cook's Sparkling Moscato

Everything a great Moscato should be, bright and very sweet with notes of various citrus fruits, honeysuckle, and orange blossom along with a subtle peach flavor underneath. Cook's Sparkling Moscato is great with any kind of dessert, but also with spicy fare such as Korean and Thai, or smoked meats served with Brie and Gouda.

title: Cook's Cellars California Blush Champagne Sparkling Sweet Rose
body_html:
Cook's Cellars California Blush Champagne Sparkling Sweet Rose

Cook's Cellars California Blush Champagne Sparkling Sweet Rose is a medium-sweet rose with strong pink color and even stronger flavors. Drawing from strawberries and raspberries this complex rose has a crisp, long and smooth finish. Rose's are great with meats and cheeses, pair up Cook's Cellars California Blush Champagne Sparkling Sweet Rose with a brochette bar for appetizers at your next gathering.

title: Black Box Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Black Box Pinot Grigio

Award Winning Black Box Pinot Grigio showcases a breezy assortment of flavors including pear, lemon, lime, honey dew and other melons, and whole nuts, topped off with an aroma reminiscent of apples and soda bread. Pairs well with chicken or grilled fish, pasta, Thai or Korean cuisine, and any type of salad.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Pinot Grigio Sparkling Wine
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Pinot Grigio Sparkling Wine

Barefoot Bubbly Pinot Grigio is a sparkling white wine from California. It has a refreshing, citrus taste with delectable aromas of orange blossom. This fun wine has bubbles that are unique for a Pinot Grigio from the area. It is created from a white wine grape variety from the species Vitis vinifera. Pair Barefoot Bubbly Pinot Grigio with light pasta salad, an artichoke pizza, a hummus dip, or a Greek salad. Light foods go well with the light-bodied wine.

title: Gekkeikan 'Suzaku' Junmai Ginjo Sake
body_html:
Gekkeikan Suzaku Junmai Ginjo Sake

Authentic Japanese sake requires a refined palate, one that adjusts to the cultural differences in distilled spirits. Gekkeikan "Suzaku" Junmai Ginjo Sake is one such sake that should be sipped in the usual Japanese tradition--from a tiny cup and in between bites of the best sushi you can buy.

title: Gekkeikan Sake
body_html:
Gekkeikan Sake

Gekkeikan makes a range of excellent Sake products with many in the domestic and many in the imported selection as well. You're going to get fruity notes to go along with earthiness. The traditional Gekkeikan Sake is with grapefruit and some acidity with a perfect match to shellfish, green vegetables and can even be used for stocks and marinades.

title: Gekkeikan Nigori Junmai Sake
body_html:
Gekkeikan Nigori Junmai Sake

Gekkeikan NIgori Junmai Sake is a thicker and creamier sake that has a cloudy milk-like appearance. This is because of the sediment that forms when the rice is poured through a mesh filter. It is sweet and creamy and a has a tropical fruit taste and a long finish. Best when chilled and served with California rolls, grilled teriyaki chicken or shrimp, or a crisp salad with pickled cucumbers.

title: Piper-Heidsieck Rose Sauvage
body_html:
Piper-Heidsieck Rose Sauvage

Piper-Heidsieck Rose Sauvage is a great blend of beautiful fruit and other amazing flavors. When it hits your sense of smell and your taste buds you will see the great fruit flavors, some of which include cherry, blackberry, blackcurrant, blood orange, strawberry and mandarin. The beautiful red color goes perfectly with the flavors and it will drive your senses into overload. The Piper-Heidsieck Rose Sauvage pairs well with lamb.

title: Piper-Heidsieck Brut
body_html:
Piper-Heidsieck Brut

Piper-Heidsiek Cuvee Brut Champagne is a classic and full-bodied champagne that is bursting sweet, fruity flavors. The extended maturation time provides for the fine and delicate bubble. Let the clear golden hue of this champagne capture your eye before you inhale the scent of star fruit, pears, russet apples, hints of citrus, and a grape finish. The citrus and golden grape texture is excellent with poached salmon, pastas with cream sauces, and pairings of brie and fresh fruit.

title: Moet & Chandon Brut Rose
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Brut Rose Imperial

Moet and Chandon's Brut Rose champagne is a traditional style of dry rose with subtle notes of fruit and spice flavors. With its warm copper color, aroma, and firm texture, this is an excellent dinner champagne, pairing well with many dishes that balance acidity and richness. Consider mixed salads and pasta in addition to lightly cooked seafoods.

TASTING NOTES

A glowing colour

Pink with amber highlights

A bewitching bouquet

A lively, intense bouquet of red fruits (wild strawberry, raspberry, cherry)
Floral nuances of rose
A slight hint of pepper

title: Moet & Chandon Brut
body_html:
Moet & Chandon Brut

Invigorate your senses with this sensational Moet and Chandon Brut wine. It has a lovely citrus blend with hints of minerals, brioche and white flowers. The bright acidity, graceful structure, toast flavors, crushed blackberry and smoothness of the wine make it delectable. Pair it with your favorite cooked shellfish and a rich, creamy sauce.

TASTING NOTES

An elegant colour

Golden straw yellow with green highlights

A sparkling bouquet

The vibrant intensity of green apple and citrus fruit
The freshness of mineral nuances and white flowers
The elegance of blond notes (brioche, cereal, fresh nuts)

title: Chandon Brut
body_html:
Domaine Chandon Brut

Domain Chandon Brut Classic Champagne is perfectly balance with the right touch of elegance. It has a nutty flavor with hint of sweet brioche bread that give it a nice, dry finish. The combination of apples and pears that are accented with citrus and spice. The notes of caramel and almonds undertone the bouquet of this sparkling wine. A perfect beverage for appetizers such as salty bacon-wrapped shrimp or brie en croute or a celebratory meal of rack of lamb or filet mignon.

title: Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Demi-Sec
body_html:
Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Demi-Sec

The Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Demi-Sec pairs perfectly with creams and cake because of the aromas of toast and brioche along with plenty of ripe fruits. With flavors of peach and vanilla it has a light, fresh finish that makes it an excellent champagne to go along with your favorite dessert.

TASTING NOTES

After additional cellaring (two to three years, or even more in the right conditions), Demi Sec develops even richer notes of praline or toasts. It is then ideal with caramel or praline based desserts: Paris-Brest, tarte Tatin, pears with caramel.

title: Veuve Clicquot Brut Rose Champagne
body_html:
Veuve Clicquot Brut Rose Champagne

Veuve Cliquot Ponsardin Brut Rose is a sparkling rose wine that is made in Champagne, France. It a delicate perfume of bright red berries, flowers, and sweet ripe kiwi fruit. Let the flavor or sweet and tangy ruby red grapefruit, along with hints of Mandarin oranges and peaches give this vibrant and tangy sparkling wine a memorable taste. It is great with salads that contain grilled chicken, goat cheese, and citrus as well as desserts such as crème brulee or crepes.

TASTING NOTES
Coppery-orange color. Expressive aromas of strawberry and very ripe wild strawberries. A full-bodied, structured, vinous palate which stays fresh. Length and character define this champagne.

AROMAS
Fresh red fruits
Biscuity notes of dried fruits
Viennese pastries

title: Veuve Clicquot Yellow Label Brut
body_html:
Veuve Clicquot Brut Champagne Yellow Label

The Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Brut is an amazing champagne that is simply put, elegant. It has a creamy note to it and it consists of flavors that include ground ginger, Gala apple, white pepper and kumquat. The Veuve Clicquot Ponsardin Brut has remarkable flavor, beautiful notes that have a great finish and you will find extremely pleasing to your palate. It pairs well with a variety of cheeses, sushi, fried chicken, caviar and lox.

title: Prophecy Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT
body_html:
Prophecy Pinot Grigio delle Venezie

The Prophecy Pinot Grigio delle Venezie is a wine that was created to showcase the defining characteristics of the grape. This light-bodied wine has a floral aroma and a citrus zest. The Prophecy Pinot Grigio offers delectable tastes that provide a bouquet of tropical fruit flavors that include pair and orange. The crisp Prophecy Pinot Grigio 750ml also offers mineral flavors. Pair the Prophecy Pinot Grigio with delicious, light dishes to match the lightness of the wine. Ideal dishes for pairing with this Pinot Grigio include butternut squash ravioli, mixed vegetables with tofu, fruit salad, thin crust vegetable pizza, and Greek salad.

title: Prophecy Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Prophecy Sauvignon Blanc

Prophecy's Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc distinguishes itself as one of New Zealand's signature white wines. With flavor's that vary significantly from other white wines, boasting notes of various fruits as well as a mix of spices like vanilla, nutmeg, and dill that give it a strong green herbaceous flavor. Pair this unique wine with dishes that include green herbs like rosemary, cilantro, parsley, and mint.

title: Prophecy Wines Red Blend
body_html:
Prophecy Wines Red Blend

If you are looking for a great red wine that is silky and has a great body that has layers, the Prophecy Wines Red Blend is a great choice for you. It has a great mixture of fruits that also blends with vanilla and other spices. Prophecy Wines Red Blend is wonderful and it pairs well with veal parmesan.

title: Prophecy Wines Pinot Noir
body_html:
Prophecy Wines Pinot Noir

The Prophecy Wines Pinot Noir is graceful. It features hints of raspberry and ripe cherry to help balance out the acidity. It also has hints of complex spices and pomegranate. The smooth finish encourages you to keep coming back for more. Pair it with a rich grilled pork or any number of other main courses.

title: Jellybean Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Jellybean Sauvignon Blanc

If you are in search of a beautiful wine that has wonderful flavor, unmistakable balance and a nice even taste, then the Jellybean Sauvignon Blanc is the perfect one for you! It is made of a great combination of citrus fruits which include the ruby-red grape fruit and Meyer lemon. With Jellybean Sauvignon Blanc you will also notice the beautiful taste of pear and honeydew melon, and you also get a hint of the spices that bring it all together perfectly. Jellybean Sauvignon Blanc is a great option if you are looking for a great wine to serve at the beginning of your meal with an appetizer; it also pairs well with fish, vegetable and chicken dishes.

title: Charles Smith Chateau Smith Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Charles Smith Chateau Smith Cabernet Sauvignon

A full-bodied red wine, the Charles Smith Chateau Smith Cabernet Sauvignon offer elegance with bright cherry and raspberry flavors. Long and rich in the mouth, it includes fine tannins and white pepper and cinnamon notes for a lively finish, pairing well with Beef Bourguignon and Lamb Chops with Balsamic Reduction.

title: Charles Smith The Eve Chardonnay
body_html:
Charles Smith The Eve Chardonnay

The beautiful Charles Smith The Eve Chardonnay is made with grapes grown in Evergreen and Ryan Patrick Vineyards for a consistent and bright taste. Flavors of stone fruit, apple blossom, hibiscus flower and lemon cream create a delicious, sweet wine that pairs perfectly with golden squash and sauteed shrimp for a perfect meal.

title: Peachy Canyon Winery Westside Zinfandel
body_html:
Peachy Canyon Winery Westside Zinfandel

Peachy Canyon Westside Zinfandel is a fragrant and fruity red wine that is full of the aromas of fresh fruit and comforting baking spices such as cocoa, nutmeg, allspice, anise, walnut, and dark black plums. The rich palate has flavors of sweet huckleberries, red and black cherries, along with warm clove and aromatic vanilla. This a perfect dessert wine that is great with spiced cakes, fruit cobblers, or tarts. Also pair with a hearty steak and baked potato.

title: Castello Banfi Pinot Grigio San Angelo Toscana
body_html:
Castello Banfi Pinot Grigio San Angelo Toscana

Whether you enjoy this wine as an aperitif, or the perfect accompaniment to lighter dishes, the Castello Banfi Pinot Grigio San Angelo Toscana offers a refreshing, fruity and crisp taste. This delightful white-gold wine offers you the notes of pear, peach, anise, and honey, complementing grilled vegetables, pasta and seafood.

title: Sea Smoke Southing Pinot Noir 2014
body_html:
Sea Smoke Southing Pinot Noir

Southing Pinot Noir by Sea Smoke Cellars is a complex, yet elegant wine is finely tannic and laced with flavors of raspberries and assorted mixed wild berries. Inhale fragrant notes of cola, persimmon, morel mushrooms, and fresh, crushed flowers. This wine is excellent with veal osso bucco, or a cream lobster macaroni and cheese.

title: Saintsbury Carneros Pinot Noir
body_html:
Saintsbury Carneros Pinot Noir

The Saintsbury Carneros Pinot Noir is a beautiful wine that you will find the wonderful taste of dark cherries, rose petal, cocoa to name a few along with plum, baking spices and more. The taste you experience lingers just a touch and you will enjoy the taste. Saintsbury Carneros Pinot Noir will pair well with rich fatty meats like duck and lamb; it will also go well with wild mushrooms and artisanal cheeses.

title: Martini & Rossi Prosecco
body_html:
Martini & Rossi Prosecco

The Martini and Rossi Prosecco is designed to give you the best flavor of all when paired with grilled fish or even sushi. It features aromas of apple and thyme as well as other fruits and has a dryness that is very soft when balanced with the light bubbles. The flavor of Prosecco grapes is also very evident here.

title: Martini & Rossi Asti Spumante DOCG
body_html:
Martini & Rossi Asti Spumante

Delicate notes of fresh peach and melon mingle with tart citrus and apple in Martini & Ross Asti Spumante DOCG. Serve this with white cake, lemon tarts, or apple or pear pie with cream for a festive dessert experience. It also pairs well with before-dinner cheese courses.

title: The Hess Collection Hess Select Treo Winemaker's Blend
body_html:
The Hess Collection Hess Select Treo Winemaker's Blend

With its softer tannins, Hess Select Treo Winemaker’s Red Blend is meant to be an easy drinking red wine. The Treo blend offers the sweetness of ripe, dark fruit that is accented by flavors of bing cherries and ripe plums. Hess Collection’s Hess Select Treo is a versatile accompaniment and is suitable whether you are serving burgers, salmon, grilled flank steak or an aged cheese and cured meat platter.

title: The Hess Collection Hess Select Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
The Hess Collection Hess Select Sauvignon Blanc

The grassy aroma definitely will draw you in, but it's the citrus and fruit flavors that will keep you coming back for more of The Hess Collection ' Hess Select' Sauvignon Blanc. It has a fullness and a richness that comes from ripe berries and just the right amount of acidity. Pair with raw vegetable salads, goat cheeses or basil and tomatoes.

title: Scott Family Estate Pinot Noir
body_html:
Scott Family Estate Pinot Noir

The Scott Family Estate Pinot Noir features a bright and silky flavor palette interwoven with earthy hints of vanilla and accents of red fruits and freshly picked herbs. Pair this Pinot with wild salmon, grilled Pacific tuna, or roast duck or chicken prepared with an herb and garlic crust.

title: Lander-Jenkins Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Lander-Jenkins Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

With fragrance of toasted oak, blackberry and cherry the Lander-Jenkins Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon most definitely provides just what you're looking for. It has a medium-light body and flavors of toffee, blueberry and cranberry that pairs well with beef, lamb or gamey meats. Super sweet, you will love this wine for the accent it gives to your foods.

title: Louis Jadot Beaujolais-Villages
body_html:
Louis Jadot Beaujolais-Villages

Louis Jadot Beaujolais-Villages burst with the rich and ripe flavors of juicy cherry fruit and raspberries. The wine is light bodied, well-balanced and scrumptious. Experience a delicate, yet refined taste in your mouth. It pairs well with white meats and grilled red meats. Get ready to celebrate precious moments.

title: Louis Jadot Beaujolais
body_html:
Louis Jadot Beaujolais

The Louis Jadot Beaujolais is a delightful bright red wine full of strawberry flavor and fresh mineral acidity. This wine offers a rich, crisp, fruity taste with a hint of flowers and pairs great with red meats or roasted white meats, such as roasted citrus chicken or steak.

title: Zin-Phomaniac Old Vines Zinfandel
body_html:
Zin-Phomaniac Old Vines Zinfandel

Old Vine Zinfandel by Zin-Phomaniac is a dark, almost black ruby color that is crisp, dry, yet extraordinarily fruity. This bright and fruity wine has fruity and toasty aromas of berry cobbler a la mode along with fragrant cocoa. Zin-Phomaniac is a medium-bodied wine which has a leafy tannin cedar finish along with hints of light oak. The taste has touches of salt and peppered roasted nuts and bright, sweet cherries giving it an original taste does not compare to other zinfandels.

Old Vine Zinfandel by Zin-Phomaniac pairs well with root vegetables such as carrots, potatoes, and rutabagas. It is delicious with beef dishes such as a classic beef stew.

title: Jellybean Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Jellybean Pinot Grigio

Jellybean Pinot Grigio gives you a wonderfully blended taste of sweet fruits some of which are key lime, nectarine, green apple, and white peach. Along with these magnificent flavors you will be able to pick up some beautiful floral notes that include honeysuckle, and jasmine. Jellybean Pinot Grigio pairs well with fresh salads and dishes that include Asian noodles and even shrimp kabobs.

title: Treos Wines Stolen Kisses Pinot Gris
body_html:
Treos Wines Stolen Kisses Pinot Gris

Treos Wines Stolen Kisses Pinot Gris offers a touch of sweetness to sip alone or to pair with hors d’oevres, seafood, pork or vegetables. Made of popular Oregon pinot gris grapes and blended with Muscat, this wine is perfect for all occasions, whether alone or paired with many food options.

title: Louis Jadot Macon-Villages Chardonnay
body_html:
Louis Jadot Macon-Villages Chardonnay

The Louis Jadot Macon-Villages Chardonnay is a deliciously classic chardonnay with clean crisp fresh fruit flavors. Featuring the flavors of green apples and bright fresh honeydew melon, along with a slight hint of candied fruit, this Louis Jadot Macon-Villages Chardonnay features a wonderful flavor bouquet without being overly complex. Pair this perfect chardonnay with fresh seafood dishes or grilled chicken and you will be able to better enjoy all that this wine has to offer.

title: Sutter Home Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Sutter Home Cabernet Sauvignon

Rich cherry and toasted vanilla in both flavor and fragrance give the Sutter Home Cabernet Sauvignon a richness and fullness that you'll love pairing with chicken, red meats and even pasta. With its medium body, this dry wine also features hints of toasted oak and even blackcurrents running through alongside herbal scents.

title: Sutter Home Chardonnay
body_html:
Sutter Home Chardonnay

Fresh, crisp accents of summer fruit blend smoothly with this varietal's classic creaminess in this award-winning Sutter Home Chardonnay. Serve this with halibut, Pacific cod, trout, or any other whitefish drizzled with a cream-based sauce for an elegant dinner. It also pairs well with roast chicken and light summer salads.

title: Sutter Home Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Sutter Home Sauvignon Blanc

If you are in the mood for a medium-dry white wine that is delicious and crisp, this Sutter Home Sauvignon Blanc is the perfect choice for you. This award-winning sauvignon blanc is light and refreshing with flavors of passion fruit, fresh honeydew melon, and bright grapefruit. If you want to truly experience the best that the Sutter Home Sauvignon Blanc has to offer, pair it with savory herbaceous chicken dishes or fresh shellfish and seafood dishes.

title: Sutter Home Merlot
body_html:
Sutter Home Merlot

Sutter Home Merlot is an award-winning wine that pairs great with grilled chicken or caramelized roasted vegetables. The black cherry dry wine is fresh, smooth and has a hint of spice. The perfect wine for a low key night with friends and family.

title: Sutter Home Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Sutter Home Pinot Grigio

Notes of tropical fruit seamlessly combine with soft floral notes to make Sutter Home Pinot Grigio the white wine of choice when the occasion calls for something crisp that tastes like a sunny summer day. Pair it with fruit, fish, or poultry or enjoy it alone after dinner.

title: Sutter Home Sangria
body_html:
Sutter Home Sangria

Paired beautifully with California style tapas, the Sutter Home Sangria has a juicy and citrusy flavor profile that accents with just a little bit of spice. Pour over the top of just a little ice and you'll be ready for your meal, especially when you add in just a little fresh fruit.

title: Sutter Home Moscato
body_html:
Sutter Home Moscato

This beautiful wine features scents of sweet fruits like lycee and peach alongside florals such as rose. With a sweet flavor of honeydew and peach the Sutter Home Moscato is perfect for pairing with your favorite desserts. It goes excellently with light cheese, desserts and even fruit, especially when slightly chilled.

title: Sutter Home White Zinfandel
body_html:
Sutter Home White Zinfandel

A lightly sweet, but crisp wine, Sutter Home White Zinfandel presents a delicate aroma of sun-ripened berries and a pleasing pale rose color. Strawberry and melon flavors with a hint of vanilla tempt the palate. The wine’s light, fresh flavor makes it an excellent choice for grilled chicken, spicy Asian, Latin or Indian cuisine and light cheeses. Sutter Home White Zinfandel is best when well chilled.

title: Starborough Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Starborough Sauvignon Blanc

Made with just the right mix of citrus and tropical fruits, this Starborough Sauvignon Blanc gives the sweetness and tartness that you want in a wine without the bitterness of the tannins from the skin. The passionfruit, kiwi and guava flavors pair excellently with cheeses, oysters, herbs and even dairy ingredients.

TASTING NOTES

Fresh Guava
Sweet Kiwi
Zesty Citrus
Tropical Passion Fruit

title: K Vintners Charles Smith 'Vino' Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Vino Evergreen Vineyard Pinot Grigio

The Charles Smith Vino Evergreen Vineyard Pinot Grigio pairs excellently with grilled seafood and light pasta because of the broad feel of the wine. Flavors and aromas of apricot, hay and nutmeg create an elegant finish that also provides a broad flavor. It is grown exclusively at the Evergreen Vineyard.

title: Charles Smith Kung Fu Girl Riesling
body_html:
Charles Smith Kung Fu Girl Riesling

When you want a wine that hits you with flavor the same way a Kung Fu movie hits you with spectacular action, then you need to try the Charles Smith 'Kung Fu Girl' Riesling. This smooth and fruity riesling is not overly sweet making it a light and crisp wine similar to German rieslings. With an impressive 90 point rating on the Wine Spectator, the Charles Smith 'Kung Fu Girl' Riesling features flavors of white peach, apricot, fresh lime, and a hint of Fuji apples. Pair this riesling with spicy foods to give your meal balance and enhance the flavors. Madarin chicken and pad thai are great options with the Charles Smith 'Kung Fu Girl' Riesling.

title: Charles Smith The Velvet Devil Merlot
body_html:
Charles Smith The Velvet Devil Merlot

Classic Merlot accents such as ripe dark cherries, spring cherry blossoms, cedar, tobacco, and anise combine with a velvety finish to create this ultra-smooth Charles Smith 'The Velvet Devil' Merlot. Pair it with roasted pork tenderloin for an elegant meal and watch this wine live up to its name.

title: Charles Smith Boom Boom Syrah
body_html:
Charles Smith Boom Boom Syrah

If you are looking for a wine with that "boom, boom, pow" of flavors then you need to try the incredible Charles Smith Boom Boom Syrah. This wine has unparalleled tannins and delicious flavors of dark cherries, blackberries, and boysenberries along with the spiciness of savory herbs as well as black pepper. Pair this Charles Smith 'Boom Boom' Syrah with griilled lamb or grilled eggplant to best bring out the delicious flavors in this wine.

title: CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio
body_html:
CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio

This CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Willow Springs Pinot Grigio is a delightfully crisp summer cocktail wine. The fresh tropical flavors are combined with a touch of spice that engage all your senses. Bright, white gold in color, this wine is a perfect pairing with chicken and vegetable dishes or can be enjoyed all on its own.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas of wildflowers, peaches and pears. Fresh, tropical flavors combined with a touch of spice in this medium-bodied wine provide a lovely finish that is crisp and refreshing on the palate.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Grigio

title: CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

A crisp, refreshing wine with brilliant citrus and herbaceous notes. A peppery lemon flavor that is dry and yet fruity. Bright, light, yellow straw in coloring. Created in the vineyards of California, this medium bodied CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Willow Springs Sauvignon Blanc is a perfect pairing to seafood, roasted chicken, mild cheeses, fruit and pasta.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas of lemon, kiwi and herbaceous notes. Flavors of grapefruit and citrus make this crisp, refreshing wine a food-friendly favorite.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Sauvignon Blanc

title: CK Mondavi Family Chardonnay
body_html:
CK Mondavi Family Chardonnay

This medium bodied CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Chardonnay tantalizes your taste buds with flavors of apple and pear and finishes with a crisp hint of oak. Bright, yellow, straw gold in color, this wine is a perfect pairing to roasted chicken, seafood, pastas with cream sauce and hearty cheeses or can be enjoyed all on its own.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas of lemon and citrus. Flavors of apple and pear mingle with a hint of oak in this medium-bodied wine that is smooth and refreshing.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: CK Mondavi Family Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

This classic CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon boasts a deep, rich red color which is mirrored by its complex flavors of rich cherry and blackberry, finished with a hint of oak. This wine is a perfect pairing to lamb, grilled steak, and hearty pastas. Dry and full bodied with a peppery brisk finish.

TASTING NOTES
Classic, deep red color, rich with cherry and blackberry flavors with a hint of oak and a long, silky finish for a perfectly balanced wine.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: CK Mondavi Family Merlot
body_html:
CK Mondavi Family Merlot

This CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Merlot is a delicious oaky medium-bodied red wine with a well-rounded flavor. The taste profile features rich ripe plums and sweet yet tart dark cherries. To really showcase the delectable CK Mondavi Family Vineyards Merlot, pair it with grilled or barbecued chicken or a rich and creamy fondue.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas of plum, blackberry jam and dark chocolate. With flavors of cherries and pecan pie, the medium-bodied wine has a soft finish that never disappoints.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Merlot

title: Union Wine Co. Underwood Rosé Can
body_html:
Union Wine Underwood Rosé Can

375ml Can

Who says wine always has to come in a bottle? If you want to try something unique and new, then the Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Rose Can is just the thing for you. This wine can features delicious watermelon, strawberry, and peach flavors with just the right mix of dry and sweet flavors. Pair this Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Rose Can with grilled seafood or light rice and pasta dishes.

title: Gekkeikan Black and Gold Sake
body_html:
Gekkeikan Black and Gold Sake

Whether you are new to drinking sake or a seasoned veteran, you will want to give this Gekkeikan Black and Gold Sake a try. This sake has a smooth and mellow flavor that make it pleasant to drink. This Gekkeikan Black and Gold Sake is a blend of two different sakes giving it a full-bodied flavor of toasted nuts, papaya, anise, and honeydew melon.

Sake is always a great choice to have, but when you can have sake that is a great combination of two wonderful sakes you can’t go wrong and that is just what the Gekkeikan Black & Gold is, a wonderful blend of two sakes. The Gekkeikan Black & Gold Sake is great blend of wonderful fruits such as papaya, honeydew and roasted nuts. This has a smooth finish and it is extremely balanced; it has an impeccable taste and you can enjoy it best with grilled chicken, scallops, pork, duck or steamed shellfish. Pair this rice wine with shellfish and scallops for a deliciously wonderful experience.

title: Marchesi Antinori Tignanello Toscana IGT
body_html:
Marchesi Antinori Tignanello Toscana

For the true wine connoisseur, it is a rarity to find a unique wine that surprises the palate. However, this Marchesi Antinori Tignanello Toscana IGT does just that with flavors of black currants, raspberries, white pepper, and blueberries for a polished, yet complex tasting profile. This delectable wine is highly praised and is rated in the Top 100 Wine Spectator Wines at number 8. Pair the Marchesi Antinori Tignanello Toscana IGT with dessert, especially dark chocolate and you will not be sorry.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red Wine

title: Ziobaffa Filmmaker's Edition 'Bella Vita' Red
body_html:
Ziobaffa Filmmaker's Edition 'Bella Vita' Red

Ziobaffa Filmmaker's Edition 'Bella Vita' Red is dense, herbal, and practically bursting with flavor. This tantalizing Tuscan-made blend of Sangiovese and Syrah is biodynamic and organic, but the real star is the wine's elegant balance and supple tannins. Drink it with a rosemary crusted beef tenderloin or a homemade pizza.

title: Davis Bynum Pinot Noir
body_html:
Davis Bynum Pinot Noir

Soft, warm, and full of balanced fruit and spice, this bottle of Davis Bynum Pinot Noir is everything you’d expect from a high-level Russian River Pinot. The bright cherry and cranberry aromas and dry, earthy finish will pair beautifully with duck prosciutto or a mushroom and fig flatbread.

title: Terlato Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Terlato Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio

The Terlato Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio is a layered white wine with a complex array of flavors. With overtones of white peaches and pears, as well as aromas and flavors of spring flowers and apricots, you can enjoy a dazzlingly rich yet crisp white wine. Shellfish like shrimp and crap pair well with the Terlato Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio as does lemon-grilled chicken.

title: Patz & Hall Sonoma Coast Chardonnay
body_html:
Patz & Hall Sonoma Coast Chardonnay

Patz & Hall Sonoma Coast Chardonnay is a crisp and bright white wine with a deceptively complex flavor profile. The hints of guava, lime zest, honeydew melon, and even cinnamon, and warm vanilla make this a well-rounded chardonnay. Enjoy the Patz & Hall Sonoma Coast Chardonnay with seafood or a crisp, fresh salad.

title: Patz & Hall Pinot Noir
body_html:
Patz & Hall Pinot Noir

Enjoy your evening with a nice seared salmon and a glass of Patz & Hall's Pinot Noir in your hand. Relax with supple, tart berry flavors and earthy aromas. This wine is perfect for settling in on the weekend and enjoying savory notes that sing of warm nights in front of the fire.

title: Lillet Blanc Aperitif
body_html:
Lillet Blanc Aperitif

A key ingredient in the original James Bond martini (called a Vesper), Lillet Blanc is as smooth and surprising as 007 himself. Drink it on its own as an aperetif or pair the Lillet's bitter citrus notes with a snack of marinated olives and herbed cheese.

title: Lander-Jenkins Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Lander-Jenkins Vineyards Pinot Noir

If you are looking for a deep, dark red wine with rich and warm flavors, then the Lander-Jenkins Vineyards Pinot Noir is the right bottle of wine for you. This super fruity wine has flavors of blueberry along with oak and caramel. Pair this red wine with a juicy steak or filet mignon and you will bring out the best in both.

title: Carnivor Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Carnivor Cabernet Sauvignon

Every bit as big and bold as the the name suggest. From color to long-lasting finish, Carnivor Cabernet Sauvignon boasts rich berry, oak, and mocha flavors with velvety tannins that softly but persistently grip the palate. Serve it with slow-braised short ribs or crispy duck breast and cherries.

title: Riunite Lambrusco
body_html:
Riunite Lambrusco Italian Red Wine

The rich and delectable Riunite Lambrusco Red Wine is crafted from luscious Lambrusco grapes, originating in ancient Rome. With a medium bodied taste that doesn't overwhelm its sweet, fruity flavor, this is the perfect wine to sit down and relax with an authentic Italian meal such as Tortellini Alla Panna.

Riunite Lambrusco offers a medium body and a somewhat sweet and fruity flavor that pairs well with pasta, red sauces, chicken dishes, and foods with some spice. This delightful red wine is best served chilled and enjoyed with or without a hearty meal. Riunite Lambrusco Red Wine contains 8% ALC by volume.

title: Lillet Rouge Aperitif
body_html:
Lillet Rouge Aperitif

The Lillet Rouge Aperitif is a blend of seductive wines including Merlot and Cabernet Sauvignon grapes that are infused with cinchona bark and fruit liqueurs. The fine notes of tannins and dark fruits offer it a slightly bitter finish despite its full character. This aperitif is best served over ice and pairs well with fresh fruit, smoked salmon, and caviar.

title: Chloe Pinot Noir
body_html:
Chloe Pinot Noir

Chloe Pinot Noir offers plump red cranberries and cherries combined with a touch of cola, sagebrush, anise and purple flowers to give it an amazing taste. Smashed herbs, strawberry candy and anise are framed with acidity. This wine tends to pair well with a smoky glazed ham or a delectable lentil curry.

TASTING NOTES

It exudes fruit-forward flavors and aromas of fresh strawberry, juicy plum and black cherry. A plush, velvety mouthfeel is followed by an undeniably, satisfying finish with soft notes of spicy clove and vanilla.

title: Chloe Prosecco
body_html:
Chloe Prosecco

Bursting with fine bubbles, Chloe Prosecco is loaded with the flavors of tangerines, pears and peaches. Upon popping the cork you'll be hit with notes of green apple, lilac and white guava. This sparkling wine has a clean and crisp finish that is elegantly acidic. Perfect for pairing with lamb.

TASTING NOTES

Peach, Apple, Citrus, White Flowers

title: Chloe Chardonnay
body_html:
Chloe Chardonnay

The Chloe Chardonnay offers an oaky and tropical expression of grapes. It’s slightly sweetened and round with a smooth butter-like silkiness. The wine is aged in American and French oak and tends to go exceptionally well with lobster, swordfish and halibut. A definite must-have for seafood lovers who want the perfect wine to accentuate their dish.

TASTING NOTES

Fresh citrus, apple and pear with notes of creamy butter followed by soft hints of vanilla and toasted oak. The resulting wine is exceptionally well-balanced with sophisticated intensity, a creamy mid-palate and an unforgettable, silky finish.

title: Clarendelle
body_html:
Clarendelle

Clarendelle combines a blend of various grape varieties from other key wine varieties that helps gives it character and a subtle structure that is unlike other wines. It has a nice blend of elegance and balance that far outweigh its power. It goes nicely with fish, seafood, veal and chicken.

Predominantly Merlot with Cabernet Sauvignon and Cabernet Franc.

Thanks to a skilful blend of three traditional Bordeaux grape varieties (Cabernet Sauvignon, Merlot, and Cabernet Franc), this is a wine of character with a subtle structure. Making the most of the complementary qualities of each variety, oenologists from Domaine Clarence Dillon and the team from Clarence Dillon Wines produce very well-balanced wine.

title: Santa Margherita Brut Prosecco
body_html:
Santa Margherita Brut Prosecco 750ml

This classic sparkly prosecco brut from the Valdobbaidene region of the Veneto is a dry and well-balanced wine. Its fruity fragrance, with notes of apple and peach, make Santa Margherita Brut Prosecco the perfect celebratory drink for special occasions. It pairs well with seafood and stands alone as an aperitif or dessert wine.

TASTING NOTES

This sparkling wine has fine, lively bubbles that dance within its bright straw-yellow color and greenish reflections. Its lovely aromas include ripe pineapples, peaches, and Rennet apples as well as delicate florals. Its finish is bright and dry, yet sweet on the palate.

title: Le Grand Courtage Brut Rosé Mini 187ml
body_html:
Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Brut Rosé

187ml

Fresh and fruity, the Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Brut Rose has notes of lilacs and violets. Coming in a mini bottle, the sparkling wine is a favorite party favor or in a gift basket. The Chardonnay adds a deep flavor profile, while the Ugni Blanc adds a bit of crispness. The rich acidity of the sparkling wine goes well with fatty foods like cheeses and sweets.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas:
Bright aromas of fresh strawberry, raspberry and pomegranate combine with notes of lilac and violet.

Flavor:
It is deliciously seductive while smooth and versatile. A perfect balance of freshness, fruit, acidity, and sweetness.

title: Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Brut Rose
body_html:
Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Brut Rose

The Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Brut Rose is aptly recognized as the perfect blend of Ugni Blanc, Chardonnay, and Gamay. It tastes like a floral arrangement of roses mixed with the sharp, tart, but sweet taste of strawberries that resonates as the wine lingers in your mouth. This alcoholic beverage is perfectly paired with spicy meals, but remains just as savory when served alone.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas:
Bright aromas of fresh strawberry, raspberry and pomegranate combine with notes of lilac and violet.

Flavor:
It is deliciously seductive while smooth and versatile. A perfect balance of freshness, fruit, acidity, and sweetness.

title: Le Grand Courtage Blanc de Blancs Brut Mini 187ml
body_html:
Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Blanc de Blancs Brut

187ml

You are going to tie the knot, and your girlfriends have planned one last bash. Thank them and get the party started with this 187ml Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Blanc de Blancs Brut. Mini-bottles of this creamy sparkling wine start the party right while expressing gratitude for their support. Pair with appetizers, creamy pastas, and fruity desserts.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas:
With bright flavors of green apple, ripe melon, honeysuckle and toasted brioche.

Flavor Profile:
A delicate balance of dryness and acidity lingers with flavors of Meyer lemon, honeydew & soft floral notes. Crisp, light, refreshing with baby bubbles. Great length.

title: Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Blanc de Blancs Brut
body_html:
Le Grand Courtage Grande Cuvee Blanc de Blancs Brut

Indulge in this balanced and fruity Le Grand Courtage Blanc de Blancs brut. With aromas of apples, honeysuckle and strawberry, it pairs well with tasty appetizers, creamy pastas, and fruity desserts. One sip of this Le Grand Courtage Blanc de Blancs brut produces an ideal balance of fruit, acidity, and sweetness.

TASTING NOTES

Aromas:
With bright flavors of green apple, ripe melon, honeysuckle and toasted brioche.

Flavor Profile:
A delicate balance of dryness and acidity lingers with flavors of Meyer lemon, honeydew & soft floral notes. Crisp, light, refreshing with baby bubbles. Great length.

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Orange Moscato
body_html:
Il Conte d'Alba Stella Rosa Imperiale Orange Moscato

Made with grapes cultivated from Italy, this Il Conte d'Alba sparkling orange moscato is a delicate balance of acidity and sweetness. With aromas of orange blossom, peach, and apricot, it pairs well with mild cheeses, fruity desserts, and indulgent cold treats like vanilla ice cream.

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Moscato
body_html:
Il Conte d'Alba Stella Rosa Imperiale Moscato

Il Conte D’Alba Stella Rosa Moscato Imperiale is a delightful sparkling moscato wine from Northwestern Italy. With its light effervescence and remarkable sweetness, this unique white wine has fragrant aromas of wildflowers, juicy peaches, and flavorful pears. It is packed with the flavor of pears and peaches to make this a superbly delicious wine. Pair with your favorite salads topped with bleu or gorgonzola cheeses. It is also is great with a freshly baked peach cobbler topped with vanilla bean ice cream.

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Brachetto d'Acqui DOCG
body_html:
Stella Rosa Imperiale Brachetto d'Acqui DOCG

A premium sparkling red wine, Conte d'Alba Stella Rosa Imperiale Brachette d'Acqui DOCG is lightly effervescent and pleasantly sweet. With its floral and fruity aromas of fresh rose petals and raspberries, Stella Rosa is a perfect accompaniment for both fruit and cheese plates and chocolate desserts.

title: Joel Gott Wines Merlot
body_html:
Joel Gott Wines Merlot

Joel Gott Wines Merlot draws deep, rich flavors from black cherry and blueberry with notes of vanilla and spices. Blackberry and mocha flavor is balanced and bright for an elegant finish. Try pairing Joel Gott Wines Merlot with a hearty meat dish like an herb and breadcrumb encrusted pork tenderloin.

TASTING NOTES

Our California Merlot has aromas of cherries, raspberries and red plum with notes of maple and vanilla. On the palate, red fruit flavors are complemented by balanced acidity and juicy tannins with hints of spice on the long, textured finish.

title: Jack's House Chardonnay
body_html:
Jack's House Chardonnay

Jack's House Chardonnay is a smooth, easy drinking California wine that is light and crisp with a citrus nature. Green apples leave this wine with a clean, refreshing finish. Chardonnays are great with seafood. Try Jack's House Chardonnay with spicy Cajun style shrimp served in a creamy alfredo on pasta.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: Ruffino IL Ducale Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Ruffino IL Ducale Friuli Pinot Grigio

This Ruffino IL Ducale Friuli Pinot Grigio is a bright wine full of fruity flavors of pineapple, white peach and tropical fruits that definitely make you feel like you're on vacation. With an aroma of white flower and sage, it pairs best with seafood dishes of shrimp and lighter fish.

TASTING NOTES

Color:
Straw Yellow with a hint of gold.

Aroma:
Fresh and fragrant with bright aromas of pineapple, white peach, and tropical fruit accompanied by delicate white flowers and sage, followed by flavors of apple and pear.

Tasting profile:
The acidity is firm but balanced, working with the ripe fruit taste profile to confer freshness and a mineral touch to the wine.

title: Ruffino Lumina Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Ruffino Lumina Pinot Grigio Venezia Giulia

Ruffino Lumina Pinot Grigio Venezia Giulia is a medium bodied wine that layers the tasting notes of fresh apples and pears with a bouquet of meadow flowers, sage and mint. Complexly elegant, this Pinot Grigio has a minerality that pairs well with lighter fare including charcuterie, seafood, and white meat dishes.

TASTING NOTES

Color:
Straw yellow.

Aroma:
Notes of meadow flowers, pears, and golden apple. The bouquet is fresh and complex, showing refined notes of sage and mint accompanied by an elegant minerality typical of Pinot Grigio.

Tasting profile:
Medium bodied, lively, and elegant. A touch of minerality lingers in the finish, with notes of lemon peel.

title: Ruffino Prosecco
body_html:
Ruffino Prosecco

Crisp, clean and bubbly, the delicious Ruffino Prosecco sparkling white wine is made primarily out of exquisite Glera grapes grown near the lovely northeastern Italian village of Prosecco. Ruffino Prosecco is intensely fragrant, fruity and easy-to-drink, pairing well with a variety of cuisine from pizza to fish and chicken dishes.

TASTING NOTES

Color:
Bright straw yellow with fine bubbles.

Aroma:
The boquet is fragrant and bursting with fruit notes. It shows clean aromas of apples, pears and citrus, accompanied by hints of wisteria.

Tasting profile:
Crisp, clean and delicate with fine bubbles on the palate. Intense flavors of apples and peaches lead to a pleasant finish with lingering fruit and floral notes.

title: Robert Mondavi Bourbon Barrel-Aged Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Winery Private Selection Bourbon Barrel-Aged Cabernet Sauvignon

Robert Mondavi Winery Private Selection Bourbon Barrel-Aged Cabernet Sauvignon is a deep cherry red from its rich black cherries and blueberries with vanilla and brown sugar aroma that is sure to please. Robert Mondavi Winery Private Selection Bourbon Barrel-Aged Cabernet Sauvignon is best with some bourbon glazed ribs to match.

We craft this richly textured Cabernet Sauvignon with Monterey County fruit, picked at the peak of ripeness in our coastal vineyards. In a truly original alternative to traditional aging, we set aside a portion of the blend to age in a mix of new and used bourbon barrels. The new barrels give the wine its deep undertones of toasted oak. The used barrels—selected from a renowned Kentucky distillery—exude notes of vanilla and dried herbs, hinting at the fine bourbon that once graced these casks. The result is a bold, flavorful wine, unlike any other Cabernet.

Layered and complex, our Bourbon Barrel-aged Cabernet Sauvignon leaps from the glass with aromas of blackberry cobbler, graham cracker, brown sugar, milk chocolate, coffee and smoke. A palate of blueberry pie, praline, sweet vanilla custard, caramel and mocha is framed by soft, chewy tannins and a hint of toasted oak on the lingering finish.

title: Cook's Cellars California Champagne Brut
body_html:
Cook's Cellars California Champagne Brut

Cook's Cellars California Champagne Brut is medium-dry in finish and has a crisp fruit flavor. Apple and pear are the dominant flavor with floral nuances. Champagnes are light and great with snacks before the main course, try matching Cook's Cellars California Champagne Brut with some sriracha and wasabi deviled eggs.

title: Manischewitz Blackberry Wine
body_html:
Manischewitz Blackberry Wine

When you want wine that's out of the ordinary, nothing is better suited than Manischewitz Blackberry Wine. Bottled under strict Rabbinical supervision, this delectable kosher wine is sweet and succulent, boasting a fragrant floral bouquet, deep fruit flavors, and a palate reminiscent of rich blackberry jam. Perfect for any vibrant occasion or Jewish holiday, few wines can match Manischewitz Blackberry Wine's refreshing allure.

title: Liberty School Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Liberty School Cabernet Sauvignon

For a night when you are in the mood for a rich and deeply complex red wine, pour a glass of this Liberty School Cabernet Sauvignon. This wine has overtones of ripe black cherries as well as the unique flavors of blackberries and boysenberries. If you are looking to drink your Liberty School Cabernet Sauvignon with a meal, consider pairing it with a juicy steak or stew and you will best be able to enjoy your wine and your meal.

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Moscato Spumante Rose
body_html:
Stella Rosa Imperiale Moscato Spumante Rose By The Best Wine Store

Il Conte d'Alba Stella Rosa Imperiale Moscato Spumante Rose

Piedmonte in Northwestern Italy is famous for its Moscato grapes and the wines made from said grapes. This Il Conte d'Alba Stella Rosa Imperiale Moscato Spumante Rose is no exception.

Fruity Sweetness & Fresh Fruit Sent 

Its fruity sweetness combines well with fresh fruit and cheeses from this region of Italy, or with very rich, creamy and/or velvety desserts. Get my Stella Rose NOW!

title: Stella Rosa Imperiale Prosecco
body_html:
Il Conte Stella Rosa Imperiale Prosecco

The Il Conte Stella Rosa Imperiale Prosecco is sparking, extra dry, white wine, crafted from grapes grown in the Treviso, Italy countryside. Surprisingly bubbly and tart at the same time, the Rosa Imperiale Prosecco should be reserved for the most special of occasions. While drinking it on its own is recommended, you can pair it with lightly seasoned freshwater fish.

title: Ferrari-Carano Fume Blanc
body_html:
Ferrari-Carano Fume Blanc Sauvignon Blanc

Ferrari Carrano Fume Blanc Sauvignon Blanc is warm golden-colored white wine from the Sonoma Valley region of California. With a slight grassiness and hint of creamy citrus, this flavorful Fume Blanc has a fun, tropical fruity taste of fresh pineapples, mangoes, kiwis, and even gooseberries. This wine pairs great with simple seafood dishes such as grilled salmon.

title: Ferrari-Carano Chardonnay
body_html:
Ferrari-Carano Chardonnay

Ferrari Carrano Chardonnay is a flavorful chardonnay that has delightful flavors of pear, mangoes, rich golden caramel, toasted oak and heavenly creamy finish. Take in its aromas of graham crackers, figs, and hazelnuts. This medium-bodied white wine can be served with poultry such as Cornish game hen or even a snack of cheese, crackers, and fruit.

title: Ferrari-Carano Anderson Valley Pinot Noir
