body_html:
Ferrari-Carano Anderson Valley Pinot Noir

Ferrari Carrano Anderson Valley Pino Noir has everything that you want in a red wine with the smoothness of a white wine. This vibrant red has notes of cola, pomegranate, rich red cherries, delicate rose petals, bright raspberries. Then, you discover blackberries, dark plums, and some spice. This wine is amazing with beef bourguignon or even grilled salmon.

title: Kim Crawford Pinot Noir
body_html:
Kim Crawford Pinot Noir

Kim Crawford Pinot Noir is a rich New Zealand’s South Island that has intense fruity flavors of strawberries and dark cherries. Because this wine is partially aged in French oak barrels there is a lovely yet complex texture of tannins and rich oak. Pair this pinot noir with a creamy risotto filled with wild mushrooms or a flavorful herb-crusted lamb.

TASTING NOTES

COLOR:
Dark red

AROMA:
Lifted red berry fruit aromas with dark cherry notes, complemented by savory undertones and spicy oak.

PALATE:
Ripe, dark berry flavors of blackberry and black currant. Subtle hints of oak help fill out the palate.

CELLAR:
One to five years.

APPELLATION:
New Zealand

PAIRINGS:
Ideal with herb-crusted racks of lamb, mushroom risotto, or all on its own!

title: Kim Crawford Chardonnay
body_html:
Kim Crawford Chardonnay

When you open a bottle of Kim Crawford Chardonnay, you open a gateway to the sunny vineyards of Marlborough, New Zealand. 

Celebrate the fresh, succulent taste of this top selling Chardonnay 

Are you looking for a top selling Chardonnay? The a Best Wine Store has your answer. Each grape is tended with care to celebrate the fresh, succulent taste of the fruit itself.

Hint of Butterscotch & tropical fruit aroma

With its pale straw complexion and tropical fruit aroma, this chardonnay is kissed with a hint of butterscotch, making it the perfect partner for any seafood or "fusion" dishes. Get my bottle now!

TASTING NOTES

COLOR: Medium straw color

AROMA: Lifted aromas of citrus and stone fruit with notes of tropical fruit and pineapple.

PALATE: An approachable and full-bodied Chardonnay that shows great length and persistence. Medium weight with a creamy texture and hints of butterscotch and lemon meringue pie.

CELLAR: Two years with confidence.

APPELLATION: New Zealand

PAIRINGS: Delicious paired with Camembert cheese, pan-seared salmon, or other white meat dishes.

title: Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc

With a twist of a cap, journey to the bountiful vineyards of Marlborough, New Zealand. Close your eyes and let the crisp, summertime citrus flavors dance on your taste-buds.

The straw colored wine will delight you with its sweetness and balanced flavor profile. It is perfectly paired with fresh oysters, asparagus, lobster and summer salads. Make this summer one to remember with Kim Crawford Sauvignon Blanc.

TASTING NOTES

COLOR:
Very pale yellow

AROMA:
Classic Marlborough Sauvignon Blanc aromas of lifted citrus, tropical fruit, and crushed herbs.

PALATE:
A fresh, juicy wine with vibrant acidity and plenty of weight and length on the palate. Ripe, tropical fruit flavor with passion fruit, melon, and grapefruit.

APPELLATION:
New Zealand

PAIRINGS:
Pairs brilliantly with fresh oysters, asparagus, lobster, or summer salads.

title: Ravenswood Winery Vintners Blend Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Ravenswood Winery Vintners Blend Cabernet Sauvignon

This Ravenswood Winery Vintners Blend Cabernet Sauvignon is rife with rich bold flavors of black currants, blackberries, oakiness, and warm vanilla. This wine is deep and complex with robust tannins and is well-suited to being paired with equally rich and bold meals. Drink this Ravenswood Wintery Vintners Blend Cabernet Sauvignon with filet mignon or lamb for a truly decadent experience.

title: Toasted Head Chardonnay
body_html:
R.H. Phillips Toasted Head Chardonnay

Crafted with delicious California grapes, mostly picked from the gorgeous Dunnigan Hills of Yolo County, the R.H. Phillips Toasted Head Chardonnay is barrel-aged and hand-stirred every two weeks. The result is a buttery, creamy, toasted oak flavor perfect for pairing with shellfish such as shrimp, crab and lobster.

title: Daou Discovery Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Daou Discovery Cabernet Sauvignon

Daou Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon is a robust wine of many textured layers, ripe with black raspberry, black cherry, and black currants, tinged with hints of chocolate and mocha, all wrapped up in a smooth tannin finish.

This Paso Robles blend makes a complementary pairing with succulent meats like duck or pork tenderloin.

title: Black Box Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Black Box Sauvignon Blanc

Black Box Sauvignon Blanc is light, refreshing and zesty. The wine gets its kick from stone fruit, sweet peaches and some floral content. Herbaceous undertones leave this wine with a crisp finish. This sauvignon blanc is great with white meats, try Black Box Sauvignon Blanc with scallops and mixed greens.

title: Black Box Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Black Box Cabernet Sauvignon

If you're looking for great wine to pair with pork tenderloin, fillet Mignon, or perhaps roast duck, the Black Box Cabernet Sauvignon is it. Hinting of toasty oak and mocha, this wine displays aromas of black currants. Cherry and chocolate combine with smooth tannins for a lingering, soft finish.

title: Cook's Cellars California Champagne Grand Reserve
body_html:
Cook's Cellars California Champagne Grand Reserve

Cook's Cellars California Champagne Grand Reserve has a special nature due to its hint of brandy, highlighting vanilla undertones. Blended with fruits and flowers it leaves a refreshing aroma. It is great for appetizers, match Cook's Cellars California Champagne Grand Reserve with a goat cheese & roasted red pepper tart.

title: Cooks Spumante
body_html:
Cooks Spumante

Cook's Spumante is a sweet wine with toasty yeast notes and floral nuances, balanced with the aromas of peach and lychee. This champagne pairs very well with salty and fried foods. It's forward fruit flavor includes mild floral character and is a straw color.

title: Cook's Cellars California Champagne Extra Dry
body_html:
Cook's Cellars California Champagne Extra Dry

Champagne is the perfect beverage to celebrate any special occasion and if you love your champagne to be extra dry, then you need to grab yourself a bottle of this Cook's Cellars California Champagne Extra Dry. This champagne has a long and smooth finish and contains wonderful flavors of ripe crisp fruits. Pair this champagne with fruit like strawberries to draw out the flavors of both.

title: Luna Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Luna Cabernet Sauvignon

Enticing, dark flavours of ripe blackberry and plum fuse with spicy cinnamon and cloves in Luna Cabernet Sauvignon.

Its medium-tannin composition offers longevity, making it a pleasant addition to any cellar. With appealing aromas of anisse and cassis to enhance its savory taste, this compelling vintage delivers a satiny smooth finish.

title: Love Noir Pinot Noir
body_html:
Love Noir Pinot Noir

Love Noir Pinot Noir is a seductive take on a classic noir, made from the finest California ripe grapes and generous hints of dark cherries. Full of bold flavor, Love Noir Pinot Noir is great with rich cheeses like cream brie on baguettes to counter the wine's natural tart aftertaste.

title: San Antonio Winery Imperial Red
body_html:
San Antonio Winery Imperial Red

This semi-sweet, medium bodied wine pairs well with meats, cheeses, and desserts. Using Ruby Cabernet grapes, San Antonio Winery Imperial Red compliments the cherry and raspberry bouquet. This makes for a flavorful, fruit-driven wine perfect for the holiday season. The aroma is one of cherries and plums. It can be served chilled or at room temperature.

title: San Antonio Cardinale Sweet Red American
body_html:
Top Selling Cardinale Red Wine 

San Antonio Cardinale Sweet Red American

The San Antonio Cardinale Sweet Red American is a delicious and unique sweet red wine made by San Antonio Winery. Best served chilled, this sweet red has a full and robust flavor with hints of mixed berries. Learn more about Reds

Best served with savory Italian dishes

This San Antonio Cardinale Sweet Red American is best served with savory Italian dishes or with foods full of rich spices and garlic.

San Antonio Cardinale is a sweet red wine. It is a proprietary blend created by the Riboli family. Cardinale can be enjoyed by itself or with your favorite cuisine. Serve slightly chilled. Gold medal winner in national competitions. See All Reds

title: Stella Rosa Moscato d'Asti DOCG
body_html:
Stella Rosa Moscato d'Asti DOCG

Let your eyes take in the very soft and pale vanilla hue of Stella Rosa Moscato d'Asti before you ever open the bottle. The first sip is full of succulent apricots, juicy peaches, and sweet honey made from the finest nectar of a flower. This light and refreshing wine is perfect with cheese fondue, salted nuts, chicken pad thai in a sweet peanut sauce, or a scrumptious and creamy New York cheesecake.

title: Stella Rosa Stella Pink Wine
body_html:
Stella Rosa Stella Pink Semi-Sweet Rose Piemonte

Stella Rosa 'Stella Pink' Semi-Sweet Rose Piemont is a flavorful wine consisting of honey, peach and delectably fine red berry qualities. Its lush and well-balanced taste pairs well with fruit based desserts or fruit salads such as a tasty Mango Berry Crunch Fruit Salad.

title: Josh Cellars Merlot
body_html:
Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Merlot

Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Merlot is a delicate blend of violets, rosemary, vanilla beans, and sweet plums. The plums are noticeable in its smooth texture along with Bing cherries and cocoa powder. This type of wine is best served with Italian cuisine, such as spaghetti and lasagna and other tomato based dishes.

title: Josh Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon

With its deep red texture, Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon has a fusion of clove, cinnamon, and dark berry flavors. An aggregate of hazelnut, toasted almonds, and vanilla flavoring add a sweet taste combined with bold tannins to give this succulent treat a rich and steady flavor. This bold and exceptional blend is best enjoyed with your favorite dish of seasoned beef.

FOOD PAIRING

We love pairing this wine with well-seasoned meats like beef, pork, or lamb, and indulgent chocolate desserts.

title: Josh Cellars Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Sauvignon Blanc

This very refreshing Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Sauvignon Blanc is a delight to serve cold on a hot evening. Melon, peach and lime join the light chilled grapes that make this white wine a perfect companion for fruit salad, dessert bars and/or key lime pie. Citrus-flavored poultry dishes also pair well with this wine.

title: Kenwood "Jack London" Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Jack London Cabernet Sauvignon

With grapes grown from the red volcanic soil of the Jack London Ranch, the Kenwood Vineyard Jack London Cabernet Sauvignon is complex and balanced with hints of black currant, black cherry, vanilla, herbal spice, and exquisite tannins. This wine pairs delectably with a rich prime rib dinner.

title: Kenwood Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

Kenwood Vineyards' Sonoma Sauvignon Blanc is the perfect aperitif or is equally well-paired with a spicy Pad Thai or a light shrimp and fruit salad. The intense, yet superbly-balanced flavors of lemongrass, melon and cilantro culminate with notes of grapefruit and pineapple for a crisp and refreshing finish.

title: Kenwood Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Pinot Noir

Kenwood Vinyards' Pinot Noir is full of rich, fruity aromas reminicent of black currant and raspberry. This wine pairs expertly with lamb, chicken, pork, and wild salmon. Enjoyed in many ways, this Pinot Noir provides a big and luciuous mouth feel and will provide a lasting finish that is sure to please.

title: Kenwood Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Chardonnay

Enjoy a glass of Kenwood Vineyards Chardonnay before your meal or alongside a dinner of seafood, chicken or fresh greens. A tenacious and lavish mouthful, the crisp citrus flavor is paired alongside ginger and ends with a toasty vanilla note for a crisp finish.

title: Kenwood Vineyards Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Kenwood Vineyards Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon

Kenwood Vineyards Sonoma County Cabernet Sauvignon is a full-bodied cabernet sauvignon that boast rich fruity flavors of cherry, blackcurrant, and plum and deep spicy notes of licorice and nutmeg, complemented by well-balanced acidity. This rich full sauvignon pairs well with equally full and savory foods. Enjoy this spirit with rich tomato based pasta dishes and beef rib roast.

title: Castoro Cellars Estate Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Castoro Sauvignon Blanc

Serve your guests the best with this multi-award winning Castoro Cellars Estate Sauvignon Blanc that has a lemongrass and melon aroma with a crisp delivery of pear flavors that delight the tongue. Serve with a mirad of food from spicey Thai to garlic shrimp as this wine pairs with most anything.

Castoro Sauvignon Blanc is a refreshing crisp white wine. Lush in flavor and highly aromatic, along with a spicy aroma and flavor. The grapes used to make this Sauvignon Blanc are from Dos Vinas vineyard. One of the freshest and crips wines you will have the pleasure of enjoying.

Crisp and refreshing, this wine is sure to please! Great with most light fish dishes.

title: Mer Soleil Santa Lucia Highlands Reserve Chardonnay
body_html:
Mer Soleil Santa Lucia Highlands Reserve Chardonnay

Named for the sun and the sea, Mer Soleil 'Santa Lucia Highlands' Reserve Chardonnay tastes light and bright on the tongue. The Santa Lucia Highlands Reserve is made from early season grapes, and is ideal for sipping on a spring night. Its full, crisp flavor pairs well with seafood and creamy fresh vegetables.

title: Mer Soleil Silver Unoaked Chardonnay
body_html:
Mer Soleil Silver Unoaked Chardonnay

With a pale yellow hue Mer Soleil Silver Unoaked Chardonnay is well balanced with great structure. Bright minerality, pink grapefruit and key lime characters shine through on the nose, followed by lemon zest and stone-fruit. The mid-palate displays intriguing notes of lemon meringue, quince and citrus, complemented by a crisp acidity that carries through from start to finish. The higher acidity in this wine makes it a perfect accompaniment to a wide array of food, particularly salads, grilled seafood, tomato-based dishes and fresh oysters.

title: Mer Soleil Santa Barbara County Reserve Chardonnay
body_html:
Mer Soleil 'Santa Barbara County' Reserve Chardonnay

Mer Soleil 'Santa Barbara County' Reserve Chardonnay is rich and creamy with a complexity balanced by acidity. At first, rich with citrus and pineapple as it's golden hue, the Mer Soleil 'Santa Barbara County' Reserve Chardonnay finishes with oak, butter, and fruit. Pair it nicely with roasted chicken.

title: Hess Collection Hess Select Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
The Hess Collection Hess Select Cabernet Sauvignon

Add an air of class and sophistication to your next dinner party with the Hess Collection "Hess Select" Cabernet Sauvignon. Dominated with the captivating flavors of ripe plum fruits, hints of dusty oaks, and earthy spices, this rich, dark red wine is a graceful and elegant partner to beef, lamb, brie and chocolate.

title: The Hess Collection 'Hess Select' Pinot Noir
body_html:
The Hess Collection Hess Select Pinot Noir

Hess Select Pinot Noir from the Hess Collection is a medium-bodied wine that displays bright, concentrated fruit and earthy aromas tinged with peppery red cherry, pomegranate, and raspberry flavors. The refreshing texture derives from the firm tannins and energizing acidity and pairs well with smoky glazed ham or bruschetta.

title: The Hess Collection 'Hess Select' Chardonnay
body_html:
The Hess Collection Hess Select Chardonnay

Get lost in the sunny yellow color of The Hess Collection "Hess Select" Chardonnay when you pour your first glass. Crisp apples and zesty lemons and limes rush over your tastebuds for a combination of both sweet and tart throughout each notable sip of this wine with a crisp acidity. Remember the tropical notes with a hint of toasty oak long after your first taste. Pair with a Chinese chicken salad with a toasted sesame dressing or grilled albacore tuna with a salty anchovie butter.

title: SeaGlass Chardonnay
body_html:
SeaGlass Chardonnay

Seaglass Unoaked Chardonnay has a tropical fruit aroma that leads to creamy pineapple and zesty citrus fruits on the palate, then it is followed by a refreshing and lively finish. The clean and lightly oaked style is elegant and lean. There are food creations to serve with this wine.

Some of the foods that go well with this wine are creamy pasta dishes, grilled fish, and summer salads Meats that go well with this wine are sweet shellfish, fish with white flesh ( halibut, black cod (sablefish), sturgeon, mahi-mahi, tilapia), chicken, turkey, pork, and veal. Vegetables that will go very well with Seaglass Chardonnay are legumes, winter squash, and corn. Other foods creations that go well with this wine are nuts, risotto and pasta, and mild Caribbean dishes with tropical fruit flavors. These food creations will make drinking this great into a glorious experience.

TASTING NOTES

Our Chardonnay captures the cool-climate terroir of Central Coast at its best. Stone fruit aromas segue to flavors of green apple and zesty citrus on the palate, framed by a lively, refreshing finish. This clean, un-oaked style of Chardonnay is elegant and lean—the perfect complement for light pastas, grilled fish or summer salads.

title: Emmolo Merlot
body_html:
Emmolo Merlot

Emmolo Merlot is a uniquely flavored deep red wine characterized by the flavor of caramelized plums. Along with the aromas of rich mahogany and warm leather, as well as just a hint of spice, this wine is a perfect with a rich lamb dish or even with a hearty meatloaf.

title: Emmolo Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Emmolo Sauvignon Blanc

Emmolo Sauvignon Blanc has soft aromas of melon and white peach lends this wine to a very spring/summer feel. Its bit of tartness is mellowed out by its fruity body, finishing with a hint of lime. Pair Emmolo Sauvignon Blanc with spaghetti with anchovy carbonara for a light, filling meal.

title: Santa Margherita Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Santa Margherita Pinot Grigio 750ml

Whether you are planning a dinner party or a summer's night hang out, the Santa Margherita Pinot Grigio will add sweetness to your good time. The versatile white wine heightens your senses with a brilliantly crisp citrus burst and deepens into flavors of Asian pear. Serve alongside pork, poultry or shellfish and have a merry evening!

TASTING NOTES

With its straw-yellow hue, clean intense aroma, and bright, well-balanced taste, our Pinot Grigio is as authentic as it is refreshing. For those who love a dry white wine with the delightful aroma of Golden Delicious apples, our signature Pinot Grigio is unparalleled. It will impress even the most astute connoisseurs with its flavorful personality.

title: Joel Gott Wines Pinot Noir
body_html:
Joel Gott Pinot Noir

The Joel Gott Santa Barbara Pinot Noir has aromas of sweet cherries and baking spices with a hint of smoke. On the palate, ripe red fruit flavors are followed by elegantly balanced acidity and soft, velvety tannins. Buy a bottle of Joel Gott at The Best Wine Store in San Diego.

TASTING NOTES

Our California Pinot Noir has aromas of cherries, raspberries, plum, and pomegranate with notes of toasted oak and spice. On the palate, flavors of bright red fruit and candied cherries are followed by soft, velvety tannins on the mid-palate and a long, elegant finish.

title: Joel Gott Wines Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Joel Gott Wines Sauvignon Blanc

Joel Gott Sauvignon Blanc has plum, dark cherry and mocha aromas with hints of vanilla and anise. Dark fruit flavors open this wine and are followed by soft tannins on the mid palate balancing a long, vibrant finish.

Joel Gott Wines Sauvignon Blanc goes best with grilled red meats, hard cheeses, and stews.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott California Sauvignon Blanc has aromas of honeydew melon, peaches and lychee with citrus notes. On the palate, the wine opens with tropical fruit flavors followed by crisp, refreshing acidity on the mid-palate and notes of ruby red grapefruit on the long, clean balanced finish.

title: Joel Gott Red Blend
body_html:
Joel Gott Washington Red Blend

With its blend of ripened strawberries, scents of nutmeg, and a spicy touch of cherry cola, Joel Gott Washington Merlot makes for an excellent burger wine! Its deep, ruby red smoothness is balanced with firm tannens to add a steady zest for pure enjoyment. The prominent Coca-Cola flavoring makes this wine an excellent treat when paired with a meal of bleu cheese burgers and sweet potato fries.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott Washington blend has aromas of blackberry blossom, black licorice and plum with notes of nutmeg. On the palate, flavors of black currants and cranberries are followed by smooth, elongated tannins with notes of tart cherries and subtle acidity on the mid-palate and a long, delicate finish.

title: Joel Gott Wines Zinfandel
body_html:
Joel Gott Zinfandel

Full-bodied with a long, bold finish, Joel Gott Zinfandel features aromas of pepper spices, roasted plum, and mild hints of wood smoke that help define the complex, yet subtle flavors of black cherry and blackberries. Joel Gott Wines recommends pairing their Zinfandel with blackened salmon with grilled vegetable ratatouille.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott California Zinfandel has aromas of brambleberries, red currants, and plum with notes of maple sugar and vanilla. The wine opens with bright fruit flavors followed by soft, velvety tannins on the mid-palate, and a long finish with hints of spice.

title: Joel Gott Wines Pinot Gris
body_html:
Joel Gott Pinot Gris

Produced in the fertile regions of Oregon's Willamette Valley, Joel Gott Pinot Gris are a popular treat for special occasions! A fusion of white peach, earthy undertones, and spicy lemon zest with a hint of almond milk render this Pacific Northwest spirit a healthy balance to offset its dryness. This dinnertime favorite is best when paired with smoked fish or chicken with cream sauce.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott Oregon Pinot Gris has aromas of honeydew melon and lime with notes of pear and peach blossoms. On the palate, the wine opens with bright acidity and citrus notes followed by a smooth, elongated mid-palate with tropical fruit flavors and a long, clean balanced finish.

title: Joel Gott Wines Chardonnay
body_html:
Joel Gott Wines Chardonnay

Light, tart, and airy, Joel Gott Unoaked Chardonnay is a masterpiece unto itself. This refreshing white wine is full and fruity, boasting a floral nose with a palate of pear, honeydew melon, and pineapple. Perfectly paired with grilled chicken, mild white fish, and shellfish dishes, the Joel Gott Unoaked Chardonnay is an ideal choice for any summer evening surrounded by friends.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott Unoaked California Chardonnay has aromas of honeydew melon, green apple, nectarine and mandarin with notes of honeysuckle. On the palate, the wine opens with bright fruit flavors, followed by crisp minerality and flavors of grapefruit on the mid-palate and a hint of spice on the long, clean balanced finish.

title: Joel Gott Wines 815 Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Joel Gott 815 Cabernet Sauvignon

Joel Gott 815 Cabernet Sauvignon has cherry and blackberry aromas with spice and vanilla aromas. Concentrated fruit flavors can be experienced upon opening, followed by solid tannins on the mid-palate and a long finish. Grilled red meats go best with this assertive, bold Joel Gott Wines 815 Cabernet Sauvignon.

TASTING NOTES

The Joel Gott Cabernet Sauvignon has aromas of black cherries and blackberries with notes of clove and brown sugar. The wine opens with dark, concentrated fruit flavors, followed by velvety tannins on the mid-palate and notes of vanilla on the long, textured finish.

title: Oyster Bay Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Oyster Bay Sauvignon Blanc

Pale straw green in colour with brilliant clarity, Oyster Bay Sauvignon Blanc is zesty and aromatic with lots of lively, penetrating fruit characters. A concentration of tropical and gooseberry flavors with an abundant bouquet, it is a wine that is always crisp, elegant and refreshing. Pair it with fresh pan fried fish, oysters, salads, canapés, smoked salmon, sashimi, and spinach and oven roasted asparagus with shaved parmesan.

title: Line 39 Merlot
body_html:
Line 39 Merlot

A gold medal winner from the 2014 San Diego International Wine Competition, the Line 39 Merlot is a dense red wine with concentrated plum and ripe currant flavors on the palate. This tannin rich Merlot is a superb choice for savory meats such as a nice flat iron steak or roast chicken with thyme.

title: Alamos Torrontes
body_html:
Catena 'Alamos' Torrontes

Hailing from an Argentinian vineyard that sits 5,000 feet above sea level, Catena Alamos Torrontés balances a sweet vibe with a tantalizing crisp acidity that results in layers of depth of taste. Should you be creating a sizzling Szechuan stir-fry or another spicy Asian dish, this is your wine.

title: Alamos Red Blend
body_html:
Catena 'Alamos' Red Blend

Catena 'Alamos" Red Blend is a wine that is knows how to get attention, Wine & Spirits magazine had a crush on its 2010 vintage and it has danced away from the Los Angeles International Wine Competition wearing gold. A full-bodied blended wine that sings of black berries, figs, plums and black cherries, it would pair wonderfully with a pork roast that had been simmering all day or a old-school roasted chicken.

title: Alamos Malbec
body_html:
Catena 'Alamos' Malbec

Catena "Alamos" Malbec is an Argentinian wine marked by the purity of its grapes, which are grown high in the Andes. The melted snow and ice trickles down and feeds the grapes with the purest of snow waters, and the wine itself incorporates several other locally grown fruits, including raspberry and blackberry. It is a delicious wine to enjoy with lamb or sipped before a rich chocolate dessert.

title: Alamos Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Catena 'Alamos' Cabernet Sauvignon

The Catena 'Alamos' Cabernet Sauvignon is an award-winning wine. The Wines of Argentina rated it as a gold wine, and the Critics Challenge Wine Competition gave it the Critics Gold award. With its beautiful, deep purple color that has tones of ruby red, the Catena 'Alamos' Cabernet Sauvignon has aromas of sweet spice, ripe berries, and a bit of tobacco. Its flavors include red currant and cassis with a distinct note of espresso beans. It has moderate acidity and pairs well with hearty dishes. Pair it with such food as stir-fried garlic tofu, chana masala, falafel, and black bean tacos.

title: Casillero del Diablo Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Casillero del Diablo Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon

When you are looking for a beautifully rich and delicious red wine, look no further than the Casillero del Diablo Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon. This medium bodied wine is characterized by the flavors of ripe plums, dark cherries, and unique black currants. Pair the Casillero del Diablo Reserva Cabernet Sauvignon with aged cheeses like gruyere or blue cheese and red meat.

Awards:

International Wine Challenge, 2018: Silver
International Wine Challenge 2017: Commended
Sydney International Wine Competition, 2017: Gold
International Wine & Spirit Competition 2016: Bronze
International Wine & Spirit Competition, 2015: Bronze

title: Apothic Wines White Winemaker's Blend
body_html:
Apothic Wines White Winemaker's Blend

Combining a trio of full-bodied varietals of Chardonnay, Riesling and Moscato, Apothic Wines White Winemaker's Blend creates a bold wine in the style for which Apothic is known. Be ready to experience its intense mixture of honey, vanilla spice, peach and pineapple flavors. Pair White Winemaker’s blend with chicken, shrimp, or grilled salmon.

title: Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Gold Brut
body_html:
Top Selling Gold Brut

Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Gold Brut

Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Gold Brut is a non-vintage full bodied and fruity flavored champagne that is packaged in a shiny gold bottle.

Racy fruit characteristics

Sits well on the palate due to its sumptuous, yet racy fruit characteristics that is perfectly balanced with a blend of Pinot Noir, Chardonnay, and Pinot Meunier wine. It is the kind of champagne that blends well with soft cheeses and poultry dishes.

Champagne Armand de Brignac Gold Brut

Armand de Brignac Gold Brut is the iconic, flagship tête de cuvée from the 13th generation Montagne de Reims champagne growers, the Cattier family.

Rich traditions of blending in Champagne

Reflecting the rich traditions of blending in Champagne, the current assemblage comprises 40% Pinot Noir, 40% Chardonnay and 20% Pinot Meunier and is a trio of vintages; 2009, 2010 and 2012. See more options 

Peach, apricot and red berry aromas

Peach, apricot and red berry aromas are followed by crystallized citrus, orange blossom, and hints of brioche. The palate is rich with cherries, exotic fruits and a touch of lemon, vanilla and honey.

Ideal as an aperitif or pairs perfectly with seared scallops, roasted quail and freshwater fish.

95 Points – Christelle Guibert, Decanter Magzine, November 2016

93 Points – Anthony Dias Blue, The Tasting Panel, April 2016

http://www.armanddebrignac.com

title: Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Silver Blanc de Blancs
body_html:
Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Silver Blanc de Blancs

The Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Silver Banc de Blancs has more than just a unique and stylish bottle. It's also a fruity and floral Chardonnay that pairs well with crab, lobster and shellfish. The buttery aroma pairs well with the flavors of smoke, vanilla and several sharp spices to balance it out.

Champagne Armand de Brignac Blanc de Blancs

The first single varietal from Armand de Brignac, this 100% Chardonnay is crafted with fruit

sourced from the Côte des Blancs and Montagne de Reims terroirs of Champagne. The current assemblage is a trio of vintages; 2009, 2010 & 2012.

The first aromas of lightly buttered, baked pastry are followed by notes of pear, hazelnut and a hint of gingerbread. On the palate, flavors of exotic fruits such as guava, gooseberry and peach are complemented by sweet spice notes of cinnamon and vanilla. Fresh, mineral finish.

Beautiful paired with carpaccio of shellfish or scallops, sashimi, grilled sea bass or a light cheese.

94 Points – Anthony Dias Blue, The Tasting Panel, April 2016

91 Points – Christelle Guibert, Decanter Magazine, November 2016

http://www.armanddebrignac.com

title: Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Demi-Sec
body_html:
Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Demi-Sec

The Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Demi-Sec is a Champagne blend that's designed for your favorite sweets, especially cakes and creams. With a sparkling accent, scents of compote fruits, buttered brioche and English candies. It also features flavors of blueberries, chocolate and citrus to create a super sweet accent to your dessert.

Champagne Armand de Brignac Demi Sec

Armand de Brignac Demi Sec was once a curiosity shared only with visitors to the maison in Chigny-les-Roses, France. The first bottles were released in 2015. A highly unique wine, the Armand de Brignac Demi Sec is a lightly sweeter style of champagne that pairs with the most exotic of foods.

A trio of vintages 2009, 2010 and 2012, the current assemblage is comprised of 40% Chardonnay, 40% Pinot Noir and 20% Pinot Meunier.

The aroma carries notes of English candy, grapefruit, compote fruits, caramel, quince and brioche. The palate is abundant with crystallized citrus fruits, honey and hints of blackberries.

An ideal pairing with foie gras, cheeses or lightly spiced foods. Also pairs well with exotic fruits and baked desserts.

93 Points – Christelle Guibert, Decanter Magazine, November 2016

92 Points – Anthony Dias Blue, The Tasting Panel, April 2016

http://www.armanddebrignac.com

title: Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Brut Rose
body_html:
Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Brut Rose

Armand de Brignac's premium rosé champagne, packaged in their normal metallic bottle, this time with an appropriately pink sheen. Even the trademark pewter Ace of Spades has a pinky hue.

Jay-Z's favorite bubbly, this pink Champagne falls under the Champagne Cattier umbrella. "Ace of Spades" is the new Cristal, at least in hip hop circles. About as limited as a wine can get. This one is mainly sold at night clubs.

The beautiful Armand de Brignac Ace of Spades Brut Rose is a bubbly pink champagne that features strawberry, orange peel and blackcurrant notes along with plenty of smokiness in the background. It has flavors of dried apricot and almond skin to create a beautiful balance of taste and aroma paired with lamb.

Champagne Armand de Brignac Rosé

Armand de Brignac Rosé is an elegant and delicious “basket of red fruits” as described by Chef de Cave, Jean-Jacques Cattier. The vibrant rose hue is given from the inclusion of slightly more than 15% of still red wine, harvested from old Pinot Noir vines that produce fruit with great flavor intensity. The current assemblage comprises 50% Pinot Noir, 40% Pinot Meunier and 10% Chardonnay and is a trio of vintages; 2009, 2010 & 2012.

Strawberry, currants and cherry abound on the nose, with floral hints and a touch of sweet almond.  The red grape dominance brings a structured palate filled with black fruits, cherries and hints of baked pastry. The Chardonnay brings the lightness and elegance.

Ideal as an aperitif or pairs beautifully with truffled veal, duck confit and wild salmon.

93 Points – Christelle Guibert, Decanter Magazine, November 2016

92 Points – Alison Napjus, Wine Spectator, May 2016

Best in Show, Best Sparkling Wine – 2015 New York International Wine Competition

http://www.armanddebrignac.com

title: M. Chapoutier Cotes du Rhone Belleruche Rose
body_html:
Chapoutier Belleruche Côtes-du-Rhône Rosé

A delightful medium-bodied wine suitable for summer entertaining, Chapoutier Belleruche Rosé is a blend of 50% Grenache with 40% Syrah and 10% Cinsault. This light salmon pink colored wine imparts a light raspberry, cherry and currant taste that is provides a well-balanced finish provided by the Syrah. It pairs well with grilled fish and appetizers.

Born of the legendarily fertile soil of France’s Rhone Valley, Chapoutier Belleruche’s Rose brings a sweet array of aromas including currant, cherry, and raspberry into play. Gaining its signature rose appearance from sustained contact with the grape’s skin, this sparkling wine is excellent for celebrating the important occasions in life.

title: Hahn Family Wines Pinot Noir
body_html:
Hahn Family Wines Pinot Noir

Hahn Family Wines Pinot Noir shows ruby and garnet colors with aromas of cranberries and black cherries with earthy notes. This medium body wine boasts fruit and spice flavors that suggest pairing with lamb curry, soft cheeses like ricotta and mozzarella or fried dumplings.

title: La Catrina Chardonnay
body_html:
La Catrina Chardonnay

Smooth, dry and a bit fruity, the La Catrina Chardonnay has the aroma of roasted nuts and apples with the flavor of juicy pineapple. This pleasant, light to medium bodied easy sipper pairs well with reminiscing friends and roasted chicken or fresh seafood.

TASTING NOTES

A golden Chardonnay with aromas of vanilla spice and ripe pear, with balanced flavors of Fuji apple, citrus, and a buttery-oaky finish to invigorate your palate after every sip.

title: Hahn Family Wines Merlot
body_html:
Hahn Family Wines Merlot

Monterey County produces some robust wines and this award-winning merlot is no exception. With hints of black cherry, cassis and raspberry , this dark beauty pairs well with pork entrees, squash and root vegetable dishes. Hahn Family Wines Merlot is aged in oak barrels to enhance its already earthy allure.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Pinot Noir
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Pinot Noir

As a delightfully flavorful wine from a vineyard that’s situated in Monterey Country, the Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Silver Label Pinot Noir has a rich fruity taste. It boasts the titles of Silver Label and Diamond Collection with good reason. It stands apart from other Pinot Noirs with its well-balanced aromas and flavors. Its fruit flavors include currant, strawberry, plum, and black cherry, while it stands out equally for its appealing texture and elegant accents. Pair the Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Silver Label Pinot Noir with pasta dishes or casseroles.

Another delightful wine from the Monterrey vineyards, the bay breezes and crisp night weather make the climate just right for this Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Silver Label Pinot Noir. It has a rich and complex fruity taste. Well-balanced, it mixes strawberry, currant, black cherry and plum for a light and smooth taste with a lushy texture and an elegant finish. It makes a nice pairing with burgers or a steak.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Blue Label Merlot
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Blue Label Merlot

The Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Blue Label Merlot is made of a combination of fruit from Sonoma, Napa, and Monterey. They come together to create a perfect blend of textures and flavors that bring out the best in the characteristics known to each region. Rich red raspberry and plum are the primary flavors of this California Merlot. You can taste crushed berry, vanilla, and blueberry flavors. Also, its berry and vanilla aroma is enticing. When poured in the glass, it has an aesthetically pleasing purple magenta color and looks as delectable as it tastes.

You have flexibility with pairing food with the Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Blue Label Merlot because it falls in the middle of the red wine spectrum of flavors. It is generally best paired with light meals, including mild stir fries, salads, and veggie burgers. Avoid foods that are too spicy because that will affect the enjoyment of the Merlot flavors.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Yellow Label Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Yellow Label Sauvignon Blanc

A gentlemanly wine, the Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Yellow Label Sauvignon Blanc is simple but loaded with flavor. A bit on the sweet side, it has an orange cream taste with lemon zest and marshmallow. The finish has a bit of an herbal hint to it making this a classic wine that’s easy to find with its bright yellow labeling from the Diamond Collection. Makes a lovely pairing with poultry, white fish, cheese and prosciutto.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Gold Label Chardonnay
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Gold Label Chardonnay

The Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Gold Label Chardonnay is a beautiful, light gold wine that tastes as elegant as it appears. As a wine that’s under an already exclusive, family-owned label, it has much to live up to as a part of the Diamond Collection and Gold Label lines.

Happily, it exceeds all expectations with the bold flavor combinations of cherry and spice. It offers cantaloupe, pear, apricot, and juicy apple flavors with its strong, buttery crème brûlée finish. There’s an undeniable oaky flavor that makes the wine tastes as though it were being served in a cedar wine glass. Pair the Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Gold Label Chardonnay with vegetarian dishes such as quinoa salad, grilled vegetables, and stir fries.

Stock up on an easy-drinking wine that gives you supreme taste value for your dollar. A pleasant combination of cherry and spice give way to a buttery finish—a solid Chardonnay that ticks all the right boxes. Notes of oak are very evident but never upstage the fruit in this mix. Serve with BBQ pork chops, quinoa salad, or just an elevated version of your homemade tuna fish salad.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Ivory Label Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Ivory Label Cabernet Sauvignon

A prize winning wine that’s very popular, Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Ivory Label Cabernet Sauvignon is a fruity red that’s medium-bodied. It has a rich nose of vanilla, red bell pepper and cassis. Very smooth to the palate, there are wonderfully delightful ripe tannin flavors. It’s a crowd pleaser that will work well when served at a summer barbecue and paired with stuffed peppers or beef sliders.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Black Label Claret
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Black Label Claret

Francis Ford Coppola's Diamond Collection Black Label Claret has a good structure with notes of blackberry, plum and a touch of oak. Modest acidity forms a dry bite that helps to bring out the oak and some of the more hidden spices. Serve with mussels sautéed in a tomato broth, or with a creamier mustard-based sauce.

The Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Black Label Claret is an award-winning, well-balanced wine that’s vividly fragrant. Its aromas will bring to mind oak, plums, raspberries, and tobacco for a distinct and inviting combination. The bold structure of the Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Black Label Claret offers such flavors as cloves, toasted vanilla, and cherries. It has a modest acidity that lends a dry bite to the purple magenta wine. The Francis Ford Coppola Diamond Collection Black Label Claret is best paired with tomato-based soups or pasta with creamy tomato-based sauces.
  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Rose
body_html:
Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Rose

The Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Rose presents with orange, floral notes match with green apple and melon fruit. Salty mineral and mustard nuances dance across the tongue as this bright wine leaves a fruity afterglow. Pair with any kind of food, from a summer strawberry salad to a hearty steak from the grill.

title: Bodegas Juan Gil Honoro Vera Blanco
body_html:
Bodegas Juan Gil Honoro Vera Blanco

The Spanish grapes of Monastrell are harvested from rocky soils, which give the Bodegas Juan Gil 'Honoro Vera' Blanco a highly aromatic, fruity concentration. Easy to drink and pleasant across the tongue, it includes notes of mineral, underbrush, and blueberry for a medium-bodied taste. It's paired best with pastas, rice, stew meat, and meat with sauces.

title: Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Garnacha
body_html:
Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Garnacha

Grapes in the Bodegas Ateca Honoro Vera Garnacha wine come from high hillsides, processed, then stored for two months in oak barrels. This gives the drink a higher aromatic complexity, complete with blueberry undertones and mineral notes. Spicy and savory, it's balanced and smooth. It pairs best with pastas, white fish, feta, lentil soups, roasted meats or mushrooms.

title: Cakebread Cellars Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Cakebread Cellars Sauvignon Blanc

Crisp, cool, and smooth, Cakebread Cellars Sauvignon Blanc is a favorite for a reason. Ideal for a warm summer day or a meal pairing with vegetables or fish, this dry Napa white is destined for a spot on your must-haves list. Boasting a succulent, fruity fragrance and a bold flavor that captures notes of guava, melon, and peach, this is the perfect wine for anytime.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Sauvignon Blanc

title: Erath Pinot Noir
body_html: This Pinot Noir produced from the house of Erath boasts odorous notes of berries, accented with spices and oak flavors with every swirl on your tongue. Every sip engulfs your palate with rich fruity fragrances with a lingering taste that leaves you delighted. This delicious wine pairs well with roasted or braized meat and vegetables.

title: Castello di Gabbiano 'Promessa' Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT
body_html:
Gabbiano Cavaliere Doro Pinot Grigio

Pale yellow and lighter on the alcohol content, Castello di Gabbiano 'Promessa' Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT is not going to quench the thirst of a voracious wine drinker but the medium-high acidity makes it so approachable and pairable with just about any food.

Serve with BBQ slices of pineapple, fish tacos or lemon chicken.

title: Castello di Gabbiano Chianti DOCG
body_html:
Castello di Gabbiano Chianti has a fresh and floral aroma with hints of ripe berries and plums and just a touch of oak. Bursting with fresh raspberries, the firm tannins and good balancing acidity round out this wine that has a lot of flavor in it. There is some cuisine that pairs well with this delicious wine.

Cuisine that Chianti goes well with is tomato-based sauces like marinara. For that reason, they are regularly paired with pasta dishes. This wine also goes well with light meats like chicken and pork. If you need a vegetable to serve with this wine, roasted garlic, zucchini, and asparagus pair well with this wine. If you serve this wine with this cuisine, then you will have a meal that is C'est’ Bion.

title: Nicolas Feuillatte Brut Rosé
body_html:
Nicolas Feuillatte Reserve Exclusive Rosé

Feuillatte Brut Rosé opens silver-tinged salmon-pink, with a steady ribbon of fine bubbles. Blended from 90% red grapes with a dollop of Chardonnay, this wine explodes in the glass with vivid red fruit aromas and flavors of raspberry, strawberry and red currants. Delicate on the palate, quite dry and light for a wine with this much flavor. Delicious paired with both mustard-roasted pork loin and a strawberry shortcake dessert.

title: Nicolas Feuillatte Blue Label Reserve Brut
body_html:
Nicolas Feuillatte Reserve Brut

Now you can have "Blue Label" sparkling wine from the Champagne region when you drink Nicolas Feuillatte Brut Reserve. This wine consists of part chardonnay, part pinot noir and part pinot meunier for a structured drink that has a fruity taste to it. Lobster and chicken dishes are best bets to serve with this French product.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Peach
body_html:
You don't have to have an occasion to break out Barefoot Bubbly Peach; it might even prefer casual occasions.

This sweet and juicy crowd-pleaser everything you love about the Georgia peach with a heck of a lot less fuzz. Serve it at your next fish fry, clam bake or lobster boil because this peach goes best with great seafood.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Brut Cuvee Champagne
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Brut Cuvee Champagne

Barefoot Bubbly Brut tickles the taste buds with a vibrant palate of green apple, jasmine, kiwi and peach. The flavours bubble up through the semi-dry body for a crisp finish. Those that love Chardonnay will likely make Barefoot Bubbly Brut an instant favorite for taking to a cottage weekend, a relaxing picnic or a weekend barbeque. Enjoy with a dessert plate of fresh fruit, or a buttery lobster roll.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Pink Moscato
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Pink Moscato sparkles with the scent of fresh berries, green apples on the palate, and a creamy finish of candied cherries and sweet citrus.

This sweet sparkling wine from California is crisp and the sweet flavors of raspberry and vanilla pair perfectly with cheese, fresh fruit, and sorbet.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Moscato Spumante
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Moscato Spumante is a deliciously sweet Moscato that bubbles with the flavors of Mandarin orange and tangerine with a hint of honeysuckle and pear in the nose.

Good clean acidity balances the sweetness, so this sparkling wine pairs beautifully with savory charcuterie, antipasto, and cheese plates.

title: JaM Cellars BuTTER Chardonnay
body_html:
BuTTER Chardonnay

A good chardonnay is something that many enjoy; when you want the best you should get JaM Cellars Butter Chardonnay! It is a smooth chardonnay that is easily described as juicy, succulent and tasty. It has great flavor that will gently take over your taste buds with every sip you have. This amazing chardonnay has been aged with blends of oak. You will have subtle hints of pear and a mixture of citrus fruits along with vanilla that leaves you with a velvet tone on your palate that you will enjoy.

The JaM Cellars Butter Chardonnay pairs well with fish, chicken roasted vegetables and Pecorino-Romano cheese.

With a name like JaM Cellars Butter Chardonnay, you would thorougly expect this white wine to be creamy and smooth, just like butter. It is definitely a unique taste sensation, given that the grapes were combined with stone fruit juices and vanilla. Try a bottle with chicken or fish "en papillote" and fresh from an outdoor grill.

title: Boschendal Rose Garden Rose
body_html:
Boschendal The Rose Garden Rose

The Boschendel Rose Garden Rose is made delicate grapes from cross-sectional regions. This delicate Rose has flavors of juicy ripe red strawberries, subtle mulberries, and mouth-watering raspberries. This particular Rose wine goes excellent with roasted or grilled chicken, seafood, and salad. It also goes nicely with desserts such as a fresh fruit tart or a rich New York cheesecake.

Enjoy the light and crisp flavor of Boschendal Rose Garden Rose. A wonderfully balanced blend of juicy strawberries, raspberries and mulberries with a touch of spice. You will love this rose with its enchanting flavor.

title: 19 Crimes The Banished Dark Red
body_html:
19 Crimes The Banished Dark Red

Cabernet Sauvignon and Shiraz grapes are the highlight of this 19 Crimes The Banished Dark Red wine. Hailing from Australia, the original penal colony, this vineyard takes its moniker from the crimes that caused British citizens to be banished here. Don't let the name of the vineyard or the wine fool you, however; it exceeds expectations in taste and value. Pairs well with heavily seasoned or very spicy beef and fancy small game dishes (e.g., pheasant under glass).

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red Blend

title: Chateau de Sours Blanc
body_html:
Chateau de Sours Blanc

Uncork this easy to drink Chateau de Sours Blanc—a blend of Sauvignon Blanc and Sémillon. The obvious smokey character of oak pokes through the lime leaves for a fresh and somewhat tropical finish. It's not overly complex but the crisp finish pairs effortlessly with salmon, tuna, shellfish, bouillabaisse, sweet treats, and fowl.

title: 19 Crimes Red Blend
body_html:
19 Crimes Red Blend

Charm your guests with something surprising at your next dinner party. 19 Crimes Red, with its smooth tannin's and medium finish is a crowd-pleaser that will leave them enticed and intrigued. With its "bruise" purple tone, this 19 Crimes Red is a showcase of similarly toned fruits that are balanced out with woods and spices. There is something both exotic and also casual about this particular blended red wine.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red Blend

title: 19 Crimes The Warden Red
body_html:
19 Crimes The Warden Red Blend

From the late 1700's to the late 1800's approximately 162,000 men and women were brought to Australia (then, an island of only Aboriginals) for committing nineteen severe and violent crimes.

The Warden wine, from 19 Crimes, celebrates the criminals who helped forged a new country, brick by brick and tiny town by tiny town. Tinted with dusty red cherry,

The Warden actually tells us a lot about the nose just by looking at it. Flavors of cranberry, currant, plum, and cherry lozenge continue into a spicy, syrupy vanilla finish.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red Blend

title: Belle Glos Las Alturas Vineyard Pinot Noir
body_html:
Belle Glos Las Alturas Vineyard Pinot Noir

Belle Glos Las Alturas Pinot Noir has a deep red coloring that makes it look sensational, while the tantalizing aromas of ripe plums, blackberries and black licorice make this one of the best-tasting wines available. Dark berries come alive in your mouth with deep chocolate flavors making this a great addition to your chocolate desert or fresh fruits and hard cheeses. Food Suggestion: Chicken and Turkey.

TASTING NOTES

Rich crimson in color withfragrant aromas of blackberry, sage, cherry, and hints of rich dark chocolate. Bold and elegant on the palate with boysenberry pie, black currant jam, dark plum, and subtle notes of ground nutmeg. Balanced and structured, this wine has beautiful acidity that lingers through to a long, mouthwatering finish.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Beringer Vineyards White Zinfandel
body_html:
Beringer Vineyards White Zinfandel

With berry-esque fruity flavors, Beringer Vineyards White Zinfandel is rich with citrus aromas with hints of honeydew. This wine has floral notes to complement the primarily tropical fruity flavors. It is a great blending of White Zinfandel and Moscato.

When it comes to pairing food with your Beringer Vineyards White Zinfandel, remember that it pairs especially well with pasta dishes and spicy foods. You may also serve it with desserts for a great combination.

title: Beringer Vineyards Founders' Estate Pinot Noir
body_html:
Beringer Vineyards Founders' Estate Pinot Noir

The Beringer Vineyards Founders' Estate Pinot Noir has a smooth, dark fruit flavor of plum and cherries with the right hint of oak. It is light and delicate. This Pinot Noir is from a historical Napa Valley vineyard that is the oldest continuously operating on in the area.

It pairs well with foods that have a mushroom sauce, such as wild mushroom bruschetta, goat cheese, and spring vegetable and rice dishes.

TASTING NOTES

Beringer Founders’ Estate Pinot Noir is immediately fruit forward with bright flavors of red cherry and currant, beautifully complemented by cedar and cinnamon spice. It is a perfect pairing with grilled salmon, roast turkey, or brie cheese.

title: Beringer Vineyards Founders' Estate Chardonnay
body_html:
Beringer Founders' Estate Chardonnay comes in a pleasing shade of bright gold, which catches the eyes even as the taste of fruits and spices captivates the tongue.

Its well-balanced nature makes it a suitable pairing with savory but not too savory dishes such as chicken, fish, and other kinds of seafood.

TASTING NOTES

The Beringer Founders’ Estate Chardonnay is the perfect combination of pear, apple and ripe tropical fruit flavors, with a hint of toasted almond and a classically round mouthfeel. This Chardonnay perfectly complements grilled chicken or fish, or can stand up to rich risotto with its ripe, clean flavors and lingering finish.

title: Beringer Vineyards Founders' Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Enjoy the delightful blend of black berries, white pepper, cocoa, mint, caramel, cassis, brown spices, rose petals and vanilla in the Beringer Vineyards Founders' Estate Cabernet Sauvignon.

The dense purple coloring is beautiful, while the taste is extremely rich and smooth. It pairs nicely with any type of meat, such as lamb, beef or chicken.

TASTING NOTES

The Beringer Founders’ Estate Cabernet boasts flavors of black cherry, raspberry, and vanilla and cinnamon spice. It has a round mouthfeel, supple tannins and a long, lingering finish. A food-friendly wine, it pairs beautifully with a grilled rib-eye steak, roasted vegetables, or aged cheddar.

title: Beringer Vineyards Knights Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Beringer Vineyards Knights Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

Indulge in hints of mocha, black fruit, licorice and dried herbs with the Beringer Knights Valley Cabernet Sauvignon. This versatile blend has supple black and blue fruit notes that are accented by roasted coffee, dark chocolate and a lingering finish that is as smooth as silk. Enhance the flavor of the wine with a delectable dark chocolate desert.

TASTING NOTES

This crowd-pleasing Cabernet Sauvignon is a beautiful Bordeaux blend, with soft, round tannins and a plush, rich mouthfeel. Built to age and develop further complexity, the wine in its youth is ripe and juicy upfront with aromas of fresh boysenberry, blackberry, and cassis, alongside dark berry fruit notes of fig, black cherry cola, and currants. The warm baking spice notes from the oak-integration work well with the more traditional Knights Valley tones of lavender, wild sage, and mocha. Lively and well-balanced with vibrant acidity, chewy tannins, and a long, smooth, satisfying finish.

title: Plungerhead Lodi Old Vine Zinfandel
body_html:
Plungerhead Lodi Old Vine Zinfandel

A bouncy zest of fresh cherries and strawberry flavors comprise the vintage favorite known as Plungerhead Old Vine Zinfandel. Brewed in the Lodi valley region of central California, the wine has a deep, ruby red luminosity that, when combined with raspberries and other red fruits, give it a unique zest that is pleasing to the palate.

A spicy finish blended with tobacco and red peppers lend the wine its rich, inner life which makes it a favorite among friends or alone.

This variation is an excellent partner for pulled pork sandwiches or grilled Polish sausage and peppers.

title: Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Cabernet Sauvignon

Educated Guess by Roots Run Deep Winery has all the requirements that a serious Cabernet Sauvignon lover is looking for while remaining approachable, fun, and food friendly!

title: Chateau d'Esclans Whispering Angel Rosé
body_html:
Chateau d'Esclans Whispering Angel Rose

Chateau d'Esclans Angel Rose is a select rosé from the South of France. This pale pink Provence rosé has notes of strawberry and fresh peach with a crisp, dry finish. Angel Rose is a clean, fruity blend of Provence varietals with a nice round acidity. It begins with a bouquet of berries in its nose and surprises with red currants, spices, and crisp lemon on the palate. It's light but has a robust full-bodied flavor that pairs perfectly with salmon.

TASTING NOTES

AROMA
A beautifully pale pink, which is pleasing to the eye and draws one in.

PALATE
Whispering Angel rosé has a Fresh red berry fruit characteristics with floral notes. Ripe and fleshy feel on the palate.

FINISH
This popular rosé wine has great concentration, a smooth and round finish and no astringent aftertaste.

title: 19 Crimes Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
19 Crimes Cabernet Sauvignon

This deep-flavored 19 Crimes Cabernet Sauvignon is a delightful blend of berries and red currants with a hint of tannin's and oak –– giving it an excellent aroma with a delicately sweet taste.

Paired beautifully with a juicy steak or a pork roast, this dark full-bodied wine resembles a rich black-red color and leaves a fruity flavor on your tongue after every sip.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Cherry Pie Three Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Cherry Pie Three Vineyards Pinot Noir

Known for its cherry flavor, Cherry Tart Cherry Pie Pinot Noir was the signature wine of Cherry Pinot Noir vineyards in California (no longer Cherry Tart). Grapes taken from three separate vineyard areas produce the unique wine blend surrounding this wine's distinct tart cherry notes. It is best consumed with dark meats that have been sauteed or smothered in fruity sauces, or, if you dare, consumed with tart cherry pie.
  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Pinot Noir

title: Josh Cellars Pinot Noir
body_html:
Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Pinot Noir

Joseph Carr Josh Cellars Pinot Noir provides vibrant aromas of bright cherries and toasted oak with a rich bouquet of cocoa, vanilla bean, and dark cherry flavors, preceding a long, full finish. For palate pleasing flavor combinations, pair this Pinot Noir with hearty vegetables, lean meats, or decadent chocolate desserts.

title: Roots Run Deep Winery Educated Guess Chardonnay
body_html:
Roots Run Deep Winery 'Educated Guess' Chardonnay

The Roots Run Deep Winery 'Educated Guess' Chardonnay is a crisp and bright white wine that is full of tropical fruit flavors. Along with spices and rich yet subtle vanilla, this chardonnay is well-rounded and refreshing. Pour yourself a glass of Roots Run Deep Winery 'Educated Guess' Chardonnay with a creavy vegetable soup or seafood dish.

title: Thierry & Guy Fat Bastard Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
FAT bastard Cabernet Sauvignon

If you want a wine that is delicious and robust while also having a hearty sense of humor, then the Fat Bastard Cabernet is the right choice for you. With flavors of black currant, pomegranate, and blackberries as well as hints of vanilla, Fat Bastard Cabernet great with spicy foods or red meat like beef and lamb.

TASTING NOTES

Ruby red colour, beautiful deep carmine notes. Opulent aromas of chocolate and black cherries. Flavours of stone fruit with hints of grilled red pepper and spices (vanilla, cinnamon, pepper spices). Long lasting aromas on the finish.

title: Barone Fini Pinot Grigio Alto Adige
body_html:
Barone Fini Valdadige Pinot Grigio Dry White Wine

Barone Fini Pinot Grigio delivers an explosion of fruity taste from the moment the cork is popped to the last sip of the bottle’s final glass. A crisp ripe apple flavor joins a summery, but earthy, lynchee fruit taste that is excellent as a stand-alone vintage for a night before the fire, or paired with a delicious dinner of fowl, shellfish, and vegetarian fare.

title: Cavit Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT
body_html:
Cavit Collection Pinot Grigio

Made in Veneto, Italy, the Cavit Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT is a crisp and light white wine with a bright, straw gold color. This sought-after dry wine features aromas of green apple, blossoms, and lemon. It features fruity flavors of lemon and apple. The Cavit Pinot Grigio delle Venezie IGT can be served with lunch, dinner, or as an aperitif. This delicious wine pairs well with cheesy Italian dishes, roasted potatoes, grilled vegetables, and a diverse array of salads with almonds or walnuts.

Cavit Pinot Grigio is created from the lush Italian vineyards. Its bright straw gold color, fruity flavor, and aromatic scents have won the heart of America. The grapes that make the wine are carefully squeezed from fresh grapes. The green apple and citrus flavors give the wine a refreshing finish. Cavit Pinot Grigio is a perfect aperitif with 100% freshness.

title: La Catrina Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
La Catrina Cabernet Sauvignon

A mellow full bodied red wine enveloped in an audacious bottle, the La Catrina Cabernet Sauvignon is rich and thrilling. With flavors of berries and melted chocolate, the La Catrina offers a smooth, satiny feel to delight your senses. Enjoy this juicy gem alongside a plate of beef and veggies.

TASTING NOTES

A deep Cabernet Sauvignon with aromas of dark cherry and licorice and flavors of ripe plums and pomegranate. A smooth tannic finish on the palate.

title: La Catrina Red Blend
body_html:
La Catrina Red Blend

Embrace the moment with the La Catrina Red Blend. With sweet, tangy, cherry accents, you won't have to ponder what to have for dinner. This wine pairs well with beef, lamb and Italian dishes. Go ahead, toast your ancestors with this lively blend!

TASTING NOTES

A ruby colored red blend with aromas of wild berries and baking spices. Bright flavors of ripe cherries and blueberries, with a tannic finish on the palate.

title: La Catrina Sangria
body_html:
La Catrina Sangria

Nicknamed "The Wedding Singer," the La Catrina Sangria is a fiendish partnering between sweet and spicy. The sweet, fruity and flowery notes are grounded by the dark and mysterious spiciness. A challenge for your senses, this Sangria is paired well with seafood dishes and grilled vegetables.

TASTING NOTES

A ruby red Sangria with sweet aromas of orange peel, cinnamon, and black cherry. Lively flavors of pomegranate and citrus with a finish of baking spice on the palate.

title: Angeline Rose of Pinot Noir
body_html:
Angeline Rose of Pinot Noir

Fruity and floral, this cocktail style pink rose has something for everybody. A complex nose of watermelon, pink grapefruit and nectarine with notes of orange blossoms and lilies gives way to sweet strawberries and crisp citrus and finishes with a clean acidity.

Enjoy on its own or paired with a roast turkey sandwich.

TASTING NOTES

Notes of fresh crushed wild strawberries, with tart, preserved lemon, kumquat zest, fresh watermelon rind, and subtle rose petals and honeycomb on the finish.

title: Daou Vineyards Pessimist Red
body_html:
Daou Vineyards 'Pessimist' Red

The Daou Vineyards "Pessimist" Red is the perfect example of a "man's man wine". Full-bodied, macho and strong, its dark fruit and heavy spices make it the perfect wine for men who typically do not drink wine.

Pair Daou Pessimist with much milder flavored meats, such as lightly seasoned and grilled steak, so the flavors of the meat do not clash with this wine.

title: Bota Box Pinot Grigio 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Pinot Grigio

The light and lively Bota Box Pinot Grigio is a scrumptious white wine that comes in packaging that’s sure to catch the eye: a brown box. That makes it very easy to bring it along when traveling or having a picnic. This medium-bodied dry wine offers tempting aromas of white peach and nectarine with a hint of floral notes. It has a soft texture that accentuates its peach, citrus, and nectarine flavors. The remarkable Bota Box Pinot Grigio pairs best with delectable dishes like seitan tacos, grilled peppers with soy ginger sauce, pasta with lemon sauce, sesame-soy grilled vegetables, and mozzarella marinara.

title: Bota Box RedVolution 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box RedVolution

Boxed wine allows you to easily take wine along with you on a picnic or vacation. Bota Box RedVolution was named one of the 10 best boxed wines by “Paste Magazine”, and that’s with good reason. This sweet red wine blend combines Merlot, Syrah, Petite Sirah, and more. It has tempting aromas of cocoa and black cherry along with a hint of spice. It has flavors of cherry, dark fruit, and oak. Ultimately the Bota Box RedVolution is a full-bodied wine is sure to satisfy lovers of red wine. Those who are eco-conscious will love the Bota Box RedVolution, too, because it comes in eco-friendly packaging.

title: Bota Box Malbec 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Malbec 3 Liter

Boldy embrace Bota Box Malbec medium-bodied wine whose fruity flavors of offer blackberry jam and blueberry syrup flavors softened by the earthiness of tannins at the finish. The pleasing aroma offers a mix of blueberry and blackberry. Malbec pairs with spicy foods, red meats and Italian tomato dishes.

title: Bota Box Pinot Noir 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Pinot Noir

Why cart around assorted bottles when one box has you covered. Made for entertaining, the Bota Box Pinot Noir is a surprisingly fruity pinot with aromas of cherry and cocoa, mid palate tannins and a nice, clean finish. Serve up with figs and duck pancakes for the perfect spring social.

title: Bota Box Sauvignon Blanc 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Sauvignon Blanc

Feeling playful? Bota Box Sauvignon Blanc medium-bodied wine is an outstanding selection to share among friends. This wine's aroma of citrus, honeydew and lemongrass energize any gathering. Its medium-bodied with a crisp delivery of flavors including lime zest, nectarine and melon. Serve with grilled veggies or Thai couisine.

title: Bota Box Chardonnay 3 Liter
body_html:
Bota Box Chardonnay 3 Liter

Citrus and ripe melon meet warm, toasty oak in this medium bodied and beautifully balanced chardonnay. Enjoy between courses or paired with a light and simple seafood pasta. The Bota Box Chardonnay 3 liter comes packaged in an environmentally friendly box that's easy to transport and great for large groups or weekend getaways.

title: Angeline Pinot Noir
body_html:
Angeline Pinot Noir

The Angeline Pinot Noir is a delicious California red wine with intense berry flavors and a lively, pleasant acidity. It offers delicate aromas of orange zest, maraschino cherries, and fresh cranberries. Its rich flavors include vanilla, raspberry, and cherry with a toasty oak finish.

This pure, crisp wine is medium-bodied, and has firm tannins that are never obtrusive to the flavors and enjoyment of the wine. The Angeline Pinot Noir pairs well with Italian pastas, casseroles, and lasagna. It also pairs well with rich stews and soups.

TASTING NOTES

Vivid notes of black raspberry, fresh pomegranate juice, with wild blueberry, sassafras, subtle licorice, toasted oak an earthy backbone, and grippy tannins.

title: Terra d'Oro Chenin Blanc
body_html:
Terra d'Oro Chenin Blanc

Terra d'Oro Chenin Blanc is utterly enchanting! The vibrant straw color and tropical fruit notes are an indulgence for the senses. It flaunts a spicy kaffir lime and lemongrass mulled together with bright fruits and toasted graham crackers. For a deliciously sinful pairing, serve it with chilled seafood on your next sushi night!

title: Terra d'Oro Zinfandel
body_html:
Terra d'Oro Zinfandel

Bright and distinctive, this Terra d'Oro Zinfandel is sure to leave an impression. A largely fruit driven base, akin to strawberry and rhubarb, is accented with savory herbs that unfold nicely on the palate. This Zinfandel is uniquely well balanced and pairs nicely with many dishes such as eggplant parmesan and grilled quail.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Zinfandel

title: Antigal Estimulo Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Antigal Estimulo Cabernet Sauvignon

This Antigal Estimulo Cabernet Sauvignon is just the right table wine to sip and savor slowly over a meal of venison stew or beef rib roast. The wine hails from Argentina, which has become a leading producer in notable wines and a rival for Napa Valley growers in the U.S. Come taste this Cabernet and see why.

title: Bodega Norton Reserva Malbec
body_html:
Bodega Norton Reserva Malbec

Savor the cozy and expressive flavors of red currants, dark figs, and robust espresso in the Bodega Norton Reserve Malbec wine. This distinguished Malbec has a uniquely long finish that leaves a notable impression on the palette. Enjoy it with grilled and barbecued meats such as tri tip or ribs.

title: Alexander Valley Alexander School Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Alexander Valley Vineyards 'Alexander School Reserve' Cabernet Sauvignon

Tart yet accessible, this critically acclaimed Cabernet Sauvignon shows hints of blackcurrant, red berries and black cherry across the palate with bright acidity and dusty tannins. If you're looking for a unique dinner pairing, try Korean beef garlic stir fry paired with Alexander Valley Vineyards 'Alexander School Reserve' Cabernet Sauvignon.

title: Chateau Souverain Merlot
body_html:
Chateau Souverain Merlot

Chateau Souverain Merlot has a rich, dark flavor and color from a blend of dark red fruits like black cherry and plum, highlighted by hints of chocolate and spice. Chateau Souverain Merlot's full, elegant flavor is the perfect match for a grilled flat iron steak with blue cheese butter sauce.

title: Chateau Souverain Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Chateau Souverain Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

The Chateau Souverain Alexander Valley Cabernet Sauvignon pairs beautifully with beef and venison because of the unique flavor of the wine. It is a bold, but dry red that features dark cherry and green woods with a berry, earthy aroma. It tastes excellent with just a little breathing time and a full-bodied meal.

title: Chateau Souverain Chardonnay
body_html:
Chateau Souverain Chardonnay

The Chateau Souverain Chardonnay has beautiful full aromas of roasted pears and baking spice cut through with a little acid from the lemon citrus. With bold flavors of creme brulee and pineapple it has a truly elegent feel and body as well as a little bit of acidity. It is best with shellfish, crab and lobster.

title: Chateau Souverain Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Chateau Souverain Sauvignon Blanc

The Chateau Souverain Sauvignon Blanc is a pure, clear wine with plenty of bold flavor. It has notes of grapefruit, guava and lime zest but flavors of melon, honeysuckle and orange blossom. The acidity of the citrus is cut well with richness and pairs excellently with a variety of roasted vegetables and seafood.

title: Bota Box Chardonnay
body_html:
Bota Box Chardonnay

This Bota Box Chardonnay is a medium-bodied wine that tickles the nose with citrus, matured melon, and subtle undertones of toasty oak aromas, while tantalizing taste-buds with lemon, apple and graham cracker for a smooth, rich, wet finish that pairs perfectly with pasta and scallops or grilled chicken.

title: Bota Box RedVolution
body_html:
Bota Box RedVolution

Become a part of the Bota Box RedVolution with the box of this full-bodied, rich wine with intense dark fruit flavors and cherry complemented with undertones of toasty oak. The savory aromas of cherry, cocoa and spice accompany its smooth finish. Pair with lamb or wild mushroom pizza.

title: Bota Box Merlot
body_html:
Bota Box Merlot

Chase away the winter blues with the a glass of Bota Box Merlot. Medium bodied and packaged in an environmentally friendly carton perfect for transport and storage, the Bota Box Merlot pairs beautifully with roast pork and vegetables. Follow up the following evening with takeout pizza and a glass or two by the fire with that special someone.

title: Bota Box Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Bota Box Pinot Grigio

Bota Box Pinot Grigio is a boxed wine that you do not have to hide when your wine-snob friend Harriet comes over. With its fulsome fruitiness, this absolutely delightful pinot grigio brings out the earthiness in roasted chicken, the comfort in alfredo sauce and the zing in Mediterranean salad.

title: Bota Box Moscato
body_html:
Bota Box Moscato

Bota Box Moscato is a sweeter, light wine that flirts with flavors of sweet honeyed nectar, orange blossom and white peach that combine to provide a sweet, satisfying finish. The engaging bouquet enchants the nose with sweet honeysuckle, citrus blossom and honeydew melon aromas. Pair with light cheese and fruit deserts.

title: Babich Wines Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Babich Wines Sauvignon Blanc

Babich Wines Sauvignon Blanc has a beautiful pale yellow color, and provides a refreshing herbal flavor with notes of citrus. Wine connoisseurs may also notice a hint of gooseberry. Try this wine with fresh seafood and you will not be disappointed!

title: Babich Wines East Coast Unoaked Chardonnay
body_html:
Babich Wines East Coast Unoaked Chardonnay

With a smooth, light flavor, Chardonnay is a favorite white wine variety for a reason. When you want a bold, complex palate that balances artistry with an affordable price, Babich Wines Unoaked Chardonnay can be the pièce de résistance for any meal or special occasion. Featuring a tropical nose with a creamy texture and hints of melon and peach, this versatile wine is the perfect addition to your regular rotation.

title: La Playa Estate Series Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
The La Playa Estate Series Sauvignon Blanc is a lovely white wine with a dry body. On first sip, wine connoisseurs will notice the delightful interplay of pink grapefruit, tangerine, and a green apple finish. For the best experience, pair this with either poultry or fish.

TASTING NOTES

A delicate pale gold. On the nose, aromas of lemon, fresh pineapple with hints of lavender. It is a bright well balanced wine with a clean minerality and touch of lime on the finish.

title: La Playa Estate Series Carmenere
body_html:
The La Playa Estate Series Carmenere has a lucious garnet color, and features a variety of subtle flavoring, including vanilla peppermint toffee and peanut butter chocolate fudge. You'll be sure to notice the delicious spiced apple finish. Pair it with beef, pork, or virtually any cheese.

TASTING NOTES

Velvety light purple. On the nose, ripe blueberries with a hint of fine smoke. It has good ripe fruit presence with rounded tannins.

title: La Playa Estate Series Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
La Playa Estate Series Cabernet Sauvignon

Strawberry and hints of black pepper are the first flavors you'll notice when you take a sip of La Playa Estate Series's Cabernet Sauvignon. For best results, you should pair this darker wine with a steak or lamb chops and mint jelly.

TASTING NOTES

A deep elegant scarlet color.  This Cabernet Sauvignon has notes of ripe black currant and mocha, with structured tannins and a supple finish.

title: La Playa Estate Series Chardonnay
body_html:
With a lovely golden straw color, the La Playa Estate Series Unoaked Chardonnay is a dry wine lover's delight. Take a sip and you'll taste green apple and lively lemon zest. A crisp wine, it pairs well with seafood -- lobster in particular.

TASTING NOTES

A rich gold hay color. On the nose, aromas of tropical fruits such as kiwi and pineapple along with delicate floral notes. The palate has good balanced between refreshing acidity and a lush mouthfeel.

title: A By Acacia Vineyard Chardonnay
body_html:
A By Acacia Vineyard Chardonnay

As buttery as baked goods and just as spice-filled, A by Acacia Vinyard Chardonnay is Golden Delicious in color and just as syrupy sweet. A by Acacia is a household name in California by producing solid casual-drinking numbers such as this. A lingering and weighty finish makes for a wine that must search a little longer for it's perfect drinker. Try with steamed mussels, crab or prawns, or fresh pasta prima vera.

A by Acacia Vineyard is a Napa Valley winery that has been making great Chardonnay since 1979. Paired with grilled fish, the A By Acacia Vineyard Chardonnay is a smooth, fruity drop that is silky on the palate with a crisp yet opulent texture, ideal for a spring garden party.

title: A by Acacia Vineyard Pinot Noir
body_html:
A by Acacia Vineyard Pinot Noir

Start a pork shank crock-pot dinner in the morning and pick up a bottle of A by Acacia Vineyard Pinot Noir to serve with it. The ruby hue and cherry cola nose are both a delight, and end up in a well-crafted balancing act with soft tannins and a short, dry finish.

A by Acacia Vineyard Pinot Noir features ripe red cherry and raspberry mixed with plum and rose petals. It also features fine-grain tannins paired with beautiful oak spices and is a light and perfumed red wine that pairs well with pork. Made in California, this wine is inexpensive and a good quality.

title: Columbia Crest H3 Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Columbia Crest H3 Cabernet Sauvignon

Columbia Crest H3 Cabernet Sauvignon presents aromas of dark cherry, vanilla, berry jams and mocha with no shortage of oak. The spiciness is dialed in just right for the medium finish. An amazing value for a Washington Cabernet Sauvignon that readily competes with its rivals down the coast in California. Try tonight with fresh-caught seafood, oysters on the half shell or buttery escargo.

title: Don Miguel Gascon Malbec
body_html:
Don Miguel Gascon Malbec

Don Miguel Gascon Malbec is a casual-drinking Malbec with a spicy kick. The bold body of blackberries is balanced with a riddichio and cocoa bitterness. A generous and oaky mouthfeel makes it seem older than it's age and gives way to a dry finish. Drink this gorgeous Don Miguel Gascon Malbec with a Cobb salad or a rare flank steak.

title: Dusted Valley Boomtown Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Dusted Valley Boomtown Cabernet Sauvignon
