Dusted Valley Boomtown Cabernet Sauvignon is a medium bodied red wine with cherry notes. It has a complex flavor including notes of crushed herbs. It was made from grapes grown in Washington state. Dusted Valley Boomtown Cabernet Sauvignon pairs well with chocolate, lamb, or pork.

title: Allegrini Palazzo della Torre Veronese
body_html:
Allegrini Palazzo della Torre Veronese

This Allegrini Palazzo della Torre Veronese is packed with hints of roasted figs and sun baked plums. A gorgeous autumn wine to pair with your favorite thyme and oregano-laden foods. Earthy notes, firm tannins and high acidity make this a wonderful food wine. Thanksgiving dinner definitely calls for a couple bottles of Allegrini Palazzo della Torre Veronese.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red

title: Santa Cristina Toscana Antinori Rosso
body_html:
Santa Cristina by Antinori Rosso

Marchesi Antinori Santa Cristina Toscana opens with a ruby red color with violet tinges. It has a full and intense fragrance with hints of red fruit which bring to mind cherries and raspberries. On the palate the wine is smooth and well-balanced. The finish is characterized by gentle tannins and the persistent flavor of the grapes which make is so delicious with baked brie, pasta with marinara sauce or your favorite pizza.

title: La Catrina Moscato
body_html:
La Catrina Moscato

La Catrina Moscato is readily recognizable by the "Bridesmaid" graffiti on the bottle. This moscato will dance on your tastebuds until the early hours of morning with its strawberry and jasmine kisses. Taste the excitement of the sunset when you pair the sweetness of this wine with spicy foods!

TASTING NOTES

A bright Moscato with aromas of freshly baked peach cobbler and balanced flavors of persimmon and sweet citrus. The finish leaves your palate wanting another sip.

title: La Catrina Pinot Grigio
body_html:
La Catrina Pinot Grigio

Bearing the unmistakable image of a skeletal Mariachi band, La Catrina Pinot Grigio exudes the smell of aromatic spices, which is sure to excite the senses in anticipation of the refreshing taste of 80 percent Pinot Grigio, 15 percent Colombard, and 5 percent Chardonnay. Such a crisp wine pairs well with chicken, seafood, and even select vegetarian dishes.

TASTING NOTES

A crisp Pinot Grigio with aromas of pear and bright citrus. Smooth flavors of sweet summer peach and green apple, that refresh your palate after every sip. Salud.

title: Charles & Charles Rosé
body_html:
Charles & Charles Rosé

Bieler and Smith - Charles & Charles Rosé is one of the best roses on the market today and with bang for your buck. Its crisp and slightly tart flavor is sure to please. Pair Charles & Charles Rose with a nice salmon steak with a sunflower-dill pesto sauce for a delicious, light meal.

Charles & Charles Rose is a complex wine with a vibrant pink color. Made with strawberries, raspberries, Bing cherries, Herbs de Provence, grass, and citrus, its flavor is outstanding and bright. It smells as great as it tastes and that’s due to the experimental yeasts the company added to the flavor profile.

title: Gerard Bertrand Cote Des Roses Rosé
body_html:
Gerard Bertrand Cote Des Roses Rosé

Delicate and floral, Gerard Bertrand Cote Des Roses is both a work of art in the bottle and on your palate. Flavors of cranberry and under ripe strawberry work their way to a fresh, almost candied finish. This Rose is perfect with a summery salad or an array of hard cheeses.

Experience the refreshing flavor of this full bodied rose by Gerard Bertrand. You and your friends can savor the elegant aromatic persistence of the summer fruits from the south of France while sitting on your patio. Or pair this pale pink rose with your favorite dinner. From pasta, to salmon and pork, it will enhance the pleasure of your meal.

TASTING NOTES

The robe shows a soft, pale, brilliant pink with bluish tints developing over time towards more orangey nuances.

The bouquet releases aromas of summer fruits, cassis and redcurrant Floral notes of rose along with hints of grapefruit complete the picture.

On the palate the impression is fresh and full, with great aromatic persistence and balance The finish is fresh, offering notes of candy.

title: Once Upon A Vine A Villainous Zinfandel
body_html:
Once Upon A Vine 'A Villainous Zinfandel'

Any real scoundrel knows that this thrilling Zinfandel comes from the Central California sub-region, with dark fruits like cherry, boysenberry, and plum exploding in your mouth, and the smoke, pepper, and cola hints providing the perfectly smooth finish to this dastardly good wine. Best enjoyed with a steak or sweet, savory BBQ from the grill, or with cow or sheep milk cheese and dark chocolate in front of the fire.

title: Menage a Trois Malbec
body_html:
Menage a Trois Malbec

Menage a Trois Malbec is a sultry wine that boldly tangos across your palate trailing an irresistible blend of blackberries, blueberries, dark cherries and hints of spice in its wake. With an opulent texture, soft, round tannins, and a long, velvety finish, it is a perfect pairing with a juicy cheeseburger or a tomato-based pasta dish.

title: 1000 Stories Bourbon Barrel Aged Zinfandel
body_html:
Top Selling Zinfandel

1000 Stories Bourbon Barrel Aged Zinfandel

You will have many wonderful stories to tell when you serve your friends 1000 Stories Zinfandel. The deep, rich purple color invites you in and the intense raspberry and spicy flavors seal the deal.

Unique red wine is aged in bourbon barrels

This unique red wine is aged in bourbon barrels to give it that very distinctive character. 1000 Stories, a full bodied, smooth zinfandel, is ideal at barbeques. The lingering warmth of the 1000 Stories Zinfandel combines with the zest of the barbequed ribs to give you a perfect blend of flavors.

Enjoy 1000 Stories Zinfandel with friends at your cookout. You'll be glad you did!

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Zinfandel

title: Terra d'Oro Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Terra d'Oro Pinot Grigio

Lively, full of luscious pear and white peaches, with an undercurrent of ginger tea and honeycomb that teases the palate – this is the complex swirl of flavors and aromas that makes up Terra d’Oro Pinot Grigio. Pair the minerally finish with some freshly shucked oysters for the perfect summer treat.

title: Terra d'Oro Sangiovese
body_html:
Terra d'Oro Sangiovese

Whether you need a glass at the end of the day or you are celebrating with a good friend, the Terra d'Oro Sangiovese is the perfect bottle for any occasion. While deliciously light and acidic, your taste buds will be delighted with rich flavors of ripe berries and a hinting of all spice and white pepper. Pair this with well seasoned food.

title: Luna Vineyards Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Luna Vineyards Pinot Grigio

Luna Vineyards Pinot Grigio is made using grapes grown on the eastern hillside of the Silverado Trail, which are blended with the products of other locations to create an outstanding balance of citrus and other refreshing fruit flavors. This liveliness makes it well-suited for lighter seafood as well as grilled chicken and vegetables.

title: Luna Vineyards Lunatic Red
body_html:
Luna Vineyards Lunatic Red

Luna Vineyards Lunatic Red came to my rescue last week. My vegetarian sister challenged me to pair a wine with her cumin-curry quinoa burgers. The berry sweetness of the Luna Vineyards Lunatic Red complemented the spicy burgers perfectly, and the smooth tannins added depth to the meal.

title: Domaine Lafage Cotes du Roussillon Miraflors Rose
body_html:
Domaine Lafage Cotes du Roussillon Miraflors Rose

Pretty pink wines are never just for show as this Dom Lafage Miraflors Rose demonstrates. The base is a light, mildly dry white wine, enhanced naturally in color and flavor with strawberry and cherry. It is delightfully paired with summer salads and cold cut sandwiches, although it also works well with mild-tasting fish too.

title: Caymus Special Selection Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Caymus Special Selection Cabernet Sauvignon

Caymus Special Selection is the flagship wine of the Wagner family and is comprised of the very best barrels of the vintage. This wine is not produced in difficult years. Caymus Napa Valley is more representative of a standard Cabernet of Napa Valley, as it is a bit less precocious than the Special Selection, but still delivers big. Caymus prides itself on producing wines that are as approachable in youth as well at maturity. Both the “Napa Valley” and “Special Selection” Cabernets are produced under the winemaking hand of Chuck Wagner.
  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Caymus Vineyards Special Selection Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Caymus Vineyards Special Selection Cabernet Sauvignon

The Caymus Vineyards Special Selection Cabernet Sauvignon is a Napa Valley wine that has the distinct honor of having been named as “Wine of the Year” by “Wine Spectator Magazine” twice. To receive that distinction, it had to beat out around 10,000 other wines. It offers such flavors as plum, blackberry, wild berry, and currant. The rich wine also has hints of anise and black licorice. Other flavor characteristics include tobacco, vanilla, violet, and black pepper. The Caymus Vineyards Special Selection Cabernet Sauvignon is a complex, oaky wine is best paired with rich dishes like mushroom stroganoff, creamy soups, and other cream-based dishes.

title: Opus One 2013
body_html:
Opus One 2013

A very dry and unseasonably warm winter gave the vines an early start to the growing season which became an extraordinary vintage for Opus One 2013. It offers splendid aromas of blueberry, cassis, and blackberries. Elegantly balanced, the acidity and core structure deliver a persistent finish with hints of dark chocolate. Approachable and enjoyable now, but will be even better in 2019 and beyond. Pair with grilled filet mignon or a dry-aged bone-in prime rib roast.

title: Joseph Phelps Vineyards Insignia 2013
body_html:
Joseph Phelps Vineyards Insignia

2013

The Joseph Phelps Vineyards Insignia 2013 is a beautiful red blend with flavors of dark fruit, cracked black pepper, sweet vanilla beans and bitter chocolate. It pairs beautifully with blackberry and plum aromatics and the hints of espresso, baking spices and even cardamom. All you need is a rare filet mignon to go with it.

title: Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon 1 Liter
body_html:
Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon 1 Liter

The Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon 1 Liter is a charmingly ripe, plump red wine from Napa Valley, California. This rich wine offer flavors like creamy vanilla, cedar, sweet tobacco, dark chocolate, sweet licorice, and blueberry pie. It’s perfectly balanced with a supple, appealing texture. In addition to its delectable flavors, what’s also special about the full-bodied Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon 1 Liter is that it provides wine enthusiasts with 33 percent more of this delectable red wine than traditional wine bottles can offer. Pair the Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon with vegetable tarts, fried tofu with spicy sauce, or stir-fried dishes.

title: Wilson Creek "White" Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Wilson Creek White Cabernet Sauvignon

The Wilson Creek Variant White Cabernet Sauvignon has a slightly dry taste and plenty of sweetness. Fruity flavors of strawberry, peach and melon, along with floral notes have the ideal amount of acidity to go along with it. Great with Thai dishes and curry-based options, this is a tannin rich beverage for your next diner.

Variant Series

Our Variant Series showcases the amazing array of possibilities when a craft winery can control all vineyard and cellar influence on wine from vine to bottle. The poster child for variant behavior is the white Cabernet Sauvignon, turning a traditionally rich tannic dark red wine into a white wine while retaining the rich feel of classic Cabernet.

The Variant Series White Cabernet Sauvignon is a true “white” wine with big aromas; strawberry, melon, and peach are prominent with subtle floral back notes. This wine’s fruit plays on the palate integrating well with its acidity and sweetness, notes of strawberry and melon come to mind. Most White Cabernets are darker in color due to a more vigorous pressing. A softer press keeps most of the color locked in the skin, the result is a softer more subtle wine.

TASTING NOTES

Strawberry, melon, and peach are prominent with subtle floral back notes. This wine plays on your palate integrating well with its acidity and sweetness.

title: Menage a Trois Silk
body_html:
Menage a Trois Silk

Menage a Trois Silk is a smooth, seductive red blend with a bright, red ruby hue and an alluring fragrance of dried violets and berries. Succulent cherry and ripe raspberry flavors mingle with delicate hints of rose petals and toasty spice, and glide gracefully across your palate. The one bottle to have with both a grilled New York strip and a dark chocolate dessert.

title: The Prisoner Red Blend Wine
body_html:
The Prisoner Wine Co. 'The Prisoner'

Inspired by the “mixed blacks” blends made by Italian immigrants of the Napa Valley, The Prisoner is an innovative, unique and very drinkable blend that incorporates Zinfandel, Cabernet Sauvignon, Syrah, Petite Sirah, and Charbono. Expect to taste bing cherries mingling with warm figs and dark roast espresso. It finishes smooth and lushiously with tart red berries for a taste that the Wine Spectator gave a solid 91 points.

Pair with a gorgeously bloody steak or a thick juicy burger to bring out the strong palate, or serve more casually with a plate of hard cheeses and fall or winter fruits, like pomegrate, persimmon and fig.

TASTING NOTES

Blend:
Cabernet Sauvignon, Petite Sirah, Syrah, Charbono

Aromas:
Bing Cherry, Dark Chocolate, Clove, Roasted Fig

Tasting Notes:
Raspberry, Boysenberry, Pomegranate, Vanilla

Food Pairing:
Chef Brett recommends pairing The Prisoner Red Blend with Kalbi Short Ribs or Chicken Mole Tostada.

title: Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon 2013
body_html:
Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon Napa Valley

The Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon has an appealing, vibrant berry scent that’s accented with warm layers of vanilla. The taste of this wine offers notes of cassis, cocoa, blackberries, and blackcurrant. With its good tannin structure and beautifully deep purple color, this Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon stands out as a Cabernet to try at a nice dinner or gathering. This Cabernet Sauvignon is a favorite among foodies for good reason.

Thanks to its tannic structure and deep flavors, it can be paired well with a variety of rich dishes, including creamy pastas, decked-out soufflés, decadent bruschetta, and buttery mashed potatoes. Grilled vegetables like Brussel sprouts and grilled radicchio also pair well with the Caymus Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon.

title: Line 39 Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Line 39 Pinot Grigio

A sharp wine with flavors of ripe pear and stone fruits, the Line 39 Pinot Grigio features a broad palate that lends itself well to seafood. The wine shines well when served with a pan-seared tilapia. Straw in color, this solid dry wine tickles the palate with nice tropical fruit notes.

title: Justin Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Justin Cabernet Sauvignon

Justin Cabernet Sauvignon is a beautiful medium bodied wine with flavors of blackcurrant, black and red cherries with vanilla, cedar, sweet tobacco, and licorice. With its purple core and light violet rim, this medium ruby drink is a traditional Sauvignon in all respects. It pairs nicely with red meat and strong cheeses.

title: Husch Mendocino Chardonnay
body_html:
Husch Mendocino Chardonnay

Husch Mendocino Chardonnay is loaded with flavors and aromas like that of pear tart. Coupled with hints of custard and vanilla, this wine is loaded with character. It has a slightly soft balance and a body that isn’t too full. Pair the wine with bacon wrapped scallops or herb-encrusted pork chops.

title: Husch Anderson Valley Dry Gewurztraminer
body_html:
Husch Anderson Valley Dry Gewurztraminer

With the perfect combination of dry and sweet, the Husch Anderson Valley Dry Gewurztraminer is a delicious wine for any occasion. This wine has a floral aroma and bouquet along with the delicious flavors of tart grapefruit and a hint of spice. Pair this wine with Asian cuisine or a strong, pungent cheese and you will find a wonderful balance of flavors.

title: Husch Mendocino Chenin Blanc
body_html:
Husch Mendocino Chenin Blanc

Enjoy a charming, juicy, bright blend in the Husch Mendocino Chenin Blanc wine. It smells like crisp apples and tastes like that of citrus and herbs, yet, it has a slight sweetness that comes together and is balanced out with a crisp acidity. Bring the wine on your picnic or pair it with a spicy curry or Thai food.

title: Husch Pinot Noir
body_html:
Husch Pinot Noir

Enjoy scrumptious aromas of bing cherry, pomegranate, vanilla, orange and sweet herbs in the Husch Pinot Noir. This delicious wine is both plush and round to deliver an all-around taste that pairs well will an assortment of foods, such as stuffed pork chops, mushroom tortellini, chicken pesto sausage and many others.

title: Husch La Ribera Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Husch La Ribera Vineyards Sauvignon Blanc

Rated among the top 10 wines of the region, with a Wine Enthusiast score of 91, Husch La Ribera's Sauvignon Blanc has freshness on the nose followed by a zest of acidity. Notes of mango, lime, pineapple, and gooseberry suggest pairing with roasted chicken, crusted halibut, or fresh goat cheese.

title: Husch La Ribera Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Husch La Ribera Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon

Husch La Ribera Vineyards Cabarnet Sauvignon is medium-bodied wine with bright and concentrated fruit aromas and delicious red cherry and raspberry flavors. Rated 90 points by Wine Enthusiast, this reflreshingly textured wine pairs well with beet salad, chocolate ganache or blue cheese encrusted filet mignon.

title: Menage a Trois Gold Chardonnay
body_html:
Menage a Trois Gold Chardonnay

Give your palate a nice and spicy taste with Menage a Trois Gold Chardonnay. It features an aroma that evokes the taste of vanilla paired with nutmeg. With a taste that reminds you of baking spices or sweet liquids, this is a wine you will want to pair with chicken or turkey. It even goes well with seafood-based dishes like lobster.

title: Menage a Trois Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Menage a Trois Sauvignon Blanc

Liven up your lunch with the bold and fresh taste of Menage a Trois Sauvignon Blanc. Its flavor profile demonstrates bursts of lemon, lime, and tangerine that lingers. Menage a Trois Sauvignon Blanc pairs well with savory garlic shrimp and mexican salads.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Riesling
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Riesling

The Chateau Ste. Michelle Riesling, despite the vineyard's French name, is actually produced here in the U.S. (specifically Columbia Valley). This dry white wine is a decent table wine, best consumed with cornish game hen and a dessert of pears flambe to bring out its other fruit and earthy notes.

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Cabernet Sauvignon

Chateau Ste. Michelle Cabernet Sauvignon is a delicious wine full of spices that add an herbaceous flavor that cannot be compared. The flavors of boysenberry, raspberry, and cherries round out this full-bodied wine. Pair this Chateau Ste. Michelle Cabernet Sauvignon with a rack of barbecued ribs or with garlicky chicken wings and you will bring out the full flavors of the food and the wine.

TASTING NOTES

We craft our Columbia Valley Cabernet to highlight concentrated Washington red fruit in an accessible style. This inviting cab is rich with red fruit flavor, the complexity and structure of this Cabernet Sauvignon remains delectable at every sip – especially when paired with beef, game or burgers.

title: Monkey Bay Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Monkey Bay Sauvignon Blanc

Monkey Bay Sauvignon Blanc is crisp and vibrant, with aromas of ripe kiwi, pineapple, and grapefruit, and subtle hints of fresh cut grass. While liveyad overflowing with flavors of passion fruit, lemn, and grapefruit, these is a delicate herbaceous character infused throughout. Pair a bottle with fresh shucked oysters on the half-shell, or with a citrus glazed sea bass and wild rice pilaf.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Sauvignon Blanc

title: Estancia Estates Pinot Noir
body_html:
Estancia Estates Pinot Noir

Estancia Estates Pinot Noir is a smooth wine with a supple and rich flavor profile. This delicious ruby red wine features the tastes of warm spices, ripe raspberries, and cherries. To best bring out these complex flavors, pair the Estancia Estates Pinot Noir with asparagus, smoked salmon, or grilled steak or chicken.

title: Estancia Estates Chardonnay
body_html:
Estancia Estates Chardonnay

Award-winning Estancia Estates California Chardonnay hails from one of the best growing areas for Chardonnay. This light-colored golden wine provides an aroma of tropical fruit and honey with a hint of peach and pineapple. Its lush tropical taste with a touch of butter cream and sweet vanilla make it a delightful accompaniment to meals including poultry, pork, smoked salmon or pasta with cream sauce.

title: Estancia Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Estancia Cabernet Sauvignon

Estancia Cabernet Sauvignon opens to aromas of dark cherry, chocolate and mocha. The cherry lingers into the flavor along with the chocolate with the addition of some spicy, peppery notes followed by sweet oak. The rich finish of this wine is best paired with aged hard cheeses and red-sauce pastas.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Michael David Rapture Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Michael David Winery Rapture Cabernet Sauvignon

Rapture is Michael David's small-production Rapture Cabernet Sauvignon, blended with a small percentage of Petite Sirah, then aged 17 months in French oak for a full-bodied figure. Purple-black in color, it's mouth-filling, jammy and extracted with flavorful blackberry and cherry fruit and a streak of vanilla and fig on the finish. Couple this wish your favorite cheese and you'll be in for a mouthful of greatness.

TASTING NOTES

Michael David Winery's most select Cabernet Sauvignon offering, the 2021 Rapture presents tempting layers of baked blackberry cobbler, coffee bean, nutmeg and clove on the nose. Full bodied on the palate, complex flavors of ripe summer berries, Mission fig, dark chocolate truffle and cedar are carried through by a pleasantly, long finish that will have you reaching for another sip.

title: 3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
3 Badge Enology 'Leese-Fitch' Cabernet Sauvignon

3 Badge Enology Leese-Fitch Cabernet Sauvignon pairs gorgeous deep blackberry flavor, fig compote, and dark cherry with toffee, tea leaf and Dutch cocoa. In addition to the tannins, and caramel oak nodes, you'll find a hint of dark raspberry and toasted coconut. This Cabernet Sauvignon pairs exceptionally well with hearty roast beef and root veggies.

title: 3 Badge Enology 'Leese-Fitch' Pinot Noir
body_html:
3 Badge Enology 'Leese-Fitch' Pinot Noir

As an extremely affordable Pinot Noir, 3 Badge Enology’s Leese Fitch offers a complex sensory experience from start to finish. Begin with aromas of orange blossom, freshly crushed raspberries, cola, cherry pie and toasty brioche and finish with an interesting taste blend of tart cranberry, bing cherry, sour plum that is seasoned with vanilla, cardamom, black tea leaf, clove and watermelon rind. This wine pairs well with grilled chicken and soft cheeses.

title: 3 Badge Enology 'Leese-Fitch' Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
3 Badge Enology 'Leese-Fitch' Sauvignon Blanc

The Sauvignon Blanc grape features prominently in this 3 Badge Enology "Leese-Fitch" Sauvignon Blanc wine. The 3 Badge name brand of wines is affiliated with the Don Sebastiani winery and a part of SoCal not entirely familiar to most most tourists. Still, the wine presents with a medium-dry palette and is best consumed with smoked fish.

title: Line 39 Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Line 39 Sauvignon Blanc

The Line 39 Sauvignon Blanc brings refreshing notes of lime and lemon and then culminates with grapefruit for a crisp, delicious finish. It is an ideal aperitif, the perfect complement to a delicious shrimp scampi dinner, or would make the quintessential hostess gift.

title: Line 39 Pinot Noir
body_html:
Line 39 Pinot Noir

Throw your next dinner party with the help of Line 39 Pinot Noir. Take in aromas of cherries and juicy strawberries, while flavors of supple tannins and light oak hold firmly on the palette. Medium-to-full bodied, this garnet colored wine goes well with seared salmon and pasta dishes with rich marinara.

title: Line 39 Chardonnay
body_html:
Line 39 Chardonnay

The Line 39 Chardonnay is a rich, medium-bodies wine ripe with tropical fruit flavors and hints of warm oak. Served alongside roast chicken with garlic and herbs, poached halibut with lemon and herbs, or even enjoyed alone on a hot summer afternoon, this crisp and refreshing wine is sure to be pleasing to the palate.

title: Line 39 Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Line 39 Cabernet Sauvignon

The Line 39 Cabernet Sauvignon is a classically bold wine with rich fruit flavors and a hint of pepper on the palate. It finishes with subtle tannins that don't overwhelm the senses, but instead lead to a smooth finish that would go well with a roasted duck breast or beef tenderloin with blackberry dressing.

title: La Merika Chardonnay
body_html:
La Merika Chardonnay

Made using grapes harvested in the cool morning hours before being permitted to settle overnight in order to maximize their flavor, La Merika Chardonnay promises a smooth mouthful that starts with citrus, green apple, and honey before finishing with lemon, lime, pear, and toasted almond. As a result, it is perfect for lighter dishes, whether that means chicken and seafood or soups and salads.

title: Apothic Wines Apothic Crush Limited Edition Red
body_html:
Apothic Wines 'Apothic Crush' Limited Edition Red

Apothic Wines "Apothic Crush" Limited Edition Red is a blended limited batch of wine with very unique red grape blend. Pinot Noir and Petite Sirah are at the heart of this limited red blend. You will quickly develop a "crush" on this wine, and then want a lot more bottles of it! Enjoy with venison or other large game.

title: Stella Rosa Bianco
body_html:
Stella Rosa Bianco

Satisfy your taste buds with the Stella Rosa Platinum semi-sweet Bianco. It's pale golden straw color delights the eyes and is followed with exquisite taste of earthy and bright exotic fruits. Keep your guests on their toes with the funky, complex and most interesting dessert wine. Pair it with gelato, mixed berries or mild cheese for the perfect party.

title: Pennywise Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Pennywise Cabernet Sauvignon

Dark garnet in color, this wine has complex aromas consisting of blackberries, Bing cherry, a hint of fresh leather and crushed oregano. In the mouth, flavors start with black currant, tart raspberry, coffee nibs, dark caramel, mocha, toasted coconut, and pecan while the finish lingers with notes of dried plum, sweetened cranberry and cocoa.

title: Leese-Fitch Chardonnay
body_html:
Leese-Fitch Chardonnay

This rich Leese-Fitch Chardonnay begins with the pleasant tone of apple, citrus, and tangerine. It goes down smooth and tasty in the mouth. The hint of sweetness makes it pair well with a wide variety of dishes, and shines very well when enjoyed along spicy foods. You'd be hard-pressed to find a better example of California Chardonnay than this.

title: Tozai Junmai Living Jewel Sake
body_html:
Tozai Junmai Living Jewel Sake

Few drinks conjure faraway lands like Tozai Junmai Living Jewel Sake. Its crisp white grape and licorice notes float above the tongue and pair perfectly with roasted chicken or salmon. With Tozai Junmai Living Jewel sake it's easy to forget mundane life and slide undercover my own exotic beauty.

title: Tozai Typhoon Premium Futsu Sake
body_html:
Tozai Typhoon Premium Futsu Sake

Tozai Typhoon Premium Futsu Sake has banana and nut flavors with a mellow taste. Tozai Typhoon Premium Futsu Sake pairs well with seafood salad, pork dumplings, or roasted vegetables. Drink this sake on its own or mixed in a cocktail.

title: Tozai Well of Wisdom Sake
body_html:
Tozai Well of Wisdom Sake

Tozai Well of Wisdom Sake is a juicy sake with watermelon notes. Tozai Well of Wisdom Sake has a silky and fresh taste . It's made from the mountain spring water near the family's brewery. Try this with shrimp kabobs, grilled chicken, or ceviche.

title: Menage a Trois Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Menage a Trois Pinot Grigio

Menage a Trois Pinot Grigio is cold fermented in steel tanks resulting in a really fresh, crisp and juicy Pinot Grigio. It begins with lots of fresh, zesty, citrus and tropical fruit aromas. The wine tastes of crisp, juicy fruit and has good acidity. The zesty fruit carries over from the bouquet making it perfect to enjoy with ceviche, paella and chicken fajitas.

title: Menage a Trois Pinot Noir
body_html:
Menage a Trois Pinot Noir

The Menage a Trois Pinot Noir features a soft base of earthy undertones. The earthy flavor dissolves into a light, sweet, fruity wine that pairs perfectly with pasta dishes, creamy chicken dishes or even a beef bourguignon. The aroma of cherries and blackberries makes this lightly tannic wine perfect for game meat, like duck, as well.

The Menage a Trois Pinot Noir is the perfect accompaniment to practically any meal, with its light, fruity flavors and hints of cocoa it is also a stellar wine to serve with a dessert or a cheese course.

title: Menage a Trois Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Menage a Trois Cabernet Sauvignon

Treat yourself like royalty with Menage a Trois Cabernet Sauvignon! With its rich tannins and a deep, ruby red color, this version of Cabernet Sauvignon will entice you with its rich, diverse berry flavors and long, smooth, elegant finish. Put a sovereign end to your dinner by pairing it with a simple dessert of no-bake cream cheese truffles.

title: Stella Rosa Red
body_html:
Stella Rosa Red

Beguile your grown up tastes with the deep sophistication of Stella Rosa Red! Made from freshly harvested grapes, Stella Rosa Red has a profoundly beautiful deep red color that reminds you of those flashing, graceful rubies that once adorned your grandmother's lace curtains. The wine is characterized by a hearty blend of fresh strawberry, red plum, and raspberry and boasts an alluring, full-bodied flavor with undertones of sweetness, just enough to bring out the femme -fatale in within. Compliment the elegance of the wine with a dish of the finest Asiago cheese.

title: Ravenswood Winery Zen of Zin Old Vine Zinfandel
body_html:
Ravenswood Winery 'Zen of Zin' Old Vine Zinfandel

The Ravenswood Winery 'Zen of Zin' Old Vine Zinfandel is a wine with a floral aroma and a deep underlying flavor profile. With a hint of smoke and dominant flavors of vanilla and spices, as well as plums and chocolate, this zinfandel is robust and intriguing on the palate. This wine is best paired with Italian fare like spaghetti and meatballs, or a delicious Italian sausage.

title: Antigal 1 Uno Malbec
body_html:
Antigal 1 Uno Malbec

Hailing from Argentina, Antigal 1 Uno Malbec offers a multilayered experience. This intense dark red wine begins with an aroma of wild berry and plum with a touch of coffee working its way to the palate where it’s joined with vanilla and smoke to a velvety finish. It’s an excellent choice for meals including roasted leg of lamb or red meats.

title: Ravenswood Winery Old Vine Zinfandel
body_html:
Ravenswood Winery Old Vine Zinfandel

Ravenswood Winery Old Vine Zinfandel will warm and envelope your senses in a flavorful mixture of blueberry, blackberry, natural vanilla, and baking spice flavors. The feeling you get from each sip is also elegantly layered and generous.

Be sure to pair Ravenswood Windery's Old Vine Zinfandel with spare ribs, beef braised in wine, or leg of lamb for an extraordinary dinner experience.

title: Ravenswood Winery Vintners Blend Old Vine Zinfandel
body_html:
Ravenswood Winery Vintners Blend Old Vine Zinfandel

This aromatic and full-bodied Zin, sourced from some of the oldest vineyards in California, caresses your tongue with its cherry flavor, backed by hints of raspberry, blackberry, and vanilla. Its sweet notes pair perfectly with succulent or salty foods like barbequed or grilled dishes, or spicy Mexican and Southwest dishes.

title: Bartenura Moscato
body_html:
Bartenura Moscato Italian Wine

Enjoy sipping on some Bartenura Moscato Italian Wine as you relax by the pool and enjoy the warm breeze against your face. It’s refreshing and crisp with hints of tangerine, pear, melon and nectar all to give it an amazing finish. Serve this delicious blend with fresh fruit such as pears, melons or nectarines.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Moscato

title: Diseno Old Vine Malbec
body_html:
Diseno Old Vine Malbec

Get complex aromas of ripe blackberries, red cherries, violets and notes of vanilla oak to balance out the Diseno Old Vine Malbec. It has subtle hints of dark chocolate to complete the blend and give you something that will leave your tastebuds alive. Pair the blend with seafood, beef or hard cheeses.

title: Layer Cake Sea of Stones Red
body_html:
Layer Cake 'Sea of Stones' Red

Named for a memorable landscape carpeted in cobblestones, Layer Cake 'Sea of Stones' is a concentrated red wine blended using Malbec, Syrah, Cabernet Sauvignon, and Petit Verdot before being permitted to sit in 100% French oak barrels. This process brings out flavors of ripe fruit, grilled bread, and even wet stones, which are accompanied by notes of coffee, chocolate, and spices. Combined, these flavors make Layer Cake 'Sea of Stones' an excellent pairing with red meats, roasted vegetables, and other rich foods, thus reflecting its blended nature.

TASTING NOTES

The Layer Cake Sea of Stones red blend is extremely dense and concentrated. Opaque purple, almost black in color, the aroma is full of ripe black fruit, grilled bread, pencil lead, wet stones, lavender, blueberry pie, and black cherry. On the palate there is layer upon layer of savory fruit, spice notes, espresso, and dark chocolate as well as rich, creamy texture. The aromas and flavors carry on long after the wine is gone from your mouth, the finish taunting you to have another sip.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Red Wine Blend

title: Achaval Ferrer Quimera
body_html:
Achaval Ferrer Quimera

The Achaval Ferrer Quimera is aged for 12 months in French oak barrels to create the rich flavor. Accented with aromas of blackberry, blueberry and cassis, it's also flavored with chocolate-tobacco, licorace and crushed blackberry. This intense, red wine comes from Mendoza, Argentina and pairs well with beef and venison

title: R Wines Bitch Grenache
body_html:
R Wines Bitch Grenache

Dominated by jammy notes of red berries and a dash of black pepper, the aptly named Bitch Grenache is made from hard-to-grow grapes with modest yields, but the end results are exquisite. Pair the Bitch with Shepherd's Pie, anything with corned beef, and game birds such as pheasant and duck.

Have you ever wanted a wine so refreshing and tasty that you would almost pass out by thinking about having it? Well, you should try Bitch Grenache! Pretty crude namThe Best Wine Storee, I know. Don't let that get to you, though. It is made by winemakers Chris Ringland & Lisa Wetherell with ingredients found in the sub-region of Barossa Valley in South Australia. The nose and palate are made with raspberries, peach and poached quince. The palate continues with a wonderful texture flavored with strawberries and cream then finishes with spices, cloves and nutmeg. If you like creamy, fruit flavored wine, this Bitch will be the best you will ever have!

title: Apothic Wines Red Winemaker's Blend
body_html:
Apothic Wines Red Winemaker's Blend

Apothic’s Red Winemaker’s Blend features blackberry and dark cherry flavors layered with a hint of chocolate, mocha and brown spice that make for an intriguing and full-bodied blend of reds. This wine pairs well pork, beef and pasta with red sauces.

title: Apothic Wines Dark Limited Release
body_html:
Apothic Wines Dark Limited Release

Apothic Wines Dark Limited Release goes beyond making a rich, dark intense red wine. Its dark berry, heavy red grape and full-bodied flavors make it a favorite to serve at special occasions, or any time you want to impress your dinner guests. It is is best consumed with beef because of its intense red wine flavors.

title: Menage a Trois Midnight
body_html:
Ménage à Trois Midnight

The sensual Ménage a Trois Midnight DARK Red Blend is a rich garnet hue full of passionate black fruits. Seductive hints of blackberry and spiced plum tickle your palate. Silky and smooth, exotic spices linger for a long, flavorful finish. This Ménage a Trois Midnight DARK Red Blend wine pairs delightfully with roast beef and mushroom gravy.

title: Massimo Prestige Vineyards Malbec
body_html:
Massimo Prestige Vineyards Malbec

Massimo Prestige Vineyards Malbec is a medium-bodied, dry red wine with strong impressions of dark fruits on the nose and palate. With mellower tannins than its French counterpart, the dry bite typical of a Malbec is tempered with this wine, which finishes with a mild cherry taste. It pairs well with any savory red meat such as a sirloin or skirt steak with chimichurri.

title: Once Upon A Vine Lost Slipper Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Once Upon A Vine 'Lost Slipper' Sauvignon Blanc

Once Upon a Vine, The Lost Slipper Sauvignon Blanc is made of vibrant tropical fruits and it has a rich, round style. It’s nose radiates of lively passion fruit aromas and it gives way to ripe guava and pineapple flavors. The varietal is bright and it has a crisp character that is elevated by Sur lie aging, that adds fleshiness and weight to the palate. This wine has a taste that is friendly, inviting, and delicious. There are supreme foods that can be served with this wine.

There are a lot of supreme foods that can be served with this wine. If you are looking for a meat to serve with this wine, you can serve these white meats: chicken, pork chops, and turkey. If you need a seafood dish to eat with this wine, then Tilapia, Sea Bass, Perch, Sole, Haddock, Trout, Cod, Redfish, Halibut, Snapper, Mussels, Crab, Lobster, and Clams go well with it. There are also spices and herbs and cheeses that go well with this wine.

If you are in need of a green herb to season a dish that will be served with this wine, then Parsley, Basil, Mint, Tarragon, Thyme, Fennel, Dill, Chives, and Rosemary are ideal choices. When looking for a spice to season a dish that will be served with this wine is White Pepper, Coriander, Fennel, Turmeric, and Saffron. When you need a cheese to serve with this wine, softer and more briny and sour cheeses like Goat’s Milk cheese, Yogurt, and Creme fraiche. There are also vegetable and vegetable dishes that go well with this wine.

When making a vegetable dish to go with this wine, saute green vegetables or mix vegetables in more fatty vegetarian dishes so that the acidity of the wine shines through. These dishes are good examples of what can be served with this wine are asparagus quiche, cucumber dill yogurt salad, green hummus, white bean casserole and zucchini, and white lasagna.

There you have it, a description of a super wine and supreme foods to go with it. Those food items will make the Once Upon a Vine Lost Slipper Cabernet Sauvignon a dream come true instead of a fairy tale.

title: Once Upon A Vine The Big Bad Red Blend
body_html:
Once Upon A Vine 'The Big Bad' Red Blend

If you're in the mood for something bold and mysterious, Once Upon A Vine "The Big Bad" Red Blend is the perfect way to feed your cravings. A sumptuous red blend with a dynamic flavor profile, this wine boasts a berry, black plum, and root beer palate with just a touch of spice for an added kick. Excellent for any special occasion, this rich wine pairs perfectly with beef, lamb, or venison.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Blanc de Blancs Can 187ml
body_html:
Our effervescent Sofia Blanc de Blancs blend, in stylish pink 187ml cans.

Sofia Mini is a single-serving of our effervescent Sofia Blanc de Blancs, tasting of fresh juicy pears, summer melon and honeysuckle. Zesty, refreshing, cool and fun, each dazzling pink can comes with its own straw for sipping, so you can take it anywhere—anytime you feel like sparkling.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Blanc de Blancs 4-Pack Can
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Blanc de Blancs Can

4 Pack Can

A sparkling wine from the Monterrey vineyards, the Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Blanc de Blancs Mini cans come 4 in a pack and can be described as impetuous and impromptu. A combination of Reisling, Pinot Blanc and Muscat, the taste is rich with passion fruit, pear, crisp apple orange and melon. It gives the taste buds a tingle and has a flavorful sweet tart finish. Pour it in a flute for a champagne toast at a wedding, or invite a few friends over and pair it with cheese.

title: Infinite Monkey Red Wine Can
body_html:
Infinite Monkey Red Wine Can

4 Pack Can's

What a fun beverage you will carry to any gathering when you bring the Infinite Monkey Red Wine Can. The Infinite Monkey Theorem is a successful urban winery that focuses on serving up what people love to drink. The Infinite Monkey Red Wine Can allows you to access fresh, delicious wine without having to commit to drinking or storing the rest of a wine bottle.

The portable, single-serving can of red wine comes in a four-pack. It is a lightly carbonated Merlot red wine that offers a deep, rich color and vibrant flavors of currants, blackberries, and cherries. Pair the Infinite Monkey Red Wine Can with light meals like salads and roasted tomato dishes.

title: Infinite Monkey Theorem Moscato Can
body_html:
Infinite Monkey Theorem Moscato Can

4 Pack Can's

Drop the pretense and just enjoy refreshing wine with the Infinite Monkey Theorem Moscato in a can. Each sip is packed with floral, apricot, honeysuckle, and grapefruit notes. The sweet wine leaves a soft touch of sugar on the tongue and pairs well with spicy Asian foods or with appetizers such as cheese or antipasto.

title: Babe Rose With Bubbles Can
body_html:
Babe Rose With Bubbles Can

*Oprah's Pick*

(4 Pack Can's)

The very fun, single-serving Babe Rose With Bubbles Can is a delectable sparkling red wine that’s enjoyable for any occasion. With the smartly designed can, it is just right for a casual night in, but it is a high quality wine that’s a good choice for any gathering. Guests will marvel at the delicious wine that’s given out so fresh in a can.

Alternately, simply pour it into wine glasses before serving, and your guests will never know. As a sparking rosé from the creators of White Girl Wine, it’s an aesthetically pleasing, bubbly pink wine, and the can makes it so convenient when you only want a little wine or are on the go. It’s ultimately a portable wine that can be taken on camping trips or other excursions.

This wine is perfect for a fun gathering as the partner for cheese tastings. Also pair the Babe Rosé With Bubbles with rich, cheesy Italian dishes. The Babe Rose With Bubbles Can brings more fun and great taste to any evening.

title: Seven Daughters Moscato Veneto Can
body_html:
Seven Daughters Moscato Veneto Can

Trendy and portable with a revolutionary design, the Seven Daughters Moscato Veneto can is perfect for any hot summer day. Featuring raisin and apricot aromas and a medium body peppered with hints of pear and citrus, this one of a kind wine deserves a place of honor at every barbecue and outdoor gathering.

title: Seven Daughters Pinot Noir Can
body_html:
Seven Daughters Pinot Noir Can

This Pinot Noir wine from Seven Daughters has been blended with grapes grown in warm afternoon and cool evening temperatures to create a light bodied texture that pairs beautifully with foods like pasta and steak meat. The flavorsome fruity finish leaves a gentle lightness on your palate. Serve it at room temperature for the best wine drinking experience.

title: Clos du Bois Russian River Valley Reserve Chardonnay
body_html:
Clos du Bois Sonoma Reserve Russian River Valley Chardonnay

The Clos du Bois Russian River Valley Reserve Chardonnay is in a league of its own as a refreshing and robust chardonnay. It is rich and creamy with pear, apple, and lemon aromas. As a wine that has won the Gold Medal in numerous competitions, including the Los Angeles International Wine Competition, the Clos du Bois Russian River Valley Reserve Chardonnay also has notes of sweet brown spice that bring a special balance to it.

Pair the Clos du Bois Russian River Valley Reserve Chardonnay with vegetable terrines, creamy vegetable stews, and risotto. That will help bring out the rich, creamy flavors in both the wine and the food.

TASTING NOTES

Pear, Gala Apple, Meyer Lemon

title: Once Upon A Vine A Charming Pinot
body_html:
Once Upon A Vine 'A Charming' Pinot

Once Upon A Vine 'A Charming' Pinot was made in a style to enhance the fresh fruit characteristics of the Pinot grapes, with only half the wine being aged in oak barrels. Medium bodied with a good measure of that grip in the back of your palate Pinot is known for. The acidity is balanced and the finish is propelled by the mid palate flavors and the acidity. Excellent pairing with roast chicken or turkey with herb stuffing.

title: Once Upon A Vine The Fairest Chardonnay
body_html:
Once Upon A Vine 'The Fairest' Chardonnay

Once Upon A Vine, “The Fairest Chardonnay’ offers a ripe nose of pear, guava, pineapple, and creme brulee. Lees stirring and integrated oak lends richness and weight to the fleshy fruit. The enchanting flavors of the wine linger well into the finish, leaving notes of citrus and spice. There are cool foods that can be paired well with this Chardonnay.

Chardonnay can be served with mild, buttery, or creamy dishes. If a seafood dish is needed to serve with this wine, then meaty fish (like halibut or cod) and shellfish (lobster, crabs, scallops, and shrimp). This wine can also be paired with subtly flavored, simply seasoned pork and pork dishes. If a vegetable meal is needed, play to ripe Chardonnay’s impression of sweetness with ingredients like corn, butternut squash, sweet potatoes, and foods that are caramelized from roasting or grilling, like crisp-skinned roast chicken.Chardonnay can also be paired with dishes that have a silky texture, like risottos, cream enhanced soups, sauces, and pasta.

These super cool foods will make the fairest Chardonnay, even more, fairer and a lot more fabulous and fun to drink.

title: Menage a Trois Rose
body_html:
Ménage à Trois Rose

Menage a Trois Rose opens salmony red with a nose dominated by strawberry aromas with citrus notes around the edges. The flavors are composed primarily of red berries and cherries, and are best when served well chilled.

This wine is very approachable and easy drinking, excellent for picnics, cookouts, and other summer meals. Serve this bright, approachable rose with salads, shellfish and grilled salmon or chicken.

title: Clos du Bois Chardonnay
body_html:
Clos du Bois Chardonnay

California is golden when it comes to wine and this creamy Clos du Bois Chardonnay is no exception. Pale straw in color with aromas of apple, citrus and buttered toast, it's a dry and drinkable medium oaked companion to roast turkey, BBQ chicken, lobster or shrimp. Wine critics unanimously love its butterscotch finish.

TASTING NOTES

Honey, Toasted Oak, Pear, Apple

title: Barefoot Cellars Pink Moscato
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Pink Moscato

Sweet and delicious wines that have a unique and playful flavor are sometimes tough to come by but the Barefoot Cellars Pink Moscato embodies all of these ideas. With unique and subtle hints of pomegranate, jasmine, cherries, and Mandarin orange, this Barefoot Cellars Pink Moscato is the perfect wine for a dessert of strawberries and cream or can pair nicely with spicy Asian delicacies.

title: Layer Cake Rosé
body_html:
Layer Cake Wines Rosé

The Layer Cake Wines Rosé is an indulgent dessert wine that features aromas of grapefruit, roses, and passion fruit. One sip creates a fusion of flavor including hints of dark chocolate, cranberry, guava, and strawberries. This exquisite wine would pair best with equally delectable treats such as cake or gelato.

title: Barefoot Cellars Sweet Red
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Sweet Red

When you open a bottle of Barefoot Cellars Sweet Red wine you notice strong fruity notes of sweet, juicy cherries, pomegranates, and raspberries. This gorgeous, berry-colored wines is perfect when it's served chilled, perhaps on a hot summer day. Taste the flavors of plums, cherries, and raspberries that will remind you of homemade jam. Excellent when paired barbecued marinated steaks and grilled summer vegetables.

title: Barefoot Cellars Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Sauvignon Blanc

Barefoot Cellars Sauvignon Blanc is this makers dryest white wine and has the taste of summer in a bottle. Delicious fruity flavor of honeydew melon, peach and nectarine compliment the soft finishing notes of pear and lime. Barefoot Cellars Sauvignon Blanc pairs with fresh veggies and mild cheese like Gouda.

title: Barefoot Cellars Riesling
body_html:
Barefoot Riesling

Tastes & Delights

Hits all the right fruit-filled notes with perfect pitch. A delicate orange blossom aroma bounces off juicy apple and tangy lemon flavors for a slightly sweet finale.

Time to Uncork

Whether you’re eating out or in, it’s got your palate covered.

Perfect Partners

Plays well with others. Especially spicy foods, fresh fruit and mild cheeses

title: Barefoot Cellars Red Moscato
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Red Moscato

Barefoot Cellars Red Moscato is a sweet wine filled with fruity flavors like red cherry and raspberry with a citrus finish. Enjoy Barefoot Cellars Red Moscato with soft cheeses like Brie, feta, Gorganzola, white quesos. Barefoot Cellars Red Moscato also pairs well with fresh fruit and spicy foods like Indian.

title: Barefoot Cellars Pinot Noir
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Pinot Noir

Notes of ripe red fruit give Barefoot Cellars Pinot Noir its classic California flavor profile, while silky accents of field-grown lavender provide a streamlined finish. Pair this Pinot Noir with herb-crusted roast chicken or serve it with a bowl of fresh raspberries and ice cream at the end of the day.

title: Barefoot Cellars Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Pinot Grigio

Barefoot Cellars Pinot Grigio offers exactly what you would expect from this classic wine: a light body with tart green apple notes tamed with a soft peach undertones that lead to a bright finish. Barefoot Cellars Pinot Grigio's aroma offers citrus and floral fragrance. Pair with poultry, pizza and pasta.

title: Barefoot Cellars Merlot
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Merlot

Barefoot Cellars Merlot is the classic quintessential wine, with its deep red hues, Barefoot Merlot offers a rich, full flavor that is comprised of plum, boysenberry, cherry and chocolate. Its finishing notes of mocha are accompanied by smokey vanilla oak. Barefoot Merlot pairs with red meats, marinara dishes, poultry and chocolate.

title: Barefoot Cellars Malbec
body_html:
Barefoot Malbec

TASTES & DELIGHTS

Barefoot Malbec is a plush red wine of epic proportions. Big juicy flavors of blackberry and currant set sail on a gorgeous gust of vanilla, caramel and toasted oak.

TIME TO UNCORK

As soon as your guests arrive (or maybe 30 minutes before).

PERFECT PARTNERS

Goes great with barbequed steak or caramelized-onion pizza.

title: Barefoot Cellars Chardonnay
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Chardonnay

Barefoot Cellars Chardonnay is a medium-bodied wine that delights the senses with honeyed peach and fuji apple flavors. Barefoot Cellars Chardonnay is smooth its aroma is a welcoming sweet vanilla. This wine pairs perfectly with seafood, chicken and light Alfredo sauced pasta. Sip Barefoot Cellars Chardonnay while enjoying fresh fruit.

title: Barefoot Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Barefoot Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon

When you are looking for a rich and robust wine to accompany a decadent meal of hearty beef or lamb, then the Barefoot Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon is perfect for you. With strong notes of blackberries, currents, and raspberries and the finishing flavor of warm vanilla, the Barefoot Cellars Cabernet Sauvignon will elevate your meal to new heights.

title: Layer Cake Pinot Noir
body_html:
Layer Cake Wines Pinot Noir

The warm sun, cool winds, and shallow, granitic soil of the Monterey vineyards have resulted in the powerful flavors of the Layer Cake Pinot Noir. Cranberries, raspberries, and pomengranates are contrasted well with plums and blackberries before vanishing to leave a lasting finish that tastes of chocolate and tannins. Layer Cake Pinot Noir is compatible with not just roasted meats but also the softer, creamier kinds of cheese that are available for sale.

TASTING NOTES

Expressive notes of raspberry, pomegranate, and cranberry, are supported by dried tea leaf and tobacco on the nose. The palate is layered texturally and has rich, pronounced blackberries and ripe plum. Soft, fine-grained tannins and smoky, dark chocolate linger through the finish.

title: Layer Cake Shiraz
body_html:
Layer Cake Shiraz

Layer Cake Shiraz is made using grapes grown in a number of the micro-climates that can be found in South Australia before being aged in new French oak to prevent acidification. This results in a richer, more complex flavor that tastes of dark fruits and warm spices that goes well with a wide range of foods that include but are not limited to chicken, fish, and leaner red meats.

TASTING NOTES

The aromas of cocoa, warm spice and dark fruit are very powerful from the first whiff. In the mouth, the wine is layered with rich blackberry, dark cherries and hints of dark, creamy chocolate ganache. The finish lingers on, hanging on your palate while the fruit and spice flavors slowly change and fade.

title: Layer Cake Malbec
body_html:
Layer Cake Malbec

Grown in the arid climate that can be found at the foot of the Andes Mountains, the grapes that go into Layer Cake Malbec are chosen with care to ensure winemaking excellence. The result is black fruit flavored with hints of earth, cocoa, and truffles as well as blackberries and chocolate sauce, which pairs well with chicken as well as leaner cuts of pork and lamb.

TASTING NOTES

Big, brooding, black fruit, then rich earth, truffles and dark cocoa are at the front. The Sea of Stones vineyard is at its core, always evident with the thread of minerality that the deep alluvial cobblestones lend. This wine is elegant in the mouth with fresh-picked blackberries, simmering chocolate sauce on the stove, and somewhere someone’s cooking bacon…so many layers, so little time. Drinking a bottle of this wine will certainly lead to, well, opening another.

title: Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Zinfandel
body_html:
Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Zinfandel

Wait until you have time to sit down and savor this Kendall-Jackson Vinter's Reserve Zinfandel. Its deep plum and berry flavor roll smoothly over the tongue and the solid tannins have a long finish. Serve in a bordeaux glass with hearty, flavorful food such as barbecued ribs or brisket.

TASTING NOTES

plum, raspberry jam, and blackberry flavors with cedar and spice accents

title: Mark West Pinot Noir
body_html:
Mark West Pinot Noir

Mark West Pinot Noir is an innovative pinot noir that gets its flavor palette from black cherries, strawberries, cola, plums and soft tannins. The cola gives it a caramel-esque finish that is sure to please at your next dinner party. Mark West Pinot Noir is great paired with rich cuts of meat, try succulent duck with a pomegranate-orange glaze sauce.

TASTING NOTES

Black cherry, plum and strawberry.

title: Layer Cake Chardonnay
body_html:
Layer Cake Chardonnay

As a white wine from the Central Coast of California, the Layer Cake Chardonnay is the perfect choice for wine lovers who enjoy crisp, refreshing wines that build in tastes and texture as it is enjoyed. The virgin in the title of this wine refers to the fact that it is unoaked.

This Chardonnay has a fruit core flavor with lemon and grapefruit hints, and it is further appealing with its accents of anise and licorice. The Layer Cake Chardonnay has an appetizing citrus scent. It pairs well with light pasta dishes, butternut squash ravioli, and zucchini salad.

TASTING NOTES

The nose is reminiscent of preserved Meyer lemons, wet stones and a hint of lime blossoms. The rich body and texture builds as it envelops your mouth, while layers of Kaffir lime, guava, and pineapple tantalize; followed by light, creamy texture of whipped lemon curd. The lingering fi nish is clean and crisp, preparing your palate for more.

title: Layer Cake Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Layer Cake Cabernet Sauvignon

The Layer Cake Cabernet Sauvignon brings out the best in the grape, expressing its complexity. The makers added violets and wild berries to deliver a strong variety of tasteful characters. Combined with a plum taste, this wine presents fruit for the palate, soft tannins, and a cocoa finish. Perfect with hard meats, such as lamb, beef, or rabbit.

TASTING NOTES

This Cabernet Sauvignon truly expresses the depth and complexity of the grape. Perfumed with violets and wild berries, it shows strong varietal characters and rich, ripe plum fruit. Seamless and elegant, this wine shows big black fruit on the palette, fine grain soft tannins and a long coffee chocolate finish.

title: Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Pinot Noir
body_html:
Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Pinot Noir

If you are in the market for a rich red wine with a great deal of flavor, then you need to try this Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Pinot Noir. The combination of flavors of spicy cola, vanilla, and strawberries, raspberries, and cherries dance on the palate, and make it perfect to pair with an herb-roasted pork loin or rack of lamb.

TASTING NOTES

bright cherry, strawberry and raspberry, with elegant earthy notes

title: Stella Rosa Peach Mosto di Uva Parzialmente Fermentato
body_html:
Stella Rosa Peach

Stella Rosa Peach Mosto di Uva Parzialmente Fermentato is a light and sparkling Moscato-based blend of natural citrus flavors of white and yellow peach. This light sparkling wine has a delicate flavor best paired with savory meats and vegetables like veal, lamb, and mushrooms.

title: Stella Rosa 'Stella Berry' Semi - Sweet Rose
body_html:
Stella Rosa Stella Berry Semi-Sweet Rose

Treat your senses with a sparkling glass of Stella Rosa 'Stella Berry' Semi - Sweet Rose. This beautifully blended rose wine derives its unique hue from a proprietary Stella Rosa blend of grapes, as well as a natural kiss of sweet wild strawberry and complex blackberry flavors.

A fine Italian wine that's perfect with a slice of decadent chocolate cake, it's as lovely on the palate as the nose!

title: Far Niente Oaksville Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Far Niente Oaksville Cabernet Sauvignon

Deep ruby in color and generous in flavor, Far Niente Estate Bottled Cabernet Sauvignon opens with aromas of cranberries, vanilla and chocolate-covered cherries. You will taste red and black berries, a hint of anise and a touch of oak. Great to drink now or let age for a few years to develop even more. Pair with lamb, poultry or beef.

"... prances out of the glass with gorgeous black cherries, molten chocolate, licorice and warm cassis... possesses great elegance..."

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • 2017
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Takara Sho Chiku Bai Nigori Sake
body_html:
Takara Sho Chiku Bai Nigori Sake

Nigori Sake was the way that Sake came about when it was brewed for the Imperial Court of Kyoto as well as its 2,000-year history. It is coarsely filtered, bold, very sweet, and goes well with spicy food items. It also has a plentiful, abundant, rich, and strong flavor. There are foods that can be served with this wine.

When looking for a food to serve with Takara Sho Chiku Bai Nigori, slow-cooked stews and roast beef are good options to serve with it. Prosciutto, cheese, and chocolate will taste good with sake also. When sake is served with these delicious foods, they will make drinking this rice wine an experience you will never forget.

title: Takara Kinsen Plum Wine
body_html:
Takara Kinsen Plum Wine

Takara Kinsen Plum Wine captures the purest essence of mid-to-late summer sun-ripened plums. Pour it over rocks on a warm summer evening and enjoy it on the porch with a friend or two and a bowl of cherries. For a purely decadent dessert, drizzle it over your favorite ice cream.

title: Far Niente Estate Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Far Niente Estate Bottled Cabernet Sauvignon

Deep ruby in color and generous in flavor, Far Niente Estate Bottled Cabernet Sauvignon opens with aromas of cranberries, vanilla and chocolate-covered cherries. You will taste red and black berries, a hint of anise and a touch of oak. Great to drink now or let age for a few years to develop even more. Pair with lamb, poultry or beef.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • 2015
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

"... prances out of the glass with gorgeous black cherries, molten chocolate, licorice and warm cassis... possesses great elegance..."

title: Tisdale White Zinfandel
body_html:
Tisdale White Zinfandel

Tisdale White Zinfandel is a medium-bodied wine that stimulates the senses with the tantalizing aroma of cherries and raspberries before leading into a lingering finish flavored with raspberries, strawberries, and watermelon. As a result, it is the perfect complement for people who are planning to dine on salads as well as the lighter kinds of pasta.

title: Tisdale Vineyards Shiraz
body_html:
Tisdale Vineyards Shiraz

Tisdale Vineyards Shiraz is made using authentic varietals grown in the bountiful soil of California before being entrusted to the hands of skilled and experienced winemakers. As a result, it should come as no surprise to learn that its taste of mingled blackberries and pomegranates is sure to please when paired with both pastas and grilled meats.

title: Tisdale Pinot Noir
body_html:
Tisdale Pinot Noir

Hand crafted by experienced wine makers, this Tisdale Pinot Noir has been crafted with fresh berry flavors. Cherries and red plum are accompanied by medium bodied soft tannins and a hint of brown spice. Enjoy this exceptional red wine with creamy pastas, grilled salmon or spicy chicken for an experience you are sure to remember.

title: Tisdale Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Tisdale Pinot Grigio

A light-bodied blend with hints of citrus fruit, Tisdale Pinot Grigio is the perfect companion to fresh salads or grilled chicken. Its crisp, sparkling scent is equally reflected by its crystal clear color which is balanced by an acidic flavor. An excellent taste for less than $5 per bottle makes this a great wine for the unemployed, the underemployed, and the starving artist.

title: Tisdale Vineyards Moscato
body_html:
Tisdale Moscato

Tisdale Vineyards Moscato is a refreshing aromatic and floral wine. Its characteristic muscat blend makes it the perfect complement for chili's and other hot and spicy foods. This full and bubbly Moscato has a mineral-rich flavor which enhances its natural grape flavor.

title: Tisdale Vineyards Merlot
body_html:
Tisdale Merlot

Like other offerings from the Californian winemaker, Tisdale Vineyards Merlot has been made with care and consideration using authentic varietals. The result is a medium-bodied red wine that tastes of black cherries and mixed berries while smelling of spiced oak, thus making it not just a well-balanced but also a distinctive in nature beverage that is suitable for salads, pastas, and grilled meats.

title: Tisdale Vineyards Chardonnay
body_html:
Tisdale Chardonnay

Tisdle Vineyards Chardonnay features citrus and pineapple accents woven with hints of oak and a tease of vanilla. Pair it with lighter meats such as poultry or grilled seafood from the Pacific Ocean, or go meatless and serve it with a fresh salad from the garden or local farmers market.

title: Tisdale Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Tisdale Cabernet Sauvignon

Meant to be paired with entrees such as pastas and grilled meats, Tisdale Vineyards Cabernet Sauvignon has been purpose-made to be medium-bodied as well as well-balanced in nature. The flavor of plums and blackberries combine with the smell of oak and vanilla combine to create a memorable and pleasurable experience for the imbiber.

title: True Myth Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
True Myth Cabernet Sauvignon

The aroma of blackberry and blueberry with pepper and cassis are going to draw you in, but it's the flavor profile of the True Myth Cabernet Sauvignon that will keep you coming back for this wine. Cedar spice, cocoa powder, caramelized oak and red fruits create a perfectly rich balance ideal for grilled steak or lamb burgers.

title: Poppy Pinot Noir
body_html:
Poppy Monterey County Pinot Noir

Fill your glass with Poppy Monterey County Pinot Noir and take in robust aromas of juicy berries and cherries, layered with a hint of mocha. Prominent flavors of luscious raspberry, cherry, along with touches of oak and spice finish firmly with a well-balanced acidity. This medium-bodied wine pairs well with roast chicken.

title: The Hess Collection Allomi Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
The Hess Collection Allomi Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon

750ml

You will be entranced by the deep burgundy color of The Hess Collection Allomi Vineyard Cabernet Sauvignon when you pick up the bottle. Upon opening, notice the fragrance of woodsy oak spice and fragrantly enticing vanilla along with red berries. Bright red currants and sweet dark blackberries envelope your taste-buds with every sip of this mesmerizing deep red wine. Pair with pan seared sea scallops atop a bed of sauteed vegetables or juicy herb roasted chicken with mashed potates.

title: The Hess Collection Chardonnay
body_html:
The Hess Collection Chardonnay

Treat guests to the crisp, clean fruit taste of The Hess Collection Chardonnay. Savor an aromatic bouquet of succulent apple and honeysuckle, while the delectable flavors of white pear, apple, and lush tropical melon delight the taste buds. Serve this refreshing low-oak Chardonnay with grilled or poached seafood.

title: Raeburn Russian River Chardonnay
body_html:
Raeburn Chardonnay

Raeburn Chardonnay from the Russian River Valley is an award-winning wine that shows a variety of fruits such as apple, nectarine, and pear. It boasts a dry, medium body with a honey butter aroma. The fruit is balanced with fine tannins and toasted oak with suggestions of vanilla for a calm finish. It pairs well with an array of foods such as cheese and halibut.

title: Oberon Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Oberon Cabernet Sauvignon

The kiss of Petit Verdot, dash of Merlot and sprinkling of other red varietals helped to create Oberon Cabernet Sauvignon's deep rich colors, supple tannins, and vibrant black cherry, candied blackberry and spices. A hint of coffee and dark chocolate create a lingering and delightful finish. Pair it with steak, lamb and duck dishes, as well as flavorful cheeses.

Read more about the wine that scores 91 Points James Suckling

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Dona Paula Los Cardos Malbec
body_html:
Dona Paula Los Cardos Malbec

Rich in color with a full balanced sweet and spicy aroma, Dona Paula Los Cardos Malbec is the perfect blend. Raspberries, blueberries, strawberries and Herbes de Provence give this wine its boldness. Pair Dona Paula Los Cardos Malbec with a hearty meal like beer-braised baby back ribs with orange-tamarind sauce.

title: Chateau Montelena Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Chateau Montelena Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

A little bit of everything that makes a good cabernet is present in this Chateau Montelena Cabernet Sauvignon. The initial fruit flavors blend raspberry, plum, strawberry, blueberry and blackberry notes with the most perfectly ripened cabernet grapes. Star anise, baking spices and cherry and chocolate dance across your tongue and vanilla lingers softly behind. Beef Borguignonne and pheasant under glass pair well with this rich, flavorful wine.

title: Far Niente Estate Chardonnay
body_html:
Far Niente Estate Chardonnay

Barrel fermented and aged in French Oak, Far Niente Estate Chardonnay opens with aromas of citrus, pear, hazelnut and spice. Layers of flavor including fig, oak and some minerality evolve into a melodious finish. This Chardonnay is perfectly paired with savory dishes such as prosciutto, creamy pasta or risotto, or a rich pork belly.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: Frog's Leap Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Frog's Leap Cabernet Sauvignon

With its deep, cassis-currant aromas, Frog’s Leap Cabernet Sauvignon offers the earthen flavors of black olive, cedar and tomato leaf. Hailing from the Rutherford Bench, this estate-grown wine offers velvety dusty tannins in a well-balanced blend of Cabernet Sauvignon, Cabernet Franc and Merlo. This wine pairs well with New York strip steaks or rack of lamb.

title: Frog's Leap Merlot
body_html:
Frog's Leap Merlot

Frog’s Leap Merlot is an elegant textured, but soft-spoken red wine. Using sustainable and organic farming practices, Frog’s Leap has created a delightfully light Merlot with notes of red fruits including cherries, currants and plums muddled with sweet savory hints of green tea and spice that finishes with a touch of milk chocolate. This wine pairs well with sweeter entrees, such as Duck a l’Orange.

title: Frog's Leap Zinfandel
body_html:
Frog's Leap Zinfandel

Featuring a blend of old-vine Zinfandel, Carignane and Petite sirah grapes, Frog’s Leap Zinfandel is an elegant wine with the richness of raspberry and mulberry flavors with a hint of white pepper and cinnamon. This versatile Zinfandel makes a great accompaniment to roasted poultry or a summer backyard barbeque.

title: Frog's Leap Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Frog's Leap Sauvignon Blanc

Frog’s Leap Sauvignon Blanc bursts with the full flavors of citrus peel as well as a hint of stone fruit. Foods that pair well would be a cold plate of oysters, rabbit stew or chicken cacciatore. What makes this wine so special is its pure sophistication, complimented by an opulent fruit richness to delight the most delicate palate.

title: Frog's Leap Chardonnay
body_html:
Frog's Leap Chardonnay

Frog’s Leap Chardonnay is a delicate wine that features multiple layers featuring core fruit flavors of white dried peach and apples with hints of dried earth and leaves. This Chardonnay is a well-balanced wine with a medium body that is lush on the palate. Serve Frog’s Leap Chardonnay with Dungeness crab, strong cheeses or chicken dishes.

title: True Myth Chardonnay
body_html:
True Myth Chardonnay

Take a sip of True Myth Chardonnay and enjoy the sharp notes of pineapple, white peaches and pears. This California chardonnay from the Central Coast region hints at tropical fruits and earthy minerals as its undertones along with a sprinkle of vanilla bean and toasted oak for a rich flavor.

title: redtree Pinot Noir
body_html:
redtree Pinot Noir

Pour Redtree Pinot Noir when the occassion calls for a bright wine with soft tannins and an easy finish. Perfect when paired with wild Pacific Northwest salmon or roast chicken, this Pinot also features playful hints of cherry pie that make it an idea sipping wine before or after dinner.

title: redtree Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
redtree Cabernet Sauvignon

Redtree Cabernet Sauvignon is a light wine with red cherry and cranberry flavors. The wine has a dry and crisp mouth-feel, and ripened lingering fruit notes at the finish. The Redtree Cabernet Sauvignon’s herbaceous notes and tannic structure makes it perfect for pork, lamb or beef dishes.

title: Irony Pinot Noir Black
body_html:
Irony Pinot Noir Black

The only thing ironic about this Irony Pinot Noir Black wine is that not everyone has heard about it. Change that by sampling a bottle with friends, and you will see why it quickly wins over wine lovers with its almond finish, cocoa, plum and cherry flavors. It is a delightful choice to serve with Christmas meals and fruit breads.

title: Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Pinot Gris Can
body_html:
Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Pinot Gris Can

375ml Can

Approachable and portable, the Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Pinot Gris can moves with you. Don't let the can fool you - the taste punches with tones of peach, grapefruit, and pear. Tingling the senses with a fruity smell, the after taste pairs perfectly with salmon, scallops, or any light, white fish.

title: Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Pinot Noir Can
body_html:
Union Wine Co. Underwood Pinot Noir Can

375ml

Sometimes you want a nice glass of wine without worrying about breaking a fine wine glass. For those days the Union Wine Co. ‘Underwood’ Pinot Noir Can is a brilliant solution. The Pinot Noir offers sweet tastes of cherry, chocolate, and raspberry followed with a sweet and sour aftertaste that pleasantly lingers on your palate. Pairs well with salmon and pasta.

title: Union Wine Co. Underwood Pinot Noir
body_html:
Union Wine Underwood Pinot Noir

Have your wine on hand and take it where other wines dare not go with the Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Pinot Noir in a can. Traveling anywhere, this wine provides an explosive mix of cherries, chocolate and raspberries, creating a wash of flavor and after taste. Match it with poached salmon or braised duck, as it is one of the few wines that is versatile enough to match with a wide range of food.

title: Union Wine Co. Underwood Rosé
body_html:
Union Wine Co. Underwood Rosé

The Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Rose is a crisp, tasty wine that is fun to enjoy at parties, informal gatherings, music festivals, and neighborhood barbecues. The Union Wine Company Is proud to point out that this Rosé wine comes from Rose City, the nickname of Portland, Oregon. Consider that the Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Rose offers the taste of peach, watermelon, and strawberry with each sip. It also has just a slight hint of black pepper spice. Pair the Union Wine Co. 'Underwood' Rose with vegetable soup, tomato salad, quiche, or barbecue rice dishes.

title: 14 Hands Winery Stampede Red Blend
body_html:
14 Hands Stampede Bold Red Wine Blend

14 Hands Stampede Red Blend is of Colombia Valley descent. Stampede was created in a year when the warm weather was perfect for ripening. Kicking off the senses with cedar and spice aromas, it washes the palate with cherry and cola. Pair with spicy curries, Korean BBQ, or Tandoori chicken.

FOOD PAIRINGS

Spicy curries, Korean-style BBQ

title: Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Artemis Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Artemis Cabernet Sauvignon

Aromas of cassis and blackberry bounce off the nose in this Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Artemis Cabernet Sauvignon. The crushed berry, cherry and red plum notes are balanced out by mesquite smoke and vanilla. The smooth mouthfeel, soft tannins, and great spice on a long finish makes this a wine to revisit again and again. Try it with smoked whitefish salad or a wild boar ragu.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Karia Chardonnay
body_html:
Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Karia Chardonnay

Dip into something buttery with this Stag's Leap Wine Cellars Karia Chardonnay. It's so delicious and creamy, it reminds one of apple pie with flaky crust and whipped cream. Notes of Honey Crips apple, vanilla and oak dance a fairly balanced dance before finishing with a fresh acidity. Enjoy with a gorgeous pork dish or terrine.

title: Meiomi Pinot Noir
body_html:
Meiomi Pinot Noir

Alive with hints of tobacco, fresh berries and dark red fruits, the Meiomi Pinot Noir is one that you have to try for yourself. It has a rich cherry flavor that carries hints of raspberry, strawberry and cedar. Enjoy the delicious wine with your choice of grilled salmon or seared beef tenderloin.

title: Meiomi Chardonnay
body_html:
Meiomi Chardonnay

As a delectable white wine from Napa Valley, the Meiomi Chardonnay is bursting with apple and pear aromas along with a distinctive white flower aroma. It features flavors like honeysuckle and golden apple that are mixed together just right.

The Meiomi Chardonnay should be chilled so that you can enjoy its full bouquet of flavors. When planning a dinner party where you plan to serve Meiomi Chardonnay, remember that it is particularly delicious with butternut squash ravioli, pumpkin ravioli, salads, nut-based dishes, and roasted eggplant.

title: Ravage Cabernet Sauvignon California
body_html:
Ravage Cabernet Sauvignon California

The Ravage Cabernet Sauvignon California features notes of dark berries, vanilla and mocha, with perfectly soft tannins. Ideal with beef, lamb, game meats or poultry, the medium to heavy body of this wine is one that you will definitely enjoy. The dark richness here is a perfect compliment to your meal.

title: Black Box Monterey Chardonnay
body_html:
Black Box Monterey Chardonnay

Who says delectable wines can't come in boxes? For discerning palates in need of a clean, crisp, and refreshing wine, Black Box Monterey Chardonnay is the perfect pick. Masterfully crafted from grapes grown in the heart of California, this sweet wine boasts a rich fruity nose and a full body featuring hints of citrus, pineapple, and pear. From special occasions to simple summertime cookouts, this box deserves a special spot in your regular rotation.

title: Avalon Chardonnay
body_html:
Avalon Chardonnay

Lovers of a good drop know Santa Barbara County vineyards run east to west, gathering cool air from the Pacific Ocean. Combined with apple flavors of the Russian River in Sonoma we present Avalon California CHARD Chardonnay, the perfect summer evening bubbly paired with a light chicken terrine or risotto.

title: J. Lohr Estates Los Osos Merlot
body_html:
J. Lohr Estates Los Osos Merlot

A Mature Merlot

Lovers of a robust Merlot will love the J. Lohr Estate Los Osos Merlot, a fine purchase. Merlot grapes, grown on their estate in Napa Valley combined with malbec grapes that provide 14% of the wine provide balance and enjoyable finish. Pair with roast chicken and cheeses.

title: J. Lohr Estates Flume Crossing Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
J. Lohr Estates Flume Crossing Sauvignon Blanc

Pouring the pale straw yellow J. Lohr Estates Flume Crossing Sauvignon Blanc releases bright aromas of lime peel and sliced apple. Crisp and zesty fruit flavors of ruby red grapefruit and passionfruit followed by Anjou pear linger on the palate for a long finish. Serve with sushi and sashimi or fresh salads with goat cheese.

title: J Lohr Seven Oaks Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
J Lohr Seven Oaks Cabernet Sauvignon

J Lohr Seven Oaks Cabernet Sauvignon from vineyards in Estrella Hills (Paso Robles), an appellation that produces “world class” Cabernet Sauvignon.
