Opening releases aromas of cherry and plum accented by hazelnut and dark chocolate. On the palate, medium tannins give a velvety mouthfeel, with flavors of tobacco giving way to richer coffee. A perfect pairing with grilled steak.

title: J. Lohr Estates Riverstone Chardonnay
body_html:
J. Lohr Estates Riverstone Chardonnay

J. Lohr Estates Riverstone Chardonnay has a nose of fresh Key limes and grapefruit combined with vanilla and toasted oak from barrel aging. Brisk acidity gives it a mouthwatering quality, and the flavors hint of lemons and grapefruits, with a richer touch of nectarines. Pairs with oven-roasted chicken or cream-sauced pasta dishes.

title: La Crema Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir
body_html:
La Crema Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir

The La Crema Sonoma Coast Pinot Noir is an impressive and elegant red wine. Notoriously difficult to produce, the Sonoma Coast offers nothing but the best with this smooth and earthy Pinot Noir. The blueberry and cherry flavors, finishing with tea and floral notes, pair well with fatty fish and roasted chicken dishes.

title: Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Sauvignon Blanc

Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Sauvignon-Blanc is a medium-bodied, fruity Sauvignon-Blanc with a soft finish. Aromas of fresh lemongrass, ripe pear, and sweet honeysuckle intertwine and give way to the tropical fruit flavors of grapefruit, honeysuckle, and figs. Kendall-Jackson suggests pairing their Vintner's Reserve Sauvignon-Blanc with swordfish for a premium flavor sensation.

TASTING NOTES

honeysuckle, melon and pineapple

title: Stella Rosa Black
body_html:
Stella Rosa Black

Semi-sweet in taste, the Stella Rosa Black is a delightful first choice for first-time wine tasters. This treat is laced with flavors consisting of ripe blueberries, blackberries and raspberries and is smooth and supple in taste and texture. It pairs deliciously well with fresh fruit, chocolate and cheese.

title: 14 Hands Winery Hot to Trot Red
body_html:
14 Hands Hot to Trot Red

This polished red wine offers aromas of cherry, red currant and tea. Flavors of ripe red fruit, supported by a frame of refined tannins, give way to subtle notes of baking spice on a persistent finish.

FOOD PAIRINGS

BBQ pork, grilled portabella mushrooms, lasagna and hearty cheeses

title: 14 Hands Winery Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
14 Hands Winery Cabernet Sauvignon

Enjoy the best red wine from Washington State, 14 Hands Cabernet. It is a sensational red with a flavor of cherries, red berries, and a hint of spice. 14 Hands Cabernet is the perfect red wine for your next dinner party of grilled lamb. A delicious cabernet with a sumptuous meal.

title: Belle Ambiance Family Vineyards Pinot Noir
body_html:
Belle Ambiance Family Vineyards Pinot Noir

Accents of cocoa, dark cherry, and plum combine to give Belle Ambiance Family Vineyards Pinot Noir its softly elegant flavor profile. Smooth-yet-earthy, this Pinot Noir pairs seamlessly with classic roast chicken, freshly grilled wild salmon, pasta primavera with liberal use of forest mushrooms, and Peking Duck.

title: Belle Ambiance Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Belle Ambiance Family Vineyards Pinot Grigio

Prepare your perfect evening with Belle Ambiance Family Vinyards' Pinot Grigio. This elegant white wine pairs flawlessly with a moonlit night and a plate of fresh crab and cucumber salad in your hands. Delicate floral aromas escape the medium-bodied wine, accentuating the light and fruity flavors each glass brings.

title: Michael David Winery Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Michael David Winery Sauvignon Blanc

This unoaked sauvignon blanc has the perfect PH, resulting in a beautiful light color and the lush, fruity aromas of guava & grapefruit. The crisp, lively finish with just a touch of waxed pepper will evoke the warm island breezes of the Mediterranean, pairing perfectly with grilled lamb, chicken, and fish, as well as sharp cheeses like Feta. This perfectly balanced, tart and not too sweet wine also goes nicely with Mexican cuisine.

TASTING NOTES

Our Michael David Sauvignon Blanc opens with vibrant citrus and floral notes. Crisp and clean on the palate, refreshing flavors of white peach, granny smith apple and tropical fruit dance on the tongue, carried through by the wine's lingering acidity on the finish. Pairs great with grilled shrimp, bruschetta, and a porch swing on a warm summer night.

title: Troublemaker Red Blend
body_html:
Troublemaker Red Blend

Taste hints of Syrah, Grenache, Mourvedre, Petite Syrah and Zinfandel that make up the Paso blend of this Troublemaker Red Blend wine. Bottled in central California, this red blend offers the vitality and boldness of a young wine with the richness of an older bottle of wine for a unique taste.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Rosè
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Rosè

Dip into a sensual and perfume-laden pond of Francis Ford Coppola's Sofia Rose. Dry floral scents give way for tart red fruits, which is what you might expect from the deep rose hue of the wine. What you might not expect is the vanilla and pink bubblegum that pops out as your lips make contact. If the film "Marie Antoinette" had a signature drink, it would simply be this wine.

As a flavorful blend of Pinot Noir and Monterey County Syrah, the Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Rosé has vibrant lavender and strawberry aromas. The primary flavors of this popular wine are raspberry, cherry, and citrus, and it is accented by flavors of vanilla and bubblegum. The aromatic rosé has dry, floral scents along with an aroma of pomegranate and raspberries. It’s a stylish and elegant wine likes its namesake Sofia Coppola. As the daughter of the family-owned winery’s founder, filmmaker Francis Ford Coppola, Sofia is involved with this elegant line of wines that boast her name. The Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Rose is best served chilled and paired with such food as savory hors d'oeuvres or light meals like a pasta salad.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Méthode Champenoise
body_html:
Elevate your champagne game with Sofia Méthode Champenoise, a sparkling wine that's sure to impress. This sophisticated wine features light effervescence and delicate bubbles, creating a truly luxurious drinking experience.

With impressions of minerals and fresh peaches on the finish, Sofia Méthode Champenoise is a delight for the senses. Its complexity and depth make it a perfect wine for any special occasion, from weddings to anniversaries to graduations.

Crafted using traditional methods and the finest grapes, this sparkling wine is sure to impress even the most discerning palate. Its light and refreshing taste make it a versatile wine that pairs well with a variety of foods, from light salads to seafood to cheese and crackers.

Indulge in the sophistication and elegance of Sofia Méthode Champenoise and experience the magic of a truly exceptional sparkling wine. Order now and discover why this wine is a must-have for any wine connoisseur or anyone who appreciates the finer things in life.

title: EnRoute Brumaire Chardonnay
body_html:
EnRoute Brumaire Chardonnay

Fresh and vibrant, EnRoute Brumaire Chardonnay dazzles with aromas of peach, citrus, jasmine and oak. The palate continues the citrus flavor along with a slightly toasty quality and lively juiciness to finish that reiterates the ripe citrus, almost tropical essence. This Chardonnay is best paired with buttery seafoods such as salmon, crab cakes or seared scallops.

title: EnRoute Les Pommiers Pinot Noir
body_html:
EnRoute Les Pommiers Russian River Pinot Noir

2015

Bold with the aroma of bing cherries, EnRoute Les Pommiers Pinot Noir is luscious with the flavors of dark berries. A bright, juicy, plummy finish is permeated with notes of oak, vanilla and spices. This Pinot Noir is adventurous enough to be paired with duck or other game birds, or stews such as beef bourguignon.

title: Bella Union Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Bella Union Cabernet Sauvignon

2016

Notes of ripe dark fruits mingle with lush strawberries and old-school berry compote to provide this classic Bella Union Caberet Sauvignon with layers of complex deliciousness. Cabernets of this quality pair perfectly with rich cuts of red meat, and it can be used as a desert wine with anything chocolate.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Cabernet Sauvignon

title: Dolce Late Harvest Semillon 375ml
body_html:
Dolce Late Harvest Semillon

375ml (Half Bottle)

Dolce is Italian for "sweet," and that is a very accurate adjective for this Dolce Late Harvest Semillion Sauvignon Blanc. It is a good everyday white wine. Serve with desserts that contain caramel or creme brulee, or enjoy with oily fish, such as salmon, to balance out the saltiness of the fish.

title: Stella Rosa Rosso Red Berry Wine
body_html:
Stella Rosa Rosso Red BerrySemi-Sweet Sparkling Red Wine

Stella Rosa Rosso Mosto di Uva Parzialmente Fermentato is one of Piedmont's most popular wines. This wine is a blend of rare red grapes characteristic of the Bordeaux blends. This refreshing semi-sweet wine is best served with fresh fruits and cheese.

Stella Rosa Rosso, the timeless original Stella, is all about the classics. This semi-sweet, sparkling red wine is the must-have at every and any occasion. Made with fresh strawberry, and red berry.

90 Points – Gold Medal & Best Buy Tastings.com (Beverage Testing Institute)

title: Menage a Trois Folie Red
body_html:
Menage a Trois Folie Red

Introduce yourself to a fine red wine when you sample a glass of Menage a Trois Folis Red. This contains fresh, ripe, jam-like fruit flavoring that is in many California wines. This is a blend of three grapes with zinfandel for juice, merlot for a mellow taste and cabernet for a little kick. Pair this wine with bird-based dishes like chicken and turkey for a delicious dish.

title: Woodbridge Chardonnay
body_html:
Woodbridge Chardonnay

Uncork a bottle of Woodbridge Robert Mondavi Chardonnay, then take the time to inhale its rich aroma. A top layer of tropical fruit, gives way to rich hints of cinammon and maple, all wrapped up in a toasty oak finish. Its vibrant medium bodied taste is a perfect match for grilled veggies and chicken recipes of every kind.

title: The Hess Collection Lion Tamer Red Blend
body_html:
The Hess Collection Hess Select Lion Tamer

The Hess Collection's "Hess Select Lion Tamer" is at the core a Red Blend Wine, wild and heady. When layered with Zinfandel, Petite Sirah and Cabernet Sauvignon, the tannins are "tamed" by the complex layers of blackberry, milk chocolate and black plums. Pair it to perfection with slow cooked country style pork ribs.

title: Woodbridge Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Woodbridge Pinot Grigio

There's a reason pinot grigio has taken the world by storm. Its refreshing taste suits all palates and goes well with virtually any dish. Serve Woodbridge Robert Mondavi Pinot Grigio at your next gathering. Its crisp fresh taste, preceded by a wafting aroma of peach and citrus, is best experienced chilled. Pair it with brie and oysters at appetizer time or save it for chicken or fish at the table. Pinot grigio is food-friendly !

title: Woodbridge Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Woodbridge  Sauvignon Blanc

Woodbridge Robert Mondavi Sauvignon Blanc blends tropical fruit with a touch of citrus for a fresh crisp taste that is perfect for enjoying a waterside shellfish dinner. It's light yet richly nuanced fruit undertones lend just the right harmony to oysters, lobsters, and scallops. Best served chilled, its hint of tartness pairs well with summer salads and chicken dishes without overpowering them.

title: Woodbridge Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Woodbridge Cabernet Sauvignon

Give your nose and palate a jolt with the cedar brush cassis and black currant in the Woodbridge by Robert Mondavi Cabernet Sauvignon. This wine goes great with just about everything. It’s full-bodied and extremely smooth, but not too heavy. Grab a glass of wine and mix it with your next hamburger for a bold, rich flavor.

title: Woodbridge Merlot
body_html:
Woodbridge Merlot

Woodbridge by Robert Mondavi Merlot is a full-bodied wine that will leave you content and satisfied. Aromas of blackberries, cherries, dark chocolate, and toasty oak give this ruby-red wine enough depth and subtlety to earn a trusted spot at your table. It is an ideal complement of grilled meats, so savor this complex red wine with grilled steak or lamb, or serve it alongside a rich pasta dinner.

title: Woodbridge Pinot Noir
body_html:
Woodbridge Pinot Noir

Pinot Noir, just saying its name evokes a dark mysterious richness, and Woodbridge Robert Mondavi Pinot Noir doesn't dispel the notion. Its cherry and strawberry infused aroma with hints of spice is but a preview of things to come. Roll it around your tongue and savor its toasty oak richness and fruit forward character This full-bodied wine suits duck, pork and tomato and pasta dishes.

title: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Pinot Grigio
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Private Selection Pinot Grigio

Choose a wine that goes with all of your favorite light foods; Robert Mondavi Private Selection Pinot Grigio has easy drinking covered. The pale yellow color hints at fresh and fruity flavors of Bosc pear and tart lemon. Pair with crab, sushi rolls, grilled chicken, pasta primavera or salad and enjoy.

title: Robert Mondavi Winery Private Selection Pinot Noir
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Winery Private Selection Pinot Noir

Robert Mondavi Winery Private Selection Pinot Noir is an elegant wine. It can wow you with a delicious black cherry flavor, or impress you with the tang of ripe red berries. The fruitier tasting versions of Pinot Noir pair well with salmon and roasted chicken, while the more tannic ones are perfect with duck and stews.

title: Blackstone Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Blackstone Winemaker's Select Cabernet Sauvignon

The richness and intensity of Blackstone Winemaker’s Select Cabernet Sauvignon will leave your taste buds craving more of this delicious dark wine. Let your tongue linger on the notes of toasted nuts and spicy cinnamon while relishing in the sweet fruitiness of red cherries and blackberries. This is an excellent wine with roasted red meats, chocolates, or rich desserts.

Blackstone Cabernet Sauvignon, A dark berry fruit with red currant flavors, complimented by light mint and chocolate characteristics and supported with structured tannins.

title: Wild Horse Chardonnay
body_html: The Wild Horse Chardonnay has delicious hints of baked apple crisp, vanilla, lemon, grapefruit and orange that can only be complemented by lingering citrus flavors and fresh acidity. With 30 percent of the blend being tank fermented, you can enjoy clean, crisp attributes in every drink. Pair the delicious blend with oysters, Gruyere and Gouda cheeses and chicken Dijon.

title: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Chardonnay
body_html:
Chardonnay is America's favorite wine for a reason, and this dry, full-bodied Robert Mondavi Private Selection Chardonnay might just be it. The golden yellow pear color hints at the syrupy sweet and spicy tastes that the wine makers painstakingly developed: anise, citrus, sauteed apple and dried papaya are balanced with oak and island spices.

Serve it with your favorite shellfish recipe, an appetizer of pâtés, vegetable terrines or risotto prima vera.

title: La Crema Sonoma Coast Chardonnay
body_html:
La Crema Sonoma Coast Chardonnay

Lemon drop, white stone fruit, golden plum, and honeydew characterize the unique flavor of La Crema Sonoma Coast Chardonnay. An aromatic fruit, floral, and spice blend are crafted to add balance to the refined nature that is so characteristic of Chardonnay wines. All that is needed to bring out its apple zest is a dish of honeycrisp apple pizza with balsamic onions.

title: Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Chardonnay
body_html:
Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Chardonnay

Butterscotch and vanilla from toasty oak aging on the nose of this Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Chardonnay. Tropical flavors such as pineapple and papaya with notes of ripe pear and peach that explode in your mouth. On the palate, this wine is full bodied and balanced with a dry finish. Pair it with a cheese pizza on movie night or pasta carbonarra.

TASTING NOTES

tropical flavors such as pineapple, mango and papaya, with citrus notes. aromas of vanilla and honey. A hint of toasted oak and butter

title: Kendall-Jackson Avant Chardonnay
body_html:
Kendall Jackson Avant Chardonnay

Nothing quite tastes like summer than this Kendall-Jackson Avant Chardonnay. Its bouquet is literally a bouquet of flowers and tropical fruits! Pineapple, green apple and lemon wash over your tongue, while the hint of wildflowers transport you to a picnic in the sun.

Add a touch of seltzer to drink it on its own as a springtime cooler or consume with brook trout.

  • Vintage
  • Varietal
  • Current
  • Chardonnay

title: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Private Selection Sauvignon Blanc

With craft ciders all the rage, it's time for something with the freshness of a cider and the refined taste of a Sauvignon Blanc. The respected wine makers at Robert Mondavi created a wine reminiscent of farm fields in late summer with a pale straw yellow color and notes of green apple, minerals and citrus. Pair this bouncy, medium-bodied profile with any casual drinking occasion. Pair it with spaghetti with anchovy carbonara or a plate of fresh summer fruits and creamy cheeses.

title: Wild Horse Merlot
body_html:
Wild Horse Merlot

Enjoy aromas of mocha and berry cobbler with mild hints of cedar all in the Wild Horse Merlot. It features a mid-palate that is surrounded with flavors of soft tannins and plum leaving you with a long and chewy finish. Pair the wine with a delicious margherita pizza or steak taco.

title: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Merlot
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Private Selection Merlot

Robert Mondavi Private Selection Merlot is a wine that is easy for just about anyone to enjoy because it has soft flavors of cherry, mocha, and raspberry that create a delightful taste that dances on the palate. The delectable flavors are not overwhelming and pair nicely with chicken, pasta, and even cheeseburgers.

title: Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Merlot
body_html:
Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Merlot

The Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Merlot is a perfect combination of smooth texture and flavor framed by succulent soft cherries and round tannins. The black berry intricate layers with spicy hint and bright fruit flavors makes it a must buy option for any season. This Merlot forms an amazing pair with garlic spread cheese.

TASTING NOTES

black cherry, plum, currant and wild berry

title: Chateau Ste. Michelle Merlot
body_html:
Chateau Ste. Michelle Merlot

Rich, dark and fruity, the Chateau Ste. Michelle Merlot is a red wine you want to sip and savor over a meal of rich and spicy food. Indian, Thai and Sicillian dishes pair well with the aromatic spice notes of this merlot. When beef is the main meat in any of these dishes, the flavor of leather in the merlot enhances the flavor of the beef. Silky and smooth to the tongue, you can enjoy this wine by itself too.

title: Blackstone Merlot
body_html:
Blackstone Winemaker's Select Merlot

Experience the taste of raspberry, blackberry, and plum with subtle notes of vanilla and toasted french bread with Blackstone Winemaker's Select Merlot. This elegant merlot boasts grape varieties of Bordeaux and is unassuming enough to be a favored by the daily wine consumer due to its heady fruit flavors and fresh ripe appeal. Enjoy this rich and flavorful merlot with savory foods like lamb chili or wild mushroom lasagna.

title: Craggy Range Te Muna Road Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc
body_html:
Craggy Range Te Muna Road Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc

The Craggy Range Te Muna Road Vineyard Sauvignon Blanc is best paired with various types of seafood that help to accent the full flavor of the wine. With aromas of lime, lemon blossom, white peach and Thai basil, this wine features flavors nectarines and citrus for a dry and somewhat chalky finish. 

For Information on Craggy Range click here.

91 Points

"Leafy fresh herbs and lime citrus make for a refreshing nose. The palate delivers a refreshing swathe of nectarine and tropical melon fruit flavors. Drink now."

Nick Stock on James Suckling

October 2017

title: Vina San Pedro Epica Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Vina San Pedro Epica Cabernet Sauvignon

Enjoy the rich taste of Vina San Pedro Epica Cabernet Sauvignon on a happy evening with friends. This wine is a bright, intense red with shades of purple. With an aroma of red fruits and hints of vanilla, this is a pungeant, sweet wine that you will savor to the final taste. It has a palate of rich flavors, red fruits, and spices. Enjoy this wine with a dinner of steak or duck, or sip it along with a strong cheese.

title: Cruz Garcia Real Sangria
body_html:
Cruz Garcia Real Sangria

Affordable without sacrificing quality, Cruz Garcia Real Sangria is delicious and full-bodied sangria with sweetness and tang, leaving you with a citrus aftertaste. The traditional wine of Spain it is only right to share with friends. Try pairing Cruz Garcia Real Sangria with calamari appetizers that will please the crowd.

title: The Hess Collection THE LION
body_html:
The Hess Collection The Lion

There is more that lies beneath The Hess Collection "The Lion" when you take a second glance. Like a harmonious chorus and a well baked pie, this textural wine pulls you closer to its sweet and concentrated opulence. Exotic and sweet aromas meld together in a crust of notable tannins. Serve it with rich beef or chocolate...if you dare!

title: Chateau de Rayne Vigneau 'Le Sec de Rayne Vigneau'
body_html:
Chateau de Rayne Vigneau 'Le Sec de Rayne Vigneau'

Ideally paired with white fish, the Chateau de Rayne Vigneau's Le Sec de Rayne Vigneau is a dry white wine with flavors of grapefruit and citrus. Not only this, but it features thick, sweet honey to accent these sharp flavors and tastes best when aged just slightly. It features floral notes to accent the flavor.

title: Avalon Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Avalon Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

Avalon Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon tempts the senses with the aroma of blackberries and plums with a hint of vanilla and violet its 85% Cabernet Sauvignon/15% Merlot blend. The flavors of red raspberries and black cherry dance on your tongue while Rutherford Dust-hinted tannins provide a smooth finish on your palate. This wine pairs well with grilled or braised beef and aged Gouda.

title: Conundrum Sparkling by Caymus
body_html:
Conundrum Sparkling by Caymus

The Caymus Sparkling Conundrum was created over two decades ago when one of the winery’s co-founders was seeking the perfect wine for a delicious meal. He experimented with mixing wines until he found the right sparkling mix with the Conundrum Sparkling by Caymus. The inviting aromas of this sparkling wine include honeysuckle blossoms, tangerine, and green apple. It offers tastes of pair, peach, citrus, and green melon with subtle vanilla notes. This exotic wine should be served chilled, and it pairs well with many foods, including appetizers like bruschetta and mozzarella marinara as well as desserts like crème brûlée or tiramisu.

title: Conundrum White by Caymus
body_html:
Conundrum White by Caymus

The Caymus White Conundrum is an inspired wine that has been delighting the palates of wine lovers for 25 years since Charlie Wagner, Sr., the co-founder of Caymus Vineyards, would mix wines to try to come up with just the right wine to enjoy with a great meal.

He knew he’d found it with the Conundrum White. It has a distinct, lush texture and crisp acidity. It also has irresistible floral qualities. The Conundrum White by Caymus offers pear, apricot, orange, and honeysuckle aromas. It has a fresh, sweet scent with flavors of citrus, peach, and apple.

You can enjoy this special wine on its own or savor it with your meal as its creator did. Pair the Conundrum White by Caymus with full-flavored Asian dishes like vegetarian pho, General Tso’s tofu and rice, and Thai curry.

title: Conundrum Red by Caymus
body_html:
Conundrum Red by Caymus

Caymus Red Conundrum is a fine wine that lives up to its name because it may leave the wine enthusiasts wondering how such a high-quality wine can be offered at such an affordable price. This supple Caymus wine is a red blend from Napa Valley, California. The Conundrum Red by Caymus has an intense scent with such aromas as rhubarb, color, raspberry, and blackberry. The tastes that drinkers of this full-bodied wine are sure to savor include its lavender, plum, cherry, and pomegranate notes. It has a vanilla, oak, and brown spice finish. Pair this non-traditional red blend with baked eggplant parmesan, rich Italian dishes, and grilled vegetable plates.

title: Wild Horse Pinot Noir
body_html:
Wild Horse Pinot Noir

Invigorate your palette with the Wild Horse Pinot Noir. It has a rather complex blend of dark fruit, ripe cherries, earth, nutmeg, strawberry pie and vanilla. All of the flavors are balanced, fresh and bright, including butterscotch, strawberry and cranberry. Pair the wine with baked ziti, salmon, goat cheese or caramelized onions.

title: Robert Mondavi Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Napa Valley Cabernet Sauvignon

Everything late Robert Mondavi adored about Napa Valley, is here in one of the most popular Cabernet Sauvignons the label makes. This blended wine (87% Cabernet Sauvignon, 8% Merlot, 5% Cabernet Franc) boasts rich texture with whisper-smooth tannins, complemented with an uplifting freshness. Cabernet lovers will appreciated he deep aromas and flavors of blackberries and dark plums, dried herbs and wild violets, while Merlot drinkers will likely note the hint of leather. The luxuriously long finish that allows these complex flavors to linger on and on. Enjoy it with light summer dishes of trout, pork or blackened chicken.

title: Ruffino Sparkling Rosé
body_html:
Ruffino Sparkling Wine Rosé

With hints of fresh rose petals and ripe summer strawberries, Ruffino Sparkling Rose is the quintessential brunch wine for when the occasion calls for optimal elegance and glamour. Its tiny bubbles contain notes of apples, pears, peaches ending in a finish of garden wisteria and Hawthorne flowers.

TASTING PROFILE

A crisp, off-dry sparkling wine that offers alluring flavors of strawberry and rose petals, with delicate hints of red berries and white fruits that linger through the finish.

title: Hess Collection Mount Veeder 19 Block Mountain Cuvée
body_html:
Hess Collection Mount Veeder 19 Block Mountain Cuvée

The Hess Collection 19 Block Mount Veeder Cuvée blended red wine is packed with flavor led by Malbec and Cabernet Sauvignon and scoring 90 points.

Savory herbs, hints of cocoa powder, dark fruits and a touch of sweet oak make this a natural pairing with Asian meat dishes.

title: Hess Mount Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Hess Mount Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon

Bring out the best with Hess Mount Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon! A fruitful combination of wild mountain raspberry combined with Bing cherry comprises the rich, complex aroma that is music to your nose. A hint of classic Malbec is blended with a mixture of rich blueberries, vanilla, and cassis, all of which are tempered with undertones of creamy milk chocolate, caramel, and oak spice. Due to the complexity of the rich, bold flavoring, Hess Mount Veeder Cabernet Sauvignon makes an excellent partner for sohpisticated favorites such as lamb or eggplant and fennel.

title: Wild Horse Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Wild Horse Cabernet Sauvignon

Enjoy aromas of leather, licorice, dark chocolate and black cherries with the Wild Horse Cabernet Sauvignon. It will leave your mouth feeling sexy, refreshed and alive. Consider pairing the wine with your choice of lamb, hearty stew and steak to have one of the most delicious meals of your life.

title: Robert Mondavi Private Selection Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Robert Mondavi Private Selection Cabernet Sauvignon

Robert Mondavi Private Selection Cabernet is a rich cherry red wine that has delicious flavors of cherry, vanilla, and blueberry that create a delectable taste. The wine pairs beautifully with steak or pasta thanks to the hints of spice created in the aroma of the wine. Cabernet is a dry wine that has a robust flavor.

title: Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Kendall Jackson Vintner's Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon

Kendall-Jackson Vintner's Reserve Cabernet Sauvignon draws you in with aromas of lush black cherry and bright blackberry. Drinks clean and easy, yet offers depth and substance. Round, rich tannins are smooth and elegant with hints of cedar and vanilla that linger on the finish. Pairs with rosemary lamb with Swiss chard and sizzling New York strip steak.

TASTING NOTES

black cherry, blackberry, and cassis

title: Avalon Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Avalon Cabernet Sauvignon

Named for the beloved Isle of Avalon from Arthurian legend, the Avalon Cabernet Sauvignon lives up to its majestic namesake. It offers aromas of plum, cheery, blueberry, and boysenberry. This Napa Valley red wine has lush flavors that showcase layers of blackberries and red cherries with supporting notes of toasted oak and vanilla. Pair the Avalon Cabernet Sauvignon with buttery pasta with cream sauce, Margherita pizza, or grilled vegetable dishes.

Delicious and a terrific all around wine! The nose shows cherry pie, rhubarb, boysenberry jam, and a hint of rosemary. French oak adds a touch of vanilla and nutmeg with a lovely finish of juicy blue and black fruit.

title: Smith & Hook Cabernet Sauvignon
body_html:
Smith & Hook Cabernet Sauvignon

A hearty banquet of dark fruit, boysenberry, cherry, and spice are the zesty blend which characterizes the bold flavor of Smith & Hook Cabernet Sauvignon. The richness is tempered by hints of cacao and creamy vanilla blended with a smooth, tannin finish. A perfect companion to offset this brand of Cabernet Sauvignon would be mushroom stroganoff or braised short ribs.

title: Dom Pérignon Brut Champagne
body_html:
Dom Pérignon Brut Champagne

When you are looking for the best possible champagne to celebrate a special occasion or just to toast with the person you love, then you need Dom Perignon Brut. This delectable champagne bubbles beautifully with effervescent flavors of violets and delicate white peaches. Pair this champagne with strawberries or other fruits, or drink it alone to savor the flavors.

title: Candoni Prosecco Brut
body_html:
Candoni Prosecco Brut

The Candoni Prosecco Brut offers hints of fruit with just the right amount of honey and a delicate balance of flavor. It has a sweetness and acidity that play off each other and give you the perfect blend to tantalize your tastebuds. This wine pairs well with just about any dish, so enjoy it with pork, chicken, turkey or beef.

title: Louis Roederer Brut
body_html:
Louis Roederer Brut

A native of the Champagne region, Louis Roederer Brut is a wine that has enjoyed a gradual maturation process from an oak barrel. The brewing process consists of three types of grapes that are handpicked for its characteristic fruity appeal, bringing a balance of old and young, sophistication and pep. This harmonious, mellow blend goes best with lobster.

title: Menage a Trois Prosecco
body_html:
Folie a Deux Ménage à Trois Prosecco

If you need a quality Italian sparkling wine to dance on your palate, then Menage a Trois Prosecco is your solution! Its floral fragrance and lively green apple citrus blend bring the wine a frothy, bubbly finish that shines throughout the evening. Menage a Trois Prosecco ends with a fresh, pure finish which can be nursed with a homemade pizza that includes any toppings of your choice.

title: Schramsberg Blanc de Noirs
body_html:
Schramsberg Blanc de Noirs

Indulge in the vintage, Californian Schramsberg Blanc de Noirs with its crisp and exotic citrus flavors. A beautiful, deep gold color, the white wine enters with a bright and cheerful disposition and leaves your palate refined and longing. It pairs perfectly with shellfish, pasta with white sauce and mild cheeses.

title: Korbel Natural Champenoise
body_html:
Korbel Cellars Natural Methode Champenoise

Korbel Cellars Natural Methode Champenoise is a crisp, delectably dry wine made with a blend of Pinot Noir and Chardonnay grapes grown in the Russian River Valley. This mix provides a bright and vibrant taste with touches of baked apple, cherry, and a touch of lemongrass. The balanced acidity and crispness make this an excellent aperitif or an addition to lighter fish dishes.

title: Korbel Brut Rose California Champagne
body_html:
Korbel Cellars California Champagne Brut Rose

This award-winning wine is light and medium dry. You get a sense of cinnamon roll and citrus with other wonderful flavors like orange, lime and vanilla with just a taste of strawberry. Make sure to pair with chicken, seafood or Asian meals for the best experience, or pair with with fruit and mild cheeses.

title: Domaine Ste. Michelle Michelle Brut
body_html:
Domaine Ste. Michelle 'Michelle' Brut

The Domaine Ste. Michelle 'Michelle' Brut features plenty of acid in the form of apples and citrus and pairs well with a variety of foods including spicy fries, calamari, salty snacks or even artichoke and cheese dips. It features just the right blend of Chardonnay, Pinot Noir and Pinot Gris for a full flavor.

TASTING NOTES

Delicate aromas of green apple, bright citrus notes with a persistent bubble and balanced acidity. Domaine Ste. Michelle Brut is the perfect accompaniment for a wide array of foods.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Extra Dry Champagne
body_html:
Barefoot Bubbly Extra Dry Champagne

Barefoot Bubbly Extra Dry Champagne is a crisp and smooth sparkling white with the semisweet flavors of peach pie, green apples, brioche, vanilla, and spice. It has sweet kiwi notes and a clean, short finish and pairs perfectly with either fresh fruit and sweet desserts or savory ham.

title: Barefoot Bubbly Prosecco D.O.C
body_html: Barefoot Bubbly Prosecco is a crisp and inviting Italian sparkling wine. Its vibrant pear, apple and peach flavors dance through delicate bubbles, ending with a zesty lemon finish. Use it in your Sunday brunch Mimosa, Bellini or sherbert float. It goes smashingly with fresh fruit plates, spices and sun.

title: Wilson Creek Sparkling Sangria
body_html:
Wilson Creek Winery & Vineyards Sparkling Sangria

Southern California's finest Sangria... chilled and sparkling, fresh for your summer fiestas! Whether you're grilling chicken or steak or serving a salad bar buffet, Wilson Creek's Sparkling Sangria is the perfect companion for light summer dining. Add fresh fruit to it for a unique zest and your guests will be more than content.

TASTING NOTES

Semi-sweet or off-dry, Natural Tank fermentation

title: Wilson Creek Peach Bellini
body_html:
Wilson Creek Peach Bellini

Peach Bellini is synonymous with Sunday morning brunch. Wilson Creek vintners have combined their almond sparkling wine with natural peach flavors to create their version of the renowned Italian Bellini. Crisp and not overly sweet, it's perfect for pairing with smoked salmon, blinis, fruit and cheese platters, or for that special occasion, caviar. Enjoy WIlson Creek Peach Bellini year round, from fireside to poolside.

TASTING NOTES

Crisp, clean, and not overly sweet.

title: Korbel Sweet Cuvée California Champagne
body_html:
Korbel Cellars California Champagne Sweet Cuvee

Enjoy the bright tropical fruit flavors of Korbel Cellars California Champagne Sweet Cuvee. This bright medium sweet champagne is a perfect balance of acidity and sweetness. Floral notes mix playfully with citrus notes making this a perfect complement to fruit desserts and spicy dishes alike.

Think coconut curry or Thai food. Both are equally delicious when paired with this champagne.

title: Onehope Sparkling Brut
body_html:
Onehope Sparkling Brut

Enjoy fruity, fizzy tastes every time you drink a glass of Onehope Sparkling Brut. This wine combines the tastes of apple with the earthen feel of baked bread, all wrapped up in a nice package. Pair this brut with appetizers, meal-size salads and seafood dishes. Its fine fragrance goes well with many different foods.

title: Korbel Cellars Blanc de Noirs California Champagne
body_html:
Korbel Cellars Blanc de Noirs California Champagne

Raw and dramatic, the Korbel Cellars Blanc de Noirs California Champagne is remarkable and delicious. Raspberry and strawberry flavors make this the perfect summer beverage. Celebrate every milestone with a dinner of smoked chicken and lavish chocolate desserts, accompanied by a bubbling glass of Korbel champagne.

title: Jaume Serra Cristalino Brut Cava
body_html:
Jaume Serra Cristalino Brut Cava

Jaume Serra Cristalino Brut Cava is the best for special occasions! With its sparkling flavor of green apples and a perky citrus effervescence, this straw-colored concoction has an aftertaste that is slightly dry in nature. Its medium-bodied texture can be enjoyed alone or with friends and family. White peaches, ginger, and orange add to the spirit's fruity zest. The wine is best when paired with caviar or your favorite sushi dish.

title: Jaume Serra Cristalino Extra Dry Cava
body_html:
Jaume Serra Cristalino Extra Dry Cava

Jaume Serra Cristalino Brut Cava is a fine sparkling Spanish wine is made using the traditional method where the secondary fermentation produces a sparkling wine's bubbles inside the bottle. It has a fresh and toasty nose and a beautiful citrus, green apple, and mineral flavors. This wine also has a lively mouth-feel and a firm, dry, and clean finish that makes it the perfect for any type of celebration. There are also some foods that you can cook and serve with this wine.

When you give this wine to your guests, you can serve it with sushi, caviar, seafood, fried food, and Asian food. Also, since this wine has a gentle acidity and has a low sugar content, there are not many food items that do not pair well with it. For this reason, desserts with a lot of sugar in them do not go well with Cava. Due to its low alcohol content, it goes well with spicy food since the heat of the food is not intensified by the heat of the alcohol. The low acidity content offsets the fattiness of sauteed and fried foods.

If a Cava has a higher amount of sugar, their fruitier palates go well with poultry and pork entrees as well as light desserts. They also pair well with sweet and sour dishes due to the fact that the wine and the dishes equally compliment each other. If a Cava is very dry, it typically has a sweeter palate and can be served with appetizers and Asian foods. These foods are great ideas of what you can cook and serve with this Caba to make anything that is served with it even more super.

title: Risata Pink Moscato
body_html:
Risata Pink Moscato

Bursting with the sweet and tantalizing flavors of cherry, raspberry and strawberries, the Risata Pink Moscato is sure to be a well-balanced delight for any wine fan. Though this palatable wine does just fine on its own, it also pairs well with desserts like peach cobbler, or ones containing apples.

title: Risata Red Moscato
body_html:
Risata Red Moscato

Inhale the delicate floral bouquet when you open up a tempting botle of Risata Il Rosso. Let the fresh fruity flavors of ripe red strawberries and sweet cherries burst into your mouth when you take your first sip of the exquisitely sweet red wine. Excellent for a summer barbecue of grilled pork tenderloin and a salad bursting with fresh tomatoes and cucumbers. It is also an excellent base for making a fruity sangria.

title: Risata Prosecco 187ml
body_html:
Risata Prosecco 187ml

Lightly straw colored and bubbly on the tongue, Risata Prosecco is the perfect addition to any summer soiree. The vanilla and floral bouquet mix with a burst of citrus and finish off with honey to provide just the right amount of sweetness in this sparkling wine. Serve as an aperitif or with hors d'eouvers.

title: Wilson Creek Almond California Champagne
body_html:
Top Selling Almond Champagne

Wilson Creek Vineyards Almond California Champagne

Wilson Creek Almond Champagne is a gold-medal winning sparkling wine from southern California’s Temecula Valley wine country. Fermented with an unexpected hint of almond that is sweet without being cloying. See More Options

Tantalizing after dinner treat

Wilson Creek Almond Champagne makes a tantalizing after dinner treat that marries well with desserts, soft cheeses and fresh fruits.

This Wilson Creek Almond gold-medal winning champagne is also referred to as the "OH MY GOSH" champagne.

Naturally fermented, with just a hint of pure almond

This white sparkling wine is naturally fermented, with just a hint of pure almond added so it's guaranteed to dazzle your guests. A must-have champagne to make any occasion extra special. Great with desserts, cuddling, hot tubs, picnics, fireplaces, brunches, and parties. Very popular at all the weddings here.

View Wilson Creek Reviews and Awards Here.

title: Freixenet Cordon Negro Extra Dry Cava
body_html:
Freixenet Cordon Negro Extra Dry Cava

Not overly imposing, Freixenet Cordon Negro Extra Dry Cava is a superb choice for any day of the week. Crisp and "not too dry," Freixenet is light and refreshing on the palate with peach, melon and citrus essences. The hint of sweetness and creamy texture allows you to pair it with slightly spicier foods.

title: Freixenet Cordon Negro Brut Cava
body_html:
Freixenet Cordon Negro Brut Cava

Nicknamed "Black Bottle Bubbly," Freixenet Cordon Brut Cava is one of the top imported sparkling wines in the world. This dry, crisp and well-balanced sparkling wine offers a fresh mix of ripe pear, apple and citrus flavors with a touch of ginger. As a versatile cava, it can be served with almost anything and mixes well with juice for a sparkling cocktail.

Freixenet’s most popular cava, Cordon Negro Brut is often referred to as the “Black Bottle Bubbly.” As the #1 imported sparkling wine in the world, crisp and creamy Cordon Negro Brut’s delicate bubbles make this the ideal wine for any occasion. Get ready to sparkle!

title: Korbel Extra Dry California Champagne
body_html:
Korbel Cellars California Champagne Extra Dry

Korbel Cellars California Champagne Extra Dry is an exotic blend of citrus notes and heady spices and vanilla. This dry champagne is both fresh and light, a true treat for the palate. Enjoy salads with fruit based dressings and spicy foods that have ingredients like cilantro, ginger, and chilies to complement the light refreshing flavors of this champagne.

A is a full-bodied cabernet sauvignon that boast rich fruity flavors of cherry, blackcurrant, and plum and deep spicy notes of licorice and nutmeg, complemented by well-balanced acidity. This rich full sauvignon pairs well with equally full and savory foods. Enjoy this spirit with rich tomato based pasta dishes and beef rib roast.

title: Korbel Sweet Rose California Champagne
body_html:
Korbel Cellars California Champagne Sweet Rose

Korbel Cellars California Champagne Sweet Rose delights the palate with both red and white grape varieties. The senses are delighted with bright fruit flavors like raspberry and sweet rich vanilla. This sweet refreshing champagne is best served with fresh fruit and ripe cheeses. It also complements dishes like grilled prawn and mango salsa.

title: Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Blanc de Blancs
body_html:
Francis Ford Coppola Sofia Blanc de Blancs

A fine mix of Pinot Blanc, Riesling and Muscat, the playful, yet serious '12 Francis Coppola Sofia Blanc de Blancs is a sheer delight on the palate; fragrant and slightly sweet.

Francis Ford Coppola's tribute to his only daughter. Sofia wines are delicious, refreshing, and fun.

title: Risata Moscato d'Asti DOCG
body_html:
Risata Moscato d'Asti DOCG

Risata Moscato d'Asti DOCG is a subtly sparkling wine with effervescent hints of peach and citrus among a quietly floral bouquet. This is a moderately sweet wine that pairs well with salty seafood such as crab or provides balance to hot Thai cuisine. Serve it with warm peach cobbler for dessert.
